search_text: Interaction of a priori Anatomic Knowledge with Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning in Cardiac Magnetic Resonance Imaging 先验解剖知识与心脏磁共振成像中自我监督对比学习的相互作用 Training deep learning models on cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) can be a challenge due to the small amount of expert generated labels and inherent complexity of data source. Self-supervised contrastive learning (SSCL) has recently been shown to boost performance in several medical imaging tasks. However, it is unclear how much the pre-trained representation reflects the primary organ of interest compared to spurious surrounding tissue. In this work, we evaluate the optimal method of incorporating prior knowledge of anatomy into a SSCL training paradigm. Specifically, we evaluate using a segmentation network to explicitly local the heart in CMR images, followed by SSCL pretraining in multiple diagnostic tasks. We find that using a priori knowledge of anatomy can greatly improve the downstream diagnostic performance. Furthermore, SSCL pre-training with in-domain data generally improved downstream performance and more human-like saliency compared to end-to-end training and ImageNet pre-trained networks. However, introducing anatomic knowledge to pre-training generally does not have significant impact. 由于专家生成的标签数量较少以及数据源固有的复杂性，在心脏磁共振成像 (CMR) 上训练深度学习模型可能是一项挑战。最近证明，自监督对比学习（SSCL）可以提高多种医学成像任务的性能。然而，目前尚不清楚与虚假的周围组织相比，预训练的表示在多大程度上反映了感兴趣的主要器官。在这项工作中，我们评估了将解剖学先验知识纳入 SSCL 训练范例的最佳方法。具体来说，我们评估使用分割网络在 CMR 图像中明确定位心脏，然后在多个诊断任务中进行 SSCL 预训练。我们发现使用先验的解剖学知识可以极大地提高下游诊断性能。此外，与端到端训练和 ImageNet 预训练网络相比，使用域内数据进行 SSCL 预训练通常可以提高下游性能，并且更加具有人类的显着性。然而，在预训练中引入解剖知识一般不会产生显着的影响。 研究如何将先验解剖知识与自监督对比学习结合以提升心脏磁共振成像的诊断性能。 Makiya Nakashima,Inyeop Jang,Ramesh Basnet,Mitchel Benovoy,W. H. Wilson Tang,Christopher Nguyen,Deborah Kwon,Tae Hyun Hwang,David Chen eess.IV,cs.CV

title: VulBERTa: Simplified Source Code Pre-Training for Vulnerability Detection
title_zh: VulBERTa：用于漏洞检测的简化源代码预训练
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at IJCNN 2022
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at IJCNN 2022
abstract: This paper presents VulBERTa, a deep learning approach to detect security vulnerabilities in source code. Our approach pre-trains a RoBERTa model with a custom tokenisation pipeline on real-world code from open-source C/C++ projects. The model learns a deep knowledge representation of the code syntax and semantics, which we leverage to train vulnerability detection classifiers. We evaluate our approach on binary and multi-class vulnerability detection tasks across several datasets (Vuldeepecker, Draper, REVEAL and muVuldeepecker) and benchmarks (CodeXGLUE and D2A). The evaluation results show that VulBERTa achieves state-of-the-art performance and outperforms existing approaches across different datasets, despite its conceptual simplicity, and limited cost in terms of size of training data and number of model parameters.
summary: This paper presents VulBERTa, a deep learning approach to detect security vulnerabilities in source code. Our approach pre-trains a RoBERTa model with a custom tokenisation pipeline on real-world code from open-source C/C++ projects. The model learns a deep knowledge representation of the code syntax and semantics, which we leverage to train vulnerability detection classifiers. We evaluate our approach on binary and multi-class vulnerability detection tasks across several datasets (Vuldeepecker, Draper, REVEAL and muVuldeepecker) and benchmarks (CodeXGLUE and D2A). The evaluation results show that VulBERTa achieves state-of-the-art performance and outperforms existing approaches across different datasets, despite its conceptual simplicity, and limited cost in terms of size of training data and number of model parameters.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 VulBERTa，一种用于检测源代码中安全漏洞的深度学习方法。我们的方法使用来自开源 C/C++ 项目的真实代码的自定义标记化管道来预训练 RoBERTa 模型。该模型学习代码语法和语义的深度知识表示，我们利用它来训练漏洞检测分类器。我们在多个数据集（Vuldeepecker、Draper、REVEAL 和 muVuldeepecker）和基准测试（CodeXGLUE 和 D2A）上评估我们的二进制和多类漏洞检测任务方法。评估结果表明，VulBERTa 在不同数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且优于现有方法，尽管其概念简单，并且在训练数据大小和模型参数数量方面成本有限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VulBERTa，一种基于预训练RoBERTa模型的深度学习方法，用于检测源代码中的安全漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有漏洞检测方法复杂且资源消耗大，需更高效且性能优越的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用自定义分词管道对开源C/C++项目代码进行RoBERTa模型预训练，学习代码语法语义表示，并训练漏洞检测分类器。
AI.result: 在多个数据集（如Vuldeepecker、CodeXGLUE等）上达到最先进水平，优于现有方法，且训练数据和参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: VulBERTa通过简化设计和高效训练，在漏洞检测任务中实现了高精度与低成本的平衡。

title: Deletion and Insertion Tests in Regression Models
title_zh: 回归模型中的删除和插入测试
abstract: A basic task in explainable AI (XAI) is to identify the most important features behind a prediction made by a black box function $f$. The insertion and deletion tests of Petsiuk et al. (2018) can be used to judge the quality of algorithms that rank pixels from most to least important for a classification. Motivated by regression problems we establish a formula for their area under the curve (AUC) criteria in terms of certain main effects and interactions in an anchored decomposition of $f$. We find an expression for the expected value of the AUC under a random ordering of inputs to $f$ and propose an alternative area above a straight line for the regression setting. We use this criterion to compare feature importances computed by integrated gradients (IG) to those computed by Kernel SHAP (KS) as well as LIME, DeepLIFT, vanilla gradient and input$\times$gradient methods. KS has the best overall performance in two datasets we consider but it is very expensive to compute. We find that IG is nearly as good as KS while being much faster. Our comparison problems include some binary inputs that pose a challenge to IG because it must use values between the possible variable levels and so we consider ways to handle binary variables in IG. We show that sorting variables by their Shapley value does not necessarily give the optimal ordering for an insertion-deletion test. It will however do that for monotone functions of additive models, such as logistic regression.
summary: A basic task in explainable AI (XAI) is to identify the most important features behind a prediction made by a black box function $f$. The insertion and deletion tests of Petsiuk et al. (2018) can be used to judge the quality of algorithms that rank pixels from most to least important for a classification. Motivated by regression problems we establish a formula for their area under the curve (AUC) criteria in terms of certain main effects and interactions in an anchored decomposition of $f$. We find an expression for the expected value of the AUC under a random ordering of inputs to $f$ and propose an alternative area above a straight line for the regression setting. We use this criterion to compare feature importances computed by integrated gradients (IG) to those computed by Kernel SHAP (KS) as well as LIME, DeepLIFT, vanilla gradient and input$\times$gradient methods. KS has the best overall performance in two datasets we consider but it is very expensive to compute. We find that IG is nearly as good as KS while being much faster. Our comparison problems include some binary inputs that pose a challenge to IG because it must use values between the possible variable levels and so we consider ways to handle binary variables in IG. We show that sorting variables by their Shapley value does not necessarily give the optimal ordering for an insertion-deletion test. It will however do that for monotone functions of additive models, such as logistic regression.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的一项基本任务是识别黑盒函数 $f$ 做出的预测背后最重要的特征。 Petsiuk 等人的插入和删除测试。 (2018) 可用于判断对分类从最重要到最不重要的像素进行排序的算法的质量。受回归问题的启发，我们根据 $f$ 锚定分解中的某些主效应和相互作用，建立了曲线下面积 (AUC) 标准的公式。我们找到了在 $f$ 输入随机排序下 AUC 预期值的表达式，并提出了回归设置直线上方的替代区域。我们使用此标准来比较由积分梯度 (IG) 计算的特征重要性与由 Kernel SHAP (KS) 以及 LIME、DeepLIFT、vanilla 梯度和 input$\times$gradient 方法计算的特征重要性。 KS 在我们考虑的两个数据集中具有最佳的整体性能，但计算成本非常昂贵。我们发现 IG 几乎与 KS 一样好，但速度更快。我们的比较问题包括一些对 IG 构成挑战的二进制输入，因为它必须使用可能的变量级别之间的值，因此我们考虑在 IG 中处理二进制变量的方法。我们表明，按 Shapley 值对变量进行排序并不一定能为插入删除测试提供最佳排序。然而，对于加性模型的单调函数（例如逻辑回归），它会这样做。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了回归模型中删除和插入测试的改进方法，以评估特征重要性排序算法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有插入删除测试主要针对分类任务，而回归问题缺乏有效的评估标准，需建立适用于回归的AUC计算公式并比较不同特征重要性算法的表现。
AI.method: 通过锚定分解建立回归模型的AUC公式，提出基于直线的面积准则，并对比集成梯度、Kernel SHAP等六种方法在二分类和回归任务中的性能。
AI.result: Kernel SHAP在两个数据集上表现最佳但计算成本高，集成梯度在速度和效果上接近KS；Shapley值排序对单调函数有效但非最优通用排序方法。
AI.conclusion: 回归任务中需采用改进的AUC评估标准，集成梯度是KS的高效替代方案，但需注意二元变量处理及Shapley值排序的局限性。

title: Non-Programmers Can Label Programs Indirectly via Active Examples: A Case Study with Text-to-SQL
title_zh: 非程序员可以通过活动示例间接标记程序：文本到 SQL 的案例研究
abstract: Can non-programmers annotate natural language utterances with complex programs that represent their meaning? We introduce APEL, a framework in which non-programmers select among candidate programs generated by a seed semantic parser (e.g., Codex). Since they cannot understand the candidate programs, we ask them to select indirectly by examining the programs' input-ouput examples. For each utterance, APEL actively searches for a simple input on which the candidate programs tend to produce different outputs. It then asks the non-programmers only to choose the appropriate output, thus allowing us to infer which program is correct and could be used to fine-tune the parser. As a first case study, we recruited human non-programmers to use APEL to re-annotate SPIDER, a text-to-SQL dataset. Our approach achieved the same annotation accuracy as the original expert annotators (75%) and exposed many subtle errors in the original annotations.
summary: Can non-programmers annotate natural language utterances with complex programs that represent their meaning? We introduce APEL, a framework in which non-programmers select among candidate programs generated by a seed semantic parser (e.g., Codex). Since they cannot understand the candidate programs, we ask them to select indirectly by examining the programs' input-ouput examples. For each utterance, APEL actively searches for a simple input on which the candidate programs tend to produce different outputs. It then asks the non-programmers only to choose the appropriate output, thus allowing us to infer which program is correct and could be used to fine-tune the parser. As a first case study, we recruited human non-programmers to use APEL to re-annotate SPIDER, a text-to-SQL dataset. Our approach achieved the same annotation accuracy as the original expert annotators (75%) and exposed many subtle errors in the original annotations.
abstract_zh: 非程序员能否用代表其含义的复杂程序来注释自然语言话语？我们引入 APEL，这是一个框架，非程序员可以在种子语义解析器（例如 Codex）生成的候选程序中进行选择。由于他们无法理解候选程序，我们要求他们通过检查程序的输入输出示例来间接选择。对于每个话语，APEL 主动搜索一个简单的输入，候选程序往往会在该输入上产生不同的输出。然后，它只要求非程序员选择适当的输出，从而使我们能够推断哪个程序是正确的，并且可以用于微调解析器。作为第一个案例研究，我们招募了非程序员来使用 APEL 重新注释 SPIDER（一个文本转 SQL 数据集）。我们的方法实现了与原始专家注释者相同的注释准确性 (75%)，并暴露了原始注释中的许多细微错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为APEL的框架，使非程序员能够通过分析程序的输入输出示例间接标注复杂程序，以文本到SQL任务为例进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 传统程序标注依赖专家知识，而程序员资源有限且成本高，需探索让非程序员参与标注的有效方法。
AI.method: 通过种子语义解析器生成候选程序，主动寻找能区分候选程序输出的简单输入，要求非程序员仅选择正确输出以推断正确程序。
AI.result: 在SPIDER数据集上，非程序员标注准确率与原专家标注相当（75%），并发现原始标注中诸多细微错误。
AI.conclusion: APEL框架证明非程序员可通过间接方式有效标注程序，为降低标注成本提供了可行方案。

title: Substring Complexities on Run-length Compressed Strings
title_zh: 运行长度压缩字符串的子字符串复杂性
abstract: Let $S_{T}(k)$ denote the set of distinct substrings of length $k$ in a string $T$, then the $k$-th substring complexity is defined by its cardinality $|S_{T}(k)|$. Recently, $δ= \max \{ |S_{T}(k)| / k : k \ge 1 \}$ is shown to be a good compressibility measure of highly-repetitive strings. In this paper, given $T$ of length $n$ in the run-length compressed form of size $r$, we show that $δ$ can be computed in $\mathit{C}_{\mathsf{sort}}(r, n)$ time and $O(r)$ space, where $\mathit{C}_{\mathsf{sort}}(r, n) = O(\min (r \lg\lg r, r \lg_{r} n))$ is the time complexity for sorting $r$ $O(\lg n)$-bit integers in $O(r)$ space in the Word-RAM model with word size $Ω(\lg n)$.
summary: Let $S_{T}(k)$ denote the set of distinct substrings of length $k$ in a string $T$, then the $k$-th substring complexity is defined by its cardinality $|S_{T}(k)|$. Recently, $δ= \max \{ |S_{T}(k)| / k : k \ge 1 \}$ is shown to be a good compressibility measure of highly-repetitive strings. In this paper, given $T$ of length $n$ in the run-length compressed form of size $r$, we show that $δ$ can be computed in $\mathit{C}_{\mathsf{sort}}(r, n)$ time and $O(r)$ space, where $\mathit{C}_{\mathsf{sort}}(r, n) = O(\min (r \lg\lg r, r \lg_{r} n))$ is the time complexity for sorting $r$ $O(\lg n)$-bit integers in $O(r)$ space in the Word-RAM model with word size $Ω(\lg n)$.
abstract_zh: 令$S_{T}(k)$表示字符串$T$中长度为$k$的不同子串的集合，则第$k$个子串的复杂度由其基数$|S_{T}(k)|$定义。最近，$δ= \max \{ |S_{T}(k)| / k : k \ge 1 \}$ 被证明是高度重复字符串的良好压缩性度量。在本文中，给定长度为$n$的长度为$r$的游程压缩形式的$T$，我们证明$δ$可以在$\mathit{C}_{\mathsf{sort}}(r, n)$时间和$O(r)$空间中计算，其中$\mathit{C}_{\mathsf{sort}}(r, n) = O(\min (r \lg\lg r, r \lg_{r} n))$ 是在字大小为 $Ω(\lg n)$ 的 Word-RAM 模型中对 $O(r)$ 空间中的 $r$ $O(\lg n)$ 位整数进行排序的时间复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在运行长度压缩字符串上高效计算子串复杂度指标δ。
AI.motivation: 高度重复字符串的压缩性评估需要有效计算子串复杂度指标δ，传统方法在压缩数据上效率不足。
AI.method: 基于运行长度压缩形式，结合排序算法设计，在Word-RAM模型下实现δ的高效计算。
AI.result: 提出在O(r)空间内以C_sort(r,n)时间复杂度计算δ，其中C_sort(r,n)为排序r个O(lgn)-位整数的最优时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高度重复字符串提供了高效的压缩性评估方案，平衡了时间与空间复杂度。

authors_text: Jiawei Huang,Li Zhao,Tao Qin,Wei Chen,Nan Jiang,Tie-Yan Liu
title: Tiered Reinforcement Learning: Pessimism in the Face of Uncertainty and Constant Regret
title_zh: 分层强化学习：面对不确定性和持续遗憾的悲观主义
abstract: We propose a new learning framework that captures the tiered structure of many real-world user-interaction applications, where the users can be divided into two groups based on their different tolerance on exploration risks and should be treated separately. In this setting, we simultaneously maintain two policies $π^{\text{O}}$ and $π^{\text{E}}$: $π^{\text{O}}$ ("O" for "online") interacts with more risk-tolerant users from the first tier and minimizes regret by balancing exploration and exploitation as usual, while $π^{\text{E}}$ ("E" for "exploit") exclusively focuses on exploitation for risk-averse users from the second tier utilizing the data collected so far. An important question is whether such a separation yields advantages over the standard online setting (i.e., $π^{\text{E}}=π^{\text{O}}$) for the risk-averse users. We individually consider the gap-independent vs.~gap-dependent settings. For the former, we prove that the separation is indeed not beneficial from a minimax perspective. For the latter, we show that if choosing Pessimistic Value Iteration as the exploitation algorithm to produce $π^{\text{E}}$, we can achieve a constant regret for risk-averse users independent of the number of episodes $K$, which is in sharp contrast to the $Ω(\log K)$ regret for any online RL algorithms in the same setting, while the regret of $π^{\text{O}}$ (almost) maintains its online regret optimality and does not need to compromise for the success of $π^{\text{E}}$.
summary: We propose a new learning framework that captures the tiered structure of many real-world user-interaction applications, where the users can be divided into two groups based on their different tolerance on exploration risks and should be treated separately. In this setting, we simultaneously maintain two policies $π^{\text{O}}$ and $π^{\text{E}}$: $π^{\text{O}}$ ("O" for "online") interacts with more risk-tolerant users from the first tier and minimizes regret by balancing exploration and exploitation as usual, while $π^{\text{E}}$ ("E" for "exploit") exclusively focuses on exploitation for risk-averse users from the second tier utilizing the data collected so far. An important question is whether such a separation yields advantages over the standard online setting (i.e., $π^{\text{E}}=π^{\text{O}}$) for the risk-averse users. We individually consider the gap-independent vs.~gap-dependent settings. For the former, we prove that the separation is indeed not beneficial from a minimax perspective. For the latter, we show that if choosing Pessimistic Value Iteration as the exploitation algorithm to produce $π^{\text{E}}$, we can achieve a constant regret for risk-averse users independent of the number of episodes $K$, which is in sharp contrast to the $Ω(\log K)$ regret for any online RL algorithms in the same setting, while the regret of $π^{\text{O}}$ (almost) maintains its online regret optimality and does not need to compromise for the success of $π^{\text{E}}$.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的学习框架，该框架捕获了许多现实世界用户交互应用程序的分层结构，其中用户可以根据对探索风险的不同容忍度分为两组，并应分别对待。在此设置中，我们同时维护两个策略$π^{\text{O}}$和$π^{\text{E}}$：$π^{\text{O}}$（“O”代表“在线”）与第一层中风险承受能力更强的用户进行交互，并通过照常平衡探索和利用来最大程度地减少遗憾，而$π^{\text{E}}$（“E”代表“利用”）专门关注第二层中规避风险的用户的利用利用迄今为止收集到的数据。一个重要的问题是，对于规避风险的用户来说，这种分离是否比标准在线设置（即 $π^{\text{E}}=π^{\text{O}}$）更具优势。我们单独考虑间隙独立与间隙相关的设置。对于前者，我们证明从极小极大的角度来看，分离确实没有好处。对于后者，我们表明，如果选择悲观值迭代作为产生 $π^{\text{E}}$ 的开发算法，我们可以为厌恶风险的用户实现恒定的后悔，而与情节 $K$ 的数量无关，这与相同设置下任何在线 RL 算法的 $Ω(\log K)$ 后悔形成鲜明对比，而 $π^{\text{O}}$ 的后悔（几乎）保持其在线后悔最优性，不需要妥协$π^{\text{E}}$ 的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层强化学习框架，针对不同风险容忍度的用户群体设计两种策略，分别平衡探索与利用以及专注于利用，以降低风险规避用户的遗憾。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的用户交互应用中，用户风险容忍度差异显著，需针对性设计策略。传统在线强化学习无法有效区分处理不同风险偏好的用户群体。
AI.method: 维护两个策略π^O（在线策略）和π^E（利用策略）。π^O为风险容忍用户平衡探索与利用，π^E为风险规避用户纯利用已有数据，采用悲观值迭代算法生成策略。
AI.result: 在gap-independent场景下分层策略无优势；在gap-dependent场景下，π^E通过悲观值迭代可实现与回合数无关的常数遗憾，优于传统在线RL的Ω(log K)遗憾，且π^O的遗憾保持最优。
AI.conclusion: 分层强化学习框架在gap-dependent场景下能有效降低风险规避用户遗憾，且不影响在线策略性能，为差异化用户需求提供新解决方案。

search_text: Tiered Reinforcement Learning: Pessimism in the Face of Uncertainty and Constant Regret 分层强化学习：面对不确定性和持续遗憾的悲观主义 We propose a new learning framework that captures the tiered structure of many real-world user-interaction applications, where the users can be divided into two groups based on their different tolerance on exploration risks and should be treated separately. In this setting, we simultaneously maintain two policies $π^{\text{O}}$ and $π^{\text{E}}$: $π^{\text{O}}$ ("O" for "online") interacts with more risk-tolerant users from the first tier and minimizes regret by balancing exploration and exploitation as usual, while $π^{\text{E}}$ ("E" for "exploit") exclusively focuses on exploitation for risk-averse users from the second tier utilizing the data collected so far. An important question is whether such a separation yields advantages over the standard online setting (i.e., $π^{\text{E}}=π^{\text{O}}$) for the risk-averse users. We individually consider the gap-independent vs.~gap-dependent settings. For the former, we prove that the separation is indeed not beneficial from a minimax perspective. For the latter, we show that if choosing Pessimistic Value Iteration as the exploitation algorithm to produce $π^{\text{E}}$, we can achieve a constant regret for risk-averse users independent of the number of episodes $K$, which is in sharp contrast to the $Ω(\log K)$ regret for any online RL algorithms in the same setting, while the regret of $π^{\text{O}}$ (almost) maintains its online regret optimality and does not need to compromise for the success of $π^{\text{E}}$. 我们提出了一种新的学习框架，该框架捕获了许多现实世界用户交互应用程序的分层结构，其中用户可以根据对探索风险的不同容忍度分为两组，并应分别对待。在此设置中，我们同时维护两个策略$π^{\text{O}}$和$π^{\text{E}}$：$π^{\text{O}}$（“O”代表“在线”）与第一层中风险承受能力更强的用户进行交互，并通过照常平衡探索和利用来最大程度地减少遗憾，而$π^{\text{E}}$（“E”代表“利用”）专门关注第二层中规避风险的用户的利用利用迄今为止收集到的数据。一个重要的问题是，对于规避风险的用户来说，这种分离是否比标准在线设置（即 $π^{\text{E}}=π^{\text{O}}$）更具优势。我们单独考虑间隙独立与间隙相关的设置。对于前者，我们证明从极小极大的角度来看，分离确实没有好处。对于后者，我们表明，如果选择悲观值迭代作为产生 $π^{\text{E}}$ 的开发算法，我们可以为厌恶风险的用户实现恒定的后悔，而与情节 $K$ 的数量无关，这与相同设置下任何在线 RL 算法的 $Ω(\log K)$ 后悔形成鲜明对比，而 $π^{\text{O}}$ 的后悔（几乎）保持其在线后悔最优性，不需要妥协$π^{\text{E}}$ 的成功。 本文提出了一种分层强化学习框架，针对不同风险容忍度的用户群体设计两种策略，分别平衡探索与利用以及专注于利用，以降低风险规避用户的遗憾。 Jiawei Huang,Li Zhao,Tao Qin,Wei Chen,Nan Jiang,Tie-Yan Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Yaqing Wang,Sahaj Agarwal,Subhabrata Mukherjee,Xiaodong Liu,Jing Gao,Ahmed Hassan Awadallah,Jianfeng Gao
title: AdaMix: Mixture-of-Adaptations for Parameter-efficient Model Tuning
title_zh: AdaMix：参数高效模型调整的混合适应
abstract: Standard fine-tuning of large pre-trained language models (PLMs) for downstream tasks requires updating hundreds of millions to billions of parameters, and storing a large copy of the PLM weights for every task resulting in increased cost for storing, sharing and serving the models. To address this, parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques were introduced where small trainable components are injected in the PLM and updated during fine-tuning. We propose AdaMix as a general PEFT method that tunes a mixture of adaptation modules -- given the underlying PEFT method of choice -- introduced in each Transformer layer while keeping most of the PLM weights frozen. For instance, AdaMix can leverage a mixture of adapters like Houlsby or a mixture of low rank decomposition matrices like LoRA to improve downstream task performance over the corresponding PEFT methods for fully supervised and few-shot NLU and NLG tasks. Further, we design AdaMix such that it matches the same computational cost and the number of tunable parameters as the underlying PEFT method. By only tuning 0.1-0.2% of PLM parameters, we show that AdaMix outperforms SOTA parameter-efficient fine-tuning and full model fine-tuning for both NLU and NLG tasks.
summary: Standard fine-tuning of large pre-trained language models (PLMs) for downstream tasks requires updating hundreds of millions to billions of parameters, and storing a large copy of the PLM weights for every task resulting in increased cost for storing, sharing and serving the models. To address this, parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques were introduced where small trainable components are injected in the PLM and updated during fine-tuning. We propose AdaMix as a general PEFT method that tunes a mixture of adaptation modules -- given the underlying PEFT method of choice -- introduced in each Transformer layer while keeping most of the PLM weights frozen. For instance, AdaMix can leverage a mixture of adapters like Houlsby or a mixture of low rank decomposition matrices like LoRA to improve downstream task performance over the corresponding PEFT methods for fully supervised and few-shot NLU and NLG tasks. Further, we design AdaMix such that it matches the same computational cost and the number of tunable parameters as the underlying PEFT method. By only tuning 0.1-0.2% of PLM parameters, we show that AdaMix outperforms SOTA parameter-efficient fine-tuning and full model fine-tuning for both NLU and NLG tasks.
abstract_zh: 针对下游任务的大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的标准微调需要更新数亿至数十亿个参数，并为每个任务存储 PLM 权重的大量副本，从而导致存储、共享和服务模型的成本增加。为了解决这个问题，引入了参数高效微调 (PEFT) 技术，其中小型可训练组件被注入到 PLM 中并在微调期间进行更新。我们建议将 AdaMix 作为一种通用的 PEFT 方法，在每个 Transformer 层中引入自适应模块的混合物（考虑到选择的底层 PEFT 方法），同时保持大部分 PLM 权重冻结。例如，AdaMix 可以利用 Houlsby 等适配器的混合或 LoRA 等低秩分解矩阵的混合来提高下游任务性能，以实现完全监督和少量 NLU 和 NLG 任务的相应 PEFT 方法。此外，我们设计 AdaMix，使其与底层 PEFT 方法具有相同的计算成本和可调参数数量。通过仅调整 0.1-0.2% 的 PLM 参数，我们表明 AdaMix 对于 NLU 和 NLG 任务的性能优于 SOTA 参数高效微调和完整模型微调。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaMix方法，通过混合不同适配模块在预训练语言模型的每个Transformer层中进行参数高效微调，无需更新大部分模型权重。
AI.motivation: 传统微调需要更新大量参数导致存储和计算成本高昂，现有参数高效微调方法存在性能局限，需探索更高效的混合适配策略。
AI.method: 在保持PLM权重冻结的前提下，于每层Transformer中注入混合适配模块（如Houlsby适配器或LoRA矩阵），通过组合不同PEFT方法实现参数高效优化。
AI.result: 仅需调整0.1-0.2%参数，AdaMix在NLU和NLG任务上超越现有参数高效微调及全模型微调方法，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: AdaMix通过混合适配模块设计，在保持计算成本不变的情况下显著提升模型性能，为参数高效微调提供通用有效解决方案。

authors_text: Alexander Pondaven,Märt Bakler,Donghu Guo,Hamzah Hashim,Martin Ignatov,Harrison Zhu
title: Convolutional Neural Processes for Inpainting Satellite Images
title_zh: 用于修复卫星图像的卷积神经过程
abstract: The widespread availability of satellite images has allowed researchers to model complex systems such as disease dynamics. However, many satellite images have missing values due to measurement defects, which render them unusable without data imputation. For example, the scanline corrector for the LANDSAT 7 satellite broke down in 2003, resulting in a loss of around 20\% of its data. Inpainting involves predicting what is missing based on the known pixels and is an old problem in image processing, classically based on PDEs or interpolation methods, but recent deep learning approaches have shown promise. However, many of these methods do not explicitly take into account the inherent spatiotemporal structure of satellite images. In this work, we cast satellite image inpainting as a natural meta-learning problem, and propose using convolutional neural processes (ConvNPs) where we frame each satellite image as its own task or 2D regression problem. We show ConvNPs can outperform classical methods and state-of-the-art deep learning inpainting models on a scanline inpainting problem for LANDSAT 7 satellite images, assessed on a variety of in and out-of-distribution images.
summary: The widespread availability of satellite images has allowed researchers to model complex systems such as disease dynamics. However, many satellite images have missing values due to measurement defects, which render them unusable without data imputation. For example, the scanline corrector for the LANDSAT 7 satellite broke down in 2003, resulting in a loss of around 20\% of its data. Inpainting involves predicting what is missing based on the known pixels and is an old problem in image processing, classically based on PDEs or interpolation methods, but recent deep learning approaches have shown promise. However, many of these methods do not explicitly take into account the inherent spatiotemporal structure of satellite images. In this work, we cast satellite image inpainting as a natural meta-learning problem, and propose using convolutional neural processes (ConvNPs) where we frame each satellite image as its own task or 2D regression problem. We show ConvNPs can outperform classical methods and state-of-the-art deep learning inpainting models on a scanline inpainting problem for LANDSAT 7 satellite images, assessed on a variety of in and out-of-distribution images.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像的广泛使用使研究人员能够对疾病动力学等复杂系统进行建模。然而，许多卫星图像由于测量缺陷而存在缺失值，这使得它们在没有数据插补的情况下无法使用。例如，LANDSAT 7 卫星的扫描线校正器在 2003 年发生故障，导致其数据丢失约 20%。修复涉及根据已知像素预测缺失的内容，是图像处理中的一个老问题，通常基于偏微分方程或插值方法，但最近的深度学习方法已经显示出前景。然而，许多这些方法没有明确考虑卫星图像固有的时空结构。在这项工作中，我们将卫星图像修复视为一个自然的元学习问题，并建议使用卷积神经过程（ConvNP），其中我们将每个卫星图像作为其自己的任务或二维回归问题。我们证明，在 LANDSAT 7 卫星图像的扫描线修复问题上，ConvNP 可以超越经典方法和最先进的深度学习修复模型，并根据各种分布内和分布外图像进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经过程（ConvNPs）解决卫星图像修复问题，通过建模缺失像素的时空结构提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像常因设备故障或环境因素出现缺失值，传统修复方法（如PDE、插值）和现有深度学习模型未能有效捕捉卫星图像的时空特性，导致修复效果有限。
AI.method: 将卫星图像修复转化为元学习问题，以每个图像为独立任务，采用ConvNPs框架进行2D回归，结合卷积神经网络与概率建模处理缺失数据。
AI.result: 在Landsat 7扫描线修复任务中，ConvNPs在分布内和分布外测试集上均优于经典方法及当前最先进的深度学习修复模型。
AI.conclusion: ConvNPs通过显式建模时空结构，为卫星图像修复提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

motivation: 卫星图像常因设备故障或环境因素出现缺失值，传统修复方法（如PDE、插值）和现有深度学习模型未能有效捕捉卫星图像的时空特性，导致修复效果有限。
method: 将卫星图像修复转化为元学习问题，以每个图像为独立任务，采用ConvNPs框架进行2D回归，结合卷积神经网络与概率建模处理缺失数据。
result: 在Landsat 7扫描线修复任务中，ConvNPs在分布内和分布外测试集上均优于经典方法及当前最先进的深度学习修复模型。
conclusion: ConvNPs通过显式建模时空结构，为卫星图像修复提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Convolutional Neural Processes for Inpainting Satellite Images 用于修复卫星图像的卷积神经过程 The widespread availability of satellite images has allowed researchers to model complex systems such as disease dynamics. However, many satellite images have missing values due to measurement defects, which render them unusable without data imputation. For example, the scanline corrector for the LANDSAT 7 satellite broke down in 2003, resulting in a loss of around 20\% of its data. Inpainting involves predicting what is missing based on the known pixels and is an old problem in image processing, classically based on PDEs or interpolation methods, but recent deep learning approaches have shown promise. However, many of these methods do not explicitly take into account the inherent spatiotemporal structure of satellite images. In this work, we cast satellite image inpainting as a natural meta-learning problem, and propose using convolutional neural processes (ConvNPs) where we frame each satellite image as its own task or 2D regression problem. We show ConvNPs can outperform classical methods and state-of-the-art deep learning inpainting models on a scanline inpainting problem for LANDSAT 7 satellite images, assessed on a variety of in and out-of-distribution images. 卫星图像的广泛使用使研究人员能够对疾病动力学等复杂系统进行建模。然而，许多卫星图像由于测量缺陷而存在缺失值，这使得它们在没有数据插补的情况下无法使用。例如，LANDSAT 7 卫星的扫描线校正器在 2003 年发生故障，导致其数据丢失约 20%。修复涉及根据已知像素预测缺失的内容，是图像处理中的一个老问题，通常基于偏微分方程或插值方法，但最近的深度学习方法已经显示出前景。然而，许多这些方法没有明确考虑卫星图像固有的时空结构。在这项工作中，我们将卫星图像修复视为一个自然的元学习问题，并建议使用卷积神经过程（ConvNP），其中我们将每个卫星图像作为其自己的任务或二维回归问题。我们证明，在 LANDSAT 7 卫星图像的扫描线修复问题上，ConvNP 可以超越经典方法和最先进的深度学习修复模型，并根据各种分布内和分布外图像进行评估。 本文提出使用卷积神经过程（ConvNPs）解决卫星图像修复问题，通过建模缺失像素的时空结构提升修复效果。 Alexander Pondaven,Märt Bakler,Donghu Guo,Hamzah Hashim,Martin Ignatov,Harrison Zhu cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Multi-Head Online Learning for Delayed Feedback Modeling
title_zh: 延迟反馈建模的多头在线学习
abstract: In online advertising, it is highly important to predict the probability and the value of a conversion (e.g., a purchase). It not only impacts user experience by showing relevant ads, but also affects ROI of advertisers and revenue of marketplaces. Unlike clicks, which often occur within minutes after impressions, conversions are expected to happen over a long period of time (e.g., 30 days for online shopping). It creates a challenge, as the true labels are only available after the long delays. Either inaccurate labels (partial conversions) are used, or models are trained on stale data (e.g., from 30 days ago). The problem is more eminent in online learning, which focuses on the live performance on the latest data. In this paper, a novel solution is presented to address this challenge using multi-head modeling. Unlike traditional methods, it directly quantizes conversions into multiple windows, such as day 1, day 2, day 3-7, and day 8-30. A sub-model is trained specifically on conversions within each window. Label freshness is maximally preserved in early models (e.g., day 1 and day 2), while late conversions are accurately utilized in models with longer delays (e.g., day 8-30). It is shown to greatly exceed the performance of known methods in online learning experiments for both conversion rate (CVR) and value per click (VPC) predictions. Lastly, as a general method for delayed feedback modeling, it can be combined with any advanced ML techniques to further improve the performance.
summary: In online advertising, it is highly important to predict the probability and the value of a conversion (e.g., a purchase). It not only impacts user experience by showing relevant ads, but also affects ROI of advertisers and revenue of marketplaces. Unlike clicks, which often occur within minutes after impressions, conversions are expected to happen over a long period of time (e.g., 30 days for online shopping). The problem is more eminent in online learning, which focuses on the live performance on the latest data. In this paper, a novel solution is presented to address this challenge using multi-head modeling. Unlike traditional methods, it directly quantizes conversions into multiple windows, such as day 1, day 2, day 3-7, and day 8-30. A sub-model is trained specifically on conversions within each window. Label freshness is maximally preserved in early models (e.g., day 1 and day 2), while late conversions are accurately utilized in models with longer delays (e.g., day 8-30). It is shown to greatly exceed the performance of known methods in online learning experiments for both conversion rate (CVR) and value per click (VPC) predictions. Lastly, as a general method for delayed feedback modeling, it can be combined with any advanced ML techniques to further improve the performance.
abstract_zh: 在在线广告中，预测转化（例如购买）的概率和价值非常重要。它不仅通过展示相关广告来影响用户体验，而且还影响广告商的投资回报率和市场收入。与点击通常在展示后几分钟内发生不同，转化预计会在很长一段时间内发生（例如，在线购物需要 30 天）。这带来了挑战，因为真正的标签只有在长时间延迟后才能获得。要么使用不准确的标签（部分转换），要么使用过时的数据（例如 30 天前的数据）训练模型。这个问题在在线学习中更为突出，因为在线学习侧重于最新数据的实时表现。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的解决方案，使用多头建模来应对这一挑战。与传统方法不同，它直接将转化量化为多个窗口，例如第1天、第2天、第3-7天和第8-30天。子模型专门针对每个窗口内的转换进行训练。在早期模型（例如第 1 天和第 2 天）中最大限度地保留了标签新鲜度，而在延迟较长的模型（例如第 8-30 天）中准确地利用了后期转换。在在线学习实验中，它在转化率 (CVR) 和每次点击价值 (VPC) 预测方面都大大超过了已知方法的性能。最后，作为延迟反馈建模的通用方法，它可以与任何先进的机器学习技术相结合，以进一步提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多头在线学习方法，用于解决在线广告中因转化反馈延迟导致的模型训练问题。
AI.motivation: 在线广告中转化反馈存在长时间延迟（如30天），传统方法因使用不完整标签或过时数据导致模型性能下降，影响广告效果预测。
AI.method: 将转化事件按时间窗口（如第1天、第2天、第3-7天、第8-30天）分段，为每个窗口训练独立子模型，兼顾标签新鲜度与长期转化利用。
AI.result: 在转化率（CVR）和每次点击价值（VPC）预测任务中显著优于现有方法，且可与先进机器学习技术结合进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为延迟反馈建模提供通用框架，通过分段建模有效平衡数据时效性与预测准确性，具有广泛适用性。

title: Jointly Optimizing Color Rendition and In-Camera Backgrounds in an RGB Virtual Production Stage
title_zh: 在 RGB 虚拟制作阶段联合优化色彩还原和机内背景
abstract: While the LED panels used in virtual production systems can display vibrant imagery with a wide color gamut, they produce problematic color shifts when used as lighting due to their peaky spectral output from narrow-band red, green, and blue LEDs. In this work, we present an improved color calibration process for virtual production stages which ameliorates this color rendition problem while also passing through accurate in-camera background colors. We do this by optimizing linear color correction transformations for 1) the LED panel pixels visible in the field of view of the camera, 2) the pixels outside the field of view of the camera illuminating the subjects, and, as a post-process, 3) the pixel values recorded by the camera. The result is that footage shot in an RGB LED panel virtual production stage can exhibit more accurate skin tones and costume colors while still reproducing the desired colors of the in-camera background.
summary: While the LED panels used in virtual production systems can display vibrant imagery with a wide color gamut, they produce problematic color shifts when used as lighting due to their peaky spectral output from narrow-band red, green, and blue LEDs. In this work, we present an improved color calibration process for virtual production stages which ameliorates this color rendition problem while also passing through accurate in-camera background colors. We do this by optimizing linear color correction transformations for 1) the LED panel pixels visible in the field of view of the camera, 2) the pixels outside the field of view of the camera illuminating the subjects, and, as a post-process, 3) the pixel values recorded by the camera. The result is that footage shot in an RGB LED panel virtual production stage can exhibit more accurate skin tones and costume colors while still reproducing the desired colors of the in-camera background.
abstract_zh: 虽然虚拟制作系统中使用的 LED 面板可以显示具有宽色域的鲜艳图像，但由于窄带红色、绿色和蓝色 LED 的峰值光谱输出，它们在用作照明时会产生有问题的色移。在这项工作中，我们为虚拟生产阶段提出了一种改进的颜色校准过程，该过程改善了这种色彩再现问题，同时还传递了准确的相机内背景颜色。我们通过优化线性色彩校正转换来实现这一点：1) 相机视场中可见的 LED 面板像素，2) 相机视场外照亮拍摄对象的像素，以及作为后处理的 3) 相机记录的像素值。结果是，在 RGB LED 面板虚拟制作阶段拍摄的素材可以展现更准确的肤色和服装颜色，同时仍然再现所需的机内背景颜色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的校准方法，优化RGB LED面板虚拟制作舞台中的色彩再现和机内背景颜色。
AI.motivation: LED面板在虚拟制作中因窄带LED的光谱峰值导致颜色偏移，影响色彩准确性，需同时解决色彩再现与背景颜色保持的问题。
AI.method: 通过优化三阶段的线性颜色校正变换：1）摄像机视野内LED像素，2）视野外照明像素，3）摄像机记录像素值，以校准颜色。
AI.result: 拍摄素材中的肤色和服装颜色更准确，同时保持机内背景颜色的正确再现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解LED面板色偏问题，同时保持背景颜色，提升虚拟制作的色彩准确性与视觉效果。

authors_text: Christopher E. Denniston,Yun Chang,Andrzej Reinke,Kamak Ebadi,Gaurav S. Sukhatme,Luca Carlone,Benjamin Morrell,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi
title: Loop Closure Prioritization for Efficient and Scalable Multi-Robot SLAM
title_zh: 用于高效且可扩展的多机器人 SLAM 的循环闭合优先级
abstract: Multi-robot SLAM systems in GPS-denied environments require loop closures to maintain a drift-free centralized map. With an increasing number of robots and size of the environment, checking and computing the transformation for all the loop closure candidates becomes computationally infeasible. In this work, we describe a loop closure module that is able to prioritize which loop closures to compute based on the underlying pose graph, the proximity to known beacons, and the characteristics of the point clouds. We validate this system in the context of the DARPA Subterranean Challenge and on numerous challenging underground datasets and demonstrate the ability of this system to generate and maintain a map with low error. We find that our proposed techniques are able to select effective loop closures which results in 51% mean reduction in median error when compared to an odometric solution and 75% mean reduction in median error when compared to a baseline version of this system with no prioritization. We also find our proposed system is able to find a lower error in the mission time of one hour when compared to a system that processes every possible loop closure in four and a half hours. The code and dataset for this work can be found https://github.com/NeBula-Autonomy/LAMP
summary: Multi-robot SLAM systems in GPS-denied environments require loop closures to maintain a drift-free centralized map. With an increasing number of robots and size of the environment, checking and computing the transformation for all the loop closure candidates becomes computationally infeasible. In this work, we describe a loop closure module that is able to prioritize which loop closures to compute based on the underlying pose graph, the proximity to known beacons, and the characteristics of the point clouds. We validate this system in the context of the DARPA Subterranean Challenge and on numerous challenging underground datasets and demonstrate the ability of this system to generate and maintain a map with low error. We find that our proposed techniques are able to select effective loop closures which results in 51% mean reduction in median error when compared to an odometric solution and 75% mean reduction in median error when compared to a baseline version of this system with no prioritization. We also find our proposed system is able to find a lower error in the mission time of one hour when compared to a system that processes every possible loop closure in four and a half hours. The code and dataset for this work can be found https://github.com/NeBula-Autonomy/LAMP
abstract_zh: GPS 拒绝环境中的多机器人 SLAM 系统需要闭环来维护无漂移的集中式地图。随着机器人数量和环境规模的增加，检查和计算所有闭环候选的变换在计算上变得不可行。在这项工作中，我们描述了一个循环闭合模块，该模块能够根据底层位姿图、与已知信标的接近度以及点云的特征来优先计算要计算的循环闭合。我们在 DARPA 地下挑战赛和众多具有挑战性的地下数据集上验证了该系统，并展示了该系统生成和维护低误差地图的能力。我们发现，我们提出的技术能够选择有效的闭环，与里程解决方案相比，中值误差平均减少 51%，与没有优先级的该系统的基线版本相比，中值误差平均减少 75%。我们还发现，与在四个半小时内处理每个可能的循环闭合的系统相比，我们提出的系统能够在一小时的任务时间内发现更低的错误。这项工作的代码和数据集可以在 https://github.com/NeBula-Autonomy/LAMP 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多机器人SLAM系统的闭环优先级算法，以在GPS拒止环境中高效构建无漂移的集中式地图。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人数量和环境规模增加，传统方法计算所有闭环候选的计算量不可行，且易导致地图误差累积。
AI.method: 基于位姿图结构、已知信标邻近度及点云特征，设计闭环优先级模块动态筛选关键闭环。
AI.result: 相比里程计方案中位错误降低51%，相比无优先级基线方案降低75%，单小时任务时间误差较全闭环处理方案降低80%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过智能闭环筛选显著提升多机器人SLAM的精度与效率，适用于大规模地下等复杂场景。

title: Reward Uncertainty for Exploration in Preference-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习探索的奖励不确定性
comment: ICLR 2022. Last two authors advised equally
comments: ICLR 2022. Last two authors advised equally
abstract: Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents often requires meticulous reward engineering. Preference-based RL methods are able to learn a more flexible reward model based on human preferences by actively incorporating human feedback, i.e. teacher's preferences between two clips of behaviors. However, poor feedback-efficiency still remains a problem in current preference-based RL algorithms, as tailored human feedback is very expensive. To handle this issue, previous methods have mainly focused on improving query selection and policy initialization. At the same time, recent exploration methods have proven to be a recipe for improving sample-efficiency in RL. We present an exploration method specifically for preference-based RL algorithms. Our main idea is to design an intrinsic reward by measuring the novelty based on learned reward. Specifically, we utilize disagreement across ensemble of learned reward models. Our intuition is that disagreement in learned reward model reflects uncertainty in tailored human feedback and could be useful for exploration. Our experiments show that exploration bonus from uncertainty in learned reward improves both feedback- and sample-efficiency of preference-based RL algorithms on complex robot manipulation tasks from MetaWorld benchmarks, compared with other existing exploration methods that measure the novelty of state visitation.
summary: Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents often requires meticulous reward engineering. Preference-based RL methods are able to learn a more flexible reward model based on human preferences by actively incorporating human feedback, i.e. teacher's preferences between two clips of behaviors. However, poor feedback-efficiency still remains a problem in current preference-based RL algorithms, as tailored human feedback is very expensive. To handle this issue, previous methods have mainly focused on improving query selection and policy initialization. At the same time, recent exploration methods have proven to be a recipe for improving sample-efficiency in RL. We present an exploration method specifically for preference-based RL algorithms. Our main idea is to design an intrinsic reward by measuring the novelty based on learned reward. Specifically, we utilize disagreement across ensemble of learned reward models. Our intuition is that disagreement in learned reward model reflects uncertainty in tailored human feedback and could be useful for exploration. Our experiments show that exploration bonus from uncertainty in learned reward improves both feedback- and sample-efficiency of preference-based RL algorithms on complex robot manipulation tasks from MetaWorld benchmarks, compared with other existing exploration methods that measure the novelty of state visitation.
abstract_zh: 向强化学习（RL）代理传达复杂的目标通常需要细致的奖励工程。基于偏好的强化学习方法能够通过主动结合人类反馈（即教师在两个行为片段之间的偏好）来学习基于人类偏好的更灵活的奖励模型。然而，反馈效率低下仍然是当前基于偏好的强化学习算法中的一个问题，因为定制的人类反馈非常昂贵。为了解决这个问题，以前的方法主要集中在改进查询选择和策略初始化。与此同时，最近的探索方法已被证明是提高强化学习样本效率的良方。我们提出了一种专门针对基于偏好的 RL 算法的探索方法。我们的主要想法是通过基于学习奖励来衡量新颖性来设计内在奖励。具体来说，我们利用学习奖励模型集合中的分歧。我们的直觉是，学习奖励模型中的分歧反映了定制的人类反馈的不确定性，并且可能对探索有用。我们的实验表明，与其他衡量状态访问新颖性的现有探索方法相比，学习奖励的不确定性带来的探索奖励提高了基于偏好的 RL 算法在 MetaWorld 基准的复杂机器人操作任务上的反馈和样本效率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于奖励不确定性的探索方法，以提高基于偏好的强化学习算法在复杂机器人操作任务中的反馈和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于偏好的RL算法存在反馈效率低下问题，而利用探索方法能提高样本效率，因此提出基于奖励不确定性的探索方法以提升效率。
AI.method: 通过学习奖励模型集合的分歧来设计内在奖励，利用模型间的不确定性作为探索奖励，引导智能体探索不确定区域。
AI.result: 在MetaWorld基准的复杂机器人任务中，该方法相比其他探索方法显著提升了反馈和样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于奖励不确定性的探索方法能有效提升基于偏好的RL算法效率，为复杂任务提供新思路。

title: Emergent Communication through Metropolis-Hastings Naming Game with Deep Generative Models
title_zh: 通过采用深度生成模型的 Metropolis-Hastings 命名游戏进行紧急通信
abstract: Constructive studies on symbol emergence systems seek to investigate computational models that can better explain human language evolution, the creation of symbol systems, and the construction of internal representations. This study provides a new model for emergent communication, which is based on a probabilistic generative model (PGM) instead of a discriminative model based on deep reinforcement learning. We define the Metropolis-Hastings (MH) naming game by generalizing previously proposed models. It is not a referential game with explicit feedback, as assumed by many emergent communication studies. Instead, it is a game based on joint attention without explicit feedback. Mathematically, the MH naming game is proved to be a type of MH algorithm for an integrative PGM that combines two agents that play the naming game. From this viewpoint, symbol emergence is regarded as decentralized Bayesian inference, and semiotic communication is regarded as inter-personal cross-modal inference. This notion leads to the collective predictive coding hypothesis} regarding language evolution and, in general, the emergence of symbols. We also propose the inter-Gaussian mixture model (GMM)+ variational autoencoder (VAE), a deep generative model for emergent communication based on the MH naming game. The model has been validated on MNIST and Fruits 360 datasets. Experimental findings demonstrate that categories are formed from real images observed by agents, and signs are correctly shared across agents by successfully utilizing both of the observations of agents via the MH naming game. Furthermore, scholars verified that visual images were recalled from signs uttered by agents. Notably, emergent communication without supervision and reward feedback improved the performance of the unsupervised representation learning of agents.
summary: Constructive studies on symbol emergence systems seek to investigate computational models that can better explain human language evolution, the creation of symbol systems, and the construction of internal representations. This study provides a new model for emergent communication, which is based on a probabilistic generative model (PGM) instead of a discriminative model based on deep reinforcement learning. We define the Metropolis-Hastings (MH) naming game by generalizing previously proposed models. It is not a referential game with explicit feedback, as assumed by many emergent communication studies. Instead, it is a game based on joint attention without explicit feedback. Mathematically, the MH naming game is proved to be a type of MH algorithm for an integrative PGM that combines two agents that play the naming game. From this viewpoint, symbol emergence is regarded as decentralized Bayesian inference, and semiotic communication is regarded as inter-personal cross-modal inference. This notion leads to the collective predictive coding hypothesis} regarding language evolution and, in general, the emergence of symbols. We also propose the inter-Gaussian mixture model (GMM)+ variational autoencoder (VAE), a deep generative model for emergent communication based on the MH naming game. The model has been validated on MNIST and Fruits 360 datasets. Experimental findings demonstrate that categories are formed from real images observed by agents, and signs are correctly shared across agents by successfully utilizing both of the observations of agents via the MH naming game. Furthermore, scholars verified that visual images were recalled from signs uttered by agents. Notably, emergent communication without supervision and reward feedback improved the performance of the unsupervised representation learning of agents.
abstract_zh: 关于符号出现系统的建设性研究旨在研究能够更好地解释人类语言进化、符号系统的创建以及内部表示的构建的计算模型。这项研究为紧急交流提供了一种新的模型，该模型基于概率生成模型（PGM），而不是基于深度强化学习的判别模型。我们通过概括先前提出的模型来定义 Metropolis-Hastings (MH) 命名游戏。正如许多新兴传播研究所假设的那样，它不是一个具有明确反馈的参考游戏。相反，它是一种基于共同注意力的游戏，没有明确的反馈。从数学上讲，MH 命名游戏被证明是一种 MH 算法，用于结合两个玩命名游戏的智能体的集成 PGM。从这个角度来看，符号出现被视为分散的贝叶斯推理，符号传播被视为人际跨模态推理。这个概念导致了关于语言进化和符号出现的集体预测编码假说。我们还提出了间高斯混合模型（GMM）+变分自动编码器（VAE），这是一种基于 MH 命名游戏的紧急通信深度生成模型。该模型已在 MNIST 和 Fruits 360 数据集上得到验证。实验结果表明，类别是根据智能体观察到的真实图像形成的，并且通过 MH 命名游戏成功利用智能体的观察结果，可以在智能体之间正确共享符号。此外，学者们还证实，视觉图像是从特工说出的信号中回忆出来的。值得注意的是，没有监督和奖励反馈的紧急通信提高了代理无监督表示学习的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率生成模型和Metropolis-Hastings算法的新型涌现通信模型，用于探索符号系统创建和内部表示构建机制。
AI.motivation: 传统基于深度强化学习的判别模型难以有效解释人类语言演变和符号系统形成机制，需探索无监督、无反馈的符号涌现新范式。
AI.method: 定义基于联合注意的Metropolis-Hastings命名游戏，结合概率生成模型与GMM+VAE深度生成网络，通过跨模态推理实现符号共享。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Fruits 360数据集验证中，模型成功形成图像类别并实现跨智能体符号共享，无监督表示学习性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为符号涌现提供了分布式贝叶斯推理新视角，验证了集体预测编码假设，证明无监督奖励反馈机制的有效性。

search_text: Emergent Communication through Metropolis-Hastings Naming Game with Deep Generative Models 通过采用深度生成模型的 Metropolis-Hastings 命名游戏进行紧急通信 Constructive studies on symbol emergence systems seek to investigate computational models that can better explain human language evolution, the creation of symbol systems, and the construction of internal representations. This study provides a new model for emergent communication, which is based on a probabilistic generative model (PGM) instead of a discriminative model based on deep reinforcement learning. We define the Metropolis-Hastings (MH) naming game by generalizing previously proposed models. It is not a referential game with explicit feedback, as assumed by many emergent communication studies. Instead, it is a game based on joint attention without explicit feedback. Mathematically, the MH naming game is proved to be a type of MH algorithm for an integrative PGM that combines two agents that play the naming game. From this viewpoint, symbol emergence is regarded as decentralized Bayesian inference, and semiotic communication is regarded as inter-personal cross-modal inference. This notion leads to the collective predictive coding hypothesis} regarding language evolution and, in general, the emergence of symbols. We also propose the inter-Gaussian mixture model (GMM)+ variational autoencoder (VAE), a deep generative model for emergent communication based on the MH naming game. The model has been validated on MNIST and Fruits 360 datasets. Experimental findings demonstrate that categories are formed from real images observed by agents, and signs are correctly shared across agents by successfully utilizing both of the observations of agents via the MH naming game. Furthermore, scholars verified that visual images were recalled from signs uttered by agents. Notably, emergent communication without supervision and reward feedback improved the performance of the unsupervised representation learning of agents. 关于符号出现系统的建设性研究旨在研究能够更好地解释人类语言进化、符号系统的创建以及内部表示的构建的计算模型。这项研究为紧急交流提供了一种新的模型，该模型基于概率生成模型（PGM），而不是基于深度强化学习的判别模型。我们通过概括先前提出的模型来定义 Metropolis-Hastings (MH) 命名游戏。正如许多新兴传播研究所假设的那样，它不是一个具有明确反馈的参考游戏。相反，它是一种基于共同注意力的游戏，没有明确的反馈。从数学上讲，MH 命名游戏被证明是一种 MH 算法，用于结合两个玩命名游戏的智能体的集成 PGM。从这个角度来看，符号出现被视为分散的贝叶斯推理，符号传播被视为人际跨模态推理。这个概念导致了关于语言进化和符号出现的集体预测编码假说。我们还提出了间高斯混合模型（GMM）+变分自动编码器（VAE），这是一种基于 MH 命名游戏的紧急通信深度生成模型。该模型已在 MNIST 和 Fruits 360 数据集上得到验证。实验结果表明，类别是根据智能体观察到的真实图像形成的，并且通过 MH 命名游戏成功利用智能体的观察结果，可以在智能体之间正确共享符号。此外，学者们还证实，视觉图像是从特工说出的信号中回忆出来的。值得注意的是，没有监督和奖励反馈的紧急通信提高了代理无监督表示学习的性能。 本文提出一种基于概率生成模型和Metropolis-Hastings算法的新型涌现通信模型，用于探索符号系统创建和内部表示构建机制。 Tadahiro Taniguchi,Yuto Yoshida,Akira Taniguchi,Yoshinobu Hagiwara cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Toward Understanding Bias Correlations for Mitigation in NLP
title_zh: 理解 NLP 中缓解偏差的相关性
abstract: Natural Language Processing (NLP) models have been found discriminative against groups of different social identities such as gender and race. With the negative consequences of these undesired biases, researchers have responded with unprecedented effort and proposed promising approaches for bias mitigation. In spite of considerable practical importance, current algorithmic fairness literature lacks an in-depth understanding of the relations between different forms of biases. Social bias is complex by nature. Numerous studies in social psychology identify the "generalized prejudice", i.e., generalized devaluing sentiments across different groups. For example, people who devalue ethnic minorities are also likely to devalue women and gays. Therefore, this work aims to provide a first systematic study toward understanding bias correlations in mitigation. In particular, we examine bias mitigation in two common NLP tasks -- toxicity detection and word embeddings -- on three social identities, i.e., race, gender, and religion. Our findings suggest that biases are correlated and present scenarios in which independent debiasing approaches dominant in current literature may be insufficient. We further investigate whether jointly mitigating correlated biases is more desired than independent and individual debiasing. Lastly, we shed light on the inherent issue of debiasing-accuracy trade-off in bias mitigation. This study serves to motivate future research on joint bias mitigation that accounts for correlated biases.
summary: Natural Language Processing (NLP) models have been found discriminative against groups of different social identities such as gender and race. With the negative consequences of these undesired biases, researchers have responded with unprecedented effort and proposed promising approaches for bias mitigation. In spite of considerable practical importance, current algorithmic fairness literature lacks an in-depth understanding of the relations between different forms of biases. Social bias is complex by nature. Numerous studies in social psychology identify the "generalized prejudice", i.e., generalized devaluing sentiments across different groups. For example, people who devalue ethnic minorities are also likely to devalue women and gays. Therefore, this work aims to provide a first systematic study toward understanding bias correlations in mitigation. In particular, we examine bias mitigation in two common NLP tasks -- toxicity detection and word embeddings -- on three social identities, i.e., race, gender, and religion. Our findings suggest that biases are correlated and present scenarios in which independent debiasing approaches dominant in current literature may be insufficient. We further investigate whether jointly mitigating correlated biases is more desired than independent and individual debiasing. Lastly, we shed light on the inherent issue of debiasing-accuracy trade-off in bias mitigation. This study serves to motivate future research on joint bias mitigation that accounts for correlated biases.
abstract_zh: 人们发现自然语言处理（NLP）模型存在对性别和种族等不同社会身份群体的歧视。针对这些不良偏见的负面后果，研究人员做出了前所未有的努力，并提出了有希望的缓解偏见的方法。尽管具有相当大的实际重要性，但当前的算法公平文献缺乏对不同形式偏见之间关系的深入理解。社会偏见本质上是复杂的。社会心理学的许多研究都发现了“普遍偏见”，即不同群体之间普遍存在的贬低情绪。例如，贬低少数民族的人也可能贬低女性和同性恋者。因此，这项工作旨在提供第一个系统研究，以了解缓解中的偏差相关性。特别是，我们研究了两种常见 NLP 任务（毒性检测和词嵌入）中针对三种社会身份（即种族、性别和宗教）的偏见缓解。我们的研究结果表明，偏差是相关的，并且当前文献中占主导地位的独立去偏差方法可能还不够。我们进一步研究联合减轻相关偏差是否比独立和个体去偏差更可取。最后，我们阐明了偏差缓解中去偏差精度权衡的固有问题。这项研究有助于推动未来关于解决相关偏差的联合偏差缓解的研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究自然语言处理（NLP）中不同形式偏见的相关性，并探讨联合去偏方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前算法公平性研究缺乏对多种偏见之间关联的深入理解，而社会心理学表明偏见具有交叉性，需系统分析其相关性以改进去偏策略。
AI.method: 在毒性检测和词嵌入任务中，针对种族、性别和宗教三类社会身份，分析偏见相关性，并比较独立去偏与联合去偏的效果及准确率权衡。
AI.result: 发现偏见存在显著相关性，独立去偏方法可能不足；联合去偏更优，但需权衡去偏效果与模型准确性。
AI.conclusion: 未来应关注联合处理相关偏见的去偏方法，以更全面解决NLP中的歧视问题。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文研究自然语言处理（NLP）中不同形式偏见的相关性，并探讨联合去偏方法的有效性。

title: Toxicity Detection with Generative Prompt-based Inference
title_zh: 使用基于生成提示的推理进行毒性检测
abstract: Due to the subtleness, implicity, and different possible interpretations perceived by different people, detecting undesirable content from text is a nuanced difficulty. It is a long-known risk that language models (LMs), once trained on corpus containing undesirable content, have the power to manifest biases and toxicity. However, recent studies imply that, as a remedy, LMs are also capable of identifying toxic content without additional fine-tuning. Prompt-methods have been shown to effectively harvest this surprising self-diagnosing capability. However, existing prompt-based methods usually specify an instruction to a language model in a discriminative way. In this work, we explore the generative variant of zero-shot prompt-based toxicity detection with comprehensive trials on prompt engineering. We evaluate on three datasets with toxicity labels annotated on social media posts. Our analysis highlights the strengths of our generative classification approach both quantitatively and qualitatively. Interesting aspects of self-diagnosis and its ethical implications are discussed.
summary: Due to the subtleness, implicity, and different possible interpretations perceived by different people, detecting undesirable content from text is a nuanced difficulty. It is a long-known risk that language models (LMs), once trained on corpus containing undesirable content, have the power to manifest biases and toxicity. However, recent studies imply that, as a remedy, LMs are also capable of identifying toxic content without additional fine-tuning. Prompt-methods have been shown to effectively harvest this surprising self-diagnosing capability. However, existing prompt-based methods usually specify an instruction to a language model in a discriminative way. In this work, we explore the generative variant of zero-shot prompt-based toxicity detection with comprehensive trials on prompt engineering. We evaluate on three datasets with toxicity labels annotated on social media posts. Our analysis highlights the strengths of our generative classification approach both quantitatively and qualitatively. Interesting aspects of self-diagnosis and its ethical implications are discussed.
abstract_zh: 由于微妙性、隐含性以及不同人可能感知到的不同可能解释，从文本中检测不良内容是一个微妙的困难。众所周知的风险是，语言模型（LM）一旦在包含不良内容的语料库上进行训练，就有可能表现出偏见和毒性。然而，最近的研究表明，作为一种补救措施，LM 也能够识别有毒成分，而无需额外的微调。事实证明，快速方法可以有效地获得这种令人惊讶的自我诊断能力。然而，现有的基于提示的方法通常以区分的方式指定对语言模型的指令。在这项工作中，我们通过对提示工程的全面试验探索了基于零次提示的毒性检测的生成变体。我们对三个数据集进行评估，并在社交媒体帖子上标注了毒性标签。我们的分析强调了我们的生成分类方法在定量和定性方面的优势。讨论了自我诊断的有趣方面及其伦理影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成式提示的零样本毒性检测方法，无需额外微调即可利用语言模型的自我诊断能力检测社交媒体中的有害内容。
AI.motivation: 现有毒性检测方法依赖标注数据或微调，而语言模型本身可能已具备识别有害内容的能力，但传统判别式提示方法未能充分挖掘这一潜力。
AI.method: 设计生成式提示模板，通过全面的提示工程试验引导语言模型以生成式方式输出毒性判断，而非传统分类任务的判别式指令。
AI.result: 在三个社交媒体数据集上验证了生成式方法的优越性，定量指标和定性分析均显示其优于传统方法，并探讨了自我诊断的伦理影响。
AI.conclusion: 生成式提示方法能有效激发语言模型的自我诊断能力，为毒性检测提供新思路，同时引发对AI伦理和偏见的进一步思考。

search_text: Toxicity Detection with Generative Prompt-based Inference 使用基于生成提示的推理进行毒性检测 Due to the subtleness, implicity, and different possible interpretations perceived by different people, detecting undesirable content from text is a nuanced difficulty. It is a long-known risk that language models (LMs), once trained on corpus containing undesirable content, have the power to manifest biases and toxicity. However, recent studies imply that, as a remedy, LMs are also capable of identifying toxic content without additional fine-tuning. Prompt-methods have been shown to effectively harvest this surprising self-diagnosing capability. However, existing prompt-based methods usually specify an instruction to a language model in a discriminative way. In this work, we explore the generative variant of zero-shot prompt-based toxicity detection with comprehensive trials on prompt engineering. We evaluate on three datasets with toxicity labels annotated on social media posts. Our analysis highlights the strengths of our generative classification approach both quantitatively and qualitatively. Interesting aspects of self-diagnosis and its ethical implications are discussed. 由于微妙性、隐含性以及不同人可能感知到的不同可能解释，从文本中检测不良内容是一个微妙的困难。众所周知的风险是，语言模型（LM）一旦在包含不良内容的语料库上进行训练，就有可能表现出偏见和毒性。然而，最近的研究表明，作为一种补救措施，LM 也能够识别有毒成分，而无需额外的微调。事实证明，快速方法可以有效地获得这种令人惊讶的自我诊断能力。然而，现有的基于提示的方法通常以区分的方式指定对语言模型的指令。在这项工作中，我们通过对提示工程的全面试验探索了基于零次提示的毒性检测的生成变体。我们对三个数据集进行评估，并在社交媒体帖子上标注了毒性标签。我们的分析强调了我们的生成分类方法在定量和定性方面的优势。讨论了自我诊断的有趣方面及其伦理影响。 本文提出一种基于生成式提示的零样本毒性检测方法，无需额外微调即可利用语言模型的自我诊断能力检测社交媒体中的有害内容。 Yau-Shian Wang,Yingshan Chang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: First Contact: Unsupervised Human-Machine Co-Adaptation via Mutual Information Maximization
title_zh: 第一次接触：通过互信息最大化实现无监督人机协同适应
comment: Accepted to Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Accepted to Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: How can we train an assistive human-machine interface (e.g., an electromyography-based limb prosthesis) to translate a user's raw command signals into the actions of a robot or computer when there is no prior mapping, we cannot ask the user for supervision in the form of action labels or reward feedback, and we do not have prior knowledge of the tasks the user is trying to accomplish? The key idea in this paper is that, regardless of the task, when an interface is more intuitive, the user's commands are less noisy. We formalize this idea as a completely unsupervised objective for optimizing interfaces: the mutual information between the user's command signals and the induced state transitions in the environment. To evaluate whether this mutual information score can distinguish between effective and ineffective interfaces, we conduct an observational study on 540K examples of users operating various keyboard and eye gaze interfaces for typing, controlling simulated robots, and playing video games. The results show that our mutual information scores are predictive of the ground-truth task completion metrics in a variety of domains, with an average Spearman's rank correlation of 0.43. In addition to offline evaluation of existing interfaces, we use our unsupervised objective to learn an interface from scratch: we randomly initialize the interface, have the user attempt to perform their desired tasks using the interface, measure the mutual information score, and update the interface to maximize mutual information through reinforcement learning. We evaluate our method through a user study with 12 participants who perform a 2D cursor control task using a perturbed mouse, and an experiment with one user playing the Lunar Lander game using hand gestures. The results show that we can learn an interface from scratch, without any user supervision or prior knowledge of tasks, in under 30 minutes.
summary: How can we train an assistive human-machine interface (e.g., an electromyography-based limb prosthesis) to translate a user's raw command signals into the actions of a robot or computer when there is no prior mapping, we cannot ask the user for supervision in the form of action labels or reward feedback, and we do not have prior knowledge of the tasks the user is trying to accomplish? The key idea in this paper is that, regardless of the task, when an interface is more intuitive, the user's commands are less noisy. We formalize this idea as a completely unsupervised objective for optimizing interfaces: the mutual information between the user's command signals and the induced state transitions in the environment. To evaluate whether this mutual information score can distinguish between effective and ineffective interfaces, we conduct an observational study on 540K examples of users operating various keyboard and eye gaze interfaces for typing, controlling simulated robots, and playing video games. The results show that our mutual information scores are predictive of the ground-truth task completion metrics in a variety of domains, with an average Spearman's rank correlation of 0.43. In addition to offline evaluation of existing interfaces, we use our unsupervised objective to learn an interface from scratch: we randomly initialize the interface, have the user attempt to perform their desired tasks using the interface, measure the mutual information score, and update the interface to maximize mutual information through reinforcement learning. We evaluate our method through a user study with 12 participants who perform a 2D cursor control task using a perturbed mouse, and an experiment with one user playing the Lunar Lander game using hand gestures. The results show that we can learn an interface from scratch, without any user supervision or prior knowledge of tasks, in under 30 minutes.
abstract_zh: 在没有事先映射的情况下，我们如何训练辅助人机界面（例如基于肌电图的肢体假肢）将用户的原始命令信号转换为机器人或计算机的动作，我们无法要求用户以动作标签或奖励反馈的形式进行监督，并且我们对用户试图完成的任务没有先验知识？本文的关键思想是，无论什么任务，当界面更直观时，用户的命令噪音就会更少。我们将这个想法形式化为一个完全无监督的优化接口目标：用户的命令信号和环境中引起的状态转换之间的相互信息。为了评估这种互信息评分是否能够区分有效和无效界面，我们对 54 万个用户操作各种键盘和眼睛注视界面进行打字、控制模拟机器人和玩视频游戏的示例进行了观察研究。结果表明，我们的互信息分数可以预测各个领域的真实任务完成指标，平均 Spearman 等级相关性为 0.43。除了对现有界面进行离线评估之外，我们还使用无监督目标从头开始学习界面：我们随机初始化界面，让用户尝试使用界面执行他们想要的任务，测量互信息得分，并通过强化学习更新界面以最大化互信息。我们通过对 12 名参与者进行的用户研究（使用扰动的鼠标执行 2D 光标控制任务）以及一名用户使用手势玩 Lunar Lander 游戏的实验来评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们可以在 30 分钟内从头开始学习界面，无需任何用户监督或任务先验知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的人机协同适应方法，通过最大化用户指令信号与环境状态转移之间的互信息来优化辅助接口。
AI.motivation: 现有辅助接口（如肌电假肢）在缺乏先验映射、用户反馈及任务知识的情况下难以训练，需探索无监督的优化方式。
AI.method: 以互信息为无监督目标，通过强化学习迭代优化接口参数，利用用户操作数据计算互信息并更新模型。
AI.result: 在54万用户数据中互信息得分与任务完成度呈0.43相关性；30分钟内通过无监督学习实现鼠标控制及手势游戏接口适配。
AI.conclusion: 互信息最大化框架可有效提升无监督人机接口性能，为辅助设备开发提供新范式。

title: Hardness of Maximum Likelihood Learning of DPPs
title_zh: DPP 最大似然学习的难度
abstract: Determinantal Point Processes (DPPs) are a widely used probabilistic model for negatively correlated sets. DPPs have been successfully employed in Machine Learning applications to select a diverse, yet representative subset of data. In these applications, a set of parameters that maximize the likelihood of the data is typically desirable. The algorithms used for this task to date either optimize over a limited family of DPPs, or use local improvement heuristics that do not provide theoretical guarantees of optimality. In his seminal work on DPPs in Machine Learning, Kulesza (2011) conjectured that the problem is NP-complete. The lack of a formal proof prompted Brunel et al. (COLT 2017) to suggest that, in opposition to Kulesza's conjecture, there might exist a polynomial-time algorithm for computing a maximum-likelihood DPP. They also presented some preliminary evidence supporting a conjecture that they suggested might lead to such an algorithm. In this work we prove Kulesza's conjecture. In fact, we prove the following stronger hardness of approximation result: even computing a $\left(1-O(\frac{1}{\log^9{N}})\right)$-approximation to the maximum log-likelihood of a DPP on a ground set of $N$ elements is NP-complete. From a technical perspective, we reduce the problem of approximating the maximum log-likelihood of a DPP to solving a gap instance of a \textsc{$3$-Coloring} problem on a hypergraph. This hypergraph is based on the bounded-degree construction of Bogdanov et al. (FOCS 2002), which we enhance using the strong expanders of Alon and Capalbo (FOCS 2007). We demonstrate that if a rank-$3$ DPP achieves near-optimal log-likelihood, its marginal kernel must encode an almost perfect ``vector-coloring" of the hypergraph. Finally, we show that these continuous vectors can be decoded into a proper $3$-coloring after removing a small fraction of ``noisy" edges.
summary: Determinantal Point Processes (DPPs) are a widely used probabilistic model for negatively correlated sets. DPPs have been successfully employed in Machine Learning applications to select a diverse, yet representative subset of data. In these applications, a set of parameters that maximize the likelihood of the data is typically desirable. The algorithms used for this task to date either optimize over a limited family of DPPs, or use local improvement heuristics that do not provide theoretical guarantees of optimality. In his seminal work on DPPs in Machine Learning, Kulesza (2011) conjectured that the problem is NP-complete. The lack of a formal proof prompted Brunel et al. (COLT 2017) to suggest that, in opposition to Kulesza's conjecture, there might exist a polynomial-time algorithm for computing a maximum-likelihood DPP. They also presented some preliminary evidence supporting a conjecture that they suggested might lead to such an algorithm. In this work we prove Kulesza's conjecture. In fact, we prove the following stronger hardness of approximation result: even computing a $\left(1-O(\frac{1}{\log^9{N}})\right)$-approximation to the maximum log-likelihood of a DPP on a ground set of $N$ elements is NP-complete. From a technical perspective, we reduce the problem of approximating the maximum log-likelihood of a DPP to solving a gap instance of a \textsc{$3$-Coloring} problem on a hypergraph. This hypergraph is based on the bounded-degree construction of Bogdanov et al. (FOCS 2002), which we enhance using the strong expanders of Alon and Capalbo (FOCS 2007). We demonstrate that if a rank-$3$ DPP achieves near-optimal log-likelihood, its marginal kernel must encode an almost perfect ``vector-coloring" of the hypergraph. Finally, we show that these continuous vectors can be decoded into a proper $3$-coloring after removing a small fraction of ``noisy" edges.
abstract_zh: 行列式点过程 (DPP) 是一种广泛使用的负相关集概率模型。 DPP 已成功应用于机器学习应用程序中，以选择多样化但具有代表性的数据子集。在这些应用中，通常需要一组最大化数据可能性的参数。迄今为止，用于此任务的算法要么对有限的 DPP 系列进行优化，要么使用不提供最优性理论保证的局部改进启发法。 Kulesza (2011) 在他关于机器学习中的 DPP 的开创性工作中推测该问题是 NP 完全问题。缺乏正式的证据促使布鲁内尔等人。 （COLT 2017）表明，与 Kulesza 的猜想相反，可能存在用于计算最大似然 DPP 的多项式时间算法。他们还提供了一些初步证据来支持他们认为可能导致这种算法的猜想。在这项工作中，我们证明了 Kulesza 的猜想。事实上，我们证明了以下近似结果的更强硬度：即使在 $N$ 个元素的地面集上计算 DPP 最大对数似然的 $\left(1-O(\frac{1}{\log^9{N}})\right)$ 近似也是 NP 完全的。从技术角度来看，我们将近似 DPP 最大对数似然的问题简化为解决超图上 \textsc{$3$-Coloring} 问题的间隙实例。该超图基于 Bogdanov 等人的有界度构造。 (FOCS 2002)，我们使用 Alon 和 Capalbo 的强大扩展器对其进行了增强 (FOCS 2007)。我们证明，如果等级为 3 美元的 DPP 实现接近最优的对数似然，则其边缘内核必须对超图的近乎完美的“矢量着色”进行编码。最后，我们表明，在删除一小部分“噪声”边缘后，这些连续向量可以被解码为适当的 3 美元着色。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了确定性点过程（DPPs）的最大似然学习问题在计算上是NP难的，并且即使近似求解也具有极强的硬度。
AI.motivation: 现有DPPs最大似然学习算法要么局限于特定模型，要么缺乏理论保证，而Kulesza猜想该问题为NP难，但此前未获证明。
AI.method: 通过将DPPs最大似然近似问题归约到超图3着色问题，结合构造性证明与向量着色分析，利用强展开器增强超图结构。
AI.result: 证明了计算DPPs最大似然的(1−O(1/log⁹N))近似解是NP难的，且近似解的边际核需编码超图的近完美向量着色。
AI.conclusion: 确认了Kulesza猜想，揭示DPPs最大似然学习的理论极限，为后续算法设计提供复杂性边界参考。

search_text: Hardness of Maximum Likelihood Learning of DPPs DPP 最大似然学习的难度 Determinantal Point Processes (DPPs) are a widely used probabilistic model for negatively correlated sets. DPPs have been successfully employed in Machine Learning applications to select a diverse, yet representative subset of data. In these applications, a set of parameters that maximize the likelihood of the data is typically desirable. The algorithms used for this task to date either optimize over a limited family of DPPs, or use local improvement heuristics that do not provide theoretical guarantees of optimality. In his seminal work on DPPs in Machine Learning, Kulesza (2011) conjectured that the problem is NP-complete. The lack of a formal proof prompted Brunel et al. (COLT 2017) to suggest that, in opposition to Kulesza's conjecture, there might exist a polynomial-time algorithm for computing a maximum-likelihood DPP. They also presented some preliminary evidence supporting a conjecture that they suggested might lead to such an algorithm. In this work we prove Kulesza's conjecture. In fact, we prove the following stronger hardness of approximation result: even computing a $\left(1-O(\frac{1}{\log^9{N}})\right)$-approximation to the maximum log-likelihood of a DPP on a ground set of $N$ elements is NP-complete. From a technical perspective, we reduce the problem of approximating the maximum log-likelihood of a DPP to solving a gap instance of a \textsc{$3$-Coloring} problem on a hypergraph. This hypergraph is based on the bounded-degree construction of Bogdanov et al. (FOCS 2002), which we enhance using the strong expanders of Alon and Capalbo (FOCS 2007). We demonstrate that if a rank-$3$ DPP achieves near-optimal log-likelihood, its marginal kernel must encode an almost perfect ``vector-coloring" of the hypergraph. Finally, we show that these continuous vectors can be decoded into a proper $3$-coloring after removing a small fraction of ``noisy" edges. 行列式点过程 (DPP) 是一种广泛使用的负相关集概率模型。 DPP 已成功应用于机器学习应用程序中，以选择多样化但具有代表性的数据子集。在这些应用中，通常需要一组最大化数据可能性的参数。迄今为止，用于此任务的算法要么对有限的 DPP 系列进行优化，要么使用不提供最优性理论保证的局部改进启发法。 Kulesza (2011) 在他关于机器学习中的 DPP 的开创性工作中推测该问题是 NP 完全问题。缺乏正式的证据促使布鲁内尔等人。 （COLT 2017）表明，与 Kulesza 的猜想相反，可能存在用于计算最大似然 DPP 的多项式时间算法。他们还提供了一些初步证据来支持他们认为可能导致这种算法的猜想。在这项工作中，我们证明了 Kulesza 的猜想。事实上，我们证明了以下近似结果的更强硬度：即使在 $N$ 个元素的地面集上计算 DPP 最大对数似然的 $\left(1-O(\frac{1}{\log^9{N}})\right)$ 近似也是 NP 完全的。从技术角度来看，我们将近似 DPP 最大对数似然的问题简化为解决超图上 \textsc{$3$-Coloring} 问题的间隙实例。该超图基于 Bogdanov 等人的有界度构造。 (FOCS 2002)，我们使用 Alon 和 Capalbo 的强大扩展器对其进行了增强 (FOCS 2007)。我们证明，如果等级为 3 美元的 DPP 实现接近最优的对数似然，则其边缘内核必须对超图的近乎完美的“矢量着色”进行编码。最后，我们表明，在删除一小部分“噪声”边缘后，这些连续向量可以被解码为适当的 3 美元着色。 本文证明了确定性点过程（DPPs）的最大似然学习问题在计算上是NP难的，并且即使近似求解也具有极强的硬度。 Elena Grigorescu,Brendan Juba,Karl Wimmer,Ning Xie cs.CC,cs.DS,cs.LG

title: A Benchmark and Asymmetrical-Similarity Learning for Practical Image Copy Detection
title_zh: 实用图像副本检测的基准和非对称相似性学习
abstract: Image copy detection (ICD) aims to determine whether a query image is an edited copy of any image from a reference set. Currently, there are very limited public benchmarks for ICD, while all overlook a critical challenge in real-world applications, i.e., the distraction from hard negative queries. Specifically, some queries are not edited copies but are inherently similar to some reference images. These hard negative queries are easily false recognized as edited copies, significantly compromising the ICD accuracy. This observation motivates us to build the first ICD benchmark featuring this characteristic. Based on existing ICD datasets, this paper constructs a new dataset by additionally adding 100, 000 and 24, 252 hard negative pairs into the training and test set, respectively. Moreover, this paper further reveals a unique difficulty for solving the hard negative problem in ICD, i.e., there is a fundamental conflict between current metric learning and ICD. This conflict is: the metric learning adopts symmetric distance while the edited copy is an asymmetric (unidirectional) process, e.g., a partial crop is close to its holistic reference image and is an edited copy, while the latter cannot be the edited copy of the former (in spite the distance is equally small). This insight results in an Asymmetrical-Similarity Learning (ASL) method, which allows the similarity in two directions (the query <-> the reference image) to be different from each other. Experimental results show that ASL outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a clear margin, confirming that solving the symmetric-asymmetric conflict is critical for ICD. The NDEC dataset and code are available at https://github.com/WangWenhao0716/ASL.
summary: Image copy detection (ICD) aims to determine whether a query image is an edited copy of any image from a reference set. Currently, there are very limited public benchmarks for ICD, while all overlook a critical challenge in real-world applications, i.e., the distraction from hard negative queries. Specifically, some queries are not edited copies but are inherently similar to some reference images. These hard negative queries are easily false recognized as edited copies, significantly compromising the ICD accuracy. This observation motivates us to build the first ICD benchmark featuring this characteristic. Based on existing ICD datasets, this paper constructs a new dataset by additionally adding 100, 000 and 24, 252 hard negative pairs into the training and test set, respectively. Moreover, this paper further reveals a unique difficulty for solving the hard negative problem in ICD, i.e., there is a fundamental conflict between current metric learning and ICD. This conflict is: the metric learning adopts symmetric distance while the edited copy is an asymmetric (unidirectional) process, e.g., a partial crop is close to its holistic reference image and is an edited copy, while the latter cannot be the edited copy of the former (in spite the distance is equally small). This insight results in an Asymmetrical-Similarity Learning (ASL) method, which allows the similarity in two directions (the query <-> the reference image) to be different from each other. Experimental results show that ASL outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a clear margin, confirming that solving the symmetric-asymmetric conflict is critical for ICD. The NDEC dataset and code are available at https://github.com/WangWenhao0716/ASL.
abstract_zh: 图像副本检测 (ICD) 旨在确定查询图像是否是参考集中任何图像的编辑副本。目前，ICD 的公共基准非常有限，而所有基准都忽略了现实应用中的一个关键挑战，即对硬否定查询的干扰。具体来说，某些查询不是经过编辑的副本，但本质上与某些参考图像相似。这些硬否定查询很容易被错误识别为编辑过的副本，从而严重损害 ICD 的准确性。这一观察促使我们建立第一个具有此特征的 ICD 基准。本文在现有ICD数据集的基础上，在训练集和测试集中分别添加100、000和24、252个硬负对，构建了新的数据集。此外，本文进一步揭示了解决ICD中的硬负问题的独特困难，即当前度量学习与ICD之间存在根本冲突。这种冲突是：度量学习采用对称距离，而编辑副本是非对称（单向）过程，例如，部分裁剪与其整体参考图像接近并且是编辑副本，而后者不能是前者的编辑副本（尽管距离同样小）。这种见解产生了非对称相似性学习 (ASL) 方法，该方法允许两个方向（查询 <-> 参考图像）上的相似性彼此不同。实验结果表明，ASL 明显优于最先进的方法，证实解决对称-不对称冲突对于 ICD 至关重要。 NDEC 数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/WangWenhao0716/ASL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个针对实际图像复制检测（ICD）的基准数据集和非对称相似性学习方法（ASL），以解决硬负样本干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ICD基准忽略硬负样本（与参考图高度相似但非编辑复制的查询图）导致的误判问题，需构建新基准并解决对称距离度量与编辑复制非对称性之间的冲突。
AI.method: 构建包含10万训练对和2.4万测试对的NDEC数据集，提出允许查询与参考图像双向相似度不同的ASL方法，打破传统对称距离限制。
AI.result: ASL在多个指标上显著优于现有SOTA方法，验证了解决对称-非对称冲突对ICD的关键性。
AI.conclusion: 解决对称度量与编辑复制非对称性矛盾是提升ICD性能的核心，公开数据集和代码促进未来研究。

authors_text: Marc Tanti,Shaun Abdilla,Adrian Muscat,Claudia Borg,Reuben A. Farrugia,Albert Gatt
title: Face2Text revisited: Improved data set and baseline results
title_zh: 重新审视 Face2Text：改进的数据集和基线结果
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, to appear in LREC 2022 (P-VLAM workshop)
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, to appear in LREC 2022 (P-VLAM workshop)
abstract: Current image description generation models do not transfer well to the task of describing human faces. To encourage the development of more human-focused descriptions, we developed a new data set of facial descriptions based on the CelebA image data set. We describe the properties of this data set, and present results from a face description generator trained on it, which explores the feasibility of using transfer learning from VGGFace/ResNet CNNs. Comparisons are drawn through both automated metrics and human evaluation by 76 English-speaking participants. The descriptions generated by the VGGFace-LSTM + Attention model are closest to the ground truth according to human evaluation whilst the ResNet-LSTM + Attention model obtained the highest CIDEr and CIDEr-D results (1.252 and 0.686 respectively). Together, the new data set and these experimental results provide data and baselines for future work in this area.
summary: Current image description generation models do not transfer well to the task of describing human faces. To encourage the development of more human-focused descriptions, we developed a new data set of facial descriptions based on the CelebA image data set. We describe the properties of this data set, and present results from a face description generator trained on it, which explores the feasibility of using transfer learning from VGGFace/ResNet CNNs. Comparisons are drawn through both automated metrics and human evaluation by 76 English-speaking participants. The descriptions generated by the VGGFace-LSTM + Attention model are closest to the ground truth according to human evaluation whilst the ResNet-LSTM + Attention model obtained the highest CIDEr and CIDEr-D results (1.252 and 0.686 respectively). Together, the new data set and these experimental results provide data and baselines for future work in this area.
abstract_zh: 当前的图像描述生成模型不能很好地应用于描述人脸的任务。为了鼓励开发更多以人为本的描述，我们基于 CelebA 图像数据集开发了一个新的面部描述数据集。我们描述了该数据集的属性，并给出了在其上训练的人脸描述生成器的结果，探索了使用 VGGFace/ResNet CNN 迁移学习的可行性。通过自动指标和 76 名英语参与者的人工评估进行比较。根据人类评估，VGGFace-LSTM + Attention 模型生成的描述最接近真实情况，而 ResNet-LSTM + Attention 模型获得了最高的 CIDEr 和 CIDEr-D 结果（分别为 1.252 和 0.686）。新数据集和这些实验结果共同为该领域的未来工作提供了数据和基线。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了人脸描述数据集并建立基线结果，探索迁移学习在生成面部描述中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有图像描述生成模型难以有效描述人脸，需开发更聚焦人类特征的描述方法。
AI.method: 基于CelebA数据集构建新数据集，采用VGGFace/ResNet迁移学习结合LSTM+Attention模型进行训练，通过自动化指标与76名参与者人工评估对比实验。
AI.result: VGGFace-LSTM+Attention模型在人工评估中表现最优，ResNet-LSTM+Attention模型在CIDEr指标上取得最高分（1.252）和CIDEr-D分（0.686）。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集与实验结果为未来人脸描述生成研究提供了基准数据与方法参考，验证了迁移学习在该任务中的可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文改进了人脸描述数据集并建立基线结果，探索迁移学习在生成面部描述中的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 现有图像描述生成模型难以有效描述人脸，需开发更聚焦人类特征的描述方法。
ai_content.method: 基于CelebA数据集构建新数据集，采用VGGFace/ResNet迁移学习结合LSTM+Attention模型进行训练，通过自动化指标与76名参与者人工评估对比实验。
ai_content.result: VGGFace-LSTM+Attention模型在人工评估中表现最优，ResNet-LSTM+Attention模型在CIDEr指标上取得最高分（1.252）和CIDEr-D分（0.686）。
ai_content.conclusion: 新数据集与实验结果为未来人脸描述生成研究提供了基准数据与方法参考，验证了迁移学习在该任务中的可行性。
