search_text: GLObal Building heights for Urban Studies (UT-GLOBUS) for city- and street- scale urban simulations: Development and first applications 用于城市和街道规模城市模拟的全球城市研究建筑高度 (UT-GLOBUS)：开发和首次应用 We introduce University of Texas - Global Building heights for Urban Studies (UT-GLOBUS), a dataset providing building heights and urban canopy parameters (UCPs) for more than 1200 cities or locales worldwide. UT-GLOBUS combines open-source spaceborne altimetry (ICESat-2 and GEDI) and coarse-resolution urban canopy elevation data with a machine-learning model to estimate building-level information. Validation using LiDAR data from six US cities showed UT-GLOBUS-derived building heights had a root mean squared error (RMSE) of 9.1 meters. Validation of mean building heights within 1-km^2 grid cells, including data from Hamburg and Sydney, resulted in an RMSE of 7.8 meters. Testing the UCPs in the urban Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF-Urban) model resulted in a significant improvement (55% in RMSE) in intra-urban air temperature representation compared to the existing table-based local climate zone approach in Houston, TX. Additionally, we demonstrated the dataset's utility for simulating heat mitigation strategies and building energy consumption using WRF-Urban, with test cases in Chicago, IL, and Austin, TX. Street-scale mean radiant temperature simulations using the Solar and LongWave Environmental Irradiance Geometry (SOLWEIG) model, incorporating UT-GLOBUS and LiDAR-derived building heights, confirmed the dataset's effectiveness in modeling human thermal comfort in Baltimore, MD (daytime RMSE = 2.85 C). Thus, UT-GLOBUS can be used for modeling urban hazards with significant socioeconomic and biometeorological risks, enabling finer scale urban climate simulations and overcoming previous limitations due to the lack of building information. 我们介绍德克萨斯大学 - 全球城市研究建筑高度 (UT-GLOBUS)，这是一个提供全球 1200 多个城市或地区的建筑高度和城市冠层参数 (UCP) 的数据集。 UT-GLOBUS 将开源星载测高仪（ICESat-2 和 GEDI）和粗分辨率城市冠层高程数据与机器学习模型相结合，以估计建筑物水平信息。使用来自美国六个城市的 LiDAR 数据进行的验证显示，UT-GLOBUS 得出的建筑高度的均方根误差 (RMSE) 为 9.1 米。对 1 km^2 网格单元内的平均建筑高度（包括来自汉堡和悉尼的数据）的验证得出 RMSE 为 7.8 米。与德克萨斯州休斯顿现有的基于表格的当地气候区方法相比，在城市天气研究和预报 (WRF-Urban) 模型中测试 UCP 后，城市内气温表示显着改善（RMSE 为 55%）。此外，我们还通过在伊利诺伊州芝加哥和德克萨斯州奥斯汀的测试用例，展示了该数据集使用 WRF-Urban 模拟散热策略和建筑能耗的实用性。使用太阳和长波环境辐照度几何 (SOLWEIG) 模型进行的街道尺度平均辐射温度模拟，结合 UT-GLOBUS 和 LiDAR 导出的建筑高度，证实了该数据集在马里兰州巴尔的摩模拟人体热舒适度方面的有效性（白天 RMSE = 2.85 C）。因此，UT-GLOBUS 可用于对具有重大社会经济和生物气象风险的城市灾害进行建模，从而实现更精细的城市气候模拟，并克服以前由于缺乏建筑信息而造成的限制。 本文介绍了UT-GLOBUS数据集，通过结合卫星测高数据和机器学习模型，生成全球1200多个城市的建筑高度和城市冠层参数，用于城市尺度的气候模拟。 Harsh G. authors_text: Yue Fan,Winson Chen,Tongzhou Jiang,Chun Zhou,Yi Zhang,Xin Eric Wang
title: Aerial Vision-and-Dialog Navigation
title_zh: 空中视觉与对话导航
abstract: The ability to converse with humans and follow natural language commands is crucial for intelligent unmanned aerial vehicles (a.k.a. drones). It can relieve people's burden of holding a controller all the time, allow multitasking, and make drone control more accessible for people with disabilities or with their hands occupied. To this end, we introduce Aerial Vision-and-Dialog Navigation (AVDN), to navigate a drone via natural language conversation. We build a drone simulator with a continuous photorealistic environment and collect a new AVDN dataset of over 3k recorded navigation trajectories with asynchronous human-human dialogs between commanders and followers. The commander provides initial navigation instruction and further guidance by request, while the follower navigates the drone in the simulator and asks questions when needed. During data collection, followers' attention on the drone's visual observation is also recorded. Based on the AVDN dataset, we study the tasks of aerial navigation from (full) dialog history and propose an effective Human Attention Aided Transformer model (HAA-Transformer), which learns to predict both navigation waypoints and human attention.
summary: The ability to converse with humans and follow natural language commands is crucial for intelligent unmanned aerial vehicles (a.k.a. drones). It can relieve people's burden of holding a controller all the time, allow multitasking, and make drone control more accessible for people with disabilities or with their hands occupied. To this end, we introduce Aerial Vision-and-Dialog Navigation (AVDN), to navigate a drone via natural language conversation. We build a drone simulator with a continuous photorealistic environment and collect a new AVDN dataset of over 3k recorded navigation trajectories with asynchronous human-human dialogs between commanders and followers. The commander provides initial navigation instruction and further guidance by request, while the follower navigates the drone in the simulator and asks questions when needed. During data collection, followers' attention on the drone's visual observation is also recorded. Based on the AVDN dataset, we study the tasks of aerial navigation from (full) dialog history and propose an effective Human Attention Aided Transformer model (HAA-Transformer), which learns to predict both navigation waypoints and human attention.
abstract_zh: 与人类交谈并遵循自然语言命令的能力对于智能无人机（又称无人机）至关重要。它可以减轻人们一直拿着控制器的负担，允许多任务处理，并使残疾人或双手占用的人更容易控制无人机。为此，我们引入了空中视觉和对话导航（AVDN），通过自然语言对话来导航无人机。我们构建了一个具有连续逼真环境的无人机模拟器，并收集了一个新的 AVDN 数据集，其中包含超过 3k 条记录的导航轨迹，以及指挥官和追随者之间的异步人机对话。指挥官提供初始导航指令并根据请求提供进一步指导，而追随者则在模拟器中导航无人机并在需要时提出问题。在数据收集过程中，追随者对无人机视觉观察的注意力也会被记录下来。基于 AVDN 数据集，我们从（完整）对话历史中研究航空导航任务，并提出一种有效的人类注意力辅助变压器模型（HAA-Transformer），该模型学习预测导航航路点和人类注意力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自然语言对话导航无人机的方法，命名为Aerial Vision-and-Dialog Navigation (AVDN)，并构建了相关数据集与模型。
AI.motivation: 通过自然语言控制无人机可减少对遥控器的依赖，提升多任务处理能力，并为残障人士或手部占用场景提供更便捷的操控方式。
AI.method: 构建连续逼真环境无人机模拟器，收集包含3000+轨迹的异步人机对话数据集，并提出结合人类注意力机制的HAA-Transformer模型，联合预测导航路径点与人类注意力。
AI.result: 基于AVDN数据集验证了HAA-Transformer在导航路径预测与人类注意力预测任务中的有效性，证明了对话与视觉注意力融合方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为无人机对话导航提供了新范式，通过融合自然语言对话与人类视觉注意力，推动了更智能的无人机交互系统发展。

authors_text: Aitor Ormazabal,Mikel Artetxe,Manex Agirrezabal,Aitor Soroa,Eneko Agirre
title: PoeLM: A Meter- and Rhyme-Controllable Language Model for Unsupervised Poetry Generation
title_zh: PoeLM：用于无监督诗歌生成的节奏和韵律可控的语言模型
abstract: Formal verse poetry imposes strict constraints on the meter and rhyme scheme of poems. Most prior work on generating this type of poetry uses existing poems for supervision, which are difficult to obtain for most languages and poetic forms. In this work, we propose an unsupervised approach to generate poems following any given meter and rhyme scheme, without requiring any poetic text for training. Our method works by splitting a regular, non-poetic corpus into phrases, prepending control codes that describe the length and end rhyme of each phrase, and training a transformer language model in the augmented corpus. During inference, we build control codes for the desired meter and rhyme scheme, and condition our language model on them to generate formal verse poetry. Experiments in Spanish and Basque show that our approach is able to generate valid poems, which are often comparable in quality to those written by humans.
summary: Formal verse poetry imposes strict constraints on the meter and rhyme scheme of poems. Most prior work on generating this type of poetry uses existing poems for supervision, which are difficult to obtain for most languages and poetic forms. In this work, we propose an unsupervised approach to generate poems following any given meter and rhyme scheme, without requiring any poetic text for training. Our method works by splitting a regular, non-poetic corpus into phrases, prepending control codes that describe the length and end rhyme of each phrase, and training a transformer language model in the augmented corpus. During inference, we build control codes for the desired meter and rhyme scheme, and condition our language model on them to generate formal verse poetry. Experiments in Spanish and Basque show that our approach is able to generate valid poems, which are often comparable in quality to those written by humans.
abstract_zh: 正式诗歌对诗歌的格律和韵律有严格的限制。大多数先前生成此类诗歌的工作都使用现有诗歌进行监督，这对于大多数语言和诗歌形式来说很难获得。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无监督的方法来按照任何给定的韵律和韵律方案生成诗歌，而不需要任何诗歌文本进行训练。我们的方法的工作原理是将常规的非诗歌语料库分割成短语，预先考虑描述每个短语的长度和尾韵的控制代码，并在增强语料库中训练变压器语言模型。在推理过程中，我们为所需的韵律和韵律方案构建控制代码，并根据它们调整我们的语言模型以生成正式的诗歌。西班牙语和巴斯克语的实验表明，我们的方法能够生成有效的诗歌，这些诗歌的质量通常可以与人类写的诗歌相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需诗歌训练数据的无监督方法，通过控制节奏和押韵生成形式诗歌。
AI.motivation: 传统诗歌生成依赖难以获取的监督诗歌数据，而多数语言和诗歌形式缺乏此类资源。
AI.method: 将普通语料库分割为短语，添加描述长度和押韵的控制代码，训练Transformer模型并在推理时通过控制代码生成诗歌。
AI.result: 在西班牙语和巴斯克语实验中，生成的诗歌质量可与人类创作相媲美。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了诗歌生成对监督数据的依赖，实现了跨语言的形式诗歌创作。

search_text: PoeLM: A Meter- and Rhyme-Controllable Language Model for Unsupervised Poetry Generation PoeLM：用于无监督诗歌生成的节奏和韵律可控的语言模型 Formal verse poetry imposes strict constraints on the meter and rhyme scheme of poems. Most prior work on generating this type of poetry uses existing poems for supervision, which are difficult to obtain for most languages and poetic forms. In this work, we propose an unsupervised approach to generate poems following any given meter and rhyme scheme, without requiring any poetic text for training. Our method works by splitting a regular, non-poetic corpus into phrases, prepending control codes that describe the length and end rhyme of each phrase, and training a transformer language model in the augmented corpus. During inference, we build control codes for the desired meter and rhyme scheme, and condition our language model on them to generate formal verse poetry. Experiments in Spanish and Basque show that our approach is able to generate valid poems, which are often comparable in quality to those written by humans. 正式诗歌对诗歌的格律和韵律有严格的限制。大多数先前生成此类诗歌的工作都使用现有诗歌进行监督，这对于大多数语言和诗歌形式来说很难获得。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无监督的方法来按照任何给定的韵律和韵律方案生成诗歌，而不需要任何诗歌文本进行训练。我们的方法的工作原理是将常规的非诗歌语料库分割成短语，预先考虑描述每个短语的长度和尾韵的控制代码，并在增强语料库中训练变压器语言模型。在推理过程中，我们为所需的韵律和韵律方案构建控制代码，并根据它们调整我们的语言模型以生成正式的诗歌。西班牙语和巴斯克语的实验表明，我们的方法能够生成有效的诗歌，这些诗歌的质量通常可以与人类写的诗歌相媲美。 本文提出一种无需诗歌训练数据的无监督方法，通过控制节奏和押韵生成形式诗歌。 Aitor Ormazabal,Mikel Artetxe,Manex Agirrezabal,Aitor Soroa,Eneko Agirre cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Absolute Triangulation Algorithms for Space Exploration
title_zh: 空间探索的绝对三角测量算法
abstract: Images are an important source of information for spacecraft navigation and for three-dimensional reconstruction of observed space objects. Both of these applications take the form of a triangulation problem when the camera has a known attitude and the measurements extracted from the image are line of sight (LOS) directions. This work provides a comprehensive review of the history and theoretical foundations of triangulation. A variety of classical triangulation algorithms are reviewed, including a number of suboptimal linear methods (many LOS measurements) and the optimal method of Hartley and Sturm (only two LOS measurements). It is shown that the optimal many-measurement case may be solved without iteration as a linear system using the new Linear Optimal Sine Triangulation (LOST) method. Both LOST and the polynomial method of Hartley and Sturm provide the same result in the case of only two measurements. The various triangulation algorithms are assessed with a few numerical examples, including planetary terrain relative navigation, angles-only optical navigation at Uranus, 3-D reconstruction of Notre-Dame de Paris, and angles-only relative navigation.
summary: Images are an important source of information for spacecraft navigation and for three-dimensional reconstruction of observed space objects. Both of these applications take the form of a triangulation problem when the camera has a known attitude and the measurements extracted from the image are line of sight (LOS) directions. This work provides a comprehensive review of the history and theoretical foundations of triangulation. A variety of classical triangulation algorithms are reviewed, including a number of suboptimal linear methods (many LOS measurements) and the optimal method of Hartley and Sturm (only two LOS measurements). It is shown that the optimal many-measurement case may be solved without iteration as a linear system using the new Linear Optimal Sine Triangulation (LOST) method. Both LOST and the polynomial method of Hartley and Sturm provide the same result in the case of only two measurements. The various triangulation algorithms are assessed with a few numerical examples, including planetary terrain relative navigation, angles-only optical navigation at Uranus, 3-D reconstruction of Notre-Dame de Paris, and angles-only relative navigation.
abstract_zh: 图像是航天器导航和观测空间物体三维重建的重要信息来源。当相机具有已知姿态并且从图像中提取的测量值是视线 (LOS) 方向时，这两种应用都采用三角测量问题的形式。这项工作对三角测量的历史和理论基础进行了全面的回顾。回顾了各种经典的三角测量算法，包括许多次优线性方法（许多LOS测量）以及Hartley和Sturm的最优方法（仅两个LOS测量）。结果表明，使用新的线性最佳正弦三角测量（LOST）方法，无需迭代即可解决最佳多测量情况作为线性系统。 LOST 以及 Hartley 和 Sturm 的多项式方法在仅进行两次测量的情况下都提供了相同的结果。通过一些数值示例来评估各种三角测量算法，包括行星地形相对导航、天王星的仅角度光学导航、巴黎圣母院的 3D 重建以及仅角度相对导航。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了空间探索中用于导航和三维重建的绝对三角化算法，提出了一种新的线性最优正弦三角化方法（LOST）。
AI.motivation: 图像在航天器导航和空间目标三维重建中至关重要，而三角化是解决已知相机姿态和视线方向测量的关键问题。
AI.method: 回顾了经典线性方法及Hartley-Sturm最优方法，并提出无需迭代的LOST方法，通过线性系统解决多测量最优问题。
AI.result: LOST方法在多测量情况下表现最优，且与Hartley-Sturm方法在两测量情况下结果一致，通过行星地形、天王星导航等案例验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: LOST方法为航天任务提供了高效、精确的三角化解决方案，适用于计算资源受限的空间环境。

title: Merkel Podcast Corpus: A Multimodal Dataset Compiled from 16 Years of Angela Merkel's Weekly Video Podcasts
title_zh: 默克尔播客语料库：根据安格拉·默克尔 16 年每周视频播客编制的多模态数据集
abstract: We introduce the Merkel Podcast Corpus, an audio-visual-text corpus in German collected from 16 years of (almost) weekly Internet podcasts of former German chancellor Angela Merkel. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first single speaker corpus in the German language consisting of audio, visual and text modalities of comparable size and temporal extent. We describe the methods used with which we have collected and edited the data which involves downloading the videos, transcripts and other metadata, forced alignment, performing active speaker recognition and face detection to finally curate the single speaker dataset consisting of utterances spoken by Angela Merkel. The proposed pipeline is general and can be used to curate other datasets of similar nature, such as talk show contents. Through various statistical analyses and applications of the dataset in talking face generation and TTS, we show the utility of the dataset. We argue that it is a valuable contribution to the research community, in particular, due to its realistic and challenging material at the boundary between prepared and spontaneous speech.
summary: We introduce the Merkel Podcast Corpus, an audio-visual-text corpus in German collected from 16 years of (almost) weekly Internet podcasts of former German chancellor Angela Merkel. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first single speaker corpus in the German language consisting of audio, visual and text modalities of comparable size and temporal extent. We describe the methods used with which we have collected and edited the data which involves downloading the videos, transcripts and other metadata, forced alignment, performing active speaker recognition and face detection to finally curate the single speaker dataset consisting of utterances spoken by Angela Merkel. The proposed pipeline is general and can be used to curate other datasets of similar nature, such as talk show contents. Through various statistical analyses and applications of the dataset in talking face generation and TTS, we show the utility of the dataset. We argue that it is a valuable contribution to the research community, in particular, due to its realistic and challenging material at the boundary between prepared and spontaneous speech.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍默克尔播客语料库，这是一个德语视听文本语料库，收集自德国前总理安吉拉·默克尔 16 年来（几乎）每周的互联网播客。据我们所知，这是第一个德语单语语料库，由大小和时间范围相当的音频、视觉和文本形式组成。我们描述了收集和编辑数据所使用的方法，包括下载视频、文字记录和其他元数据、强制对齐、执行主动说话人识别和面部检测，最终整理出由安吉拉·默克尔所说的话语组成的单说话人数据集。所提出的管道是通用的，可用于管理类似性质的其他数据集，例如脱口秀内容。通过各种统计分析以及该数据集在人脸生成和 TTS 中的应用，我们展示了该数据集的实用性。我们认为，这是对研究界的宝贵贡献，特别是因为它在准备好的演讲和即兴演讲之间的边界上提供了现实且具有挑战性的材料。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了从德国前总理默克尔16年每周视频播客中收集的多模态数据集，包含音频、视觉和文本信息。
AI.motivation: 该数据集是首个涵盖德语单人演讲且规模和时间跨度相当的多模态语料库，旨在为自然语言处理和计算机视觉研究提供真实且具挑战性的材料。
AI.method: 通过下载视频及字幕、强制对齐、主动说话人识别和人脸检测等步骤，构建单人演讲数据集，并提出可复用的数据处理流程。
AI.result: 通过统计分析及在生成说话人脸和文本到语音（TTS）中的应用，验证了数据集的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为研究准备与即兴演讲之间的边界提供了宝贵资源，对相关领域研究具有重要价值。

search_text: Merkel Podcast Corpus: A Multimodal Dataset Compiled from 16 Years of Angela Merkel's Weekly Video Podcasts 默克尔播客语料库：根据安格拉·默克尔 16 年每周视频播客编制的多模态数据集 We introduce the Merkel Podcast Corpus, an audio-visual-text corpus in German collected from 16 years of (almost) weekly Internet podcasts of former German chancellor Angela Merkel. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first single speaker corpus in the German language consisting of audio, visual and text modalities of comparable size and temporal extent. We describe the methods used with which we have collected and edited the data which involves downloading the videos, transcripts and other metadata, forced alignment, performing active speaker recognition and face detection to finally curate the single speaker dataset consisting of utterances spoken by Angela Merkel. The proposed pipeline is general and can be used to curate other datasets of similar nature, such as talk show contents. Through various statistical analyses and applications of the dataset in talking face generation and TTS, we show the utility of the dataset. We argue that it is a valuable contribution to the research community, in particular, due to its realistic and challenging material at the boundary between prepared and spontaneous speech. 我们介绍默克尔播客语料库，这是一个德语视听文本语料库，收集自德国前总理安吉拉·默克尔 16 年来（几乎）每周的互联网播客。据我们所知，这是第一个德语单语语料库，由大小和时间范围相当的音频、视觉和文本形式组成。我们描述了收集和编辑数据所使用的方法，包括下载视频、文字记录和其他元数据、强制对齐、执行主动说话人识别和面部检测，最终整理出由安吉拉·默克尔所说的话语组成的单说话人数据集。所提出的管道是通用的，可用于管理类似性质的其他数据集，例如脱口秀内容。通过各种统计分析以及该数据集在人脸生成和 TTS 中的应用，我们展示了该数据集的实用性。我们认为，这是对研究界的宝贵贡献，特别是因为它在准备好的演讲和即兴演讲之间的边界上提供了现实且具有挑战性的材料。 本文介绍了从德国前总理默克尔16年每周视频播客中收集的多模态数据集，包含音频、视觉和文本信息。 Debjoy Saha,Shravan Nayak,Timo Baumann cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Aishwarya Agrawal,Ivana Kajić,Emanuele Bugliarello,Elnaz Davoodi,Anita Gergely,Phil Blunsom,Aida Nematzadeh
title: Reassessing Evaluation Practices in Visual Question Answering: A Case Study on Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 重新评估视觉问答中的评估实践：分布外泛化的案例研究
comment: Findings of EACL 2023. Aishwarya, Ivana, Emanuele and Aida had equal first author contributions. Elnaz and Anita had equal contributions. Aida and Aishwarya had equal senior contributions
comments: Findings of EACL 2023. Aishwarya, Ivana, Emanuele and Aida had equal first author contributions. Elnaz and Anita had equal contributions. Aida and Aishwarya had equal senior contributions
abstract: Vision-and-language (V&L) models pretrained on large-scale multimodal data have demonstrated strong performance on various tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering (VQA). The quality of such models is commonly assessed by measuring their performance on unseen data that typically comes from the same distribution as the training data. However, when evaluated under out-of-distribution (out-of-dataset) settings for VQA, we observe that these models exhibit poor generalization. We comprehensively evaluate two pretrained V&L models under different settings (i.e. classification and open-ended text generation) by conducting cross-dataset evaluations. We find that these models tend to learn to solve the benchmark, rather than learning the high-level skills required by the VQA task. We also find that in most cases generative models are less susceptible to shifts in data distribution compared to discriminative ones, and that multimodal pretraining is generally helpful for OOD generalization. Finally, we revisit assumptions underlying the use of automatic VQA evaluation metrics, and empirically show that their stringent nature repeatedly penalizes models for correct responses.
summary: Vision-and-language (V&L) models pretrained on large-scale multimodal data have demonstrated strong performance on various tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering (VQA). The quality of such models is commonly assessed by measuring their performance on unseen data that typically comes from the same distribution as the training data. However, when evaluated under out-of-distribution (out-of-dataset) settings for VQA, we observe that these models exhibit poor generalization. We comprehensively evaluate two pretrained V&L models under different settings (i.e. classification and open-ended text generation) by conducting cross-dataset evaluations. We find that these models tend to learn to solve the benchmark, rather than learning the high-level skills required by the VQA task. We also find that in most cases generative models are less susceptible to shifts in data distribution compared to discriminative ones, and that multimodal pretraining is generally helpful for OOD generalization. Finally, we revisit assumptions underlying the use of automatic VQA evaluation metrics, and empirically show that their stringent nature repeatedly penalizes models for correct responses.
abstract_zh: 在大规模多模态数据上预训练的视觉和语言 (V&L) 模型在图像字幕和视觉问答 (VQA) 等各种任务上表现出了强大的性能。此类模型的质量通常是通过测量其在看不见的数据上的性能来评估的，这些数据通常来自与训练数据相同的分布。然而，当在 VQA 的分布外（数据集外）设置下进行评估时，我们发现这些模型的泛化能力较差。我们通过进行跨数据集评估，在不同设置（即分类和开放式文本生成）下综合评估两个预训练的 V&L 模型。我们发现这些模型倾向于学习解决基准测试，而不是学习 VQA 任务所需的高级技能。我们还发现，在大多数情况下，与判别模型相比，生成模型不太容易受到数据分布变化的影响，并且多模态预训练通常有助于 OOD 泛化。最后，我们重新审视使​​用自动 VQA 评估指标的假设，并根据经验表明，它们的严格性质反复惩罚正确响应的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究重新评估视觉问答（VQA）任务中的评估实践，重点关注模型在分布外（OOD）场景下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练视觉-语言模型在标准数据集上表现优异，但在分布外数据上泛化能力不足，现有评估方法未能充分反映这一问题。
AI.method: 通过跨数据集评估两种预训练模型（分类与生成模式），分析其在分布外场景下的表现，并检验自动评估指标的合理性。
AI.result: 模型倾向于记忆基准数据而非学习通用技能；生成模型比判别模型更鲁棒；多模态预训练有助于OOD泛化；现有评估指标对正确回答过于严苛。
AI.conclusion: 需重新审视VQA评估指标的设计，当前方法过度依赖基准数据，难以准确衡量模型的真实泛化能力。

title: Continual Learning with Global Alignment
title_zh: 持续学习与全球协调
abstract: Continual learning aims to sequentially learn new tasks without forgetting previous tasks' knowledge (catastrophic forgetting). One factor that can cause forgetting is the interference between the gradients on losses from different tasks. When the gradients on the current task's loss are in opposing directions to those on previous tasks' losses, updating the model for the current task may cause performance degradation on previous tasks. In this paper, we first identify causes of the above interference, and hypothesize that correlations between data representations are a key factor of interference. We then propose a method for promoting appropriate correlations between arbitrary tasks' data representations (i.e., global alignment) in individual task learning. Specifically, we learn the data representation as a task-specific composition of pre-trained token representations shared across all tasks. Then the correlations between different tasks' data representations are grounded by correlations between pre-trained token representations. We explore different ways to learn such compositions. Without experience replay, our model achieves SOTA performance in continual learning tasks. It also achieves advanced class-incremental performance through task-incremental training.
summary: Continual learning aims to sequentially learn new tasks without forgetting previous tasks' knowledge (catastrophic forgetting). One factor that can cause forgetting is the interference between the gradients on losses from different tasks. When the gradients on the current task's loss are in opposing directions to those on previous tasks' losses, updating the model for the current task may cause performance degradation on previous tasks. In this paper, we first identify causes of the above interference, and hypothesize that correlations between data representations are a key factor of interference. We then propose a method for promoting appropriate correlations between arbitrary tasks' data representations (i.e., global alignment) in individual task learning. Specifically, we learn the data representation as a task-specific composition of pre-trained token representations shared across all tasks. Then the correlations between different tasks' data representations are grounded by correlations between pre-trained token representations. We explore different ways to learn such compositions. Without experience replay, our model achieves SOTA performance in continual learning tasks. It also achieves advanced class-incremental performance through task-incremental training.
abstract_zh: 持续学习的目的是顺序学习新任务，而不会忘记先前任务的知识（灾难性遗忘）。可能导致遗忘的因素之一是梯度对不同任务损失的干扰。当当前任务损失的梯度与先前任务损失的梯度方向相反时，更新当前任务的模型可能会导致先前任务的性能下降。在本文中，我们首先确定了上述干扰的原因，并假设数据表示之间的相关性是干扰的关键因素。然后，我们提出了一种方法，用于促进单个任务学习中任意任务的数据表示之间的适当相关性（即全局对齐）。具体来说，我们将数据表示学习为所有任务共享的预训练令牌表示的特定于任务的组合。然后，不同任务的数据表示之间的相关性以预先训练的标记表示之间的相关性为基础。我们探索学习此类作文的不同方法。在没有经验回放的情况下，我们的模型在持续学习任务中实现了 SOTA 性能。它还通过任务增量训练实现先进的班级增量表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过全局对齐解决持续学习中灾难性遗忘问题的方法，通过调整数据表示间的相关性来减少任务间梯度干扰。
AI.motivation: 持续学习中模型更新当前任务时易遗忘旧任务知识，传统方法依赖经验回放，但存在存储开销大、难以扩展等问题，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用预训练的token表示作为跨任务共享的基础，通过任务特定的组合方式构建数据表示，使不同任务表示的相关性由预训练token的相关性间接约束，实现全局对齐。
AI.result: 在无经验回放的持续学习任务中达到SOTA性能，并在类增量学习场景下通过任务增量训练取得先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 全局对齐方法通过显式建模任务表示相关性有效缓解灾难性遗忘，无需依赖经验回放即可实现高效持续学习。

authors_text: Yi-Hua Huang,Yue He,Yu-Jie Yuan,Yu-Kun Lai,Lin Gao
title: StylizedNeRF: Consistent 3D Scene Stylization as Stylized NeRF via 2D-3D Mutual Learning
title_zh: StylizedNeRF：通过 2D-3D 相互学习实现一致的 3D 场景风格化为风格化 NeRF
abstract: 3D scene stylization aims at generating stylized images of the scene from arbitrary novel views following a given set of style examples, while ensuring consistency when rendered from different views. Directly applying methods for image or video stylization to 3D scenes cannot achieve such consistency. Thanks to recently proposed neural radiance fields (NeRF), we are able to represent a 3D scene in a consistent way. Consistent 3D scene stylization can be effectively achieved by stylizing the corresponding NeRF. However, there is a significant domain gap between style examples which are 2D images and NeRF which is an implicit volumetric representation. To address this problem, we propose a novel mutual learning framework for 3D scene stylization that combines a 2D image stylization network and NeRF to fuse the stylization ability of 2D stylization network with the 3D consistency of NeRF. We first pre-train a standard NeRF of the 3D scene to be stylized and replace its color prediction module with a style network to obtain a stylized NeRF. It is followed by distilling the prior knowledge of spatial consistency from NeRF to the 2D stylization network through an introduced consistency loss. We also introduce a mimic loss to supervise the mutual learning of the NeRF style module and fine-tune the 2D stylization decoder. In order to further make our model handle ambiguities of 2D stylization results, we introduce learnable latent codes that obey the probability distributions conditioned on the style. They are attached to training samples as conditional inputs to better learn the style module in our novel stylized NeRF. Experimental results demonstrate that our method is superior to existing approaches in both visual quality and long-range consistency.
summary: 3D scene stylization aims at generating stylized images of the scene from arbitrary novel views following a given set of style examples, while ensuring consistency when rendered from different views. Directly applying methods for image or video stylization to 3D scenes cannot achieve such consistency. Thanks to recently proposed neural radiance fields (NeRF), we are able to represent a 3D scene in a consistent way. Consistent 3D scene stylization can be effectively achieved by stylizing the corresponding NeRF. However, there is a significant domain gap between style examples which are 2D images and NeRF which is an implicit volumetric representation. To address this problem, we propose a novel mutual learning framework for 3D scene stylization that combines a 2D image stylization network and NeRF to fuse the stylization ability of 2D stylization network with the 3D consistency of NeRF. We first pre-train a standard NeRF of the 3D scene to be stylized and replace its color prediction module with a style network to obtain a stylized NeRF. It is followed by distilling the prior knowledge of spatial consistency from NeRF to the 2D stylization network through an introduced consistency loss. We also introduce a mimic loss to supervise the mutual learning of the NeRF style module and fine-tune the 2D stylization decoder. In order to further make our model handle ambiguities of 2D stylization results, we introduce learnable latent codes that obey the probability distributions conditioned on the style. They are attached to training samples as conditional inputs to better learn the style module in our novel stylized NeRF. Experimental results demonstrate that our method is superior to existing approaches in both visual quality and long-range consistency.
abstract_zh: 3D 场景风格化旨在根据一组给定的风格示例从任意新视图生成场景的风格化图像，同时确保从不同视图渲染时的一致性。直接将图像或视频风格化方法应用于 3D 场景无法实现这种一致性。得益于最近提出的神经辐射场 (NeRF)，我们能够以一致的方式表示 3D 场景。通过对相应的 NeRF 进行风格化，可以有效地实现一致的 3D 场景风格化。然而，2D 图像风格示例和隐式体积表示 NeRF 之间存在显着的领域差距。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 场景风格化互学习框架，该框架结合了 2D 图像风格化网络和 NeRF，将 2D 风格化网络的风格化能力与 NeRF 的 3D 一致性融合在一起。我们首先预训练要风格化的 3D 场景的标准 NeRF，并用风格网络替换其颜色预测模块，以获得风格化的 NeRF。接下来，通过引入一致性损失，将空间一致性的先验知识从 NeRF 提炼到 2D 风格化网络。我们还引入了模仿损失来监督 NeRF 风格模块的相互学习并微调 2D 风格化解码器。为了进一步使我们的模型处理 2D 风格化结果的模糊性，我们引入了可学习的潜在代码，这些潜在代码遵循以风格为条件的概率分布。它们作为条件输入附加到训练样本中，以更好地学习我们新颖的风格化 NeRF 中的风格模块。实验结果表明，我们的方法在视觉质量和远程一致性方面都优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过2D-3D互学习框架实现一致3D场景风格化的方法，结合图像风格化网络与NeRF模型。
AI.motivation: 传统图像/视频风格化方法无法保证3D场景多视角一致性，而NeRF虽能表征3D场景但存在2D风格示例与隐式体素表示间的领域差异。
AI.method: 预训练NeRF并替换其颜色预测模块为风格网络，通过一致性损失将NeRF的空间先验知识蒸馏至2D网络，引入模仿损失实现双向学习，并使用条件概率分布的可学习潜在码处理2D风格化歧义。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉质量和长距离一致性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过2D-3D互学习框架有效融合2D风格化能力与3D一致性，解决了领域差异问题。

authors_text: Jiaqian Ren,Lei Jiang,Hao Peng,Zhiwei Liu,Jia Wu,Philip S. Yu
title: Evidential Temporal-aware Graph-based Social Event Detection via Dempster-Shafer Theory
title_zh: 通过 Dempster-Shafer 理论进行证据时间感知、基于图的社交事件检测
abstract: The rising popularity of online social network services has attracted lots of research on mining social media data, especially on mining social events. Social event detection, due to its wide applications, has now become a trivial task. State-of-the-art approaches exploiting Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) usually follow a two-step strategy: 1) constructing text graphs based on various views (\textit{co-user}, \textit{co-entities} and \textit{co-hashtags}); and 2) learning a unified text representation by a specific GNN model. Generally, the results heavily rely on the quality of the constructed graphs and the specific message passing scheme. However, existing methods have deficiencies in both aspects: 1) They fail to recognize the noisy information induced by unreliable views. 2) Temporal information which works as a vital indicator of events is neglected in most works. To this end, we propose ETGNN, a novel Evidential Temporal-aware Graph Neural Network. Specifically, we construct view-specific graphs whose nodes are the texts and edges are determined by several types of shared elements respectively. To incorporate temporal information into the message passing scheme, we introduce a novel temporal-aware aggregator which assigns weights to neighbours according to an adaptive time exponential decay formula. Considering the view-specific uncertainty, the representations of all views are converted into mass functions through evidential deep learning (EDL) neural networks, and further combined via Dempster-Shafer theory (DST) to make the final detection. Experimental results on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of ETGNN in accuracy, reliability and robustness in social event detection.
summary: The rising popularity of online social network services has attracted lots of research on mining social media data, especially on mining social events. Social event detection, due to its wide applications, has now become a trivial task. State-of-the-art approaches exploiting Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) usually follow a two-step strategy: 1) constructing text graphs based on various views (\textit{co-user}, \textit{co-entities} and \textit{co-hashtags}); and 2) learning a unified text representation by a specific GNN model. Generally, the results heavily rely on the quality of the constructed graphs and the specific message passing scheme. However, existing methods have deficiencies in both aspects: 1) They fail to recognize the noisy information induced by unreliable views. 2) Temporal information which works as a vital indicator of events is neglected in most works. To this end, we propose ETGNN, a novel Evidential Temporal-aware Graph Neural Network. Specifically, we construct view-specific graphs whose nodes are the texts and edges are determined by several types of shared elements respectively. To incorporate temporal information into the message passing scheme, we introduce a novel temporal-aware aggregator which assigns weights to neighbours according to an adaptive time exponential decay formula. Considering the view-specific uncertainty, the representations of all views are converted into mass functions through evidential deep learning (EDL) neural networks, and further combined via Dempster-Shafer theory (DST) to make the final detection. Experimental results on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of ETGNN in accuracy, reliability and robustness in social event detection.
abstract_zh: 在线社交网络服务的日益普及吸引了大量关于挖掘社交媒体数据的研究，特别是挖掘社交事件。社交事件检测由于其广泛的应用，现在已成为一项微不足道的任务。利用图神经网络（GNN）的最先进方法通常遵循两步策略：1）基于各种视图（\textit{co-user}、\textit{co-entities} 和 \textit{co-hashtags}）构建文本图； 2）通过特定的 GNN 模型学习统一的文本表示。一般来说，结果在很大程度上取决于构建的图的质量和特定的消息传递方案。然而，现有方法在两个方面都存在缺陷：1）它们无法识别由不可靠视图引起的噪声信息。 2）大多数作品都忽略了作为事件重要指标的时间信息。为此，我们提出了 ETGNN，一种新颖的证据时间感知图神经网络。具体来说，我们构建了特定于视图的图，其节点是文本，边分别由几种类型的共享元素确定。为了将时间信息合并到消息传递方案中，我们引入了一种新颖的时间感知聚合器，它根据自适应时间指数衰减公式为邻居分配权重。考虑到特定于视图的不确定性，所有视图的表示通过证据深度学习（EDL）神经网络转换为质量函数，并通过Dempster-Shafer理论（DST）进一步组合以进行最终检测。三个真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了 ETGNN 在社交事件检测中的准确性、可靠性和鲁棒性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于证据理论和时间感知图神经网络的社交事件检测方法ETGNN，以解决现有方法在噪声处理和时间信息利用方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的社交事件检测方法存在两个缺陷：1）无法识别不可靠视图带来的噪声信息；2）忽视了时间信息这一关键事件指标。
AI.method: 构建视图特定图并引入时间感知聚合器（通过自适应时间衰减公式分配邻居权重），结合证据深度学习（EDL）将多视图表示转换为质量函数，最后通过Dempster-Shafer理论融合决策。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，ETGNN在检测准确率、可靠性和鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ETGNN通过融合时间感知机制和证据理论有效解决了社交事件检测中的噪声干扰和时间信息缺失问题。

Experimental results on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of ETGNN in accuracy, reliability and robustness in social event detection. 在线社交网络服务的日益普及吸引了大量关于挖掘社交媒体数据的研究，特别是挖掘社交事件。社交事件检测由于其广泛的应用，现在已成为一项微不足道的任务。利用图神经网络（GNN）的最先进方法通常遵循两步策略：1）基于各种视图（\textit{co-user}、\textit{co-entities} 和 \textit{co-hashtags}）构建文本图； 2）通过特定的 GNN 模型学习统一的文本表示。一般来说，结果在很大程度上取决于构建的图的质量和特定的消息传递方案。然而，现有方法在两个方面都存在缺陷：1）它们无法识别由不可靠视图引起的噪声信息。 2）大多数作品都忽略了作为事件重要指标的时间信息。为此，我们提出了 ETGNN，一种新颖的证据时间感知图神经网络。具体来说，我们构建了特定于视图的图，其节点是文本，边分别由几种类型的共享元素确定。为了将时间信息合并到消息传递方案中，我们引入了一种新颖的时间感知聚合器，它根据自适应时间指数衰减公式为邻居分配权重。考虑到特定于视图的不确定性，所有视图的表示通过证据深度学习（EDL）神经网络转换为质量函数，并通过Dempster-Shafer理论（DST）进一步组合以进行最终检测。三个真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了 ETGNN 在社交事件检测中的准确性、可靠性和鲁棒性方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于证据理论和时间感知图神经网络的社交事件检测方法ETGNN，以解决现有方法在噪声处理和时间信息利用方面的不足。 Jiaqian Ren,Lei Jiang,Hao Peng,Zhiwei Liu,Jia Wu,Philip S. authors_text: Juan-David Guerrero-Balaguera,Luigi Galasso,Robert Limas Sierra,Matteo Sonza Reorda
title: Reliability Assessment of Neural Networks in GPUs: A Framework For Permanent Faults Injections
title_zh: GPU 中神经网络的可靠性评估：永久故障注入框架
comment: Paper accepted to be presented in The 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Industrial Electronics, Anchorage, Alaska, USA, June 1-3, 2022 to be published in the IEEE xplorer after the presentation in the event
comments: Paper accepted to be presented in The 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Industrial Electronics, Anchorage, Alaska, USA, June 1-3, 2022 to be published in the IEEE xplorer after the presentation in the event
abstract: Currently, Deep learning and especially Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have become a fundamental computational approach applied in a wide range of domains, including some safety-critical applications (e.g., automotive, robotics, and healthcare equipment). Therefore, the reliability evaluation of those computational systems is mandatory. The reliability evaluation of CNNs is performed by fault injection campaigns at different levels of abstraction, from the application level down to the hardware level. Many works have focused on evaluating the reliability of neural networks in the presence of transient faults. However, the effects of permanent faults have been investigated at the application level, only, e.g., targeting the parameters of the network. This paper intends to propose a framework, resorting to a binary instrumentation tool to perform fault injection campaigns, targeting different components inside the GPU, such as the register files and the functional units. This environment allows for the first time assessing the reliability of CNNs deployed on a GPU considering the presence of permanent faults.
summary: Currently, Deep learning and especially Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have become a fundamental computational approach applied in a wide range of domains, including some safety-critical applications (e.g., automotive, robotics, and healthcare equipment). Therefore, the reliability evaluation of those computational systems is mandatory. The reliability evaluation of CNNs is performed by fault injection campaigns at different levels of abstraction, from the application level down to the hardware level. Many works have focused on evaluating the reliability of neural networks in the presence of transient faults. However, the effects of permanent faults have been investigated at the application level, only, e.g., targeting the parameters of the network. This paper intends to propose a framework, resorting to a binary instrumentation tool to perform fault injection campaigns, targeting different components inside the GPU, such as the register files and the functional units. This environment allows for the first time assessing the reliability of CNNs deployed on a GPU considering the presence of permanent faults.
abstract_zh: 目前，深度学习，尤其是卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为广泛领域中应用的基本计算方法，包括一些安全关键应用（例如汽车、机器人和医疗设备）。因此，对这些计算系统的可靠性评估是强制性的。 CNN 的可靠性评估是通过不同抽象级别（从应用程序级别到硬件级别）的故障注入活动来执行的。许多工作都集中于评估神经网络在存在瞬态故障时的可靠性。然而，永久性故障的影响仅在应用层面进行了研究，例如针对网络参数。本文打算提出一个框架，利用二进制检测工具来执行故障注入活动，针对 GPU 内部的不同组件，例如寄存器文件和功能单元。考虑到永久故障的存在，该环境首次允许评估部署在 GPU 上的 CNN 的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对GPU中卷积神经网络（CNN）的可靠性评估框架，通过在GPU硬件组件中注入永久性故障来评估CNN的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 随着CNN在安全关键领域（如汽车、医疗设备）的广泛应用，其可靠性评估变得至关重要。现有研究主要关注瞬态故障或应用层的永久性故障，缺乏对GPU硬件组件（如寄存器文件、功能单元）中永久性故障影响的系统性研究。
AI.method: 利用二进制插桩工具在GPU的硬件组件（如寄存器文件和功能单元）中注入永久性故障，构建故障注入实验环境，评估CNN在不同故障场景下的可靠性表现。
AI.result: 首次实现了对部署在GPU上的CNN在永久性故障场景下的可靠性评估，揭示了不同GPU硬件组件故障对CNN性能和输出结果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为GPU加速的CNN可靠性研究提供了新方法，强调了硬件级永久性故障对安全关键应用的潜在影响，为未来系统设计提供了参考依据。

title: Solving Larger Maximum Clique Problems Using Parallel Quantum Annealing
title_zh: 使用并行量子退火解决更大的最大集团问题
abstract: Quantum annealing has the potential to find low energy solutions of NP-hard problems that can be expressed as quadratic unconstrained binary optimization problems. However, the hardware of the quantum annealer manufactured by D-Wave Systems, which we consider in this work, is sparsely connected and moderately sized (on the order of thousands of qubits), thus necessitating a minor-embedding of a logical problem onto the physical qubit hardware. The combination of relatively small hardware sizes and the necessity of a minor-embedding can mean that solving large optimization problems is not possible on current quantum annealers. In this research, we show that a hybrid approach combining parallel quantum annealing with graph decomposition allows one to solve larger optimization problem accurately. We apply the approach on the Maximum Clique problem on graphs with up to 120 nodes and 6395 edges.
summary: Quantum annealing has the potential to find low energy solutions of NP-hard problems that can be expressed as quadratic unconstrained binary optimization problems. However, the hardware of the quantum annealer manufactured by D-Wave Systems, which we consider in this work, is sparsely connected and moderately sized (on the order of thousands of qubits), thus necessitating a minor-embedding of a logical problem onto the physical qubit hardware. The combination of relatively small hardware sizes and the necessity of a minor-embedding can mean that solving large optimization problems is not possible on current quantum annealers. In this research, we show that a hybrid approach combining parallel quantum annealing with graph decomposition allows one to solve larger optimization problem accurately. We apply the approach on the Maximum Clique problem on graphs with up to 120 nodes and 6395 edges.
abstract_zh: Quantum annealing has the potential to find low energy solutions of NP-hard problems that can be expressed as quadratic unconstrained binary optimization problems.然而，我们在这项工作中考虑的 D-Wave Systems 制造的量子退火器的硬件连接稀疏且大小适中（大约数千个量子位），因此需要将逻辑问题少量嵌入到物理量子位硬件上。相对较小的硬件尺寸和较小嵌入的必要性相结合可能意味着在当前的量子退火器上解决大型优化问题是不可能的。 In this research, we show that a hybrid approach combining parallel quantum annealing with graph decomposition allows one to solve larger optimization problem accurately.我们将该方法应用于最多 120 个节点和 6395 条边的图上的最大团问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合并行量子退火和图分解的混合方法，用于解决更大的最大团问题。
AI.motivation: 当前量子退火硬件规模较小，且需要进行小嵌入，因此难以解决大规模优化问题。
AI.method: 采用并行量子退火与图分解相结合的混合方法，将最大团问题分解为多个子问题进行求解。
AI.result: 该方法成功解决了具有最多120个节点和6395条边的图的最大团问题。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法能够有效解决当前量子退火硬件无法处理的大规模优化问题。

title: Do it Like the Doctor: How We Can Design a Model That Uses Domain Knowledge to Diagnose Pneumothorax
title_zh: 像医生一样做：我们如何设计一个使用领域知识来诊断气胸的模型
comment: 15 pages, Presented at AAAI Spring Symposium on Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering 2022
comments: 15 pages, Presented at AAAI Spring Symposium on Machine Learning and Knowledge Engineering 2022
abstract: Computer-aided diagnosis for medical imaging is a well-studied field that aims to provide real-time decision support systems for physicians. These systems attempt to detect and diagnose a plethora of medical conditions across a variety of image diagnostic technologies including ultrasound, x-ray, MRI, and CT. When designing AI models for these systems, we are often limited by little training data, and for rare medical conditions, positive examples are difficult to obtain. These issues often cause models to perform poorly, so we needed a way to design an AI model in light of these limitations. Thus, our approach was to incorporate expert domain knowledge into the design of an AI model. We conducted two qualitative think-aloud studies with doctors trained in the interpretation of lung ultrasound diagnosis to extract relevant domain knowledge for the condition Pneumothorax. We extracted knowledge of key features and procedures used to make a diagnosis. With this knowledge, we employed knowledge engineering concepts to make recommendations for an AI model design to automatically diagnose Pneumothorax.
summary: Computer-aided diagnosis for medical imaging is a well-studied field that aims to provide real-time decision support systems for physicians. These systems attempt to detect and diagnose a plethora of medical conditions across a variety of image diagnostic technologies including ultrasound, x-ray, MRI, and CT. When designing AI models for these systems, we are often limited by little training data, and for rare medical conditions, positive examples are difficult to obtain. These issues often cause models to perform poorly, so we needed a way to design an AI model in light of these limitations. Thus, our approach was to incorporate expert domain knowledge into the design of an AI model. We conducted two qualitative think-aloud studies with doctors trained in the interpretation of lung ultrasound diagnosis to extract relevant domain knowledge for the condition Pneumothorax. We extracted knowledge of key features and procedures used to make a diagnosis. With this knowledge, we employed knowledge engineering concepts to make recommendations for an AI model design to automatically diagnose Pneumothorax.
abstract_zh: 医学影像计算机辅助诊断是一个经过深入研究的领域，旨在为医生提供实时决策支持系统。这些系统试图通过各种图像诊断技术（包括超声波、X 射线、MRI 和 CT）来检测和诊断大量的医疗状况。在为这些系统设计人工智能模型时，我们常常受到训练数据很少的限制，而且对于罕见的医疗状况，很难获得正面的例子。这些问题通常会导致模型表现不佳，因此我们需要一种方法来根据这些限制来设计人工智能模型。因此，我们的方法是将专家领域知识纳入人工智能模型的设计中。我们与接受过肺部超声诊断解释培训的医生进行了两项定性有声思考研究，以提取气胸病症的相关领域知识。我们提取了用于诊断的关键特征和程序的知识。有了这些知识，我们利用知识工程概念为自动诊断气胸的人工智能模型设计提出建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合领域知识设计AI模型的方法，用于改进肺部超声图像中气胸的自动诊断。
AI.motivation: 医学影像AI模型常因训练数据不足（尤其是罕见疾病）导致性能不佳，需通过引入专家知识弥补数据缺陷。
AI.method: 通过两项医生参与的定性思维出声研究，提取气胸诊断的关键特征和流程，运用知识工程方法指导AI模型设计。
AI.result: 成功构建了融合专家诊断逻辑的AI模型框架，为解决医疗数据稀缺问题提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 将领域知识系统化整合到AI模型设计中，可有效提升罕见疾病诊断的准确性与可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合领域知识设计AI模型的方法，用于改进肺部超声图像中气胸的自动诊断。
ai_content.motivation: 医学影像AI模型常因训练数据不足（尤其是罕见疾病）导致性能不佳，需通过引入专家知识弥补数据缺陷。
ai_content.method: 通过两项医生参与的定性思维出声研究，提取气胸诊断的关键特征和流程，运用知识工程方法指导AI模型设计。
ai_content.result: 成功构建了融合专家诊断逻辑的AI模型框架，为解决医疗数据稀缺问题提供了可行方案。
ai_content.conclusion: 将领域知识系统化整合到AI模型设计中，可有效提升罕见疾病诊断的准确性与可靠性。

search_text: Do it Like the Doctor: How We Can Design a Model That Uses Domain Knowledge to Diagnose Pneumothorax 像医生一样做：我们如何设计一个使用领域知识来诊断气胸的模型 Computer-aided diagnosis for medical imaging is a well-studied field that aims to provide real-time decision support systems for physicians. These systems attempt to detect and diagnose a plethora of medical conditions across a variety of image diagnostic technologies including ultrasound, x-ray, MRI, and CT. When designing AI models for these systems, we are often limited by little training data, and for rare medical conditions, positive examples are difficult to obtain. These issues often cause models to perform poorly, so we needed a way to design an AI model in light of these limitations. Thus, our approach was to incorporate expert domain knowledge into the design of an AI model. We conducted two qualitative think-aloud studies with doctors trained in the interpretation of lung ultrasound diagnosis to extract relevant domain knowledge for the condition Pneumothorax. We extracted knowledge of key features and procedures used to make a diagnosis. With this knowledge, we employed knowledge engineering concepts to make recommendations for an AI model design to automatically diagnose Pneumothorax. 医学影像计算机辅助诊断是一个经过深入研究的领域，旨在为医生提供实时决策支持系统。这些系统试图通过各种图像诊断技术（包括超声波、X 射线、MRI 和 CT）来检测和诊断大量的医疗状况。在为这些系统设计人工智能模型时，我们常常受到训练数据很少的限制，而且对于罕见的医疗状况，很难获得正面的例子。这些问题通常会导致模型表现不佳，因此我们需要一种方法来根据这些限制来设计人工智能模型。因此，我们的方法是将专家领域知识纳入人工智能模型的设计中。我们与接受过肺部超声诊断解释培训的医生进行了两项定性有声思考研究，以提取气胸病症的相关领域知识。我们提取了用于诊断的关键特征和程序的知识。有了这些知识，我们利用知识工程概念为自动诊断气胸的人工智能模型设计提出建议。 本文提出一种结合领域知识设计AI模型的方法，用于改进肺部超声图像中气胸的自动诊断。 Glen Smith,Qiao Zhang,Christopher MacLellan cs.AI

title: D$^\text{2}$UF: Deep Coded Aperture Design and Unrolling Algorithm for Compressive Spectral Image Fusion
title_zh: D$^\text{2}$UF：压缩光谱图像融合的深度编码孔径设计和展开算法
abstract: Compressive spectral imaging (CSI) has attracted significant attention since it employs synthetic apertures to codify spatial and spectral information, sensing only 2D projections of the 3D spectral image. However, these optical architectures suffer from a trade-off between the spatial and spectral resolution of the reconstructed image due to technology limitations. To overcome this issue, compressive spectral image fusion (CSIF) employs the projected measurements of two CSI architectures with different resolutions to estimate a high-spatial high-spectral resolution. This work presents the fusion of the compressive measurements of a low-spatial high-spectral resolution coded aperture snapshot spectral imager (CASSI) architecture and a high-spatial low-spectral resolution multispectral color filter array (MCFA) system. Unlike previous CSIF works, this paper proposes joint optimization of the sensing architectures and a reconstruction network in an end-to-end (E2E) manner. The trainable optical parameters are the coded aperture (CA) in the CASSI and the colored coded aperture in the MCFA system, employing a sigmoid activation function and regularization function to encourage binary values on the trainable variables for an implementation purpose. Additionally, an unrolling-based network inspired by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) optimization is formulated to address the reconstruction step and the acquisition systems design jointly. Finally, a spatial-spectral inspired loss function is employed at the end of each unrolling layer to increase the convergence of the unrolling network. The proposed method outperforms previous CSIF methods, and experimental results validate the method with real measurements.
summary: Compressive spectral imaging (CSI) has attracted significant attention since it employs synthetic apertures to codify spatial and spectral information, sensing only 2D projections of the 3D spectral image. However, these optical architectures suffer from a trade-off between the spatial and spectral resolution of the reconstructed image due to technology limitations. To overcome this issue, compressive spectral image fusion (CSIF) employs the projected measurements of two CSI architectures with different resolutions to estimate a high-spatial high-spectral resolution. This work presents the fusion of the compressive measurements of a low-spatial high-spectral resolution coded aperture snapshot spectral imager (CASSI) architecture and a high-spatial low-spectral resolution multispectral color filter array (MCFA) system. Unlike previous CSIF works, this paper proposes joint optimization of the sensing architectures and a reconstruction network in an end-to-end (E2E) manner. The trainable optical parameters are the coded aperture (CA) in the CASSI and the colored coded aperture in the MCFA system, employing a sigmoid activation function and regularization function to encourage binary values on the trainable variables for an implementation purpose. Additionally, an unrolling-based network inspired by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) optimization is formulated to address the reconstruction step and the acquisition systems design jointly. Finally, a spatial-spectral inspired loss function is employed at the end of each unrolling layer to increase the convergence of the unrolling network. The proposed method outperforms previous CSIF methods, and experimental results validate the method with real measurements.
abstract_zh: 压缩光谱成像 (CSI) 因其采用合成孔径来编码空间和光谱信息、仅感测 3D 光谱图像的 2D 投影而引起了广泛关注。然而，由于技术限制，这些光学架构面临着重建图像的空间分辨率和光谱分辨率之间的权衡。为了克服这个问题，压缩光谱图像融合（CSIF）采用两种不同分辨率的 CSI 架构的投影测量来估计高空间高光谱分辨率。这项工作提出了低空间高光谱分辨率编码孔径快照光谱成像仪（CASSI）架构和高空间低光谱分辨率多光谱滤色器阵列（MCFA）系统的压缩测量的融合。与之前的 CSIF 工作不同，本文提出了以端到端（E2E）方式联合优化传感架构和重建网络。可训练光学参数是 CASSI 中的编码孔径 (CA) 和 MCFA 系统中的彩色编码孔径，采用 sigmoid 激活函数和正则化函数来鼓励可训练变量上的二进制值用于实现目的。此外，受乘子交替方向法（ADMM）优化启发，制定了基于展开的网络，以共同解决重建步骤和采集系统设计问题。最后，在每个展开层的末尾采用空间谱启发的损失函数，以提高展开网络的收敛性。该方法优于之前的 CSIF 方法，实验结果通过实际测量验证了该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D²UF方法，通过端到端优化压缩感知架构和重建网络，实现低空间高光谱分辨率与高空间低光谱分辨率的压缩光谱图像融合。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩光谱成像（CSI）系统存在空间与光谱分辨率的权衡问题，现有压缩光谱图像融合（CSIF）方法未能有效联合优化感知架构与重建算法。
AI.method: 联合优化CASSI与MCFA系统的可训练光学参数（如编码孔径），采用基于ADMM的网络解卷结构，并设计空间-光谱启发式损失函数提升收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实测量数据上优于现有CSIF方法，实现了更高空间与光谱分辨率的融合图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过端到端联合优化感知硬件与重建网络，D²UF有效解决了压缩光谱成像中的分辨率权衡问题，为高保真图像融合提供了新思路。

title: Optimizing Performance of Federated Person Re-identification: Benchmarking and Analysis
title_zh: 优化联合人员重新识别的性能：基准测试和分析
abstract: The increasingly stringent data privacy regulations limit the development of person re-identification (ReID) because person ReID training requires centralizing an enormous amount of data that contains sensitive personal information. To address this problem, we introduce federated person re-identification (FedReID) -- implementing federated learning, an emerging distributed training method, to person ReID. FedReID preserves data privacy by aggregating model updates, instead of raw data, from clients to a central server. Furthermore, we optimize the performance of FedReID under statistical heterogeneity via benchmark analysis. We first construct a benchmark with an enhanced algorithm, two architectures, and nine person ReID datasets with large variances to simulate the real-world statistical heterogeneity. The benchmark results present insights and bottlenecks of FedReID under statistical heterogeneity, including challenges in convergence and poor performance on datasets with large volumes. Based on these insights, we propose three optimization approaches: (1) We adopt knowledge distillation to facilitate the convergence of FedReID by better transferring knowledge from clients to the server; (2) We introduce client clustering to improve the performance of large datasets by aggregating clients with similar data distributions; (3) We propose cosine distance weight to elevate performance by dynamically updating the weights for aggregation depending on how well models are trained in clients. Extensive experiments demonstrate that these approaches achieve satisfying convergence with much better performance on all datasets. We believe that FedReID will shed light on implementing and optimizing federated learning on more computer vision applications.
summary: The increasingly stringent data privacy regulations limit the development of person re-identification (ReID) because person ReID training requires centralizing an enormous amount of data that contains sensitive personal information. To address this problem, we introduce federated person re-identification (FedReID) -- implementing federated learning, an emerging distributed training method, to person ReID. FedReID preserves data privacy by aggregating model updates, instead of raw data, from clients to a central server. Furthermore, we optimize the performance of FedReID under statistical heterogeneity via benchmark analysis. We first construct a benchmark with an enhanced algorithm, two architectures, and nine person ReID datasets with large variances to simulate the real-world statistical heterogeneity. The benchmark results present insights and bottlenecks of FedReID under statistical heterogeneity, including challenges in convergence and poor performance on datasets with large volumes. Based on these insights, we propose three optimization approaches: (1) We adopt knowledge distillation to facilitate the convergence of FedReID by better transferring knowledge from clients to the server; (2) We introduce client clustering to improve the performance of large datasets by aggregating clients with similar data distributions; (3) We propose cosine distance weight to elevate performance by dynamically updating the weights for aggregation depending on how well models are trained in clients. Extensive experiments demonstrate that these approaches achieve satisfying convergence with much better performance on all datasets. We believe that FedReID will shed light on implementing and optimizing federated learning on more computer vision applications.
abstract_zh: 日益严格的数据隐私法规限制了人员重新识别（ReID）的发展，因为人员重新识别训练需要集中包含敏感个人信息的大量数据。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了联邦行人重新识别（FedReID）——将联邦学习（一种新兴的分布式训练方法）应用于行人 ReID。 FedReID 通过将模型更新（而不是原始数据）从客户端聚合到中央服务器来保护数据隐私。此外，我们通过基准分析优化了统计异质性下 FedReID 的性能。我们首先构建一个具有增强算法、两种架构和具有较大方差的九人 ReID 数据集的基准，以模拟现实世界的统计异质性。基准测试结果展示了统计异质性下 FedReID 的见解和瓶颈，包括收敛方面的挑战和大数据集上的性能不佳。基于这些见解，我们提出了三种优化方法：（1）我们采用知识蒸馏，通过更好地将知识从客户端传输到服务器来促进FedReID的收敛； （2）我们引入客户端聚类，通过聚合具有相似数据分布的客户端来提高大型数据集的性能； (3) 我们提出余弦距离权重，通过根据模型在客户端中的训练情况动态更新聚合权重来提高性能。大量的实验表明，这些方法在所有数据集上都实现了令人满意的收敛，并具有更好的性能。我们相信 FedReID 将为在更多计算机视觉应用程序上实施和优化联邦学习带来启发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出联邦人再识别（FedReID）方法，通过联邦学习优化隐私保护下的分布式训练，并针对统计异质性提出三种优化策略。
AI.motivation: 数据隐私法规限制了传统集中式人再识别（ReID）的发展，需在保护隐私的同时解决联邦学习中统计异质性导致的收敛困难与性能瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 构建包含增强算法、两种架构及九个异质数据集的基准测试，提出知识蒸馏、客户端聚类和余弦距离权重三种优化方法以提升FedReID性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，优化方法显著提升了FedReID在异质数据集上的收敛速度与识别准确率，验证了策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FedReID为联邦学习在计算机视觉领域的应用提供了优化思路，未来可拓展至更多隐私敏感场景。

search_text: Optimizing Performance of Federated Person Re-identification: Benchmarking and Analysis 优化联合人员重新识别的性能：基准测试和分析 The increasingly stringent data privacy regulations limit the development of person re-identification (ReID) because person ReID training requires centralizing an enormous amount of data that contains sensitive personal information. To address this problem, we introduce federated person re-identification (FedReID) -- implementing federated learning, an emerging distributed training method, to person ReID. FedReID preserves data privacy by aggregating model updates, instead of raw data, from clients to a central server. Furthermore, we optimize the performance of FedReID under statistical heterogeneity via benchmark analysis. We first construct a benchmark with an enhanced algorithm, two architectures, and nine person ReID datasets with large variances to simulate the real-world statistical heterogeneity. The benchmark results present insights and bottlenecks of FedReID under statistical heterogeneity, including challenges in convergence and poor performance on datasets with large volumes. Based on these insights, we propose three optimization approaches: (1) We adopt knowledge distillation to facilitate the convergence of FedReID by better transferring knowledge from clients to the server; (2) We introduce client clustering to improve the performance of large datasets by aggregating clients with similar data distributions; (3) We propose cosine distance weight to elevate performance by dynamically updating the weights for aggregation depending on how well models are trained in clients. Extensive experiments demonstrate that these approaches achieve satisfying convergence with much better performance on all datasets. We believe that FedReID will shed light on implementing and optimizing federated learning on more computer vision applications. 日益严格的数据隐私法规限制了人员重新识别（ReID）的发展，因为人员重新识别训练需要集中包含敏感个人信息的大量数据。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了联邦行人重新识别（FedReID）——将联邦学习（一种新兴的分布式训练方法）应用于行人 ReID。 FedReID 通过将模型更新（而不是原始数据）从客户端聚合到中央服务器来保护数据隐私。此外，我们通过基准分析优化了统计异质性下 FedReID 的性能。我们首先构建一个具有增强算法、两种架构和具有较大方差的九人 ReID 数据集的基准，以模拟现实世界的统计异质性。基准测试结果展示了统计异质性下 FedReID 的见解和瓶颈，包括收敛方面的挑战和大数据集上的性能不佳。基于这些见解，我们提出了三种优化方法：（1）我们采用知识蒸馏，通过更好地将知识从客户端传输到服务器来促进FedReID的收敛； （2）我们引入客户端聚类，通过聚合具有相似数据分布的客户端来提高大型数据集的性能； (3) 我们提出余弦距离权重，通过根据模型在客户端中的训练情况动态更新聚合权重来提高性能。大量的实验表明，这些方法在所有数据集上都实现了令人满意的收敛，并具有更好的性能。我们相信 FedReID 将为在更多计算机视觉应用程序上实施和优化联邦学习带来启发。 本文提出联邦人再识别（FedReID）方法，通过联邦学习优化隐私保护下的分布式训练，并针对统计异质性提出三种优化策略。 Weiming Zhuang,Xin Gan,Yonggang Wen,Shuai Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.DC

title: QPack Scores: Quantitative performance metrics for application-oriented quantum computer benchmarking
title_zh: QPack 分数：面向应用的量子计算机基准测试的定量性能指标
abstract: This paper presents the benchmark score definitions of QPack, an application-oriented cross-platform benchmarking suite for quantum computers and simulators, which makes use of scalable Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm and Variational Quantum Eigensolver applications. Using a varied set of benchmark applications, an insight of how well a quantum computer or its simulator performs on a general NISQ-era application can be quantitatively made. This paper presents what quantum execution data can be collected and transformed into benchmark scores for application-oriented quantum benchmarking. Definitions are given for an overall benchmark score, as well as sub-scores based on runtime, accuracy, scalability and capacity performance. Using these scores, a comparison is made between various quantum computer simulators, running both locally and on vendors' remote cloud services. We also use the QPack benchmark to collect a small set of quantum execution data of the IBMQ Nairobi quantum processor. The goal of the QPack benchmark scores is to give a holistic insight into quantum performance and the ability to make easy and quick comparisons between different quantum computers
summary: This paper presents the benchmark score definitions of QPack, an application-oriented cross-platform benchmarking suite for quantum computers and simulators, which makes use of scalable Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm and Variational Quantum Eigensolver applications. Using a varied set of benchmark applications, an insight of how well a quantum computer or its simulator performs on a general NISQ-era application can be quantitatively made. This paper presents what quantum execution data can be collected and transformed into benchmark scores for application-oriented quantum benchmarking. Definitions are given for an overall benchmark score, as well as sub-scores based on runtime, accuracy, scalability and capacity performance. Using these scores, a comparison is made between various quantum computer simulators, running both locally and on vendors' remote cloud services. We also use the QPack benchmark to collect a small set of quantum execution data of the IBMQ Nairobi quantum processor. The goal of the QPack benchmark scores is to give a holistic insight into quantum performance and the ability to make easy and quick comparisons between different quantum computers
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 QPack 的基准分数定义，QPack 是一个面向应用的量子计算机和模拟器跨平台基准测试套件，它利用可扩展的量子近似优化算法和变分量子本征求解器应用程序。使用一组不同的基准应用程序，可以定量地了解量子计算机或其模拟器在通用 NISQ 时代应用程序上的执行情况。本文介绍了可以收集哪些量子执行数据并将其转换为面向应用的量子基准测试的基准分数。给出了总体基准分数以及基于运行时间、准确性、可扩展性和容量性能的子分数的定义。使用这些分数，对在本地和供应商的远程云服务上运行的各种量子计算机模拟器进行比较。我们还使用 QPack 基准测试来收集 IBMQ Nairobi 量子处理器的一小组量子执行数据。 QPack 基准分数的目标是全面了解量子性能以及在不同量子计算机之间进行轻松快速比较的能力

AI.tldr: 本文提出QPack基准评分体系，通过可扩展的量子近似优化算法和变分量子本征求解器应用，为量子计算机和模拟器提供面向应用的量化性能评估指标。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏针对噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）设备的标准化应用导向基准测试方法，需建立统一量化指标以比较不同量子计算平台的性能表现。
AI.method: 定义包含运行时、精度、可扩展性和容量的子评分体系，基于QPack基准套件收集量子执行数据，对比本地模拟器、云端服务及实际量子处理器（如IBMQ Nairobi）的性能表现。
AI.result: 通过QPack基准测试获得不同量子计算平台的量化评分，验证了该评分体系可有效反映NISQ设备在实际应用中的综合性能差异。
AI.conclusion: QPack评分体系为量子计算机性能评估提供了系统化方法，支持快速直观比较不同硬件和模拟器的适用性与优势。

authors_text: Yunpeng Bai,Cairong Wang,Chun Yuan,Yanbo Fan,Jue Wang
title: Improving the Latent Space of Image Style Transfer
title_zh: 改善图像风格迁移的潜在空间
abstract: Existing neural style transfer researches have studied to match statistical information between the deep features of content and style images, which were extracted by a pre-trained VGG, and achieved significant improvement in synthesizing artistic images. However, in some cases, the feature statistics from the pre-trained encoder may not be consistent with the visual style we perceived. For example, the style distance between images of different styles is less than that of the same style. In such an inappropriate latent space, the objective function of the existing methods will be optimized in the wrong direction, resulting in bad stylization results. In addition, the lack of content details in the features extracted by the pre-trained encoder also leads to the content leak problem. In order to solve these issues in the latent space used by style transfer, we propose two contrastive training schemes to get a refined encoder that is more suitable for this task. The style contrastive loss pulls the stylized result closer to the same visual style image and pushes it away from the content image. The content contrastive loss enables the encoder to retain more available details. We can directly add our training scheme to some existing style transfer methods and significantly improve their results. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our methods.
summary: Existing neural style transfer researches have studied to match statistical information between the deep features of content and style images, which were extracted by a pre-trained VGG, and achieved significant improvement in synthesizing artistic images. However, in some cases, the feature statistics from the pre-trained encoder may not be consistent with the visual style we perceived. For example, the style distance between images of different styles is less than that of the same style. In such an inappropriate latent space, the objective function of the existing methods will be optimized in the wrong direction, resulting in bad stylization results. In addition, the lack of content details in the features extracted by the pre-trained encoder also leads to the content leak problem. In order to solve these issues in the latent space used by style transfer, we propose two contrastive training schemes to get a refined encoder that is more suitable for this task. The style contrastive loss pulls the stylized result closer to the same visual style image and pushes it away from the content image. The content contrastive loss enables the encoder to retain more available details. We can directly add our training scheme to some existing style transfer methods and significantly improve their results. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的神经风格迁移研究研究了通过预先训练的 VGG 提取的内容和风格图像的深层特征之间的统计信息的匹配，并在合成艺术图像方面取得了显着的改进。然而，在某些情况下，预训练编码器的特征统计可能与我们感知的视觉风格不一致。例如，不同风格的图像之间的风格距离小于相同风格的图像之间的风格距离。在这样一个不合适的潜在空间中，现有方法的目标函数将会在错误的方向上进行优化，从而导致糟糕的风格化结果。此外，预训练编码器提取的特征中缺乏内容细节也会导致内容泄漏问题。为了解决风格迁移使用的潜在空间中的这些问题，我们提出了两种对比训练方案，以获得更适合该任务的精细编码器。风格对比损失使风格化结果更接近相同的视觉风格图像，并将其远离内容图像。内容对比损失使编码器能够保留更多可用的细节。我们可以直接将我们的训练方案添加到一些现有的风格迁移方法中，并显着提高其结果。大量的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 改进图像风格迁移中的潜在空间以解决现有方法在风格一致性与内容保留上的不足
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预训练编码器，但其提取的特征统计可能与人类感知的视觉风格不一致，导致风格距离计算偏差及内容细节丢失，影响迁移效果
AI.method: 提出两种对比训练方案：风格对比损失使风格化结果更接近目标风格图像并远离内容图像，内容对比损失增强细节保留能力，可直接集成到现有方法中
AI.result: 大量实验验证了方法在提升风格一致性和内容保留上的有效性，优于现有技术
AI.conclusion: 通过优化潜在空间，所提方法有效提升了风格迁移的视觉质量和内容保真度，具有广泛适用性

search_text: Improving the Latent Space of Image Style Transfer 改善图像风格迁移的潜在空间 Existing neural style transfer researches have studied to match statistical information between the deep features of content and style images, which were extracted by a pre-trained VGG, and achieved significant improvement in synthesizing artistic images. However, in some cases, the feature statistics from the pre-trained encoder may not be consistent with the visual style we perceived. For example, the style distance between images of different styles is less than that of the same style. In such an inappropriate latent space, the objective function of the existing methods will be optimized in the wrong direction, resulting in bad stylization results. In addition, the lack of content details in the features extracted by the pre-trained encoder also leads to the content leak problem. In order to solve these issues in the latent space used by style transfer, we propose two contrastive training schemes to get a refined encoder that is more suitable for this task. The style contrastive loss pulls the stylized result closer to the same visual style image and pushes it away from the content image. The content contrastive loss enables the encoder to retain more available details. We can directly add our training scheme to some existing style transfer methods and significantly improve their results. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our methods. 现有的神经风格迁移研究研究了通过预先训练的 VGG 提取的内容和风格图像的深层特征之间的统计信息的匹配，并在合成艺术图像方面取得了显着的改进。然而，在某些情况下，预训练编码器的特征统计可能与我们感知的视觉风格不一致。例如，不同风格的图像之间的风格距离小于相同风格的图像之间的风格距离。在这样一个不合适的潜在空间中，现有方法的目标函数将会在错误的方向上进行优化，从而导致糟糕的风格化结果。此外，预训练编码器提取的特征中缺乏内容细节也会导致内容泄漏问题。为了解决风格迁移使用的潜在空间中的这些问题，我们提出了两种对比训练方案，以获得更适合该任务的精细编码器。风格对比损失使风格化结果更接近相同的视觉风格图像，并将其远离内容图像。内容对比损失使编码器能够保留更多可用的细节。我们可以直接将我们的训练方案添加到一些现有的风格迁移方法中，并显着提高其结果。大量的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性和优越性。 改进图像风格迁移中的潜在空间以解决现有方法在风格一致性与内容保留上的不足 Yunpeng Bai,Cairong Wang,Chun Yuan,Yanbo Fan,Jue Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Johannes N. Hansen,Edward T. A. Mitchard,Stuart King
title: Detecting Deforestation from Sentinel-1 Data in the Absence of Reliable Reference Data
title_zh: 在缺乏可靠参考数据的情况下根据 Sentinel-1 数据检测森林砍伐
abstract: Forests are vital for the wellbeing of our planet. Large and small scale deforestation across the globe is threatening the stability of our climate, forest biodiversity, and therefore the preservation of fragile ecosystems and our natural habitat as a whole. With increasing public interest in climate change issues and forest preservation, a large demand for carbon offsetting, carbon footprint ratings, and environmental impact assessments is emerging. Most often, deforestation maps are created from optical data such as Landsat and MODIS. These maps are not typically available at less than annual intervals due to persistent cloud cover in many parts of the world, especially the tropics where most of the world's forest biomass is concentrated. Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) can fill this gap as it penetrates clouds. We propose and evaluate a novel method for deforestation detection in the absence of reliable reference data which often constitutes the largest practical hurdle. This method achieves a change detection sensitivity (producer's accuracy) of 96.5% in the study area, although false positives lead to a lower user's accuracy of about 75.7%, with a total balanced accuracy of 90.4%. The change detection accuracy is maintained when adding up to 20% noise to the reference labels. While further work is required to reduce the false positive rate, improve detection delay, and validate this method in additional circumstances, the results show that Sentinel-1 data have the potential to advance the timeliness of global deforestation monitoring.

abstract_zh: 森林对于我们星球的福祉至关重要。全球范围内大大小小的森林砍伐正在威胁着我们气候的稳定和森林生物多样性，从而威胁着脆弱的生态系统和整个自然栖息地的保护。随着公众对气候变化问题和森林保护的兴趣日益浓厚，对碳抵消、碳足迹评级和环境影响评估的巨大需求正在出现。大多数情况下，森林砍伐地图是根据 Landsat 和 MODIS 等光学数据创建的。由于世界许多地区持续云层覆盖，这些地图通常无法以小于每年一次的间隔提供，尤其是世界上大部分森林生物量集中的热带地区。合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 可以在穿透云层时填补这一空白。我们提出并评估了一种在缺乏可靠参考数据的情况下进行森林砍伐检测的新方法，这通常构成最大的实际障碍。该方法在研究区域实现了 96.5% 的变化检测灵敏度（生产者准确度），尽管误报导致用户准确度较低约 75.7%，总平衡准确度为 90.4%。当向参考标签添加高达 20% 的噪声时，可以保持变化检测的准确性。虽然需要进一步开展工作来降低误报率、改善检测延迟并在其他情况下验证该方法，但结果表明 Sentinel-1 数据有潜力提高全球毁林监测的及时性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在无可靠参考数据情况下，利用Sentinel-1合成孔径雷达数据检测森林砍伐的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统光学遥感数据受云层覆盖限制，难以及时监测热带地区森林砍伐；现有方法依赖可靠参考数据，但实际应用中此类数据获取困难。
AI.method: 基于Sentinel-1 SAR数据开发无需依赖可靠参考数据的森林砍伐检测算法，通过引入噪声鲁棒性设计提升模型稳定性。
AI.result: 在测试区域实现96.5%生产者准确率和75.7%用户准确率，平衡准确率达90.4%，且在参考数据添加20%噪声时仍保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: Sentinel-1数据可显著提升全球森林砍伐监测时效性，后续需优化误报率、检测延迟及多场景验证。

authors_text: Elio D. Di Claudio,Paolo Giannitrapani,Giovanni Jacovitti
title: Full-Reference Calibration-Free Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 全参考免校准图像质量评估
abstract: One major problem of objective Image Quality Assessment (IQA) methods is the lack of linearity of their quality estimates with respect to scores expressed by human subjects. For this reason, usually IQA metrics undergo a calibration process based on subjective quality examples. However, example-based training makes generalization problematic, hampering result comparison across different applications and operative conditions. In this paper, new Full Reference (FR) techniques, providing estimates linearly correlated with human scores without using calibration are introduced. To reach this objective, these techniques are deeply rooted on principles and theoretical constraints. Restricting the interest on the IQA of the set of natural images, it is first recognized that application of estimation theory and psycho physical principles to images degraded by Gaussian blur leads to a so-called canonical IQA method, whose estimates are not only highly linearly correlated to subjective scores, but are also straightforwardly related to the Viewing Distance (VD). Then, it is shown that mainstream IQA methods can be reconducted to the canonical method applying a preliminary metric conversion based on a unique specimen image. The application of this scheme is then extended to a significant class of degraded images other than Gaussian blur, including noisy and compressed images. The resulting calibration-free FR IQA methods are suited for applications where comparability and interoperability across different imaging systems and on different VDs is a major requirement. A comparison of their statistical performance with respect to some conventional calibration prone methods is finally provided.
summary: One major problem of objective Image Quality Assessment (IQA) methods is the lack of linearity of their quality estimates with respect to scores expressed by human subjects. For this reason, usually IQA metrics undergo a calibration process based on subjective quality examples. However, example-based training makes generalization problematic, hampering result comparison across different applications and operative conditions. In this paper, new Full Reference (FR) techniques, providing estimates linearly correlated with human scores without using calibration are introduced. To reach this objective, these techniques are deeply rooted on principles and theoretical constraints. Restricting the interest on the IQA of the set of natural images, it is first recognized that application of estimation theory and psycho physical principles to images degraded by Gaussian blur leads to a so-called canonical IQA method, whose estimates are not only highly linearly correlated to subjective scores, but are also straightforwardly related to the Viewing Distance (VD). Then, it is shown that mainstream IQA methods can be reconducted to the canonical method applying a preliminary metric conversion based on a unique specimen image. The application of this scheme is then extended to a significant class of degraded images other than Gaussian blur, including noisy and compressed images. The resulting calibration-free FR IQA methods are suited for applications where comparability and interoperability across different imaging systems and on different VDs is a major requirement. A comparison of their statistical performance with respect to some conventional calibration prone methods is finally provided.
abstract_zh: 客观图像质量评估（IQA）方法的一个主要问题是其质量估计相对于人类受试者表达的分数缺乏线性。因此，IQA 指标通常会根据主观质量示例进行校准过程。然而，基于示例的训练存在泛化问题，阻碍了不同应用和操作条件之间的结果比较。在本文中，引入了新的全参考（FR）技术，无需使用校准即可提供与人类分数线性相关的估计值。为了实现这一目标，这些技术深深植根于原理和理论约束。限制对自然图像集 IQA 的兴趣，首先认识到将估计理论和心理物理原理应用于高斯模糊降级的图像会产生所谓的规范 IQA 方法，其估计不仅与主观分数高度线性相关，而且还与观看距离（VD）直接相关。然后，结果表明，主流的 IQA 方法可以通过基于独特样本图像的初步度量转换重新转化为规范方法。然后，该方案的应用扩展到除高斯模糊之外的一类重要的降级图像，包括噪声图像和压缩图像。由此产生的免校准 FR IQA 方法适用于不同成像系统和不同 VD 之间的可比性和互操作性是主要要求的应用。最后提供了它们与一些传统校准方法的统计性能的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需校准的全参考图像质量评估方法，使质量估计与人类评分线性相关。
AI.motivation: 现有客观图像质量评估方法因缺乏与人类评分的线性关系而需依赖校准，但校准过程限制了方法的通用性和跨应用比较。
AI.method: 基于估计理论和心理物理原理，通过高斯模糊退化图像构建基准方法，并扩展至噪声和压缩图像，利用单一参考图像进行度量转换。
AI.result: 开发出无需校准的全参考IQA方法，在不同成像系统和视距下具有可比性，统计性能优于传统校准方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了校准依赖问题，为跨系统和视距的图像质量评估提供了更通用且可互操作的解决方案。
