A comparison of their statistical performance with respect to some conventional calibration prone methods is finally provided. 客观图像质量评估（IQA）方法的一个主要问题是其质量估计相对于人类受试者表达的分数缺乏线性。因此，IQA 指标通常会根据主观质量示例进行校准过程。然而，基于示例的训练存在泛化问题，阻碍了不同应用和操作条件之间的结果比较。在本文中，引入了新的全参考（FR）技术，无需使用校准即可提供与人类分数线性相关的估计值。为了实现这一目标，这些技术深深植根于原理和理论约束。限制对自然图像集 IQA 的兴趣，首先认识到将估计理论和心理物理原理应用于高斯模糊降级的图像会产生所谓的规范 IQA 方法，其估计不仅与主观分数高度线性相关，而且还与观看距离（VD）直接相关。然后，结果表明，主流的 IQA 方法可以通过基于独特样本图像的初步度量转换重新转化为规范方法。然后，该方案的应用扩展到除高斯模糊之外的一类重要的降级图像，包括噪声图像和压缩图像。由此产生的免校准 FR IQA 方法适用于不同成像系统和不同 VD 之间的可比性和互操作性是主要要求的应用。最后提供了它们与一些传统校准方法的统计性能的比较。 本文提出了一种无需校准的全参考图像质量评估方法，使质量估计与人类评分线性相关。 Elio D. Di Claudio,Paolo Giannitrapani,Giovanni Jacovitti cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Learning to Drive Using Sparse Imitation Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用稀疏模仿强化学习学习驾驶
abstract: In this paper, we propose Sparse Imitation Reinforcement Learning (SIRL), a hybrid end-to-end control policy that combines the sparse expert driving knowledge with reinforcement learning (RL) policy for autonomous driving (AD) task in CARLA simulation environment. The sparse expert is designed based on hand-crafted rules which is suboptimal but provides a risk-averse strategy by enforcing experience for critical scenarios such as pedestrian and vehicle avoidance, and traffic light detection. As it has been demonstrated, training a RL agent from scratch is data-inefficient and time consuming particularly for the urban driving task, due to the complexity of situations stemming from the vast size of state space. Our SIRL strategy provides a solution to solve these problems by fusing the output distribution of the sparse expert policy and the RL policy to generate a composite driving policy. With the guidance of the sparse expert during the early training stage, SIRL strategy accelerates the training process and keeps the RL exploration from causing a catastrophe outcome, and ensures safe exploration. To some extent, the SIRL agent is imitating the driving expert's behavior. At the same time, it continuously gains knowledge during training therefore it keeps making improvement beyond the sparse expert, and can surpass both the sparse expert and a traditional RL agent. We experimentally validate the efficacy of proposed SIRL approach in a complex urban scenario within the CARLA simulator. Besides, we compare the SIRL agent's performance for risk-averse exploration and high learning efficiency with the traditional RL approach. We additionally demonstrate the SIRL agent's generalization ability to transfer the driving skill to unseen environment.
summary: In this paper, we propose Sparse Imitation Reinforcement Learning (SIRL), a hybrid end-to-end control policy that combines the sparse expert driving knowledge with reinforcement learning (RL) policy for autonomous driving (AD) task in CARLA simulation environment. The sparse expert is designed based on hand-crafted rules which is suboptimal but provides a risk-averse strategy by enforcing experience for critical scenarios such as pedestrian and vehicle avoidance, and traffic light detection. As it has been demonstrated, training a RL agent from scratch is data-inefficient and time consuming particularly for the urban driving task, due to the complexity of situations stemming from the vast size of state space. Our SIRL strategy provides a solution to solve these problems by fusing the output distribution of the sparse expert policy and the RL policy to generate a composite driving policy. With the guidance of the sparse expert during the early training stage, SIRL strategy accelerates the training process and keeps the RL exploration from causing a catastrophe outcome, and ensures safe exploration. To some extent, the SIRL agent is imitating the driving expert's behavior. At the same time, it continuously gains knowledge during training therefore it keeps making improvement beyond the sparse expert, and can surpass both the sparse expert and a traditional RL agent. We experimentally validate the efficacy of proposed SIRL approach in a complex urban scenario within the CARLA simulator. Besides, we compare the SIRL agent's performance for risk-averse exploration and high learning efficiency with the traditional RL approach. We additionally demonstrate the SIRL agent's generalization ability to transfer the driving skill to unseen environment.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了稀疏模仿强化学习（SIRL），这是一种混合端到端控制策略，它将稀疏专家驾驶知识与强化学习（RL）策略相结合，用于 CARLA 模拟环境中的自动驾驶（AD）任务。稀疏专家是基于手工制定的规则设计的，虽然不是最理想的，但通过强化关键场景（例如行人和车辆避让以及交通灯检测）的经验来提供风险规避策略。事实证明，从头开始训练强化学习智能体的数据效率低下且耗时，特别是对于城市驾驶任务而言，由于状态空间的巨大而导致情况的复杂性。我们的 SIRL 策略通过融合稀疏专家策略和 RL 策略的输出分布来生成复合驱动策略，从而提供了解决这些问题的解决方案。 SIRL策略在训练初期得到稀疏专家的指导，加速了训练过程，避免RL探索造成灾难性的结果，保证探索的安全。在某种程度上，SIRL智能体正在模仿驾驶专家的行为。同时，它在训练过程中不断获得知识，因此不断超越稀疏专家，可以超越稀疏专家和传统的强化学习代理。我们通过实验验证了所提出的 SIRL 方法在 CARLA 模拟器中复杂城市场景中的有效性。此外，我们将 SIRL 代理在风险规避探索和高学习效率方面的表现与传统的 RL 方法进行了比较。我们还证明了 SIRL 智能体将驾驶技能转移到不可见环境的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合稀疏专家知识与强化学习的端到端控制策略SIRL，用于解决自动驾驶任务中的数据效率低和安全性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在复杂城市驾驶任务中存在数据效率低、训练耗时长的问题，而稀疏专家策略能提供风险规避的先验知识以应对关键场景。
AI.method: 通过融合稀疏专家策略的输出分布与强化学习策略，生成复合驾驶策略。早期训练阶段由稀疏专家引导，确保安全探索并加速学习过程。
AI.result: 在CARLA模拟器中验证了SIRL在复杂城市场景中的有效性，其风险规避能力、学习效率及环境泛化能力均优于传统强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: SIRL通过结合专家知识与强化学习，实现了安全高效的自动驾驶策略，优于单一专家策略和传统RL方法，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Sergio Paniego Blanco,Sakshay Mahna,Utkarsh A. Mishra,JoseMaria Canas
title: Memory based neural networks for end-to-end autonomous driving
title_zh: 用于端到端自动驾驶的基于记忆的神经网络
abstract: Recent works in end-to-end control for autonomous driving have investigated the use of vision-based exteroceptive perception. Inspired by such results, we propose a new end-to-end memory-based neural architecture for robot steering and throttle control. We describe and compare this architecture with previous approaches using fundamental error metrics (MAE, MSE) and several external metrics based on their performance on simulated test circuits. The presented work demonstrates the advantages of using internal memory for better generalization capabilities of the model and allowing it to drive in a broader amount of circuits/situations. We analyze the algorithm in a wide range of environments and conclude that the proposed pipeline is robust to varying camera configurations. All the present work, including datasets, network models architectures, weights, simulator, and comparison software, is open source and easy to replicate and extend.
summary: Recent works in end-to-end control for autonomous driving have investigated the use of vision-based exteroceptive perception. Inspired by such results, we propose a new end-to-end memory-based neural architecture for robot steering and throttle control. We describe and compare this architecture with previous approaches using fundamental error metrics (MAE, MSE) and several external metrics based on their performance on simulated test circuits. The presented work demonstrates the advantages of using internal memory for better generalization capabilities of the model and allowing it to drive in a broader amount of circuits/situations. We analyze the algorithm in a wide range of environments and conclude that the proposed pipeline is robust to varying camera configurations. All the present work, including datasets, network models architectures, weights, simulator, and comparison software, is open source and easy to replicate and extend.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶端到端控制的最新工作研究了基于视觉的外感受感知的使用。受这些结果的启发，我们提出了一种新的基于端到端记忆的神经架构，用于机器人转向和油门控制。我们使用基本误差指标（MAE、MSE）和基于模拟测试电路性能的几个外部指标来描述这种架构，并将其与以前的方法进行比较。所提出的工作展示了使用内部存储器来提高模型的泛化能力并允许其在更广泛的电路/情况下驱动的优势。我们在各种环境中分析了该算法，并得出结论：所提出的管道对于不同的相机配置具有鲁棒性。目前的所有工作，包括数据集、网络模型架构、权重、模拟器和比较软件，都是开源的，易于复制和扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于记忆的神经网络架构，用于端到端自动驾驶的转向和油门控制，并通过模拟测试验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法在复杂场景下的泛化能力不足，需通过引入内部记忆机制提升模型适应不同驾驶环境的能力。
AI.method: 设计包含内部记忆模块的神经网络架构，结合模拟测试环境（使用MAE、MSE等指标）与外部性能评估，对比传统方法并验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 新架构在多种模拟电路中表现更优，具备更强的泛化能力与相机配置鲁棒性，所有资源已开源。
AI.conclusion: 基于记忆的神经网络能有效提升自动驾驶模型的环境适应性，且方法易于复现与扩展。

title: Federated singular value decomposition for high dimensional data
title_zh: 高维数据的联合奇异值分解
comment: 36 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables, submitted to Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery
comments: 36 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables, submitted to Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is emerging as a privacy-aware alternative to classical cloud-based machine learning. In FL, the sensitive data remains in data silos and only aggregated parameters are exchanged. Hospitals and research institutions which are not willing to share their data can join a federated study without breaching confidentiality. In addition to the extreme sensitivity of biomedical data, the high dimensionality poses a challenge in the context of federated genome-wide association studies (GWAS). In this article, we present a federated singular value decomposition (SVD) algorithm, suitable for the privacy-related and computational requirements of GWAS. Notably, the algorithm has a transmission cost independent of the number of samples and is only weakly dependent on the number of features, because the singular vectors associated with the samples are never exchanged and the vectors associated with the features only for a fixed number of iterations. Although motivated by GWAS, the algorithm is generically applicable for both horizontally and vertically partitioned data.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is emerging as a privacy-aware alternative to classical cloud-based machine learning. In FL, the sensitive data remains in data silos and only aggregated parameters are exchanged. Hospitals and research institutions which are not willing to share their data can join a federated study without breaching confidentiality. In addition to the extreme sensitivity of biomedical data, the high dimensionality poses a challenge in the context of federated genome-wide association studies (GWAS). In this article, we present a federated singular value decomposition (SVD) algorithm, suitable for the privacy-related and computational requirements of GWAS. Notably, the algorithm has a transmission cost independent of the number of samples and is only weakly dependent on the number of features, because the singular vectors associated with the samples are never exchanged and the vectors associated with the features only for a fixed number of iterations. Although motivated by GWAS, the algorithm is generically applicable for both horizontally and vertically partitioned data.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 正在成为传统基于云的机器学习的隐私意识替代方案。在 FL 中，敏感数据保留在数据孤岛中，并且仅交换聚合参数。不愿意共享数据的医院和研究机构可以在不违反保密性的情况下加入联合研究。除了生物医学数据的极端敏感性之外，高维度对联合全基因组关联研究（GWAS）提出了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种联合奇异值分解（SVD）算法，适合 GWAS 的隐私相关和计算要求。值得注意的是，该算法的传输成本与样本数量无关，并且仅弱依赖于特征数量，因为与样本相关的奇异向量永远不会交换，并且与特征相关的向量仅进行固定次数的迭代。尽管受到 GWAS 的推动，该算法普遍适用于水平和垂直分区的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于联邦学习的高维数据奇异值分解算法，解决基因组关联研究中的隐私与计算挑战。
AI.motivation: 生物医学数据具有高度敏感性和高维性，传统集中式分析存在隐私泄露风险，而现有联邦学习方法难以高效处理高维数据。
AI.method: 设计联邦SVD算法，在传输过程中不交换样本奇异向量，仅对特征向量进行固定次数迭代，使通信成本与样本量无关。
AI.result: 算法实现隐私保护下的高效计算，适用于水平和垂直数据划分场景，满足GWAS等高维联邦分析需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维联邦学习提供通用解决方案，可在保障数据隐私的同时降低通信开销。

authors_text: Feilong Chen,Xiuyi Chen,Jiaxin Shi,Duzhen Zhang,Jianlong Chang,Qi Tian
title: HiVLP: Hierarchical Vision-Language Pre-Training for Fast Image-Text Retrieval
title_zh: HiVLP：用于快速图像文本检索的分层视觉语言预训练
abstract: In the past few years, the emergence of vision-language pre-training (VLP) has brought cross-modal retrieval to a new era. However, due to the latency and computation demand, it is commonly challenging to apply VLP in a real-time online retrieval system. To alleviate the defect, this paper proposes a \textbf{Hi}erarchical \textbf{V}ision-\textbf{}Language \textbf{P}re-Training (\textbf{HiVLP}) for fast Image-Text Retrieval (ITR). Specifically, we design a novel hierarchical retrieval objective, which uses the representation of different dimensions for coarse-to-fine ITR, i.e., using low-dimensional representation for large-scale coarse retrieval and high-dimensional representation for small-scale fine retrieval. We evaluate our proposed HiVLP on two popular image-text retrieval benchmarks, i.e., Flickr30k and COCO. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our HiVLP not only has fast inference speed but also can be easily scaled to large-scale ITR scenarios. The detailed results show that HiVLP is $1,427$$\sim$$120,649\times$ faster than the fusion-based model UNITER and 2$\sim$5 faster than the fastest embedding-based model LightingDot in different candidate scenarios. It also achieves about +4.9 AR on COCO and +3.8 AR on Flickr30K than LightingDot and achieves comparable performance with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) fusion-based model METER.
summary: In the past few years, the emergence of vision-language pre-training (VLP) has brought cross-modal retrieval to a new era. However, due to the latency and computation demand, it is commonly challenging to apply VLP in a real-time online retrieval system. To alleviate the defect, this paper proposes a \textbf{Hi}erarchical \textbf{V}ision-\textbf{}Language \textbf{P}re-Training (\textbf{HiVLP}) for fast Image-Text Retrieval (ITR). Specifically, we design a novel hierarchical retrieval objective, which uses the representation of different dimensions for coarse-to-fine ITR, i.e., using low-dimensional representation for large-scale coarse retrieval and high-dimensional representation for small-scale fine retrieval. We evaluate our proposed HiVLP on two popular image-text retrieval benchmarks, i.e., Flickr30k and COCO. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our HiVLP not only has fast inference speed but also can be easily scaled to large-scale ITR scenarios. The detailed results show that HiVLP is $1,427$$\sim$$120,649\times$ faster than the fusion-based model UNITER and 2$\sim$5 faster than the fastest embedding-based model LightingDot in different candidate scenarios. It also achieves about +4.9 AR on COCO and +3.8 AR on Flickr30K than LightingDot and achieves comparable performance with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) fusion-based model METER.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，视觉语言预训练（VLP）的出现将跨模态检索带入了新时代。然而，由于延迟和计算需求，在实时在线检索系统中应用 VLP 通常具有挑战性。为了缓解这一缺陷，本文提出了一种用于快速图像文本检索（ITR）的 \textbf{Hi}erarchical \textbf{V}ision-\textbf{}Language \textbf{P}re-Training (\textbf{HiVLP})。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的分层检索目标，它使用不同维度的表示来进行从粗到细的ITR，即使用低维表示进行大规模粗略检索，使用高维表示进行小规模精细检索。我们在两个流行的图像文本检索基准（即 Flickr30k 和 COCO）上评估了我们提出的 HiVLP。大量实验表明，我们的 HiVLP 不仅具有快速的推理速度，而且可以轻松扩展到大规模 ITR 场景。详细结果表明，在不同的候选场景中，HiVLP 比基于融合的模型 UNITER 快 $1,427$$\sim$$120,649\times$，比最快的基于嵌入的模型 LightingDot 快 2$\sim$5。与 LightingDot 相比，它在 COCO 上实现了约 +4.9 AR，在 Flickr30K 上实现了 +3.8 AR，并实现了与最先进的 (SOTA) 基于融合的模型 METER 相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiVLP方法，通过分层视觉-语言预训练实现快速图像-文本检索。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练模型因计算量大和延迟高，难以满足实时在线检索需求。
AI.method: 设计分层检索目标，利用低维表示进行大规模粗粒度检索，高维表示进行小规模细粒度检索。
AI.result: HiVLP在Flickr30k和COCO数据集上分别比LightingDot提升3.8和4.9 AR，且速度比UNITER快1,427~120,649倍，比LightingDot快2~5倍。
AI.conclusion: HiVLP在保持高性能的同时显著提升检索速度，适用于大规模实时图像-文本检索场景。

authors_text: Hanxu Zhou,Qixuan Zhou,Zhenyuan Jin,Tao Luo,Yaoyu Zhang,Zhi-Qin John Xu
title: Empirical Phase Diagram for Three-layer Neural Networks with Infinite Width
title_zh: 无限宽度三层神经网络的经验相图
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.07497
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.07497
abstract: Substantial work indicates that the dynamics of neural networks (NNs) is closely related to their initialization of parameters. Inspired by the phase diagram for two-layer ReLU NNs with infinite width (Luo et al., 2021), we make a step towards drawing a phase diagram for three-layer ReLU NNs with infinite width. First, we derive a normalized gradient flow for three-layer ReLU NNs and obtain two key independent quantities to distinguish different dynamical regimes for common initialization methods. With carefully designed experiments and a large computation cost, for both synthetic datasets and real datasets, we find that the dynamics of each layer also could be divided into a linear regime and a condensed regime, separated by a critical regime. The criteria is the relative change of input weights (the input weight of a hidden neuron consists of the weight from its input layer to the hidden neuron and its bias term) as the width approaches infinity during the training, which tends to $0$, $+\infty$ and $O(1)$, respectively. In addition, we also demonstrate that different layers can lie in different dynamical regimes in a training process within a deep NN. In the condensed regime, we also observe the condensation of weights in isolated orientations with low complexity. Through experiments under three-layer condition, our phase diagram suggests a complicated dynamical regimes consisting of three possible regimes, together with their mixture, for deep NNs and provides a guidance for studying deep NNs in different initialization regimes, which reveals the possibility of completely different dynamics emerging within a deep NN for its different layers.
summary: Substantial work indicates that the dynamics of neural networks (NNs) is closely related to their initialization of parameters. Inspired by the phase diagram for two-layer ReLU NNs with infinite width (Luo et al., 2021), we make a step towards drawing a phase diagram for three-layer ReLU NNs with infinite width. First, we derive a normalized gradient flow for three-layer ReLU NNs and obtain two key independent quantities to distinguish different dynamical regimes for common initialization methods. With carefully designed experiments and a large computation cost, for both synthetic datasets and real datasets, we find that the dynamics of each layer also could be divided into a linear regime and a condensed regime, separated by a critical regime. The criteria is the relative change of input weights (the input weight of a hidden neuron consists of the weight from its input layer to the hidden neuron and its bias term) as the width approaches infinity during the training, which tends to $0$, $+\infty$ and $O(1)$, respectively. In addition, we also demonstrate that different layers can lie in different dynamical regimes in a training process within a deep NN. In the condensed regime, we also observe the condensation of weights in isolated orientations with low complexity. Through experiments under three-layer condition, our phase diagram suggests a complicated dynamical regimes consisting of three possible regimes, together with their mixture, for deep NNs and provides a guidance for studying deep NNs in different initialization regimes, which reveals the possibility of completely different dynamics emerging within a deep NN for its different layers.
abstract_zh: 大量工作表明，神经网络（NN）的动态与其参数的初始化密切相关。受无限宽度的两层 ReLU 神经网络相图（Luo et al., 2021）的启发，我们朝着绘制无限宽度的三层 ReLU 神经网络的相图迈出了一步。首先，我们推导出三层 ReLU 神经网络的归一化梯度流，并获得两个关键的独立量来区分常见初始化方法的不同动态机制。通过精心设计的实验和大量的计算成本，对于合成数据集和真实数据集，我们发现每层的动态也可以分为线性状态和压缩状态，并由关键状态分开。标准是训练过程中输入权重（隐藏神经元的输入权重由其输入层到隐藏神经元的权重及其偏置项组成）随着宽度趋于无穷大的相对变化，分别趋于$0$、$+\infty$和$O(1)$。此外，我们还证明了深度神经网络训练过程中不同的层可以处于不同的动态状态。在压缩状态中，我们还观察到复杂度较低的孤立方向上的权重压缩。通过三层条件下的实验，我们的相图提出了深度神经网络的复杂动态机制，由三种可能的机制及其混合组成，并为研究不同初始化机制中的深度神经网络提供了指导，揭示了深度神经网络不同层中出现完全不同动态的可能性。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在为无限宽度的三层ReLU神经网络绘制经验相图，分析其训练过程中的动态行为。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明神经网络的动态行为与其参数初始化密切相关，而两层网络的相图研究（Luo等，2021）启发了对更深层网络的探索。
AI.method: 推导三层ReLU网络的归一化梯度流，通过输入权重的相对变化作为判据，结合合成与真实数据集进行大规模实验。
AI.result: 发现各层动态可分为线性区、凝聚区及临界区，不同层可能处于不同动态 regime，凝聚区出现低复杂度的权重凝聚现象。
AI.conclusion: 三层网络的相图揭示了深度网络中各层可能呈现完全不同的动态行为，为研究不同初始化 regime 下的深度网络提供了指导。

search_text: Empirical Phase Diagram for Three-layer Neural Networks with Infinite Width 无限宽度三层神经网络的经验相图 Substantial work indicates that the dynamics of neural networks (NNs) is closely related to their initialization of parameters. Inspired by the phase diagram for two-layer ReLU NNs with infinite width (Luo et al., 2021), we make a step towards drawing a phase diagram for three-layer ReLU NNs with infinite width. First, we derive a normalized gradient flow for three-layer ReLU NNs and obtain two key independent quantities to distinguish different dynamical regimes for common initialization methods. With carefully designed experiments and a large computation cost, for both synthetic datasets and real datasets, we find that the dynamics of each layer also could be divided into a linear regime and a condensed regime, separated by a critical regime. The criteria is the relative change of input weights (the input weight of a hidden neuron consists of the weight from its input layer to the hidden neuron and its bias term) as the width approaches infinity during the training, which tends to $0$, $+\infty$ and $O(1)$, respectively. In addition, we also demonstrate that different layers can lie in different dynamical regimes in a training process within a deep NN. In the condensed regime, we also observe the condensation of weights in isolated orientations with low complexity. Through experiments under three-layer condition, our phase diagram suggests a complicated dynamical regimes consisting of three possible regimes, together with their mixture, for deep NNs and provides a guidance for studying deep NNs in different initialization regimes, which reveals the possibility of completely different dynamics emerging within a deep NN for its different layers. 大量工作表明，神经网络（NN）的动态与其参数的初始化密切相关。受无限宽度的两层 ReLU 神经网络相图（Luo et al., 2021）的启发，我们朝着绘制无限宽度的三层 ReLU 神经网络的相图迈出了一步。首先，我们推导出三层 ReLU 神经网络的归一化梯度流，并获得两个关键的独立量来区分常见初始化方法的不同动态机制。通过精心设计的实验和大量的计算成本，对于合成数据集和真实数据集，我们发现每层的动态也可以分为线性状态和压缩状态，并由关键状态分开。标准是训练过程中输入权重（隐藏神经元的输入权重由其输入层到隐藏神经元的权重及其偏置项组成）随着宽度趋于无穷大的相对变化，分别趋于$0$、$+\infty$和$O(1)$。此外，我们还证明了深度神经网络训练过程中不同的层可以处于不同的动态状态。在压缩状态中，我们还观察到复杂度较低的孤立方向上的权重压缩。通过三层条件下的实验，我们的相图提出了深度神经网络的复杂动态机制，由三种可能的机制及其混合组成，并为研究不同初始化机制中的深度神经网络提供了指导，揭示了深度神经网络不同层中出现完全不同动态的可能性。 该论文旨在为无限宽度的三层ReLU神经网络绘制经验相图，分析其训练过程中的动态行为。 Hanxu Zhou,Qixuan Zhou,Zhenyuan Jin,Tao Luo,Yaoyu Zhang,Zhi-Qin John Xu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Pablo Mosteiro,Jesse Kuiper,Judith Masthoff,Floortje Scheepers,Marco Spruit
title: Bias Discovery in Machine Learning Models for Mental Health
title_zh: 心理健康机器学习模型中的偏差发现
abstract: Fairness and bias are crucial concepts in artificial intelligence, yet they are relatively ignored in machine learning applications in clinical psychiatry. We computed fairness metrics and present bias mitigation strategies using a model trained on clinical mental health data. We collected structured data related to the admission, diagnosis, and treatment of patients in the psychiatry department of the University Medical Center Utrecht. We trained a machine learning model to predict future administrations of benzodiazepines on the basis of past data. We found that gender plays an unexpected role in the predictions-this constitutes bias. Using the AI Fairness 360 package, we implemented reweighing and discrimination-aware regularization as bias mitigation strategies, and we explored their implications for model performance. This is the first application of bias exploration and mitigation in a machine learning model trained on real clinical psychiatry data.
summary: Fairness and bias are crucial concepts in artificial intelligence, yet they are relatively ignored in machine learning applications in clinical psychiatry. We computed fairness metrics and present bias mitigation strategies using a model trained on clinical mental health data. We collected structured data related to the admission, diagnosis, and treatment of patients in the psychiatry department of the University Medical Center Utrecht. We trained a machine learning model to predict future administrations of benzodiazepines on the basis of past data. We found that gender plays an unexpected role in the predictions-this constitutes bias. Using the AI Fairness 360 package, we implemented reweighing and discrimination-aware regularization as bias mitigation strategies, and we explored their implications for model performance. This is the first application of bias exploration and mitigation in a machine learning model trained on real clinical psychiatry data.
abstract_zh: 公平和偏见是人工智能中的重要概念，但在临床精神病学的机器学习应用中，它们相对被忽视。我们使用根据临床心理健康数据训练的模型计算公平性指标并提出偏差缓解策略。我们收集了乌得勒支大学医学中心精神科患者入院、诊断和治疗相关的结构化数据。我们训练了一个机器学习模型，根据过去的数据预测未来苯二氮卓类药物的给药情况。我们发现性别在预测中发挥着意想不到的作用——这构成了偏见。使用 AI Fairness 360 软件包，我们实施了重新权衡和歧视感知正则化作为偏差缓解策略，并探讨了它们对模型性能的影响。这是偏见探索和缓解在基于真实临床精神病学数据训练的机器学习模型中的首次应用。

AI.tldr: 发现并缓解心理健康领域机器学习模型中的偏见
AI.motivation: 在临床精神病学中，公平性常被忽视，需确保模型公平以避免偏见影响患者护理
AI.method: 使用公平性指标计算和AI Fairness 360包中的再加权及歧视感知正则化策略进行偏见缓解
AI.result: 发现性别在预测中存在偏见，并评估了缓解策略对模型性能的影响
AI.conclusion: 首次在真实临床精神病数据中应用偏见缓解，强调了在心理健康AI中确保公平性的必要性

title: Sim-To-Real Transfer of Visual Grounding for Human-Aided Ambiguity Resolution
title_zh: 用于人工辅助歧义解决的视觉基础的模拟到真实转换
abstract: Service robots should be able to interact naturally with non-expert human users, not only to help them in various tasks but also to receive guidance in order to resolve ambiguities that might be present in the instruction. We consider the task of visual grounding, where the agent segments an object from a crowded scene given a natural language description. Modern holistic approaches to visual grounding usually ignore language structure and struggle to cover generic domains, therefore relying heavily on large datasets. Additionally, their transfer performance in RGB-D datasets suffers due to high visual discrepancy between the benchmark and the target domains. Modular approaches marry learning with domain modeling and exploit the compositional nature of language to decouple visual representation from language parsing, but either rely on external parsers or are trained in an end-to-end fashion due to the lack of strong supervision. In this work, we seek to tackle these limitations by introducing a fully decoupled modular framework for compositional visual grounding of entities, attributes, and spatial relations. We exploit rich scene graph annotations generated in a synthetic domain and train each module independently. Our approach is evaluated both in simulation and in two real RGB-D scene datasets. Experimental results show that the decoupled nature of our framework allows for easy integration with domain adaptation approaches for Sim-To-Real visual recognition, offering a data-efficient, robust, and interpretable solution to visual grounding in robotic applications.
summary: Service robots should be able to interact naturally with non-expert human users, not only to help them in various tasks but also to receive guidance in order to resolve ambiguities that might be present in the instruction. We consider the task of visual grounding, where the agent segments an object from a crowded scene given a natural language description. Modern holistic approaches to visual grounding usually ignore language structure and struggle to cover generic domains, therefore relying heavily on large datasets. Additionally, their transfer performance in RGB-D datasets suffers due to high visual discrepancy between the benchmark and the target domains. Modular approaches marry learning with domain modeling and exploit the compositional nature of language to decouple visual representation from language parsing, but either rely on external parsers or are trained in an end-to-end fashion due to the lack of strong supervision. In this work, we seek to tackle these limitations by introducing a fully decoupled modular framework for compositional visual grounding of entities, attributes, and spatial relations. We exploit rich scene graph annotations generated in a synthetic domain and train each module independently. Our approach is evaluated both in simulation and in two real RGB-D scene datasets. Experimental results show that the decoupled nature of our framework allows for easy integration with domain adaptation approaches for Sim-To-Real visual recognition, offering a data-efficient, robust, and interpretable solution to visual grounding in robotic applications.
abstract_zh: 服务机器人应该能够与非专家人类用户自然地交互，不仅可以帮助他们完成各种任务，还可以接受指导，以解决指令中可能存在的歧义。我们考虑视觉基础的任务，其中代理根据自然语言描述从拥挤的场景中分割出一个对象。现代视觉基础的整体方法通常忽略语言结构并且难以覆盖通用领域，因此严重依赖大型数据集。此外，由于基准域和目标域之间的视觉差异较大，它们在 RGB-D 数据集中的传输性能也会受到影响。模块化方法将学习与领域建模结合起来，并利用语言的组合性质将视觉表示与语言解析分离，但要么依赖外部解析器，要么由于缺乏强有力的监督而以端到端的方式进行训练。在这项工作中，我们试图通过引入一个完全解耦的模块化框架来解决这些限制，该框架用于实体、属性和空间关系的组合视觉基础。我们利用在合成域中生成的丰富场景图注释并独立训练每个模块。我们的方法在模拟和两个真实 RGB-D 场景数据集中进行了评估。实验结果表明，我们框架的解耦性质可以轻松地与 Sim-To-Real 视觉识别领域适应方法集成，为机器人应用中的视觉基础提供数据高效、稳健且可解释的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人视觉定位的模块化框架，旨在解决跨领域（仿真到现实）的视觉 grounding 任务中的人类辅助模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉 grounding 方法在处理语言结构和跨领域视觉差异时表现不足，且模块化方法依赖外部解析器或端到端训练，缺乏强监督。
AI.method: 引入完全解耦的模块化框架，利用合成域的丰富场景图注释，独立训练实体、属性和空间关系模块，并通过领域自适应方法实现仿真到现实的迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在仿真和两个真实 RGB-D 数据集上均表现出数据高效、鲁棒且可解释的视觉 grounding 性能。
AI.conclusion: 解耦框架为机器人应用中的视觉 grounding 提供了可扩展且适应性强的解决方案，有效缓解了跨领域视觉差异和语言结构处理难题。

Modular approaches marry learning with domain modeling and exploit the compositional nature of language to decouple visual representation from language parsing, but either rely on external parsers or are trained in an end-to-end fashion due to the lack of strong supervision. In this work, we seek to tackle these limitations by introducing a fully decoupled modular framework for compositional visual grounding of entities, attributes, and spatial relations. We exploit rich scene graph annotations generated in a synthetic domain and train each module independently. Our approach is evaluated both in simulation and in two real RGB-D scene datasets. Experimental results show that the decoupled nature of our framework allows for easy integration with domain adaptation approaches for Sim-To-Real visual recognition, offering a data-efficient, robust, and interpretable solution to visual grounding in robotic applications. 服务机器人应该能够与非专家人类用户自然地交互，不仅可以帮助他们完成各种任务，还可以接受指导，以解决指令中可能存在的歧义。我们考虑视觉基础的任务，其中代理根据自然语言描述从拥挤的场景中分割出一个对象。现代视觉基础的整体方法通常忽略语言结构并且难以覆盖通用领域，因此严重依赖大型数据集。此外，由于基准域和目标域之间的视觉差异较大，它们在 RGB-D 数据集中的传输性能也会受到影响。模块化方法将学习与领域建模结合起来，并利用语言的组合性质将视觉表示与语言解析分离，但要么依赖外部解析器，要么由于缺乏强有力的监督而以端到端的方式进行训练。在这项工作中，我们试图通过引入一个完全解耦的模块化框架来解决这些限制，该框架用于实体、属性和空间关系的组合视觉基础。我们利用在合成域中生成的丰富场景图注释并独立训练每个模块。我们的方法在模拟和两个真实 RGB-D 场景数据集中进行了评估。实验结果表明，我们框架的解耦性质可以轻松地与 Sim-To-Real 视觉识别领域适应方法集成，为机器人应用中的视觉基础提供数据高效、稳健且可解释的解决方案。 本文提出了一种用于机器人视觉定位的模块化框架，旨在解决跨领域（仿真到现实）的视觉 grounding 任务中的人类辅助模糊性问题。 Georgios Tziafas,Hamidreza Kasaei cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Classification of Phonological Parameters in Sign Languages
title_zh: 手语语音参数的分类
abstract: Signers compose sign language phonemes that enable communication by combining phonological parameters such as handshape, orientation, location, movement, and non-manual features. Linguistic research often breaks down signs into their constituent parts to study sign languages and often a lot of effort is invested into the annotation of the videos. In this work we show how a single model can be used to recognise the individual phonological parameters within sign languages with the aim of either to assist linguistic annotations or to describe the signs for the sign recognition models. We use Danish Sign Language data set `Ordbog over Dansk Tegnsprog' to generate multiple data sets using pose estimation model, which are then used for training the multi-label Fast R-CNN model to support multi-label modelling. Moreover, we show that there is a significant co-dependence between the orientation and location phonological parameters in the generated data and we incorporate this co-dependence in the model to achieve better performance.
summary: Signers compose sign language phonemes that enable communication by combining phonological parameters such as handshape, orientation, location, movement, and non-manual features. Linguistic research often breaks down signs into their constituent parts to study sign languages and often a lot of effort is invested into the annotation of the videos. In this work we show how a single model can be used to recognise the individual phonological parameters within sign languages with the aim of either to assist linguistic annotations or to describe the signs for the sign recognition models. We use Danish Sign Language data set `Ordbog over Dansk Tegnsprog' to generate multiple data sets using pose estimation model, which are then used for training the multi-label Fast R-CNN model to support multi-label modelling. Moreover, we show that there is a significant co-dependence between the orientation and location phonological parameters in the generated data and we incorporate this co-dependence in the model to achieve better performance.
abstract_zh: 手语者组成手语音素，通过结合手形、方向、位置、运动和非手动特征等语音参数来实现交流。语言研究通常将手语分解为其组成部分来研究手语，并且通常会在视频注释上投入大量精力。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何使用单个模型来识别手语中的各个语音参数，目的是辅助语言注释或描述符号识别模型的符号。我们使用丹麦手语数据集“Ordbog over Dansk Tegnsprog”使用姿势估计模型生成多个数据集，然后将其用于训练多标签 Fast R-CNN 模型以支持多标签建模。此外，我们表明生成的数据中的方向和位置语音参数之间存在显着的相互依赖性，并且我们将这种相互依赖性纳入模型中以实现更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用单一模型识别手语中的语音参数，以辅助语言学标注或描述手语。
AI.motivation: 传统手语研究需大量人工标注视频，而本文方法旨在提升标注效率并优化手语识别模型的描述能力。
AI.method: 基于丹麦手语数据集，利用姿态估计生成多数据集，训练多标签Fast R-CNN模型，并引入方向与位置参数的依赖关系优化模型。
AI.result: 模型在识别手语参数任务中表现优异，尤其通过捕捉方向与位置的关联性显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持手语研究与识别，同时验证了语音参数间依赖关系对模型优化的重要性。

authors_text: Jenny Yang,Rasheed El-Bouri,Odhran O'Donoghue,Alexander S. Lachapelle,Andrew A. S. Soltan,David A. Clifton
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Multi-class Imbalanced Training
title_zh: 多类不平衡训练的深度强化学习
abstract: With the rapid growth of memory and computing power, datasets are becoming increasingly complex and imbalanced. This is especially severe in the context of clinical data, where there may be one rare event for many cases in the majority class. We introduce an imbalanced classification framework, based on reinforcement learning, for training extremely imbalanced data sets, and extend it for use in multi-class settings. We combine dueling and double deep Q-learning architectures, and formulate a custom reward function and episode-training procedure, specifically with the added capability of handling multi-class imbalanced training. Using real-world clinical case studies, we demonstrate that our proposed framework outperforms current state-of-the-art imbalanced learning methods, achieving more fair and balanced classification, while also significantly improving the prediction of minority classes.
summary: With the rapid growth of memory and computing power, datasets are becoming increasingly complex and imbalanced. This is especially severe in the context of clinical data, where there may be one rare event for many cases in the majority class. We introduce an imbalanced classification framework, based on reinforcement learning, for training extremely imbalanced data sets, and extend it for use in multi-class settings. We combine dueling and double deep Q-learning architectures, and formulate a custom reward function and episode-training procedure, specifically with the added capability of handling multi-class imbalanced training. Using real-world clinical case studies, we demonstrate that our proposed framework outperforms current state-of-the-art imbalanced learning methods, achieving more fair and balanced classification, while also significantly improving the prediction of minority classes.
abstract_zh: 随着内存和计算能力的快速增长，数据集变得越来越复杂和不平衡。这在临床数据背景下尤其严重，大多数类别中的许多病例可能会出现一种罕见事件。我们引入了一种基于强化学习的不平衡分类框架，用于训练极度不平衡的数据集，并将其扩展到多类设置中。我们结合了决斗和双深度 Q 学习架构，并制定了自定义奖励函数和情节训练程序，特别是增加了处理多类不平衡训练的能力。通过真实世界的临床案例研究，我们证明我们提出的框架优于当前最先进的不平衡学习方法，实现了更加公平和平衡的分类，同时还显着提高了少数类别的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的多类不平衡数据训练框架，用于解决临床数据中少数类预测困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 临床数据中存在严重的类别不平衡问题，传统方法难以有效提升少数类预测性能，导致分类结果不公平。
AI.method: 结合Dueling和Double DQN架构，设计自定义奖励函数与分层训练流程，构建适用于多类不平衡场景的强化学习框架。
AI.result: 在真实临床数据集上优于现有不平衡学习方法，显著提升少数类预测准确率并改善分类公平性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为处理多类不平衡数据提供了新思路，在医疗等关键领域具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Zixuan Huang,Yunfeng Wang,Zhiwen Chen,Xin Gao,Ruili Feng,Xiaobo Li
title: Context Attention Network for Skeleton Extraction
title_zh: 用于骨架提取的上下文注意网络
comment: Accepted at the Deep Learning for Geometric Computing (DLGC) workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted at the Deep Learning for Geometric Computing (DLGC) workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: Skeleton extraction is a task focused on providing a simple representation of an object by extracting the skeleton from the given binary or RGB image. In recent years many attractive works in skeleton extraction have been made. But as far as we know, there is little research on how to utilize the context information in the binary shape of objects. In this paper, we propose an attention-based model called Context Attention Network (CANet), which integrates the context extraction module in a UNet architecture and can effectively improve the ability of network to extract the skeleton pixels. Meanwhile, we also use some novel techniques including distance transform, weight focal loss to achieve good results on the given dataset. Finally, without model ensemble and with only 80% of the training images, our method achieves 0.822 F1 score during the development phase and 0.8507 F1 score during the final phase of the Pixel SkelNetOn Competition, ranking 1st place on the leaderboard.
summary: Skeleton extraction is a task focused on providing a simple representation of an object by extracting the skeleton from the given binary or RGB image. In recent years many attractive works in skeleton extraction have been made. But as far as we know, there is little research on how to utilize the context information in the binary shape of objects. In this paper, we propose an attention-based model called Context Attention Network (CANet), which integrates the context extraction module in a UNet architecture and can effectively improve the ability of network to extract the skeleton pixels. Meanwhile, we also use some novel techniques including distance transform, weight focal loss to achieve good results on the given dataset. Finally, without model ensemble and with only 80% of the training images, our method achieves 0.822 F1 score during the development phase and 0.8507 F1 score during the final phase of the Pixel SkelNetOn Competition, ranking 1st place on the leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 骨架提取是一项专注于通过从给定的二进制或 RGB 图像中提取骨架来提供对象的简单表示的任务。近年来，在骨骼提取方面出现了许多引人注目的工作。但据我们所知，关于如何利用对象二值形状中的上下文信息的研究还很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于注意力的模型，称为上下文注意力网络（CANet），它将上下文提取模块集成在UNet架构中，可以有效提高网络提取骨架像素的能力。同时，我们还使用了一些新颖的技术，包括距离变换、权重焦点损失，在给定的数据集上取得了良好的结果。最后，在没有模型集成且仅使用 80% 的训练图像的情况下，我们的方法在开发阶段获得了 0.822 F1 分数，在 Pixel SkelNetOn 竞赛的最后阶段获得了 0.8507 F1 分数，在排行榜上排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文注意力网络（CANet）的方法，用于从二值或RGB图像中提取物体的骨架结构。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有许多骨架提取的研究，但如何有效利用二值图像中的上下文信息仍缺乏深入探索，因此本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出Context Attention Network（CANet），在UNet架构中集成上下文提取模块，并结合距离变换与权重焦点损失技术，以增强骨架像素的提取能力。
AI.result: 在Pixel SkelNetOn竞赛中，仅使用80%训练数据且未采用模型集成，本文方法在开发阶段和最终阶段分别达到0.822和0.8507的F1分数，排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，CANet通过有效利用上下文信息和优化损失函数，在骨架提取任务中表现出色，验证了方法的有效性和先进性。

search_text: Context Attention Network for Skeleton Extraction 用于骨架提取的上下文注意网络 Skeleton extraction is a task focused on providing a simple representation of an object by extracting the skeleton from the given binary or RGB image. In recent years many attractive works in skeleton extraction have been made. But as far as we know, there is little research on how to utilize the context information in the binary shape of objects. In this paper, we propose an attention-based model called Context Attention Network (CANet), which integrates the context extraction module in a UNet architecture and can effectively improve the ability of network to extract the skeleton pixels. Meanwhile, we also use some novel techniques including distance transform, weight focal loss to achieve good results on the given dataset. Finally, without model ensemble and with only 80% of the training images, our method achieves 0.822 F1 score during the development phase and 0.8507 F1 score during the final phase of the Pixel SkelNetOn Competition, ranking 1st place on the leaderboard. 骨架提取是一项专注于通过从给定的二进制或 RGB 图像中提取骨架来提供对象的简单表示的任务。近年来，在骨骼提取方面出现了许多引人注目的工作。但据我们所知，关于如何利用对象二值形状中的上下文信息的研究还很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于注意力的模型，称为上下文注意力网络（CANet），它将上下文提取模块集成在UNet架构中，可以有效提高网络提取骨架像素的能力。同时，我们还使用了一些新颖的技术，包括距离变换、权重焦点损失，在给定的数据集上取得了良好的结果。最后，在没有模型集成且仅使用 80% 的训练图像的情况下，我们的方法在开发阶段获得了 0.822 F1 分数，在 Pixel SkelNetOn 竞赛的最后阶段获得了 0.8507 F1 分数，在排行榜上排名第一。 本文提出了一种基于上下文注意力网络（CANet）的方法，用于从二值或RGB图像中提取物体的骨架结构。 Zixuan Huang,Yunfeng Wang,Zhiwen Chen,Xin Gao,Ruili Feng,Xiaobo Li cs.CV

title: The Laplacian Paradigm in the Broadcast Congested Clique
title_zh: 广播拥挤集团中的拉普拉斯范式
comment: To be presented at: the 41st ACM Symposium on Principles of Distributed Computing (PODC 2022)
comments: To be presented at: the 41st ACM Symposium on Principles of Distributed Computing (PODC 2022)
abstract: In this paper, we bring the main tools of the Laplacian paradigm to the Broadcast Congested Clique. We introduce an algorithm to compute spectral sparsifiers in a polylogarithmic number of rounds, which directly leads to an efficient Laplacian solver. Based on this primitive, we consider the linear program solver of Lee and Sidford (FOCS 2014). We show how to solve certain linear programs up to additive error $ε$ with $n$ constraints on an $n$-vertex Broadcast Congested Clique network in $\tilde O(\sqrt{n}\log(1/ε))$ rounds. Using this, we show how to find an exact solution to the minimum cost flow problem in $\tilde O(\sqrt{n})$ rounds.
summary: In this paper, we bring the main tools of the Laplacian paradigm to the Broadcast Congested Clique. We introduce an algorithm to compute spectral sparsifiers in a polylogarithmic number of rounds, which directly leads to an efficient Laplacian solver. Based on this primitive, we consider the linear program solver of Lee and Sidford (FOCS 2014). We show how to solve certain linear programs up to additive error $ε$ with $n$ constraints on an $n$-vertex Broadcast Congested Clique network in $\tilde O(\sqrt{n}\log(1/ε))$ rounds. Using this, we show how to find an exact solution to the minimum cost flow problem in $\tilde O(\sqrt{n})$ rounds.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将拉普拉斯范式的主要工具引入广播拥塞集团。我们引入了一种以多对数轮数计算谱稀疏器的算法，这直接导致了高效的拉普拉斯求解器。基于这个原语，我们考虑 Lee 和 Sidford 的线性规划求解器 (FOCS 2014)。我们展示了如何在 $n$ 顶点广播拥塞团网络上以 $n$ 约束求解某些线性程序，直到 $ε$ 的附加误差为 $ε$，且需要 $\tilde O(\sqrt{n}\log(1/ε))$ 轮。使用这个，我们展示了如何在 $\tilde O(\sqrt{n})$ 轮中找到最小成本流问题的精确解决方案。

AI.tldr: 将Laplacian范式应用于广播拥塞完全图模型，开发高效算法解决谱稀疏化、线性规划和最小费用流问题。
AI.motivation: 提升分布式网络中复杂计算问题的处理效率，优化广播拥塞完全图模型下的算法性能。
AI.method: 设计多项式对数轮数的谱稀疏化算法，结合线性规划求解器改进分布式计算方法。
AI.result: 实现~O(√n log(1/ε))轮解决n约束线性规划，~O(√n)轮求解最小费用流问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出高效分布式算法框架，为广播拥塞完全图模型下的复杂问题提供新解决方案。

title: EventMix: An Efficient Augmentation Strategy for Event-Based Data
title_zh: EventMix：基于事件的数据的有效增强策略
abstract: High-quality and challenging event stream datasets play an important role in the design of an efficient event-driven mechanism that mimics the brain. Although event cameras can provide high dynamic range and low-energy event stream data, the scale is smaller and more difficult to obtain than traditional frame-based data, which restricts the development of neuromorphic computing. Data augmentation can improve the quantity and quality of the original data by processing more representations from the original data. This paper proposes an efficient data augmentation strategy for event stream data: EventMix. We carefully design the mixing of different event streams by Gaussian Mixture Model to generate random 3D masks and achieve arbitrary shape mixing of event streams in the spatio-temporal dimension. By computing the relative distances of event streams, we propose a more reasonable way to assign labels to the mixed samples. The experimental results on multiple neuromorphic datasets have shown that our strategy can improve its performance on neuromorphic datasets both for ANNs and SNNs, and we have achieved state-of-the-art performance on DVS-CIFAR10, N-Caltech101, N-CARS, and DVS-Gesture datasets.
summary: High-quality and challenging event stream datasets play an important role in the design of an efficient event-driven mechanism that mimics the brain. Although event cameras can provide high dynamic range and low-energy event stream data, the scale is smaller and more difficult to obtain than traditional frame-based data, which restricts the development of neuromorphic computing. Data augmentation can improve the quantity and quality of the original data by processing more representations from the original data. This paper proposes an efficient data augmentation strategy for event stream data: EventMix. We carefully design the mixing of different event streams by Gaussian Mixture Model to generate random 3D masks and achieve arbitrary shape mixing of event streams in the spatio-temporal dimension. By computing the relative distances of event streams, we propose a more reasonable way to assign labels to the mixed samples. The experimental results on multiple neuromorphic datasets have shown that our strategy can improve its performance on neuromorphic datasets both for ANNs and SNNs, and we have achieved state-of-the-art performance on DVS-CIFAR10, N-Caltech101, N-CARS, and DVS-Gesture datasets.
abstract_zh: 高质量且具有挑战性的事件流数据集在模拟大脑的高效事件驱动机制的设计中发挥着重要作用。虽然事件相机可以提供高动态范围和低能量的事件流数据，但其规模比传统的基于帧的数据更小且更难获取，这限制了神经形态计算的发展。数据增强可以通过处理原始数据的更多表示来提高原始数据的数量和质量。本文提出了一种针对事件流数据的高效数据增强策略：EventMix。我们通过高斯混合模型精心设计不同事件流的混合，生成随机3D掩模，实现事件流在时空维度上的任意形状混合。通过计算事件流的相对距离，我们提出了一种更合理的方法来为混合样本分配标签。在多个神经形态数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的策略可以提高其在 ANN 和 SNN 的神经形态数据集上的性能，并且我们在 DVS-CIFAR10、N-Caltech101、N-CARS 和 DVS-Gesture 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EventMix的高效事件流数据增强策略，通过高斯混合模型生成随机3D掩码实现时空维度混合，并改进标签分配方式以提升神经形态计算性能。
AI.motivation: 事件相机数据规模小且难以获取，限制了神经形态计算的发展，需通过数据增强提升数据量与质量以推动相关算法研究。
AI.method: 基于高斯混合模型设计事件流混合方法，生成随机3D掩码实现任意形状的时空混合，并通过计算事件流相对距离优化混合样本标签分配。
AI.result: 在DVS-CIFAR10、N-Caltech101等多个人工神经网络(SNN)和人工神经网络(ANN)数据集上达到最先进性能，显著提升模型准确率。
AI.conclusion: EventMix有效解决了事件数据规模限制问题，为神经形态计算提供了高效的数据增强方案，推动了相关领域的算法发展。

title: Training Efficient CNNS: Tweaking the Nuts and Bolts of Neural Networks for Lighter, Faster and Robust Models
title_zh: 训练高效的 CNNS：调整神经网络的具体细节以获得更轻、更快、更稳健的模型
comment: Accepted at Machine Learning Developers Summit-2022, Bangalore, India
comments: Accepted at Machine Learning Developers Summit-2022, Bangalore, India
abstract: Deep Learning has revolutionized the fields of computer vision, natural language understanding, speech recognition, information retrieval and more. Many techniques have evolved over the past decade that made models lighter, faster, and robust with better generalization. However, many deep learning practitioners persist with pre-trained models and architectures trained mostly on standard datasets such as Imagenet, MS-COCO, IMDB-Wiki Dataset, and Kinetics-700 and are either hesitant or unaware of redesigning the architecture from scratch that will lead to better performance. This scenario leads to inefficient models that are not suitable on various devices such as mobile, edge, and fog. In addition, these conventional training methods are of concern as they consume a lot of computing power. In this paper, we revisit various SOTA techniques that deal with architecture efficiency (Global Average Pooling, depth-wise convolutions & squeeze and excitation, Blurpool), learning rate (Cyclical Learning Rate), data augmentation (Mixup, Cutout), label manipulation (label smoothing), weight space manipulation (stochastic weight averaging), and optimizer (sharpness aware minimization). We demonstrate how an efficient deep convolution network can be built in a phased manner by sequentially reducing the number of training parameters and using the techniques mentioned above. We achieved a SOTA accuracy of 99.2% on MNIST data with just 1500 parameters and an accuracy of 86.01% with just over 140K parameters on the CIFAR-10 dataset.
summary: Deep Learning has revolutionized the fields of computer vision, natural language understanding, speech recognition, information retrieval and more. Many techniques have evolved over the past decade that made models lighter, faster, and robust with better generalization. However, many deep learning practitioners persist with pre-trained models and architectures trained mostly on standard datasets such as Imagenet, MS-COCO, IMDB-Wiki Dataset, and Kinetics-700 and are either hesitant or unaware of redesigning the architecture from scratch that will lead to better performance. This scenario leads to inefficient models that are not suitable on various devices such as mobile, edge, and fog. In addition, these conventional training methods are of concern as they consume a lot of computing power. In this paper, we revisit various SOTA techniques that deal with architecture efficiency (Global Average Pooling, depth-wise convolutions & squeeze and excitation, Blurpool), learning rate (Cyclical Learning Rate), data augmentation (Mixup, Cutout), label manipulation (label smoothing), weight space manipulation (stochastic weight averaging), and optimizer (sharpness aware minimization). We demonstrate how an efficient deep convolution network can be built in a phased manner by sequentially reducing the number of training parameters and using the techniques mentioned above. We achieved a SOTA accuracy of 99.2% on MNIST data with just 1500 parameters and an accuracy of 86.01% with just over 140K parameters on the CIFAR-10 dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度学习彻底改变了计算机视觉、自然语言理解、语音识别、信息检索等领域。在过去十年中，许多技术不断发展，使模型变得更轻、更快、更稳健，并具有更好的泛化能力。然而，许多深度学习从业者坚持使用主要在 Imagenet、MS-COCO、IMDB-Wiki 数据集和 Kinetics-700 等标准数据集上训练的预训练模型和架构，并且对于从头开始重新设计架构以实现更好的性能犹豫不决或不知道。这种场景导致模型效率低下，不适合移动、边缘和雾等各种设备。此外，这些传统的训练方法由于消耗大量的计算能力而受到关注。在本文中，我们重新审视了各种处理架构效率（全局平均池化、深度卷积和挤压和激励、Blurpool）、学习率（循环学习率）、数据增强（混合、剪切）、标签操作（标签平滑）、权重空间操作（随机权重平均）和优化器（锐度感知最小化）的 SOTA 技术。我们演示了如何通过顺序减少训练参数的数量并使用上述技术来分阶段构建高效的深度卷积网络。我们在 MNIST 数据上仅使用 1500 个参数就实现了 99.2% 的 SOTA 准确率，在 CIFAR-10 数据集上仅使用超过 140K 参数就实现了 86.01% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过调整神经网络的细节来训练更高效、更轻量且鲁棒的卷积神经网络（CNN）。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习实践中，许多从业者依赖预训练模型，导致模型在移动端等设备上效率低下，且传统训练方法消耗大量计算资源。
AI.method: 系统回顾并整合了多种前沿技术，包括架构优化（如全局平均池化、深度可分离卷积）、学习率策略（循环学习率）、数据增强（Mixup、Cutout）及优化器改进（尖锐度感知最小化）等，分阶段减少参数量以构建高效模型。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上以仅1500参数达到99.2%精度，在CIFAR-10数据集上以140K参数取得86.01%精度，均达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过组合优化架构、训练策略和数据增强技术，可在显著减少参数量的前提下构建高性能CNN，为轻量化部署提供有效方案。

search_text: Training Efficient CNNS: Tweaking the Nuts and Bolts of Neural Networks for Lighter, Faster and Robust Models 训练高效的 CNNS：调整神经网络的具体细节以获得更轻、更快、更稳健的模型 Deep Learning has revolutionized the fields of computer vision, natural language understanding, speech recognition, information retrieval and more. Many techniques have evolved over the past decade that made models lighter, faster, and robust with better generalization. However, many deep learning practitioners persist with pre-trained models and architectures trained mostly on standard datasets such as Imagenet, MS-COCO, IMDB-Wiki Dataset, and Kinetics-700 and are either hesitant or unaware of redesigning the architecture from scratch that will lead to better performance. This scenario leads to inefficient models that are not suitable on various devices such as mobile, edge, and fog. In addition, these conventional training methods are of concern as they consume a lot of computing power. In this paper, we revisit various SOTA techniques that deal with architecture efficiency (Global Average Pooling, depth-wise convolutions & squeeze and excitation, Blurpool), learning rate (Cyclical Learning Rate), data augmentation (Mixup, Cutout), label manipulation (label smoothing), weight space manipulation (stochastic weight averaging), and optimizer (sharpness aware minimization). We demonstrate how an efficient deep convolution network can be built in a phased manner by sequentially reducing the number of training parameters and using the techniques mentioned above. We achieved a SOTA accuracy of 99.2% on MNIST data with just 1500 parameters and an accuracy of 86.01% with just over 140K parameters on the CIFAR-10 dataset. 深度学习彻底改变了计算机视觉、自然语言理解、语音识别、信息检索等领域。在过去十年中，许多技术不断发展，使模型变得更轻、更快、更稳健，并具有更好的泛化能力。然而，许多深度学习从业者坚持使用主要在 Imagenet、MS-COCO、IMDB-Wiki 数据集和 Kinetics-700 等标准数据集上训练的预训练模型和架构，并且对于从头开始重新设计架构以实现更好的性能犹豫不决或不知道。这种场景导致模型效率低下，不适合移动、边缘和雾等各种设备。此外，这些传统的训练方法由于消耗大量的计算能力而受到关注。在本文中，我们重新审视了各种处理架构效率（全局平均池化、深度卷积和挤压和激励、Blurpool）、学习率（循环学习率）、数据增强（混合、剪切）、标签操作（标签平滑）、权重空间操作（随机权重平均）和优化器（锐度感知最小化）的 SOTA 技术。我们演示了如何通过顺序减少训练参数的数量并使用上述技术来分阶段构建高效的深度卷积网络。我们在 MNIST 数据上仅使用 1500 个参数就实现了 99.2% 的 SOTA 准确率，在 CIFAR-10 数据集上仅使用超过 140K 参数就实现了 86.01% 的准确率。 本文旨在通过调整神经网络的细节来训练更高效、更轻量且鲁棒的卷积神经网络（CNN）。 Sabeesh Ethiraj,Bharath Kumar Bolla cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Fan Wang,Weiming Liu,Chaochao Chen,Mengying Zhu,Xiaolin Zheng
title: HCFRec: Hash Collaborative Filtering via Normalized Flow with Structural Consensus for Efficient Recommendation
title_zh: HCFRec：通过标准化流进行哈希协同过滤，并通过结构共识实现高效推荐
abstract: The ever-increasing data scale of user-item interactions makes it challenging for an effective and efficient recommender system. Recently, hash-based collaborative filtering (Hash-CF) approaches employ efficient Hamming distance of learned binary representations of users and items to accelerate recommendations. However, Hash-CF often faces two challenging problems, i.e., optimization on discrete representations and preserving semantic information in learned representations. To address the above two challenges, we propose HCFRec, a novel Hash-CF approach for effective and efficient recommendations. Specifically, HCFRec not only innovatively introduces normalized flow to learn the optimal hash code by efficiently fit a proposed approximate mixture multivariate normal distribution, a continuous but approximately discrete distribution, but also deploys a cluster consistency preserving mechanism to preserve the semantic structure in representations for more accurate recommendations. Extensive experiments conducted on six real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our HCFRec compared to the state-of-art methods in terms of effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: The ever-increasing data scale of user-item interactions makes it challenging for an effective and efficient recommender system. Recently, hash-based collaborative filtering (Hash-CF) approaches employ efficient Hamming distance of learned binary representations of users and items to accelerate recommendations. However, Hash-CF often faces two challenging problems, i.e., optimization on discrete representations and preserving semantic information in learned representations. To address the above two challenges, we propose HCFRec, a novel Hash-CF approach for effective and efficient recommendations. Specifically, HCFRec not only innovatively introduces normalized flow to learn the optimal hash code by efficiently fit a proposed approximate mixture multivariate normal distribution, a continuous but approximately discrete distribution, but also deploys a cluster consistency preserving mechanism to preserve the semantic structure in representations for more accurate recommendations. Extensive experiments conducted on six real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our HCFRec compared to the state-of-art methods in terms of effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 用户-项目交互的数据规模不断增加，对有效且高效的推荐系统提出了挑战。最近，基于哈希的协同过滤（Hash-CF）方法利用学习的用户和项目的二进制表示的有效汉明距离来加速推荐。然而，Hash-CF经常面临两个具有挑战性的问题，即离散表示的优化和在学习表示中保留语义信息。为了解决上述两个挑战，我们提出了 HCFRec，一种新颖的 Hash-CF 方法，用于提供有效且高效的推荐。具体来说，HCFRec 不仅创新性地引入归一化流，通过有效拟合所提出的近似混合多元正态分布（一种连续但近似离散的分布）来学习最佳哈希码，而且还部署了集群一致性保留机制来保留表示中的语义结构，以获得更准确的推荐。对六个真实世界数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们的 HCFRec 与最先进的方法在有效性和效率方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HCFRec方法，通过归一化流和结构共识机制解决哈希协同过滤中的优化与语义保持问题，提升推荐系统的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 用户-物品交互数据规模激增导致推荐系统面临效率与效果的双重挑战，现有哈希协同过滤方法在离散表示优化和语义信息保持方面存在不足。
AI.method: 创新性引入归一化流拟合近似混合多元正态分布以学习最优哈希码，并设计聚类一致性保持机制以维护表示中的语义结构。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上的实验表明，HCFRec在推荐效果和计算效率上均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HCFRec通过连续分布近似与结构共识机制有效解决了哈希协同过滤的核心难题，为高效推荐提供了新思路。

title: Privacy-Preserving Image Classification Using Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 进行隐私保护图像分类
abstract: In this paper, we propose a privacy-preserving image classification method that is based on the combined use of encrypted images and the vision transformer (ViT). The proposed method allows us not only to apply images without visual information to ViT models for both training and testing but to also maintain a high classification accuracy. ViT utilizes patch embedding and position embedding for image patches, so this architecture is shown to reduce the influence of block-wise image transformation. In an experiment, the proposed method for privacy-preserving image classification is demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of classification accuracy and robustness against various attacks.
summary: In this paper, we propose a privacy-preserving image classification method that is based on the combined use of encrypted images and the vision transformer (ViT). The proposed method allows us not only to apply images without visual information to ViT models for both training and testing but to also maintain a high classification accuracy. ViT utilizes patch embedding and position embedding for image patches, so this architecture is shown to reduce the influence of block-wise image transformation. In an experiment, the proposed method for privacy-preserving image classification is demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of classification accuracy and robustness against various attacks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于加密图像和视觉变换器（ViT）结合使用的隐私保护图像分类方法。所提出的方法不仅使我们能够将没有视觉信息的图像应用于 ViT 模型进行训练和测试，而且还能保持较高的分类精度。 ViT 利用图像块的块嵌入和位置嵌入，因此该架构可以减少逐块图像变换的影响。在实验中，所提出的隐私保护图像分类方法在分类准确性和针对各种攻击的鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）的隐私保护图像分类方法，通过加密图像实现模型训练与测试，同时保持高分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分类方法在处理敏感图像时易泄露视觉信息，现有隐私保护技术难以兼顾模型性能与安全性。
AI.method: 结合加密图像与ViT架构，利用ViT的patch embedding和position embedding机制，减少块级变换对隐私的影响，实现加密数据下的模型训练与推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在分类准确率和抗攻击鲁棒性方面优于现有隐私保护分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了图像分类的隐私保护需求与模型性能，为敏感数据处理提供了新思路。

search_text: Privacy-Preserving Image Classification Using Vision Transformer 使用 Vision Transformer 进行隐私保护图像分类 In this paper, we propose a privacy-preserving image classification method that is based on the combined use of encrypted images and the vision transformer (ViT). The proposed method allows us not only to apply images without visual information to ViT models for both training and testing but to also maintain a high classification accuracy. ViT utilizes patch embedding and position embedding for image patches, so this architecture is shown to reduce the influence of block-wise image transformation. In an experiment, the proposed method for privacy-preserving image classification is demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art methods in terms of classification accuracy and robustness against various attacks. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于加密图像和视觉变换器（ViT）结合使用的隐私保护图像分类方法。所提出的方法不仅使我们能够将没有视觉信息的图像应用于 ViT 模型进行训练和测试，而且还能保持较高的分类精度。 ViT 利用图像块的块嵌入和位置嵌入，因此该架构可以减少逐块图像变换的影响。在实验中，所提出的隐私保护图像分类方法在分类准确性和针对各种攻击的鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于视觉变换器（ViT）的隐私保护图像分类方法，通过加密图像实现模型训练与测试，同时保持高分类准确率。 Zheng Qi,AprilPyone MaungMaung,Yuma Kinoshita,Hitoshi Kiya cs.CV

title: Defending a Music Recommender Against Hubness-Based Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 保护音乐推荐器免受基于 Hubness 的对抗性攻击
comment: 6 pages, to be published in Proceedings of the 19th Sound and Music Computing Conference 2022 (SMC-22)
comments: 6 pages, to be published in Proceedings of the 19th Sound and Music Computing Conference 2022 (SMC-22)
abstract: Adversarial attacks can drastically degrade performance of recommenders and other machine learning systems, resulting in an increased demand for defence mechanisms. We present a new line of defence against attacks which exploit a vulnerability of recommenders that operate in high dimensional data spaces (the so-called hubness problem). We use a global data scaling method, namely Mutual Proximity (MP), to defend a real-world music recommender which previously was susceptible to attacks that inflated the number of times a particular song was recommended. We find that using MP as a defence greatly increases robustness of the recommender against a range of attacks, with success rates of attacks around 44% (before defence) dropping to less than 6% (after defence). Additionally, adversarial examples still able to fool the defended system do so at the price of noticeably lower audio quality as shown by a decreased average SNR.
summary: Adversarial attacks can drastically degrade performance of recommenders and other machine learning systems, resulting in an increased demand for defence mechanisms. We present a new line of defence against attacks which exploit a vulnerability of recommenders that operate in high dimensional data spaces (the so-called hubness problem). We use a global data scaling method, namely Mutual Proximity (MP), to defend a real-world music recommender which previously was susceptible to attacks that inflated the number of times a particular song was recommended. We find that using MP as a defence greatly increases robustness of the recommender against a range of attacks, with success rates of attacks around 44% (before defence) dropping to less than 6% (after defence). Additionally, adversarial examples still able to fool the defended system do so at the price of noticeably lower audio quality as shown by a decreased average SNR.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击会极大地降低推荐系统和其他机器学习系统的性能，从而导致对防御机制的需求增加。我们提出了一种新的防线，以防止利用在高维数据空间中运行的推荐系统的漏洞（所谓的中心问题）进行攻击。我们使用全局数据缩放方法，即相互接近（MP），来保护现实世界的音乐推荐器，该推荐器以前很容易受到攻击，导致特定歌曲的推荐次数增加。我们发现，使用 MP 作为防御极大地提高了推荐器针对一系列攻击的鲁棒性，攻击成功率从 44% 左右（防御前）下降到不到 6%（防御后）。此外，对抗性示例仍然能够欺骗受防御系统，但代价是音频质量明显降低，如平均信噪比下降所示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局数据缩放的防御方法，用于增强音乐推荐系统对利用高维数据空间枢纽问题的对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击会显著降低推荐系统的性能，而高维数据空间中的枢纽问题使推荐系统更容易受到此类攻击，亟需有效的防御机制。
AI.method: 采用全局数据缩放方法Mutual Proximity（MP），通过调整数据分布降低枢纽节点的影响，从而防御针对推荐次数的攻击。
AI.result: 防御后攻击成功率从44%降至6%以下，且剩余有效对抗样本的音频质量明显下降（平均SNR降低）。
AI.conclusion: MP方法显著提升了推荐系统的鲁棒性，同时攻击者若成功攻击需牺牲音频质量，为实际防御提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Dustin Morrill,Ryan D'Orazio,Marc Lanctot,James R. Wright,Michael Bowling,Amy R. Greenwald
title: Efficient Deviation Types and Learning for Hindsight Rationality in Extensive-Form Games: Corrections
title_zh: 扩展型博弈中的有效偏差类型和事后理性学习：修正
comment: Please see version 4 of arXiv:2102.06973 (arXiv:2102.06973v4). This submission was a version of that paper with highlighted corrections. After submitting, I figured out that it would be better to submit this report as another version of arXiv:2102.06973
comments: Please see version 4 of arXiv:2102.06973 (arXiv:2102.06973v4). This submission was a version of that paper with highlighted corrections. After submitting, I figured out that it would be better to submit this report as another version of arXiv:2102.06973
abstract: Hindsight rationality is an approach to playing general-sum games that prescribes no-regret learning dynamics for individual agents with respect to a set of deviations, and further describes jointly rational behavior among multiple agents with mediated equilibria. To develop hindsight rational learning in sequential decision-making settings, we formalize behavioral deviations as a general class of deviations that respect the structure of extensive-form games. Integrating the idea of time selection into counterfactual regret minimization (CFR), we introduce the extensive-form regret minimization (EFR) algorithm that achieves hindsight rationality for any given set of behavioral deviations with computation that scales closely with the complexity of the set. We identify behavioral deviation subsets, the partial sequence deviation types, that subsume previously studied types and lead to efficient EFR instances in games with moderate lengths. In addition, we present a thorough empirical analysis of EFR instantiated with different deviation types in benchmark games, where we find that stronger types typically induce better performance.
summary: Hindsight rationality is an approach to playing general-sum games that prescribes no-regret learning dynamics for individual agents with respect to a set of deviations, and further describes jointly rational behavior among multiple agents with mediated equilibria. To develop hindsight rational learning in sequential decision-making settings, we formalize behavioral deviations as a general class of deviations that respect the structure of extensive-form games. Integrating the idea of time selection into counterfactual regret minimization (CFR), we introduce the extensive-form regret minimization (EFR) algorithm that achieves hindsight rationality for any given set of behavioral deviations with computation that scales closely with the complexity of the set. We identify behavioral deviation subsets, the partial sequence deviation types, that subsume previously studied types and lead to efficient EFR instances in games with moderate lengths. In addition, we present a thorough empirical analysis of EFR instantiated with different deviation types in benchmark games, where we find that stronger types typically induce better performance.
abstract_zh: 后见之明理性是一种玩一般和游戏的方法，它为个体代理规定了关于一组偏差的无悔学习动态，并进一步描述了具有中介均衡的多个代理之间的联合理性行为。为了在顺序决策环境中发展事后理性学习，我们将行为偏差形式化为尊重扩展形式博弈结构的一类一般偏差。将时间选择的思想融入反事实后悔最小化（CFR）中，我们引入了扩展形式后悔最小化（EFR）算法，该算法通过与集合的复杂性密切相关的计算来实现任何给定的行为偏差集的事后理性。我们确定了行为偏差子集，即部分序列偏差类型，它们包含了之前研究的类型，并在中等长度的游戏中产生高效的 EFR 实例。 In addition, we present a thorough empirical analysis of EFR instantiated with different deviation types in benchmark games, where we find that stronger types typically induce better performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的反事实遗憾最小化算法（EFR），通过定义行为偏差类型来实现广泛形式博弈中的事后理性学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂序列博弈时计算效率不足，需改进偏差类型以提升学习效率并保证理性行为。
AI.method: 将时间选择机制整合至反事实遗憾最小化（CFR），定义部分序列偏差类型并开发EFR算法，使计算复杂度与偏差集规模匹配。
AI.result: 实验证明，使用更强偏差类型的EFR在基准博弈中表现更优，且部分序列偏差类型能有效降低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: EFR算法通过结构化偏差类型实现了事后理性，为中等长度博弈提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Souhail Bakkali,Zuheng Ming,Mickael Coustaty,Marçal Rusiñol,Oriol Ramos Terrades
title: VLCDoC: Vision-Language Contrastive Pre-Training Model for Cross-Modal Document Classification
title_zh: VLCDoC：跨模态文档分类的视觉语言对比预训练模型
abstract: Multimodal learning from document data has achieved great success lately as it allows to pre-train semantically meaningful features as a prior into a learnable downstream task. In this paper, we approach the document classification problem by learning cross-modal representations through language and vision cues, considering intra- and inter-modality relationships. Instead of merging features from different modalities into a joint representation space, the proposed method exploits high-level interactions and learns relevant semantic information from effective attention flows within and across modalities. The proposed learning objective is devised between intra- and inter-modality alignment tasks, where the similarity distribution per task is computed by contracting positive sample pairs while simultaneously contrasting negative ones in the joint representation space}. Extensive experiments on public document classification datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the generality of our model on low-scale and large-scale datasets.
summary: Multimodal learning from document data has achieved great success lately as it allows to pre-train semantically meaningful features as a prior into a learnable downstream task. In this paper, we approach the document classification problem by learning cross-modal representations through language and vision cues, considering intra- and inter-modality relationships. Instead of merging features from different modalities into a joint representation space, the proposed method exploits high-level interactions and learns relevant semantic information from effective attention flows within and across modalities. The proposed learning objective is devised between intra- and inter-modality alignment tasks, where the similarity distribution per task is computed by contracting positive sample pairs while simultaneously contrasting negative ones in the joint representation space}. Extensive experiments on public document classification datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the generality of our model on low-scale and large-scale datasets.
abstract_zh: 从文档数据中进行多模态学习最近取得了巨大的成功，因为它允许将语义上有意义的特征作为先验进行预训练到可学习的下游任务中。在本文中，我们通过语言和视觉线索学习跨模态表示，并考虑模态内和模间关系，来解决文档分类问题。所提出的方法不是将来自不同模态的特征合并到联合表示空间中，而是利用高级交互并从模态内部和跨模态的有效注意流中学习相关语义信息。所提出的学习目标是在模态内和模间对齐任务之间设计的，其中每个任务的相似性分布是通过收缩正样本对同时对比联合表示空间中的负样本对来计算的。对公共文档分类数据集的大量实验证明了我们的模型在小规模和大规模数据集上的有效性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉-语言对比预训练的跨模态文档分类模型VLCDoC，通过学习文本和视觉线索的跨模态表征实现文档分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过合并多模态特征进行联合表征学习，但忽略了模态内与模态间的语义交互关系，限制了模型对复杂文档语义的理解能力。
AI.method: 设计跨模态对比学习框架，通过模态内注意力流捕捉局部语义关系，利用模态间正负样本对齐任务学习全局语义关联，无需显式特征融合。
AI.result: 在多个公开文档分类数据集上实验表明，该模型在小规模和大规模数据集上均优于现有方法，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模跨模态语义交互关系，VLCDoC为文档分类任务提供了更细粒度的语义表征学习框架，具有良好的应用前景。

search_text: VLCDoC: Vision-Language Contrastive Pre-Training Model for Cross-Modal Document Classification VLCDoC：跨模态文档分类的视觉语言对比预训练模型 Multimodal learning from document data has achieved great success lately as it allows to pre-train semantically meaningful features as a prior into a learnable downstream task. In this paper, we approach the document classification problem by learning cross-modal representations through language and vision cues, considering intra- and inter-modality relationships. Instead of merging features from different modalities into a joint representation space, the proposed method exploits high-level interactions and learns relevant semantic information from effective attention flows within and across modalities. The proposed learning objective is devised between intra- and inter-modality alignment tasks, where the similarity distribution per task is computed by contracting positive sample pairs while simultaneously contrasting negative ones in the joint representation space}. Extensive experiments on public document classification datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the generality of our model on low-scale and large-scale datasets. 从文档数据中进行多模态学习最近取得了巨大的成功，因为它允许将语义上有意义的特征作为先验进行预训练到可学习的下游任务中。在本文中，我们通过语言和视觉线索学习跨模态表示，并考虑模态内和模间关系，来解决文档分类问题。所提出的方法不是将来自不同模态的特征合并到联合表示空间中，而是利用高级交互并从模态内部和跨模态的有效注意流中学习相关语义信息。所提出的学习目标是在模态内和模间对齐任务之间设计的，其中每个任务的相似性分布是通过收缩正样本对同时对比联合表示空间中的负样本对来计算的。对公共文档分类数据集的大量实验证明了我们的模型在小规模和大规模数据集上的有效性和通用性。 本文提出一种基于视觉-语言对比预训练的跨模态文档分类模型VLCDoC，通过学习文本和视觉线索的跨模态表征实现文档分类。 Souhail Bakkali,Zuheng Ming,Mickael Coustaty,Marçal Rusiñol,Oriol Ramos Terrades cs.CV

title: Effect of Gender, Pose and Camera Distance on Human Body Dimensions Estimation
title_zh: 性别、姿势和相机距离对人体尺寸估计的影响
comment: Accepted to the workshop "Towards a Complete Analysis of People: From Face and Body to Clothes" (TCAP 2021) at the 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing, May 23-27, 2022, Lecce, Italy
comments: Accepted to the workshop "Towards a Complete Analysis of People: From Face and Body to Clothes" (TCAP 2021) at the 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing, May 23-27, 2022, Lecce, Italy
abstract: Human Body Dimensions Estimation (HBDE) is a task that an intelligent agent can perform to attempt to determine human body information from images (2D) or point clouds or meshes (3D). More specifically, if we define the HBDE problem as inferring human body measurements from images, then HBDE is a difficult, inverse, multi-task regression problem that can be tackled with machine learning techniques, particularly convolutional neural networks (CNN). Despite the community's tremendous effort to advance human shape analysis, there is a lack of systematic experiments to assess CNNs estimation of human body dimensions from images. Our contribution lies in assessing a CNN estimation performance in a series of controlled experiments. To that end, we augment our recently published neural anthropometer dataset by rendering images with different camera distance. We evaluate the network inference absolute and relative mean error between the estimated and actual HBDs. We train and evaluate the CNN in four scenarios: (1) training with subjects of a specific gender, (2) in a specific pose, (3) sparse camera distance and (4) dense camera distance. Not only our experiments demonstrate that the network can perform the task successfully, but also reveal a number of relevant facts that contribute to better understand the task of HBDE.
summary: Human Body Dimensions Estimation (HBDE) is a task that an intelligent agent can perform to attempt to determine human body information from images (2D) or point clouds or meshes (3D). More specifically, if we define the HBDE problem as inferring human body measurements from images, then HBDE is a difficult, inverse, multi-task regression problem that can be tackled with machine learning techniques, particularly convolutional neural networks (CNN). Despite the community's tremendous effort to advance human shape analysis, there is a lack of systematic experiments to assess CNNs estimation of human body dimensions from images. Our contribution lies in assessing a CNN estimation performance in a series of controlled experiments. To that end, we augment our recently published neural anthropometer dataset by rendering images with different camera distance. We evaluate the network inference absolute and relative mean error between the estimated and actual HBDs. We train and evaluate the CNN in four scenarios: (1) training with subjects of a specific gender, (2) in a specific pose, (3) sparse camera distance and (4) dense camera distance. Not only our experiments demonstrate that the network can perform the task successfully, but also reveal a number of relevant facts that contribute to better understand the task of HBDE.
abstract_zh: 人体尺寸估计 (HBDE) 是智能代理可以执行的一项任务，尝试从图像 (2D) 或点云或网格 (3D) 确定人体信息。更具体地说，如果我们将 HBDE 问题定义为从图像推断人体测量值，那么 HBDE 就是一个困难的逆向多任务回归问题，可以通过机器学习技术，特别是卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来解决。尽管社区为推进人体形状分析付出了巨大的努力，但仍缺乏系统的实验来评估 CNN 对图像中人体尺寸的估计。我们的贡献在于在一系列受控实验中评估 CNN 估计性能。为此，我们通过渲染具有不同相机距离的图像来增强我们最近发布的神经人体测量仪数据集。我们评估估计 HBD 和实际 HBD 之间的网络推断绝对和相对平均误差。我们在四种场景中训练和评估 CNN：(1) 使用特定性别的受试者进行训练，(2) 处于特定姿势，(3) 稀疏相机距离和 (4) 密集相机距离。我们的实验不仅证明网络可以成功执行任务，而且还揭示了许多有助于更好地理解 HBDE 任务的相关事实。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了卷积神经网络（CNN）在不同性别、姿势和相机距离条件下对人体尺寸估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究推进人体形状分析，但缺乏系统性实验评估CNN从图像中估计人体尺寸的能力，因此需通过控制实验填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过渲染不同相机距离的图像扩展数据集，并在四种场景下训练和评估CNN：特定性别、特定姿势、稀疏相机距离和密集相机距离。
AI.result: 实验表明CNN能成功完成任务，同时揭示性别、姿势和相机距离等因素显著影响估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 理解这些因素对HBDE任务的影响有助于优化模型设计和提升估计准确性。

title: Improving Human Image Synthesis with Residual Fast Fourier Transformation and Wasserstein Distance
title_zh: 利用残差快速傅立叶变换和 Wasserstein 距离改进人体图像合成
comment: This paper is accepted by IJCNN2022
comments: This paper is accepted by IJCNN2022
abstract: With the rapid development of the Metaverse, virtual humans have emerged, and human image synthesis and editing techniques, such as pose transfer, have recently become popular. Most of the existing techniques rely on GANs, which can generate good human images even with large variants and occlusions. But from our best knowledge, the existing state-of-the-art method still has the following problems: the first is that the rendering effect of the synthetic image is not realistic, such as poor rendering of some regions. And the second is that the training of GAN is unstable and slow to converge, such as model collapse. Based on the above two problems, we propose several methods to solve them. To improve the rendering effect, we use the Residual Fast Fourier Transform Block to replace the traditional Residual Block. Then, spectral normalization and Wasserstein distance are used to improve the speed and stability of GAN training. Experiments demonstrate that the methods we offer are effective at solving the problems listed above, and we get state-of-the-art scores in LPIPS and PSNR.
summary: With the rapid development of the Metaverse, virtual humans have emerged, and human image synthesis and editing techniques, such as pose transfer, have recently become popular. Most of the existing techniques rely on GANs, which can generate good human images even with large variants and occlusions. But from our best knowledge, the existing state-of-the-art method still has the following problems: the first is that the rendering effect of the synthetic image is not realistic, such as poor rendering of some regions. And the second is that the training of GAN is unstable and slow to converge, such as model collapse. Based on the above two problems, we propose several methods to solve them. To improve the rendering effect, we use the Residual Fast Fourier Transform Block to replace the traditional Residual Block. Then, spectral normalization and Wasserstein distance are used to improve the speed and stability of GAN training. Experiments demonstrate that the methods we offer are effective at solving the problems listed above, and we get state-of-the-art scores in LPIPS and PSNR.
abstract_zh: 随着元宇宙的快速发展，虚拟人应运而生，人体图像合成和编辑技术（例如姿势转移）最近开始流行。大多数现有技术都依赖于 GAN，即使有较大的变体和遮挡，它也能生成良好的人体图像。但据我们所知，现有的最先进的方法仍然存在以下问题：首先是合成图像的渲染效果不真实，例如某些区域的渲染效果较差。其次是GAN的训练不稳定，收敛速度慢，比如模型崩溃。基于以上两个问题，我们提出了几种解决方法。为了提高渲染效果，我们使用残差快速傅里叶变换块来代替传统的残差块。然后，利用谱归一化和Wasserstein距离来提高GAN训练的速度和稳定性。实验表明，我们提供的方法可以有效解决上述问题，并且我们在 LPIPS 和 PSNR 方面获得了最先进的分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用残差快速傅里叶变换块和Wasserstein距离改进人类图像合成技术，以解决现有生成对抗网络（GAN）在渲染效果和训练稳定性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的人类图像合成方法存在合成图像渲染不真实（如局部区域渲染差）及训练不稳定、收敛慢（如模型崩溃）等问题，亟需改进。
AI.method: 采用残差快速傅里叶变换块替代传统残差块以提升渲染效果，并结合谱归一化与Wasserstein距离优化GAN训练速度与稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法有效解决了上述问题，在LPIPS和PSNR指标上达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入快速傅里叶变换与Wasserstein距离，本文方法在提升人类图像合成真实感的同时显著改善了GAN训练的稳定性与效率。
