search_text: SHARP: Shape-Aware Reconstruction of People in Loose Clothing SHARP：对穿着宽松衣服的人进行形状感知重建 Recent advancements in deep learning have enabled 3D human body reconstruction from a monocular image, which has broad applications in multiple domains. In this paper, we propose SHARP (SHape Aware Reconstruction of People in loose clothing), a novel end-to-end trainable network that accurately recovers the 3D geometry and appearance of humans in loose clothing from a monocular image. SHARP uses a sparse and efficient fusion strategy to combine parametric body prior with a non-parametric 2D representation of clothed humans. The parametric body prior enforces geometrical consistency on the body shape and pose, while the non-parametric representation models loose clothing and handle self-occlusions as well. We also leverage the sparseness of the non-parametric representation for faster training of our network while using losses on 2D maps. Another key contribution is 3DHumans, our new life-like dataset of 3D human body scans with rich geometrical and textural details. We evaluate SHARP on 3DHumans and other publicly available datasets and show superior qualitative and quantitative performance than existing state-of-the-art methods. 深度学习的最新进展使得能够从单目图像重建 3D 人体，这在多个领域具有广泛的应用。在本文中，我们提出了 SHARP（宽松衣服人物形状感知重建），这是一种新颖的端到端可训练网络，可以从单目图像中准确恢复穿着宽松衣服的人的 3D 几何形状和外观。 SHARP 使用稀疏且高效的融合策略将参数化身体先验与穿着人体的非参数化 2D 表示相结合。参数化身体先验强制身体形状和姿势的几何一致性，而非参数化表示则对宽松的衣服进行建模并处理自遮挡。我们还利用非参数表示的稀疏性来更快地训练我们的网络，同时在 2D 地图上使用损失。另一个关键贡献是 3DHumans，这是我们新的逼真的 3D 人体扫描数据集，具有丰富的几何和纹理细节。我们在 3DHumans 和其他公开可用的数据集上评估 SHARP，并显示出比现有最先进方法更优越的定性和定量性能。 提出SHARP方法，从单目图像中精确重建穿宽松衣物的人体3D几何与外观 Sai Sagar Jinka,Astitva Srivastava,Chandradeep Pokhariya,Avinash Sharma,P. J. Narayanan cs.CV

title: Causal Influences Decouple From Their Underlying Network Structure In Echo State Networks
title_zh: 因果影响与其在回声状态网络中的底层网络结构脱钩
comment: This paper was accepted for oral presentation in IEEE WCCI 2022 + IJCNN 2022, special session on Reservoir Computing: algorithms, implementations and applications
comments: This paper was accepted for oral presentation in IEEE WCCI 2022 + IJCNN 2022, special session on Reservoir Computing: algorithms, implementations and applications
abstract: Echo State Networks (ESN) are versatile recurrent neural network models in which the hidden layer remains unaltered during training. Interactions among nodes of this static backbone produce diverse representations of the given stimuli that are harnessed by a read-out mechanism to perform computations needed for solving a given task. ESNs are accessible models of neuronal circuits, since they are relatively inexpensive to train. Therefore, ESNs have become attractive for neuroscientists studying the relationship between neural structure, function, and behavior. For instance, it is not yet clear how distinctive connectivity patterns of brain networks support effective interactions among their nodes and how these patterns of interactions give rise to computation. To address this question, we employed an ESN with a biologically inspired structure and used a systematic multi-site lesioning framework to quantify the causal contribution of each node to the network's output, thus providing a causal link between network structure and behavior. We then focused on the structure-function relationship and decomposed the causal influence of each node on all other nodes, using the same lesioning framework. We found that nodes in a properly engineered ESN interact largely irrespective of the network's underlying structure. However, in a network with the same topology and a non-optimal parameter set, the underlying connectivity patterns determine the node interactions. Our results suggest that causal structure-function relations in ESNs can be decomposed into two components, direct and indirect interactions. The former are based on influences relying on structural connections. The latter describe the effective communication between any two nodes through other intermediate nodes. These widely distributed indirect interactions may crucially contribute to the efficient performance of ESNs.

Interactions among nodes of this static backbone produce diverse representations of the given stimuli that are harnessed by a read-out mechanism to perform computations needed for solving a given task. ESNs are accessible models of neuronal circuits, since they are relatively inexpensive to train. Therefore, ESNs have become attractive for neuroscientists studying the relationship between neural structure, function, and behavior. For instance, it is not yet clear how distinctive connectivity patterns of brain networks support effective interactions among their nodes and how these patterns of interactions give rise to computation. To address this question, we employed an ESN with a biologically inspired structure and used a systematic multi-site lesioning framework to quantify the causal contribution of each node to the network's output, thus providing a causal link between network structure and behavior. We then focused on the structure-function relationship and decomposed the causal influence of each node on all other nodes, using the same lesioning framework. We found that nodes in a properly engineered ESN interact largely irrespective of the network's underlying structure. However, in a network with the same topology and a non-optimal parameter set, the underlying connectivity patterns determine the node interactions. Our results suggest that causal structure-function relations in ESNs can be decomposed into two components, direct and indirect interactions. The former are based on influences relying on structural connections. The latter describe the effective communication between any two nodes through other intermediate nodes. These widely distributed indirect interactions may crucially contribute to the efficient performance of ESNs.
abstract_zh: 回声状态网络（ESN）是多功能的循环神经网络模型，其中隐藏层在训练期间保持不变。该静态骨干节点之间的交互产生给定刺激的不同表示，读出机制利用这些表示来执行解决给定任务所需的计算。 ESN 是神经元回路的可用模型，因为它们的训练成本相对较低。因此，ESN 对于研究神经结构、功能和行为之间关系的神经科学家来说已经变得很有吸引力。例如，目前尚不清楚大脑网络的独特连接模式如何支持其节点之间的有效交互，以及这些交互模式如何引起计算。 To address this question, we employed an ESN with a biologically inspired structure and used a systematic multi-site lesioning framework to quantify the causal contribution of each node to the network's output, thus providing a causal link between network structure and behavior.然后，我们关注结构-功能关系，并使用相同的损伤框架分解每个节点对所有其他节点的因果影响。我们发现，正确设计的 ESN 中的节点在很大程度上进行交互，而与网络的底层结构无关。 However, in a network with the same topology and a non-optimal parameter set, the underlying connectivity patterns determine the node interactions.我们的结果表明，ESN 中的因果结构功能关系可以分解为两个组成部分：直接相互作用和间接相互作用。前者基于结构联系的影响。后者描述了任意两个节点之间通过其他中间节点进行的有效通信。这些广泛分布的间接交互可能对 ESN 的高效性能做出至关重要的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了回声状态网络（ESN）中因果影响如何与其底层网络结构解耦，并通过系统性损伤框架分析节点间的结构-功能关系。
AI.motivation: 探索神经网络结构与功能的关系对于理解大脑计算机制至关重要，但ESN中节点连接模式如何支持有效交互尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用生物启发结构的ESN，结合多部位损伤框架量化节点因果贡献，并分解直接与间接交互作用。
AI.result: 在参数优化的ESN中，节点交互主要独立于结构；而在非最优参数下，连接模式决定交互。间接交互通过中间节点广泛分布，对网络性能起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: ESN的因果结构-功能关系可分解为结构依赖的直接交互和通过中间节点的间接交互，后者是其高效计算的关键。

title: GraSens: A Gabor Residual Anti-aliasing Sensing Framework for Action Recognition using WiFi
title_zh: GraSens：使用 WiFi 进行动作识别的 Gabor 残余抗锯齿传感框架
abstract: WiFi-based human action recognition (HAR) has been regarded as a promising solution in applications such as smart living and remote monitoring due to the pervasive and unobtrusive nature of WiFi signals. However, the efficacy of WiFi signals is prone to be influenced by the change in the ambient environment and varies over different sub-carriers. To remedy this issue, we propose an end-to-end Gabor residual anti-aliasing sensing network (GraSens) to directly recognize the actions using the WiFi signals from the wireless devices in diverse scenarios. In particular, a new Gabor residual block is designed to address the impact of the changing surrounding environment with a focus on learning reliable and robust temporal-frequency representations of WiFi signals. In each block, the Gabor layer is integrated with the anti-aliasing layer in a residual manner to gain the shift-invariant features. Furthermore, fractal temporal and frequency self-attention are proposed in a joint effort to explicitly concentrate on the efficacy of WiFi signals and thus enhance the quality of output features scattered in different subcarriers. Experimental results throughout our wireless-vision action recognition dataset (WVAR) and three public datasets demonstrate that our proposed GraSens scheme outperforms state-of-the-art methods with respect to recognition accuracy.
summary: WiFi-based human action recognition (HAR) has been regarded as a promising solution in applications such as smart living and remote monitoring due to the pervasive and unobtrusive nature of WiFi signals. However, the efficacy of WiFi signals is prone to be influenced by the change in the ambient environment and varies over different sub-carriers. To remedy this issue, we propose an end-to-end Gabor residual anti-aliasing sensing network (GraSens) to directly recognize the actions using the WiFi signals from the wireless devices in diverse scenarios. In particular, a new Gabor residual block is designed to address the impact of the changing surrounding environment with a focus on learning reliable and robust temporal-frequency representations of WiFi signals. In each block, the Gabor layer is integrated with the anti-aliasing layer in a residual manner to gain the shift-invariant features. Furthermore, fractal temporal and frequency self-attention are proposed in a joint effort to explicitly concentrate on the efficacy of WiFi signals and thus enhance the quality of output features scattered in different subcarriers. Experimental results throughout our wireless-vision action recognition dataset (WVAR) and three public datasets demonstrate that our proposed GraSens scheme outperforms state-of-the-art methods with respect to recognition accuracy.
abstract_zh: 由于 WiFi 信号的普遍性和不引人注目的性质，基于 WiFi 的人体动作识别 (HAR) 被认为是智能生活和远程监控等应用中很有前途的解决方案。然而，WiFi信号的功效容易受到周围环境变化的影响，并且在不同的子载波上也存在差异。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种端到端的 Gabor 残差抗锯齿传感网络（GraSens），可以在不同场景中使用来自无线设备的 WiFi 信号直接识别动作。特别是，新的 Gabor 残差块旨在解决周围环境变化的影响，重点是学习 WiFi 信号的可靠且鲁棒的时频表示。在每个块中，Gabor层以残差方式与抗锯齿层集成以获得平移不变特征。此外，联合提出了分形时间和频率自注意力，以明确集中于 WiFi 信号的功效，从而提高分散在不同子载波中的输出特征的质量。我们的无线视觉动作识别数据集 (WVAR) 和三个公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的 GraSens 方案在识别准确性方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于WiFi信号的Gabor残差抗混叠感知框架GraSens，用于在不同环境下实现鲁棒的人类动作识别。
AI.motivation: WiFi信号在环境变化和不同子载波上的表现存在差异，导致现有动作识别方法效果不稳定，需提升环境适应性和信号鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计包含Gabor层与抗混叠层的残差模块，结合分形时空自注意力机制，以学习环境变化下的稳定时频特征并增强子载波间特征质量。
AI.result: 在自建WVAR数据集及三个公开数据集上，GraSens在动作识别准确率上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GraSens通过时频特征学习与自注意力机制有效解决了WiFi信号环境敏感性和子载波差异问题，提升了动作识别的准确性和鲁棒性。

conclusion: GraSens通过时频特征学习与自注意力机制有效解决了WiFi信号环境敏感性和子载波差异问题，提升了动作识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
search_text: GraSens: A Gabor Residual Anti-aliasing Sensing Framework for Action Recognition using WiFi GraSens：使用 WiFi 进行动作识别的 Gabor 残余抗锯齿传感框架 WiFi-based human action recognition (HAR) has been regarded as a promising solution in applications such as smart living and remote monitoring due to the pervasive and unobtrusive nature of WiFi signals. However, the efficacy of WiFi signals is prone to be influenced by the change in the ambient environment and varies over different sub-carriers. To remedy this issue, we propose an end-to-end Gabor residual anti-aliasing sensing network (GraSens) to directly recognize the actions using the WiFi signals from the wireless devices in diverse scenarios. In particular, a new Gabor residual block is designed to address the impact of the changing surrounding environment with a focus on learning reliable and robust temporal-frequency representations of WiFi signals. In each block, the Gabor layer is integrated with the anti-aliasing layer in a residual manner to gain the shift-invariant features. Furthermore, fractal temporal and frequency self-attention are proposed in a joint effort to explicitly concentrate on the efficacy of WiFi signals and thus enhance the quality of output features scattered in different subcarriers. Experimental results throughout our wireless-vision action recognition dataset (WVAR) and three public datasets demonstrate that our proposed GraSens scheme outperforms state-of-the-art methods with respect to recognition accuracy. 由于 WiFi 信号的普遍性和不引人注目的性质，基于 WiFi 的人体动作识别 (HAR) 被认为是智能生活和远程监控等应用中很有前途的解决方案。然而，WiFi信号的功效容易受到周围环境变化的影响，并且在不同的子载波上也存在差异。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种端到端的 Gabor 残差抗锯齿传感网络（GraSens），可以在不同场景中使用来自无线设备的 WiFi 信号直接识别动作。特别是，新的 Gabor 残差块旨在解决周围环境变化的影响，重点是学习 WiFi 信号的可靠且鲁棒的时频表示。在每个块中，Gabor层以残差方式与抗锯齿层集成以获得平移不变特征。此外，联合提出了分形时间和频率自注意力，以明确集中于 WiFi 信号的功效，从而提高分散在不同子载波中的输出特征的质量。我们的无线视觉动作识别数据集 (WVAR) 和三个公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的 GraSens 方案在识别准确性方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种基于WiFi信号的Gabor残差抗混叠感知框架GraSens，用于在不同环境下实现鲁棒的人类动作识别。 Yanling Hao,Zhiyuan Shi,Xidong Mu,Yuanwei Liu cs.CV,eess.SP

title: The Authenticity Gap in Human Evaluation
title_zh: 人类评价的真实性差距
abstract: Human ratings are the gold standard in NLG evaluation. The standard protocol is to collect ratings of generated text, average across annotators, and rank NLG systems by their average scores. However, little consideration has been given as to whether this approach faithfully captures human preferences. Analyzing this standard protocol through the lens of utility theory in economics, we identify the implicit assumptions it makes about annotators. These assumptions are often violated in practice, in which case annotator ratings cease to reflect their preferences. The most egregious violations come from using Likert scales, which provably reverse the direction of the true preference in certain cases. We suggest improvements to the standard protocol to make it more theoretically sound, but even in its improved form, it cannot be used to evaluate open-ended tasks like story generation. For the latter, we propose a new human evaluation protocol called $\textit{system-level probabilistic assessment}$ (SPA). When human evaluation of stories is done with SPA, we can recover the ordering of GPT-3 models by size, with statistically significant results. However, when human evaluation is done with the standard protocol, less than half of the expected preferences can be recovered (e.g., there is no significant difference between $\texttt{curie}$ and $\texttt{davinci}$, despite using a highly powered test).
summary: Human ratings are the gold standard in NLG evaluation. The standard protocol is to collect ratings of generated text, average across annotators, and rank NLG systems by their average scores. However, little consideration has been given as to whether this approach faithfully captures human preferences. Analyzing this standard protocol through the lens of utility theory in economics, we identify the implicit assumptions it makes about annotators. These assumptions are often violated in practice, in which case annotator ratings cease to reflect their preferences. The most egregious violations come from using Likert scales, which provably reverse the direction of the true preference in certain cases. We suggest improvements to the standard protocol to make it more theoretically sound, but even in its improved form, it cannot be used to evaluate open-ended tasks like story generation. For the latter, we propose a new human evaluation protocol called $\textit{system-level probabilistic assessment}$ (SPA). When human evaluation of stories is done with SPA, we can recover the ordering of GPT-3 models by size, with statistically significant results. However, when human evaluation is done with the standard protocol, less than half of the expected preferences can be recovered (e.g., there is no significant difference between $\texttt{curie}$ and $\texttt{davinci}$, despite using a highly powered test).
abstract_zh: 人工评分是 NLG 评估的黄金标准。标准协议是收集生成文本的评分、注释者的平均值，并根据平均分数对 NLG 系统进行排名。然而，很少有人考虑这种方法是否忠实地捕捉了人类的偏好。通过经济学效用理论的视角分析这个标准协议，我们确定了它对注释者所做的隐含假设。这些假设在实践中经常被违反，在这种情况下，注释者评级不再反映他们的偏好。最严重的违规行为来自于使用李克特量表，在某些情况下，它可能会逆转真实偏好的方向。我们建议对标准协议进行改进，使其在理论上更加合理，但即使采用改进的形式，它也不能用于评估故事生成等开放式任务。对于后者，我们提出了一种新的人类评估协议，称为 $\textit{系统级概率评估}$ (SPA)。当使用 SPA 对故事进行人工评估时，我们可以按大小恢复 GPT-3 模型的排序，并获得具有统计显着性的结果。然而，当使用标准协议进行人类评估时，可以恢复不到一半的预期偏好（例如，尽管使用了高功效的测试，$\texttt{curie}$ 和 $\texttt{davinci}$ 之间没有显着差异）。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自然语言生成（NLG）评估中人类评分方法的局限性，并提出了一种新的系统级概率评估（SPA）协议以改进开放性任务的评估。
AI.motivation: 传统的人类评分方法在捕捉真实偏好时存在缺陷，尤其在使用李克特量表时可能反转真实偏好，且无法有效评估开放性任务如故事生成。
AI.method: 通过经济学中的效用理论分析标准评分协议的隐含假设，指出其在实践中的缺陷，并提出改进方案及针对开放性任务的SPA协议。
AI.result: SPA协议能显著恢复GPT-3模型按规模排序的偏好（统计显著），而标准协议仅能恢复不足一半的预期偏好（如curie与davinci无显著差异）。
AI.conclusion: 标准评分协议在理论和实践中存在局限，尤其不适用于开放性任务；SPA协议为更准确的评估提供了可行替代方案。

title: Image Trinarization Using a Partial Differential Equations: A Novel Approach to Automatic Sperm Image Analysis
title_zh: 使用偏微分方程进行图像三元化：自动精子图像分析的新方法
abstract: Partial differential equations have recently garnered substantial attention as an image processing framework due to their extensibility, the ability to rigorously engineer and analyse the governing dynamics as well as the ease of implementation using numerical methods. This paper explores a novel approach to image trinarization with a concrete real-world application of classifying regions of sperm images used in the automatic analysis of sperm morphology. The proposed methodology engineers a diffusion equation with non-linear source term, exhibiting three steady-states. The model is implemented as an image processor using a standard finite difference method to illustrate the efficacy of the proposed approach. The performance of the proposed approach is benchmarked against standard image clustering/segmentation methods and shown to be highly effective.
summary: Partial differential equations have recently garnered substantial attention as an image processing framework due to their extensibility, the ability to rigorously engineer and analyse the governing dynamics as well as the ease of implementation using numerical methods. This paper explores a novel approach to image trinarization with a concrete real-world application of classifying regions of sperm images used in the automatic analysis of sperm morphology. The proposed methodology engineers a diffusion equation with non-linear source term, exhibiting three steady-states. The model is implemented as an image processor using a standard finite difference method to illustrate the efficacy of the proposed approach. The performance of the proposed approach is benchmarked against standard image clustering/segmentation methods and shown to be highly effective.
abstract_zh: 偏微分方程最近作为图像处理框架引起了广泛关注，因为它具有可扩展性、严格设计和分析控制动力学的能力以及使用数值方法易于实现的能力。本文探索了一种图像三元化的新方法，并在精子形态自动分析中对精子图像区域进行分类的具体实际应用。所提出的方法设计了具有非线性源项的扩散方程，表现出三种稳态。该模型使用标准有限差分法作为图像处理器来实现，以说明所提出方法的有效性。所提出方法的性能以标准图像聚类/分割方法为基准，并被证明是非常有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于偏微分方程的图像三分法新方法，用于自动分析精子形态的图像分类。
AI.motivation: 偏微分方程在图像处理中具有可扩展性和严谨的动力学分析能力，但现有方法在精子图像分类中的应用不足。
AI.method: 设计包含非线性源项的扩散方程，通过有限差分法实现图像处理，生成三个稳态以区分精子图像区域。
AI.result: 该方法在精子图像分类任务中优于传统聚类/分割算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于偏微分方程的三分法为自动精子形态分析提供了高效且可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Aldi Piroli,Vinzenz Dallabetta,Marc Walessa,Daniel Meissner,Johannes Kopp,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Robust 3D Object Detection in Cold Weather Conditions
title_zh: 寒冷天气条件下的稳健 3D 物体检测
abstract: Adverse weather conditions can negatively affect LiDAR-based object detectors. In this work, we focus on the phenomenon of vehicle gas exhaust condensation in cold weather conditions. This everyday effect can influence the estimation of object sizes, orientations and introduce ghost object detections, compromising the reliability of the state of the art object detectors. We propose to solve this problem by using data augmentation and a novel training loss term. To effectively train deep neural networks, a large set of labeled data is needed. In case of adverse weather conditions, this process can be extremely laborious and expensive. We address this issue in two steps: First, we present a gas exhaust data generation method based on 3D surface reconstruction and sampling which allows us to generate large sets of gas exhaust clouds from a small pool of labeled data. Second, we introduce a point cloud augmentation process that can be used to add gas exhaust to datasets recorded in good weather conditions. Finally, we formulate a new training loss term that leverages the augmented point cloud to increase object detection robustness by penalizing predictions that include noise. In contrast to other works, our method can be used with both grid-based and point-based detectors. Moreover, since our approach does not require any network architecture changes, inference times remain unchanged. Experimental results on real data show that our proposed method greatly increases robustness to gas exhaust and noisy data.
summary: Adverse weather conditions can negatively affect LiDAR-based object detectors. In this work, we focus on the phenomenon of vehicle gas exhaust condensation in cold weather conditions. This everyday effect can influence the estimation of object sizes, orientations and introduce ghost object detections, compromising the reliability of the state of the art object detectors. We propose to solve this problem by using data augmentation and a novel training loss term. To effectively train deep neural networks, a large set of labeled data is needed. In case of adverse weather conditions, this process can be extremely laborious and expensive. We address this issue in two steps: First, we present a gas exhaust data generation method based on 3D surface reconstruction and sampling which allows us to generate large sets of gas exhaust clouds from a small pool of labeled data. Second, we introduce a point cloud augmentation process that can be used to add gas exhaust to datasets recorded in good weather conditions. Finally, we formulate a new training loss term that leverages the augmented point cloud to increase object detection robustness by penalizing predictions that include noise. In contrast to other works, our method can be used with both grid-based and point-based detectors. Moreover, since our approach does not require any network architecture changes, inference times remain unchanged. Experimental results on real data show that our proposed method greatly increases robustness to gas exhaust and noisy data.
abstract_zh: 恶劣的天气条件会对基于激光雷达的物体探测器产生负面影响。在这项工作中，我们重点研究寒冷天气条件下车辆尾气冷凝的现象。这种日常效应会影响对物体大小、方向的估计，并引入鬼物体检测，从而损害最先进物体检测器的可靠性。我们建议通过使用数据增强和新的训练损失项来解决这个问题。为了有效地训练深度神经网络，需要大量的标记数据。如果天气条件恶劣，这个过程可能会非常费力且昂贵。我们分两步解决这个问题：首先，我们提出了一种基于 3D 表面重建和采样的废气数据生成方法，该方法使我们能够从一小部分标记数据中生成大量废气云。其次，我们介绍了一种点云增强过程，可用于将废气添加到良好天气条件下记录的数据集中。最后，我们制定了一个新的训练损失项，它利用增强的点云通过惩罚包含噪声的预测来提高对象检测的鲁棒性。与其他作品相比，我们的方法可以与基于网格和基于点的检测器一起使用。此外，由于我们的方法不需要任何网络架构更改，因此推理时间保持不变。真实数据的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法大大提高了对废气和噪声数据的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在寒冷天气条件下提升基于LiDAR的3D物体检测鲁棒性的方法，主要解决车辆尾气凝结导致的检测误差问题。
AI.motivation: 寒冷天气中车辆尾气凝结会干扰LiDAR点云数据，导致物体尺寸估计偏差、误检等问题，而现有方法难以有效处理此类噪声且依赖大量标注数据。
AI.method: 提出两种解决方案：1）基于3D表面重建与采样的尾气云生成方法，从少量标注数据生成大规模尾气数据；2）设计点云增强过程将尾气噪声注入晴天数据集，并引入新的训练损失项以抑制噪声预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升了检测器对尾气噪声和恶劣天气的鲁棒性，且无需修改网络结构，推理时间保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据增强与损失函数优化有效解决了寒冷天气下的检测问题，适用于网格型和点云型检测器，具有高效性和通用性。

search_text: Robust 3D Object Detection in Cold Weather Conditions 寒冷天气条件下的稳健 3D 物体检测 Adverse weather conditions can negatively affect LiDAR-based object detectors. In this work, we focus on the phenomenon of vehicle gas exhaust condensation in cold weather conditions. This everyday effect can influence the estimation of object sizes, orientations and introduce ghost object detections, compromising the reliability of the state of the art object detectors. We propose to solve this problem by using data augmentation and a novel training loss term. To effectively train deep neural networks, a large set of labeled data is needed. In case of adverse weather conditions, this process can be extremely laborious and expensive. We address this issue in two steps: First, we present a gas exhaust data generation method based on 3D surface reconstruction and sampling which allows us to generate large sets of gas exhaust clouds from a small pool of labeled data. Second, we introduce a point cloud augmentation process that can be used to add gas exhaust to datasets recorded in good weather conditions. Finally, we formulate a new training loss term that leverages the augmented point cloud to increase object detection robustness by penalizing predictions that include noise. In contrast to other works, our method can be used with both grid-based and point-based detectors. Moreover, since our approach does not require any network architecture changes, inference times remain unchanged. Experimental results on real data show that our proposed method greatly increases robustness to gas exhaust and noisy data. 恶劣的天气条件会对基于激光雷达的物体探测器产生负面影响。在这项工作中，我们重点研究寒冷天气条件下车辆尾气冷凝的现象。这种日常效应会影响对物体大小、方向的估计，并引入鬼物体检测，从而损害最先进物体检测器的可靠性。我们建议通过使用数据增强和新的训练损失项来解决这个问题。为了有效地训练深度神经网络，需要大量的标记数据。如果天气条件恶劣，这个过程可能会非常费力且昂贵。我们分两步解决这个问题：首先，我们提出了一种基于 3D 表面重建和采样的废气数据生成方法，该方法使我们能够从一小部分标记数据中生成大量废气云。其次，我们介绍了一种点云增强过程，可用于将废气添加到良好天气条件下记录的数据集中。最后，我们制定了一个新的训练损失项，它利用增强的点云通过惩罚包含噪声的预测来提高对象检测的鲁棒性。与其他作品相比，我们的方法可以与基于网格和基于点的检测器一起使用。此外，由于我们的方法不需要任何网络架构更改，因此推理时间保持不变。真实数据的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法大大提高了对废气和噪声数据的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种在寒冷天气条件下提升基于LiDAR的3D物体检测鲁棒性的方法，主要解决车辆尾气凝结导致的检测误差问题。 Aldi Piroli,Vinzenz Dallabetta,Marc Walessa,Daniel Meissner,Johannes Kopp,Klaus Dietmayer cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Community Question Answering Entity Linking via Leveraging Auxiliary Data
title_zh: 通过利用辅助数据进行社区问答实体链接
abstract: Community Question Answering (CQA) platforms contain plenty of CQA texts (i.e., questions and answers corresponding to the question) where named entities appear ubiquitously. In this paper, we define a new task of CQA entity linking (CQAEL) as linking the textual entity mentions detected from CQA texts with their corresponding entities in a knowledge base. This task can facilitate many downstream applications including expert finding and knowledge base enrichment. Traditional entity linking methods mainly focus on linking entities in news documents, and are suboptimal over this new task of CQAEL since they cannot effectively leverage various informative auxiliary data involved in the CQA platform to aid entity linking, such as parallel answers and two types of meta-data (i.e., topic tags and users). To remedy this crucial issue, we propose a novel transformer-based framework to effectively harness the knowledge delivered by different kinds of auxiliary data to promote the linking performance. We validate the superiority of our framework through extensive experiments over a newly released CQAEL data set against state-of-the-art entity linking methods.
summary: Community Question Answering (CQA) platforms contain plenty of CQA texts (i.e., questions and answers corresponding to the question) where named entities appear ubiquitously. In this paper, we define a new task of CQA entity linking (CQAEL) as linking the textual entity mentions detected from CQA texts with their corresponding entities in a knowledge base. This task can facilitate many downstream applications including expert finding and knowledge base enrichment. Traditional entity linking methods mainly focus on linking entities in news documents, and are suboptimal over this new task of CQAEL since they cannot effectively leverage various informative auxiliary data involved in the CQA platform to aid entity linking, such as parallel answers and two types of meta-data (i.e., topic tags and users). To remedy this crucial issue, we propose a novel transformer-based framework to effectively harness the knowledge delivered by different kinds of auxiliary data to promote the linking performance. We validate the superiority of our framework through extensive experiments over a newly released CQAEL data set against state-of-the-art entity linking methods.
abstract_zh: 社区问答 (CQA) 平台包含大量 CQA 文本（即问题和与问题相对应的答案），其中命名实体无处不在。在本文中，我们定义了 CQA 实体链接（CQAEL）的新任务，将从 CQA 文本中检测到的文本实体提及与其在知识库中的相应实体链接起来。此任务可以促进许多下游应用程序，包括专家查找和知识库丰富。传统的实体链接方法主要侧重于链接新闻文档中的实体，对于 CQAEL 的这项新任务来说并不是最优的，因为它们无法有效地利用 CQA 平台中涉及的各种信息辅助数据来帮助实体链接，例如并行答案和两种类型的元数据（即主题标签和用户）。为了解决这个关键问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的框架，以有效地利用不同类型的辅助数据提供的知识来提高链接性能。我们通过对新发布的 CQAEL 数据集与最先进的实体链接方法进行广泛的实验来验证我们的框架的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用辅助数据的社区问答实体链接方法，解决传统方法在CQA平台中无法有效利用辅助数据的问题
AI.motivation: 传统实体链接方法针对新闻文档效果较好，但无法有效利用CQA平台中的并行答案、主题标签和用户元数据等辅助信息，导致CQA实体链接性能不足
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的框架，通过多模态融合机制整合文本内容、并行答案、主题标签和用户信息等多源辅助数据
AI.result: 在新构建的CQAEL数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进的实体链接方法
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用CQA平台的多源辅助数据，可显著提升实体链接性能，验证了辅助数据对CQA场景的重要性

authors_text: Takeshi Kojima,Shixiang Shane Gu,Machel Reid,Yutaka Matsuo,Yusuke Iwasawa
title: Large Language Models are Zero-Shot Reasoners
title_zh: 大型语言模型是零样本推理机
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/kojima-takeshi188/zero_shot_cot
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/kojima-takeshi188/zero_shot_cot
abstract: Pretrained large language models (LLMs) are widely used in many sub-fields of natural language processing (NLP) and generally known as excellent few-shot learners with task-specific exemplars. Notably, chain of thought (CoT) prompting, a recent technique for eliciting complex multi-step reasoning through step-by-step answer examples, achieved the state-of-the-art performances in arithmetics and symbolic reasoning, difficult system-2 tasks that do not follow the standard scaling laws for LLMs. While these successes are often attributed to LLMs' ability for few-shot learning, we show that LLMs are decent zero-shot reasoners by simply adding "Let's think step by step" before each answer. Experimental results demonstrate that our Zero-shot-CoT, using the same single prompt template, significantly outperforms zero-shot LLM performances on diverse benchmark reasoning tasks including arithmetics (MultiArith, GSM8K, AQUA-RAT, SVAMP), symbolic reasoning (Last Letter, Coin Flip), and other logical reasoning tasks (Date Understanding, Tracking Shuffled Objects), without any hand-crafted few-shot examples, e.g. increasing the accuracy on MultiArith from 17.7% to 78.7% and GSM8K from 10.4% to 40.7% with large InstructGPT model (text-davinci-002), as well as similar magnitudes of improvements with another off-the-shelf large model, 540B parameter PaLM. The versatility of this single prompt across very diverse reasoning tasks hints at untapped and understudied fundamental zero-shot capabilities of LLMs, suggesting high-level, multi-task broad cognitive capabilities may be extracted by simple prompting. We hope our work not only serves as the minimal strongest zero-shot baseline for the challenging reasoning benchmarks, but also highlights the importance of carefully exploring and analyzing the enormous zero-shot knowledge hidden inside LLMs before crafting finetuning datasets or few-shot exemplars.

The versatility of this single prompt across very diverse reasoning tasks hints at untapped and understudied fundamental zero-shot capabilities of LLMs, suggesting high-level, multi-task broad cognitive capabilities may be extracted by simple prompting. We hope our work not only serves as the minimal strongest zero-shot baseline for the challenging reasoning benchmarks, but also highlights the importance of carefully exploring and analyzing the enormous zero-shot knowledge hidden inside LLMs before crafting finetuning datasets or few-shot exemplars.
abstract_zh: 预训练的大语言模型（LLM）广泛应用于自然语言处理（NLP）的许多子领域，通常被称为具有特定任务样本的优秀小样本学习器。值得注意的是，思想链（CoT）提示是一种通过逐步答案示例引发复杂多步推理的最新技术，在算术和符号推理、不遵循法学硕士标准缩放法则的困难系统 2 任务中实现了最先进的性能。虽然这些成功通常归因于法学硕士的小样本学习能力，但我们通过在每个答案前简单地添加“让我们一步一步思考”来证明法学硕士是不错的零样本推理者。实验结果表明，我们的零样本 CoT 使用相同的单提示模板，在各种基准推理任务上显着优于零样本 LLM 性能，包括算术（MultiArith、GSM8K、AQUA-RAT、SVAMP）、符号推理（最后一个字母、硬币翻转）和其他逻辑推理任务（日期理解、跟踪打乱的对象），而无需任何手工制作的少样本示例，例如使用大型 InstructGPT 模型 (text-davinci-002) 将 MultiArith 的准确率从 17.7% 提高到 78.7%，将 GSM8K 从 10.4% 提高到 40.7%，并且与另一个现成的大型模型 540B 参数 PaLM 进行类似程度的改进。这种单一提示在非常多样化的推理任务中的多功能性暗示了法学硕士尚未开发和研究的基本零样本能力，这表明可以通过简单的提示来提取高水平、多任务的广泛认知能力。我们希望我们的工作不仅可以作为具有挑战性的推理基准的最小最强零样本基线，而且还强调了在制作微调数据集或少样本样本之前仔细探索和分析法学硕士中隐藏的大量零样本知识的重要性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过简单提示（'Let's think step by step'）使大语言模型在无需少样本示例的情况下完成多步推理任务，验证其零样本推理能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）通常被视为优秀的少样本学习者，但现有研究未充分探索其零样本推理潜力，尤其在复杂逻辑任务中表现可能被低估。
AI.method: 设计统一的零样本链式思维提示（Zero-shot-CoT），仅在问题前添加'Let's think step by step'，无需人工构造示例，测试多种推理任务。
AI.result: 在MultiArith、GSM8K等算术与逻辑任务中，使用InstructGPT模型准确率提升显著（如MultiArith从17.7%升至78.7%），PaLM模型也有类似效果。
AI.conclusion: LLMs蕴含强大的零样本推理能力，简单提示即可激活其跨任务的高层次认知能力，未来应优先挖掘零样本知识再进行微调或少样本设计。

search_text: Large Language Models are Zero-Shot Reasoners 大型语言模型是零样本推理机 Pretrained large language models (LLMs) are widely used in many sub-fields of natural language processing (NLP) and generally known as excellent few-shot learners with task-specific exemplars. Notably, chain of thought (CoT) prompting, a recent technique for eliciting complex multi-step reasoning through step-by-step answer examples, achieved the state-of-the-art performances in arithmetics and symbolic reasoning, difficult system-2 tasks that do not follow the standard scaling laws for LLMs. While these successes are often attributed to LLMs' ability for few-shot learning, we show that LLMs are decent zero-shot reasoners by simply adding "Let's think step by step" before each answer. Experimental results demonstrate that our Zero-shot-CoT, using the same single prompt template, significantly outperforms zero-shot LLM performances on diverse benchmark reasoning tasks including arithmetics (MultiArith, GSM8K, AQUA-RAT, SVAMP), symbolic reasoning (Last Letter, Coin Flip), and other logical reasoning tasks (Date Understanding, Tracking Shuffled Objects), without any hand-crafted few-shot examples, e.g. increasing the accuracy on MultiArith from 17.7% to 78.7% and GSM8K from 10.4% to 40.7% with large InstructGPT model (text-davinci-002), as well as similar magnitudes of improvements with another off-the-shelf large model, 540B parameter PaLM. The versatility of this single prompt across very diverse reasoning tasks hints at untapped and understudied fundamental zero-shot capabilities of LLMs, suggesting high-level, multi-task broad cognitive capabilities may be extracted by simple prompting. We hope our work not only serves as the minimal strongest zero-shot baseline for the challenging reasoning benchmarks, but also highlights the importance of carefully exploring and analyzing the enormous zero-shot knowledge hidden inside LLMs before crafting finetuning datasets or few-shot exemplars. 预训练的大语言模型（LLM）广泛应用于自然语言处理（NLP）的许多子领域，通常被称为具有特定任务样本的优秀小样本学习器。值得注意的是，思想链（CoT）提示是一种通过逐步答案示例引发复杂多步推理的最新技术，在算术和符号推理、不遵循法学硕士标准缩放法则的困难系统 2 任务中实现了最先进的性能。虽然这些成功通常归因于法学硕士的小样本学习能力，但我们通过在每个答案前简单地添加“让我们一步一步思考”来证明法学硕士是不错的零样本推理者。实验结果表明，我们的零样本 CoT 使用相同的单提示模板，在各种基准推理任务上显着优于零样本 LLM 性能，包括算术（MultiArith、GSM8K、AQUA-RAT、SVAMP）、符号推理（最后一个字母、硬币翻转）和其他逻辑推理任务（日期理解、跟踪打乱的对象），而无需任何手工制作的少样本示例，例如使用大型 InstructGPT 模型 (text-davinci-002) 将 MultiArith 的准确率从 17.7% 提高到 78.7%，将 GSM8K 从 10.4% 提高到 40.7%，并且与另一个现成的大型模型 540B 参数 PaLM 进行类似程度的改进。这种单一提示在非常多样化的推理任务中的多功能性暗示了法学硕士尚未开发和研究的基本零样本能力，这表明可以通过简单的提示来提取高水平、多任务的广泛认知能力。我们希望我们的工作不仅可以作为具有挑战性的推理基准的最小最强零样本基线，而且还强调了在制作微调数据集或少样本样本之前仔细探索和分析法学硕士中隐藏的大量零样本知识的重要性。 该论文提出通过简单提示（'Let's think step by step'）使大语言模型在无需少样本示例的情况下完成多步推理任务，验证其零样本推理能力。 Takeshi Kojima,Shixiang Shane Gu,Machel Reid,Yutaka Matsuo,Yusuke Iwasawa cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lang Qian,Shengjie Zheng,Chunshan Deng,Cheng Yang,Xiaojian Li
title: An Adaptive Contrastive Learning Model for Spike Sorting
title_zh: 尖峰排序的自适应对比学习模型
abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), is ways for electronic devices to communicate directly with the brain. For most medical-type brain-computer interface tasks, the activity of multiple units of neurons or local field potentials is sufficient for decoding. But for BCIs used in neuroscience research, it is important to separate out the activity of individual neurons. With the development of large-scale silicon technology and the increasing number of probe channels, artificially interpreting and labeling spikes is becoming increasingly impractical. In this paper, we propose a novel modeling framework: Adaptive Contrastive Learning Model that learns representations from spikes through contrastive learning based on the maximizing mutual information loss function as a theoretical basis. Based on the fact that data with similar features share the same labels whether they are multi-classified or binary-classified. With this theoretical support, we simplify the multi-classification problem into multiple binary-classification, improving both the accuracy and the runtime efficiency. Moreover, we also introduce a series of enhancements for the spikes, while solving the problem that the classification effect is affected because of the overlapping spikes.
summary: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), is ways for electronic devices to communicate directly with the brain. For most medical-type brain-computer interface tasks, the activity of multiple units of neurons or local field potentials is sufficient for decoding. But for BCIs used in neuroscience research, it is important to separate out the activity of individual neurons. With the development of large-scale silicon technology and the increasing number of probe channels, artificially interpreting and labeling spikes is becoming increasingly impractical. In this paper, we propose a novel modeling framework: Adaptive Contrastive Learning Model that learns representations from spikes through contrastive learning based on the maximizing mutual information loss function as a theoretical basis. Based on the fact that data with similar features share the same labels whether they are multi-classified or binary-classified. With this theoretical support, we simplify the multi-classification problem into multiple binary-classification, improving both the accuracy and the runtime efficiency. Moreover, we also introduce a series of enhancements for the spikes, while solving the problem that the classification effect is affected because of the overlapping spikes.
abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BCI）是电子设备直接与大脑通信的方式。对于大多数医疗类脑机接口任务来说，多个神经元单元的活动或局部场电位足以进行解码。但对于神经科学研究中使用的脑机接口来说，分离出单个神经元的活动非常重要。随着大规模硅技术的发展和探针通道数量的增加，人工解释和标记尖峰变得越来越不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的建模框架：自适应对比学习模型，该模型以最大化互信息损失函数为理论基础，通过对比学习从尖峰中学习表示。基于这样的事实：具有相似特征的数据无论是多分类还是二分类都共享相同的标签。有了这个理论支持，我们将多分类问题简化为多个二分类问题，提高了准确性和运行效率。此外，我们还对尖峰进行了一系列增强，同时解决了尖峰重叠影响分类效果的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应对比学习模型，用于解决脑机接口中单个神经元活动分离的尖峰分类问题。
AI.motivation: 随着探针通道数量增加，传统人工标注尖峰数据效率低下，且现有方法难以处理重叠尖峰导致的分类误差，需自动化高效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于最大互信息损失函数构建自适应对比学习框架，将多分类问题拆解为多个二分类任务，并引入增强技术应对尖峰重叠问题。
AI.result: 模型在准确率和运行效率上均有提升，有效缓解了重叠尖峰对分类性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经科学研究中的尖峰分类提供了高效可靠的模型支持，推动脑机接口技术发展。

authors_text: Wei Gao,Qinghao Hu,Zhisheng Ye,Peng Sun,Xiaolin Wang,Yingwei Luo,Tianwei Zhang,Yonggang Wen
title: Deep Learning Workload Scheduling in GPU Datacenters: Taxonomy, Challenges and Vision
title_zh: GPU 数据中心中的深度学习工作负载调度：分类、挑战和愿景
abstract: Deep learning (DL) shows its prosperity in a wide variety of fields. The development of a DL model is a time-consuming and resource-intensive procedure. Hence, dedicated GPU accelerators have been collectively constructed into a GPU datacenter. An efficient scheduler design for such GPU datacenter is crucially important to reduce the operational cost and improve resource utilization. However, traditional approaches designed for big data or high performance computing workloads can not support DL workloads to fully utilize the GPU resources. Recently, substantial schedulers are proposed to tailor for DL workloads in GPU datacenters. This paper surveys existing research efforts for both training and inference workloads. We primarily present how existing schedulers facilitate the respective workloads from the scheduling objectives and resource consumption features. Finally, we prospect several promising future research directions. More detailed summary with the surveyed paper and code links can be found at our project website: https://github.com/S-Lab-System-Group/Awesome-DL-Scheduling-Papers
summary: Deep learning (DL) shows its prosperity in a wide variety of fields. The development of a DL model is a time-consuming and resource-intensive procedure. Hence, dedicated GPU accelerators have been collectively constructed into a GPU datacenter. An efficient scheduler design for such GPU datacenter is crucially important to reduce the operational cost and improve resource utilization. However, traditional approaches designed for big data or high performance computing workloads can not support DL workloads to fully utilize the GPU resources. Recently, substantial schedulers are proposed to tailor for DL workloads in GPU datacenters. This paper surveys existing research efforts for both training and inference workloads. We primarily present how existing schedulers facilitate the respective workloads from the scheduling objectives and resource consumption features. Finally, we prospect several promising future research directions. More detailed summary with the surveyed paper and code links can be found at our project website: https://github.com/S-Lab-System-Group/Awesome-DL-Scheduling-Papers
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）在广泛的领域展现出它的繁荣。深度学习模型的开发是一个耗时且资源密集的过程。因此，专用GPU加速器被共同构建到GPU数据中心中。此类 GPU 数据中心的高效调度程序设计对于降低运营成本和提高资源利用率至关重要。然而，针对大数据或高性能计算工作负载设计的传统方法无法支持深度学习工作负载充分利用 GPU 资源。最近，人们提出了大量的调度程序来针对 GPU 数据中心中的深度学习工作负载进行定制。本文调查了训练和推理工作负载的现有研究工作。我们主要从调度目标和资源消耗特征来介绍现有调度程序如何促进各自的工作负载。最后，我们展望了几个有前景的未来研究方向。包含调查论文和代码链接的更详细摘要可以在我们的项目网站上找到：https://github.com/S-Lab-System-Group/Awesome-DL-Scheduling-Papers

AI.tldr: 本文综述了GPU数据中心中深度学习工作负载调度的研究进展，分析了现有调度方法的分类、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型开发耗时且资源密集，传统调度方法无法有效利用GPU资源，导致运营成本高和资源利用率低。
AI.method: 通过分类总结现有调度器的设计目标与资源特征，对比训练和推理工作负载的调度策略，并整理研究趋势。
AI.result: 系统梳理了当前调度方法的优缺点，指出现有研究在动态资源分配、多目标优化等方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来需探索更智能的调度算法以适应异构GPU环境，并结合新型硬件特性提升资源利用率。

search_text: Deep Learning Workload Scheduling in GPU Datacenters: Taxonomy, Challenges and Vision GPU 数据中心中的深度学习工作负载调度：分类、挑战和愿景 Deep learning (DL) shows its prosperity in a wide variety of fields. The development of a DL model is a time-consuming and resource-intensive procedure. Hence, dedicated GPU accelerators have been collectively constructed into a GPU datacenter. An efficient scheduler design for such GPU datacenter is crucially important to reduce the operational cost and improve resource utilization. However, traditional approaches designed for big data or high performance computing workloads can not support DL workloads to fully utilize the GPU resources. Recently, substantial schedulers are proposed to tailor for DL workloads in GPU datacenters. This paper surveys existing research efforts for both training and inference workloads. We primarily present how existing schedulers facilitate the respective workloads from the scheduling objectives and resource consumption features. Finally, we prospect several promising future research directions. More detailed summary with the surveyed paper and code links can be found at our project website: https://github.com/S-Lab-System-Group/Awesome-DL-Scheduling-Papers 深度学习（DL）在广泛的领域展现出它的繁荣。深度学习模型的开发是一个耗时且资源密集的过程。因此，专用GPU加速器被共同构建到GPU数据中心中。此类 GPU 数据中心的高效调度程序设计对于降低运营成本和提高资源利用率至关重要。然而，针对大数据或高性能计算工作负载设计的传统方法无法支持深度学习工作负载充分利用 GPU 资源。最近，人们提出了大量的调度程序来针对 GPU 数据中心中的深度学习工作负载进行定制。本文调查了训练和推理工作负载的现有研究工作。我们主要从调度目标和资源消耗特征来介绍现有调度程序如何促进各自的工作负载。最后，我们展望了几个有前景的未来研究方向。包含调查论文和代码链接的更详细摘要可以在我们的项目网站上找到：https://github.com/S-Lab-System-Group/Awesome-DL-Scheduling-Papers 本文综述了GPU数据中心中深度学习工作负载调度的研究进展，分析了现有调度方法的分类、挑战及未来方向。 Wei Gao,Qinghao Hu,Zhisheng Ye,Peng Sun,Xiaolin Wang,Yingwei Luo,Tianwei Zhang,Yonggang Wen cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Evaluating the Effect of Enhanced Text-Visualization Integration on Combating Misinformation in Data Story
title_zh: 评估增强文本可视化集成对打击数据故事中的错误信息的效果
abstract: Misinformation has disruptive effects on our lives. Many researchers have looked into means to identify and combat misinformation in text or data visualization. However, there is still a lack of understanding of how misinformation can be introduced when text and visualization are combined to tell data stories, not to mention how to improve the lay public's awareness of possible misperceptions about facts in narrative visualization. In this paper, we first analyze where misinformation could possibly be injected into the production-consumption process of data stories through a literature survey. Then, as a first step towards combating misinformation in data stories, we explore possible defensive design methods to enhance the reader's awareness of information misalignment when data facts are scripted and visualized. More specifically, we conduct a between-subjects crowdsourcing study to investigate the impact of two design methods enhancing text-visualization integration, i.e., explanatory annotation and interactive linking, on users' awareness of misinformation in data stories. The study results show that although most participants still can not find misinformation, the two design methods can significantly lower the perceived credibility of the text or visualizations. Our work informs the possibility of fighting an infodemic through defensive design methods.

Our work informs the possibility of fighting an infodemic through defensive design methods.
abstract_zh: 错误信息对我们的生活产生破坏性影响。许多研究人员已经研究了识别和打击文本或数据可视化中的错误信息的方法。 However, there is still a lack of understanding of how misinformation can be introduced when text and visualization are combined to tell data stories, not to mention how to improve the lay public's awareness of possible misperceptions about facts in narrative visualization. In this paper, we first analyze where misinformation could possibly be injected into the production-consumption process of data stories through a literature survey. Then, as a first step towards combating misinformation in data stories, we explore possible defensive design methods to enhance the reader's awareness of information misalignment when data facts are scripted and visualized. More specifically, we conduct a between-subjects crowdsourcing study to investigate the impact of two design methods enhancing text-visualization integration, i.e., explanatory annotation and interactive linking, on users' awareness of misinformation in data stories. The study results show that although most participants still can not find misinformation, the two design methods can significantly lower the perceived credibility of the text or visualizations.我们的工作揭示了通过防御性设计方法对抗信息流行病的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估增强文本-可视化整合对在数据故事中对抗虚假信息的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注文本或可视化单独的虚假信息识别，但缺乏对结合文本与可视化的数据故事中虚假信息注入机制及防御方法的理解。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析数据故事生产-消费流程中虚假信息可能注入的环节，并设计对照实验测试两种增强整合方法（解释性注释与交互式链接）对用户认知的影响。
AI.result: 尽管多数参与者未能识别虚假信息，但两种设计方法显著降低了文本或可视化内容的可信度感知。
AI.conclusion: 防御性设计方法可通过降低可信度感知辅助应对信息疫情，为数据故事中的虚假信息治理提供新思路。

title: An interpretation of the final fully connected layer
title_zh: 最终全连接层的解释
abstract: In recent years neural networks have achieved state-of-the-art accuracy for various tasks but the the interpretation of the generated outputs still remains difficult. In this work we attempt to provide a method to understand the learnt weights in the final fully connected layer in image classification models. We motivate our method by drawing a connection between the policy gradient objective in RL and supervised learning objective. We suggest that the commonly used cross entropy based supervised learning objective can be regarded as a special case of the policy gradient objective. Using this insight we propose a method to find the most discriminative and confusing parts of an image. Our method does not make any prior assumption about neural network achitecture and has low computational cost. We apply our method on publicly available pre-trained models and report the generated results.
summary: In recent years neural networks have achieved state-of-the-art accuracy for various tasks but the the interpretation of the generated outputs still remains difficult. In this work we attempt to provide a method to understand the learnt weights in the final fully connected layer in image classification models. We motivate our method by drawing a connection between the policy gradient objective in RL and supervised learning objective. We suggest that the commonly used cross entropy based supervised learning objective can be regarded as a special case of the policy gradient objective. Using this insight we propose a method to find the most discriminative and confusing parts of an image. Our method does not make any prior assumption about neural network achitecture and has low computational cost. We apply our method on publicly available pre-trained models and report the generated results.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经网络已经在各种任务中实现了最先进的准确性，但对生成的输出的解释仍然很困难。在这项工作中，我们尝试提供一种方法来理解图像分类模型中最终全连接层中的学习权重。我们通过在强化学习中的策略梯度目标和监督学习目标之间建立联系来激发我们的方法。我们建议常用的基于交叉熵的监督学习目标可以被视为策略梯度目标的特例。利用这种洞察力，我们提出了一种方法来找到图像中最具辨别力和最令人困惑的部分。我们的方法不对神经网络结构做出任何事先假设，并且计算成本较低。我们将我们的方法应用于公开的预训练模型并报告生成的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提出一种方法以解释图像分类模型中最终全连接层的学习权重，从而增强模型输出的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 通过建立强化学习中的策略梯度目标与监督学习目标之间的联系，作者认为交叉熵损失可视为策略梯度的特例，从而为解释模型权重提供新视角。
AI.method: 基于上述联系，提出一种无需预先假设网络结构且计算成本低的方法，通过分析权重识别图像中最具判别性和混淆性的区域。
AI.result: 在多个公开的预训练模型上应用该方法，验证了其有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效解释最终全连接层权重，提升模型输出的可解释性，且具有通用性和低计算成本的优势。

title: Automatic Verification of Sound Abstractions for Generalized Planning
title_zh: 自动验证总体规划的合理抽象
abstract: Generalized planning studies the computation of general solutions for a set of planning problems. Computing general solutions with correctness guarantee has long been a key issue in generalized planning. Abstractions are widely used to solve generalized planning problems. Solutions of sound abstractions are those with correctness guarantees for generalized planning problems. Recently, Cui et al. proposed a uniform abstraction framework for generalized planning. They gave the model-theoretic definitions of sound and complete abstractions for generalized planning problems. In this paper, based on Cui et al.'s work, we explore automatic verification of sound abstractions for generalized planning. We firstly present the proof-theoretic characterization for sound abstraction. Then, based on the characterization, we give a sufficient condition for sound abstractions which is first-order verifiable. To implement it, we exploit regression extensions, and develop methods to handle counting and transitive closure. Finally, we implement a sound abstraction verification system and report experimental results on several domains.
summary: Generalized planning studies the computation of general solutions for a set of planning problems. Computing general solutions with correctness guarantee has long been a key issue in generalized planning. Abstractions are widely used to solve generalized planning problems. Solutions of sound abstractions are those with correctness guarantees for generalized planning problems. Recently, Cui et al. proposed a uniform abstraction framework for generalized planning. They gave the model-theoretic definitions of sound and complete abstractions for generalized planning problems. In this paper, based on Cui et al.'s work, we explore automatic verification of sound abstractions for generalized planning. We firstly present the proof-theoretic characterization for sound abstraction. Then, based on the characterization, we give a sufficient condition for sound abstractions which is first-order verifiable. To implement it, we exploit regression extensions, and develop methods to handle counting and transitive closure. Finally, we implement a sound abstraction verification system and report experimental results on several domains.
abstract_zh: 广义规划研究一组规划问题的一般解的计算。计算具有正确性保证的通用解长期以来一直是广义规划中的关键问题。抽象被广泛用于解决广义规划问题。健全抽象的解决方案是那些能够保证广义规划问题的正确性的解决方案。最近，崔等人。提出了总体规划的统一抽象框架。他们给出了广义规划问题的合理且完整的抽象的模型理论定义。在本文中，基于 Cui 等人的工作，我们探索了广义规划的合理抽象的自动验证。我们首先提出声音抽象的证明理论表征。然后，基于表征，我们给出了声音抽象的充分条件，该条件是一阶可验证的。为了实现它，我们利用回归扩展，并开发处理计数和传递闭包的方法。最后，我们实现了一个完善的抽象验证系统并报告了多个领域的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何自动验证广义规划中声抽象的正确性，以确保生成的通用解决方案的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 广义规划需要保证通用解决方案的正确性，而声抽象是关键手段。现有方法缺乏自动验证声抽象的系统性方案，需填补此技术空白。
AI.method: 提出证明论特征化声抽象，构建可一阶验证的充分条件，结合回归扩展与计数、传递闭包处理方法，实现自动验证系统。
AI.result: 开发了声抽象验证系统，并在多个领域实验验证了方法的有效性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为广义规划提供了自动验证声抽象的理论与工具支持，推动了可靠通用解决方案的研究。

authors_text: Zixian Su,Kai Yao,Xi Yang,Qiufeng Wang,Yuyao Yan,Jie Sun,Kaizhu Huang
title: Mind The Gap: Alleviating Local Imbalance for Unsupervised Cross-Modality Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 注意差距：减轻无监督跨模态医学图像分割的局部不平衡
abstract: Unsupervised cross-modality medical image adaptation aims to alleviate the severe domain gap between different imaging modalities without using the target domain label. A key in this campaign relies upon aligning the distributions of source and target domain. One common attempt is to enforce the global alignment between two domains, which, however, ignores the fatal local-imbalance domain gap problem, i.e., some local features with larger domain gap are harder to transfer. Recently, some methods conduct alignment focusing on local regions to improve the efficiency of model learning. While this operation may cause a deficiency of critical information from contexts. To tackle this limitation, we propose a novel strategy to alleviate the domain gap imbalance considering the characteristics of medical images, namely Global-Local Union Alignment. Specifically, a feature-disentanglement style-transfer module first synthesizes the target-like source-content images to reduce the global domain gap. Then, a local feature mask is integrated to reduce the 'inter-gap' for local features by prioritizing those discriminative features with larger domain gap. This combination of global and local alignment can precisely localize the crucial regions in segmentation target while preserving the overall semantic consistency. We conduct a series of experiments with two cross-modality adaptation tasks, i,e. cardiac substructure and abdominal multi-organ segmentation. Experimental results indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both tasks.
summary: Unsupervised cross-modality medical image adaptation aims to alleviate the severe domain gap between different imaging modalities without using the target domain label. A key in this campaign relies upon aligning the distributions of source and target domain. One common attempt is to enforce the global alignment between two domains, which, however, ignores the fatal local-imbalance domain gap problem, i.e., some local features with larger domain gap are harder to transfer. Recently, some methods conduct alignment focusing on local regions to improve the efficiency of model learning. While this operation may cause a deficiency of critical information from contexts. To tackle this limitation, we propose a novel strategy to alleviate the domain gap imbalance considering the characteristics of medical images, namely Global-Local Union Alignment. Specifically, a feature-disentanglement style-transfer module first synthesizes the target-like source-content images to reduce the global domain gap. Then, a local feature mask is integrated to reduce the 'inter-gap' for local features by prioritizing those discriminative features with larger domain gap. This combination of global and local alignment can precisely localize the crucial regions in segmentation target while preserving the overall semantic consistency. We conduct a series of experiments with two cross-modality adaptation tasks, i,e. cardiac substructure and abdominal multi-organ segmentation. Experimental results indicate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both tasks.
abstract_zh: 无监督的跨模态医学图像适应旨在在不使用目标域标签的情况下缓解不同成像模态之间严重的域差距。此活动的关键在于对齐源域和目标域的分布。一种常见的尝试是强制两个域之间的全局对齐，然而，这忽略了致命的局部不平衡域间隙问题，即一些具有较大域间隙的局部特征更难转移。最近，一些方法针对局部区域进行对齐，以提高模型学习的效率。虽然此操作可能会导致上下文中关键信息的缺乏。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种考虑医学图像特征来缓解域间隙不平衡的新策略，即全局局部联合对齐。具体来说，特征解缠风格转移模块首先合成类似目标的源内容图像以减少全局域差距。然后，集成局部特征掩模，通过优先考虑具有较大域间隙的判别性特征来减少局部特征的“间隙”。这种全局和局部对齐的结合可以精确定位分割目标中的关键区域，同时保持整体语义一致性。我们对两个跨模态适应任务进行了一系列实验，即心脏亚结构和腹部多器官分割。实验结果表明，我们的方法在这两项任务中都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的全局-局部联合对齐策略，用于解决无监督跨模态医学图像分割中的局部不平衡域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注全局域对齐或局部区域对齐，未能同时处理全局域差距和局部特征差异，导致关键信息丢失或转移效率低下。
AI.method: 设计特征解耦风格迁移模块生成目标样式的源内容图像以缩小全局域差距，并结合局部特征掩码优先优化大域差距的判别性特征，实现全局与局部对齐的联合优化。
AI.result: 在心脏子结构和腹部多器官分割任务中，该方法均达到最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 全局-局部联合对齐策略能有效缓解医学图像跨模态域差距，提升分割精度。

title: Hierarchical Vectorization for Portrait Images
title_zh: 肖像图像的分层矢量化
abstract: Aiming at developing intuitive and easy-to-use portrait editing tools, we propose a novel vectorization method that can automatically convert raster images into a 3-tier hierarchical representation. The base layer consists of a set of sparse diffusion curves (DC) which characterize salient geometric features and low-frequency colors and provide means for semantic color transfer and facial expression editing. The middle level encodes specular highlights and shadows to large and editable Poisson regions (PR) and allows the user to directly adjust illumination via tuning the strength and/or changing shape of PR. The top level contains two types of pixel-sized PRs for high-frequency residuals and fine details such as pimples and pigmentation. We also train a deep generative model that can produce high-frequency residuals automatically. Thanks to the meaningful organization of vector primitives, editing portraits becomes easy and intuitive. In particular, our method supports color transfer, facial expression editing, highlight and shadow editing and automatic retouching. Thanks to the linearity of the Laplace operator, we introduce alpha blending, linear dodge and linear burn to vector editing and show that they are effective in editing highlights and shadows. To quantitatively evaluate the results, we extend the commonly used FLIP metric (which measures differences between two images) by considering illumination. The new metric, called illumination-sensitive FLIP or IS-FLIP, can effectively capture the salient changes in color transfer results, and is more consistent with human perception than FLIP and other quality measures on portrait images. We evaluate our method on the FFHQR dataset and show that our method is effective for common portrait editing tasks, such as retouching, light editing, color transfer and expression editing. We will make the code and trained models publicly available.

We evaluate our method on the FFHQR dataset and show that our method is effective for common portrait editing tasks, such as retouching, light editing, color transfer and expression editing. We will make the code and trained models publicly available.
abstract_zh: 为了开发直观且易于使用的肖像编辑工具，我们提出了一种新颖的矢量化方法，可以自动将光栅图像转换为三层分层表示。基础层由一组稀疏扩散曲线（DC）组成，它表征显着的几何特征和低频颜色，并提供语义颜色传输和面部表情编辑的手段。中间层将镜面高光和阴影编码到大型且可编辑的泊松区域 (PR)，并允许用户通过调整 PR 的强度和/或改变形状来直接调整照明。顶层包含两种类型的像素大小的 PR，用于高频残差和精细细节，例如粉刺和色素沉着。我们还训练了一个可以自动产生高频残差的深度生成模型。由于矢量基元的有意义的组织，编辑肖像变得简单直观。特别是，我们的方法支持颜色传输、面部表情编辑、高光和阴影编辑以及自动修饰。由于拉普拉斯算子的线性，我们将 Alpha 混合、线性减淡和线性加深引入到矢量编辑中，并表明它们在编辑高光和阴影方面非常有效。为了定量评估结果，我们通过考虑照明来扩展常用的 FLIP 度量（用于测量两个图像之间的差异）。这种新的度量称为光照敏感的 FLIP 或 IS-FLIP，可以有效捕获颜色传输结果的显着变化，并且比 FLIP 和人像图像的其他质量度量更符合人类的感知。我们在 FFHQR 数据集上评估我们的方法，并表明我们的方法对于常见的肖像编辑任务是有效的，例如修饰、灯光编辑、颜色传输和表情编辑。我们将公开代码和经过训练的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层向量化方法，将肖像图像转换为三级向量表示，以实现直观的编辑功能。
AI.motivation: 开发直观易用的肖像编辑工具，解决传统方法在颜色迁移、光照调整等任务中的复杂性和低效问题。
AI.method: 构建三层次结构：底层用扩散曲线捕捉几何特征，中层通过可编辑的泊松区域调整高光阴影，顶层处理高频细节并引入生成模型自动补全残差。
AI.result: 在FFHQR数据集上验证了方法在修图、光照编辑、颜色迁移等任务的有效性，并公开了代码与模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层向量化实现了高效直观的肖像编辑，IS-FLIP指标证明了其与人类感知一致的评估优势。

search_text: Hierarchical Vectorization for Portrait Images 肖像图像的分层矢量化 Aiming at developing intuitive and easy-to-use portrait editing tools, we propose a novel vectorization method that can automatically convert raster images into a 3-tier hierarchical representation. The base layer consists of a set of sparse diffusion curves (DC) which characterize salient geometric features and low-frequency colors and provide means for semantic color transfer and facial expression editing. The middle level encodes specular highlights and shadows to large and editable Poisson regions (PR) and allows the user to directly adjust illumination via tuning the strength and/or changing shape of PR. The top level contains two types of pixel-sized PRs for high-frequency residuals and fine details such as pimples and pigmentation. We also train a deep generative model that can produce high-frequency residuals automatically. Thanks to the meaningful organization of vector primitives, editing portraits becomes easy and intuitive. In particular, our method supports color transfer, facial expression editing, highlight and shadow editing and automatic retouching. Thanks to the linearity of the Laplace operator, we introduce alpha blending, linear dodge and linear burn to vector editing and show that they are effective in editing highlights and shadows. To quantitatively evaluate the results, we extend the commonly used FLIP metric (which measures differences between two images) by considering illumination. The new metric, called illumination-sensitive FLIP or IS-FLIP, can effectively capture the salient changes in color transfer results, and is more consistent with human perception than FLIP and other quality measures on portrait images. We evaluate our method on the FFHQR dataset and show that our method is effective for common portrait editing tasks, such as retouching, light editing, color transfer and expression editing. We will make the code and trained models publicly available. 为了开发直观且易于使用的肖像编辑工具，我们提出了一种新颖的矢量化方法，可以自动将光栅图像转换为三层分层表示。基础层由一组稀疏扩散曲线（DC）组成，它表征显着的几何特征和低频颜色，并提供语义颜色传输和面部表情编辑的手段。中间层将镜面高光和阴影编码到大型且可编辑的泊松区域 (PR)，并允许用户通过调整 PR 的强度和/或改变形状来直接调整照明。顶层包含两种类型的像素大小的 PR，用于高频残差和精细细节，例如粉刺和色素沉着。我们还训练了一个可以自动产生高频残差的深度生成模型。由于矢量基元的有意义的组织，编辑肖像变得简单直观。特别是，我们的方法支持颜色传输、面部表情编辑、高光和阴影编辑以及自动修饰。由于拉普拉斯算子的线性，我们将 Alpha 混合、线性减淡和线性加深引入到矢量编辑中，并表明它们在编辑高光和阴影方面非常有效。为了定量评估结果，我们通过考虑照明来扩展常用的 FLIP 度量（用于测量两个图像之间的差异）。这种新的度量称为光照敏感的 FLIP 或 IS-FLIP，可以有效捕获颜色传输结果的显着变化，并且比 FLIP 和人像图像的其他质量度量更符合人类的感知。我们在 FFHQR 数据集上评估我们的方法，并表明我们的方法对于常见的肖像编辑任务是有效的，例如修饰、灯光编辑、颜色传输和表情编辑。我们将公开代码和经过训练的模型。 本文提出一种分层向量化方法，将肖像图像转换为三级向量表示，以实现直观的编辑功能。 Qian Fu,Linlin Liu,Fei Hou,Ying He cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Unsupervised Misaligned Infrared and Visible Image Fusion via Cross-Modality Image Generation and Registration
title_zh: 通过跨模态图像生成和配准实现无监督错位红外和可见光图像融合
abstract: Recent learning-based image fusion methods have marked numerous progress in pre-registered multi-modality data, but suffered serious ghosts dealing with misaligned multi-modality data, due to the spatial deformation and the difficulty narrowing cross-modality discrepancy. To overcome the obstacles, in this paper, we present a robust cross-modality generation-registration paradigm for unsupervised misaligned infrared and visible image fusion (IVIF). Specifically, we propose a Cross-modality Perceptual Style Transfer Network (CPSTN) to generate a pseudo infrared image taking a visible image as input. Benefiting from the favorable geometry preservation ability of the CPSTN, the generated pseudo infrared image embraces a sharp structure, which is more conducive to transforming cross-modality image alignment into mono-modality registration coupled with the structure-sensitive of the infrared image. In this case, we introduce a Multi-level Refinement Registration Network (MRRN) to predict the displacement vector field between distorted and pseudo infrared images and reconstruct registered infrared image under the mono-modality setting. Moreover, to better fuse the registered infrared images and visible images, we present a feature Interaction Fusion Module (IFM) to adaptively select more meaningful features for fusion in the Dual-path Interaction Fusion Network (DIFN). Extensive experimental results suggest that the proposed method performs superior capability on misaligned cross-modality image fusion.
summary: Recent learning-based image fusion methods have marked numerous progress in pre-registered multi-modality data, but suffered serious ghosts dealing with misaligned multi-modality data, due to the spatial deformation and the difficulty narrowing cross-modality discrepancy. To overcome the obstacles, in this paper, we present a robust cross-modality generation-registration paradigm for unsupervised misaligned infrared and visible image fusion (IVIF). Specifically, we propose a Cross-modality Perceptual Style Transfer Network (CPSTN) to generate a pseudo infrared image taking a visible image as input. Benefiting from the favorable geometry preservation ability of the CPSTN, the generated pseudo infrared image embraces a sharp structure, which is more conducive to transforming cross-modality image alignment into mono-modality registration coupled with the structure-sensitive of the infrared image. In this case, we introduce a Multi-level Refinement Registration Network (MRRN) to predict the displacement vector field between distorted and pseudo infrared images and reconstruct registered infrared image under the mono-modality setting. Moreover, to better fuse the registered infrared images and visible images, we present a feature Interaction Fusion Module (IFM) to adaptively select more meaningful features for fusion in the Dual-path Interaction Fusion Network (DIFN). Extensive experimental results suggest that the proposed method performs superior capability on misaligned cross-modality image fusion.
abstract_zh: 最近基于学习的图像融合方法在预配准多模态数据方面取得了巨大进展，但由于空间变形和缩小跨模态差异的困难，在处理未对齐的多模态数据时遇到了严重的问题。为了克服这些障碍，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于无监督错位红外和可见图像融合（IVIF）的强大的跨模态生成注册范例。具体来说，我们提出了一种跨模态感知风格转移网络（CPSTN）来生成伪红外图像，以可见图像作为输入。受益于CPSTN良好的几何保存能力，生成的伪红外图像具有清晰的结构，更有利于将跨模态图像对准转化为单模态配准，再加上红外图像的结构敏感。在这种情况下，我们引入了多级细化配准网络（MRRN）来预测失真红外图像和伪红外图像之间的位移矢量场，并在单模态设置下重建配准红外图像。此外，为了更好地融合配准的红外图像和可见图像，我们提出了特征交互融合模块（IFM），以在双路径交互融合网络（DIFN）中自适应地选择更有意义的特征进行融合。大量的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在未对准的跨模态图像融合方面表现出优异的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于未对齐的红外和可见光图像融合的跨模态生成-配准范式。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的图像融合方法在预对齐的多模态数据上取得了显著进展，但在处理未对齐的多模态数据时，由于空间变形和跨模态差异难以缩小，导致出现严重伪影。
AI.method: 提出了一种跨模态感知风格迁移网络（CPSTN）来生成伪红外图像，以及多级细化配准网络（MRRN）预测位移向量场并重建配准后的红外图像，最后通过特征交互融合模块（IFM）进行图像融合。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在未对齐的跨模态图像融合任务中表现出优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的跨模态生成-配准范式有效解决了未对齐红外和可见光图像融合中的问题，具有较好的应用前景。

title: Approximation speed of quantized vs. unquantized ReLU neural networks and beyond
title_zh: 量化与非量化 ReLU 神经网络及其他神经网络的近似速度
abstract: We deal with two complementary questions about approximation properties of ReLU networks. First, we study how the uniform quantization of ReLU networks with real-valued weights impacts their approximation properties. We establish an upper-bound on the minimal number of bits per coordinate needed for uniformly quantized ReLU networks to keep the same polynomial asymptotic approximation speeds as unquantized ones. We also characterize the error of nearest-neighbour uniform quantization of ReLU networks. This is achieved using a new lower-bound on the Lipschitz constant of the map that associates the parameters of ReLU networks to their realization, and an upper-bound generalizing classical results. Second, we investigate when ReLU networks can be expected, or not, to have better approximation properties than other classical approximation families. Indeed, several approximation families share the following common limitation: their polynomial asymptotic approximation speed of any set is bounded from above by the encoding speed of this set. We introduce a new abstract property of approximation families, called infinite-encodability, which implies this upper-bound. Many classical approximation families, defined with dictionaries or ReLU networks, are shown to be infinite-encodable. This unifies and generalizes several situations where this upper-bound is known.
summary: We deal with two complementary questions about approximation properties of ReLU networks. First, we study how the uniform quantization of ReLU networks with real-valued weights impacts their approximation properties. We establish an upper-bound on the minimal number of bits per coordinate needed for uniformly quantized ReLU networks to keep the same polynomial asymptotic approximation speeds as unquantized ones. We also characterize the error of nearest-neighbour uniform quantization of ReLU networks. This is achieved using a new lower-bound on the Lipschitz constant of the map that associates the parameters of ReLU networks to their realization, and an upper-bound generalizing classical results. Second, we investigate when ReLU networks can be expected, or not, to have better approximation properties than other classical approximation families. Indeed, several approximation families share the following common limitation: their polynomial asymptotic approximation speed of any set is bounded from above by the encoding speed of this set. We introduce a new abstract property of approximation families, called infinite-encodability, which implies this upper-bound. Many classical approximation families, defined with dictionaries or ReLU networks, are shown to be infinite-encodable. This unifies and generalizes several situations where this upper-bound is known.
abstract_zh: 我们处理关于 ReLU 网络近似属性的两个互补问题。 First, we study how the uniform quantization of ReLU networks with real-valued weights impacts their approximation properties.我们建立了均匀量化 ReLU 网络所需的每个坐标的最小位数的上限，以保持与未量化网络相同的多项式渐近逼近速度。 We also characterize the error of nearest-neighbour uniform quantization of ReLU networks.这是通过使用映射的 Lipschitz 常数的新下界（将 ReLU 网络的参数与其实现相关联）以及概括经典结果的上限来实现的。其次，我们研究了 ReLU 网络何时可以预期具有比其他经典近似系列更好的近似特性。事实上，几个近似族有以下共同的限制：任何集合的多项式渐近近似速度都受到该集合的编码速度的限制。我们引入了近似族的一个新的抽象属性，称为无限可编码性，它暗示了这个上限。 Many classical approximation families, defined with dictionaries or ReLU networks, are shown to be infinite-encodable. This unifies and generalizes several situations where this upper-bound is known.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量化与非量化ReLU神经网络的逼近速度差异，并引入了无限编码性概念以统一分析逼近方法的上限。
AI.motivation: 量化神经网络在实际应用中能减少计算与存储开销，但其逼近能力是否与非量化网络相当尚不明确；同时需明确ReLU网络相较于传统逼近方法的优势条件。
AI.method: 通过分析参数到网络实现的映射Lipschitz常数下界，结合经典结果推广上界，量化误差分析；并提出无限编码性抽象属性，证明经典逼近方法均满足该性质。
AI.result: 确定了保持多项式逼近速度的量化位数上限，量化误差被表征；证明ReLU网络及字典方法等均具有无限编码性，统一了逼近速度上限的理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 量化ReLU网络可通过足够位数保持逼近性能，而无限编码性为不同逼近方法的上限分析提供了统一视角，揭示了ReLU网络的优势条件。

search_text: Approximation speed of quantized vs. unquantized ReLU neural networks and beyond 量化与非量化 ReLU 神经网络及其他神经网络的近似速度 We deal with two complementary questions about approximation properties of ReLU networks. First, we study how the uniform quantization of ReLU networks with real-valued weights impacts their approximation properties. We establish an upper-bound on the minimal number of bits per coordinate needed for uniformly quantized ReLU networks to keep the same polynomial asymptotic approximation speeds as unquantized ones. We also characterize the error of nearest-neighbour uniform quantization of ReLU networks. This is achieved using a new lower-bound on the Lipschitz constant of the map that associates the parameters of ReLU networks to their realization, and an upper-bound generalizing classical results. Second, we investigate when ReLU networks can be expected, or not, to have better approximation properties than other classical approximation families. Indeed, several approximation families share the following common limitation: their polynomial asymptotic approximation speed of any set is bounded from above by the encoding speed of this set. We introduce a new abstract property of approximation families, called infinite-encodability, which implies this upper-bound. Many classical approximation families, defined with dictionaries or ReLU networks, are shown to be infinite-encodable. This unifies and generalizes several situations where this upper-bound is known. 我们处理关于 ReLU 网络近似属性的两个互补问题。 First, we study how the uniform quantization of ReLU networks with real-valued weights impacts their approximation properties.我们建立了均匀量化 ReLU 网络所需的每个坐标的最小位数的上限，以保持与未量化网络相同的多项式渐近逼近速度。 We also characterize the error of nearest-neighbour uniform quantization of ReLU networks.这是通过使用映射的 Lipschitz 常数的新下界（将 ReLU 网络的参数与其实现相关联）以及概括经典结果的上限来实现的。其次，我们研究了 ReLU 网络何时可以预期具有比其他经典近似系列更好的近似特性。事实上，几个近似族有以下共同的限制：任何集合的多项式渐近近似速度都受到该集合的编码速度的限制。我们引入了近似族的一个新的抽象属性，称为无限可编码性，它暗示了这个上限。 Many classical approximation families, defined with dictionaries or ReLU networks, are shown to be infinite-encodable. This unifies and generalizes several situations where this upper-bound is known. 本文研究了量化与非量化ReLU神经网络的逼近速度差异，并引入了无限编码性概念以统一分析逼近方法的上限。 Antoine Gonon,Nicolas Brisebarre,Rémi Gribonval,Elisa Riccietti cs.IT,cs.NE

title: Overview of STEM Science as Process, Method, Material, and Data Named Entities
title_zh: STEM 科学作为过程、方法、材料和数据命名实体的概述
comment: 9 pages, 17 figures, In Review submission at Queer in AI @ NAACL 2022 Research Symposia (https://sites.google.com/view/queer-in-ai/naacl-2022?authuser=0)
comments: 9 pages, 17 figures, In Review submission at Queer in AI @ NAACL 2022 Research Symposia (https://sites.google.com/view/queer-in-ai/naacl-2022?authuser=0)
abstract: We are faced with an unprecedented production in scholarly publications worldwide. Stakeholders in the digital libraries posit that the document-based publishing paradigm has reached the limits of adequacy. Instead, structured, machine-interpretable, fine-grained scholarly knowledge publishing as Knowledge Graphs (KG) is strongly advocated. In this work, we develop and analyze a large-scale structured dataset of STEM articles across 10 different disciplines, viz. Agriculture, Astronomy, Biology, Chemistry, Computer Science, Earth Science, Engineering, Material Science, Mathematics, and Medicine. Our analysis is defined over a large-scale corpus comprising 60K abstracts structured as four scientific entities process, method, material, and data. Thus our study presents, for the first-time, an analysis of a large-scale multidisciplinary corpus under the construct of four named entity labels that are specifically defined and selected to be domain-independent as opposed to domain-specific. The work is then inadvertently a feasibility test of characterizing multidisciplinary science with domain-independent concepts. Further, to summarize the distinct facets of scientific knowledge per concept per discipline, a set of word cloud visualizations are offered. The STEM-NER-60k corpus, created in this work, comprises over 1M extracted entities from 60k STEM articles obtained from a major publishing platform and is publicly released https://github.com/jd-coderepos/stem-ner-60k.

Thus our study presents, for the first-time, an analysis of a large-scale multidisciplinary corpus under the construct of four named entity labels that are specifically defined and selected to be domain-independent as opposed to domain-specific. The work is then inadvertently a feasibility test of characterizing multidisciplinary science with domain-independent concepts. Further, to summarize the distinct facets of scientific knowledge per concept per discipline, a set of word cloud visualizations are offered. The STEM-NER-60k corpus, created in this work, comprises over 1M extracted entities from 60k STEM articles obtained from a major publishing platform and is publicly released https://github.com/jd-coderepos/stem-ner-60k.
abstract_zh: 我们面临着全世界学术出版物空前的生产。数字图书馆的利益相关者认为基于文档的出版范式已经达到了充分性的极限。相反，强烈提倡以知识图（KG）的形式进行结构化、机器可解释、细粒度的学术知识发布。在这项工作中，我们开发并分析了跨 10 个不同学科的 STEM 文章的大规模结构化数据集。农业、天文学、生物学、化学、计算机科学、地球科学、工程学、材料科学、数学和医学。 Our analysis is defined over a large-scale corpus comprising 60K abstracts structured as four scientific entities process, method, material, and data. Thus our study presents, for the first-time, an analysis of a large-scale multidisciplinary corpus under the construct of four named entity labels that are specifically defined and selected to be domain-independent as opposed to domain-specific.这项工作无意中成为了用独立于领域的概念来表征多学科科学的可行性测试。此外，为了总结每个学科每个概念的科学知识的不同方面，提供了一组词云可视化。 The STEM-NER-60k corpus, created in this work, comprises over 1M extracted entities from 60k STEM articles obtained from a major publishing platform and is publicly released https://github.com/jd-coderepos/stem-ner-60k.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个涵盖10个STEM学科的6万篇论文摘要的结构化数据集，通过定义过程、方法、材料和数据四个领域无关的命名实体标签，分析跨学科科学知识的特征并生成词云可视化。
AI.motivation: 传统文档出版模式难以满足学术知识的结构化需求，需探索基于知识图谱的机器可解释科学知识表示，同时验证领域无关概念在跨学科分析中的可行性。
AI.method: 从主要出版平台获取6万篇STEM论文摘要，提取过程、方法、材料和数据四类命名实体，构建STEM-NER-60k数据集，并通过词云可视化展示各学科知识特征。
AI.result: 首次实现跨学科领域无关实体的多维度分析，生成学科特征词云，并公开包含100万实体的STEM-NER-60k数据集（https://github.com/jd-coderepos/stem-ner-60k）。
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于领域无关概念的跨学科科学知识分析可行性，为构建多学科知识图谱提供了重要数据基础和方法参考。

authors_text: Cheng Jie,Chen Yingbing,Zhang Qingwen,Gan Lu,Liu Ming
title: Real-Time Trajectory Planning for Autonomous Driving with Gaussian Process and Incremental Refinement
title_zh: 采用高斯过程和增量细化的自动驾驶实时轨迹规划
abstract: Real-time kinodynamic trajectory planning in dynamic environments is critical yet challenging for autonomous driving. In this letter, we propose an efficient trajectory planning system for autonomous driving in complex dynamic scenarios through iterative and incremental path-speed optimization. Exploiting the decoupled structure of the planning problem, a path planner based on Gaussian process first generates a continuous arc-length parameterized path in the Frenét frame, considering static obstacle avoidance and curvature constraints. We theoretically prove that it is a good generalization of the well-known jerk optimal solution. An efficient s-t graph search method is introduced to find a speed profile along the generated path to deal with dynamic environments. Finally, the path and speed are optimized incrementally and iteratively to ensure kinodynamic feasibility. Various simulated scenarios with both static obstacles and dynamic agents verify the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed method. Experimental results show that our method can run at 20 Hz. The source code is released as an open-source package.
summary: Real-time kinodynamic trajectory planning in dynamic environments is critical yet challenging for autonomous driving. In this letter, we propose an efficient trajectory planning system for autonomous driving in complex dynamic scenarios through iterative and incremental path-speed optimization. Exploiting the decoupled structure of the planning problem, a path planner based on Gaussian process first generates a continuous arc-length parameterized path in the Frenét frame, considering static obstacle avoidance and curvature constraints. We theoretically prove that it is a good generalization of the well-known jerk optimal solution. An efficient s-t graph search method is introduced to find a speed profile along the generated path to deal with dynamic environments. Finally, the path and speed are optimized incrementally and iteratively to ensure kinodynamic feasibility. Various simulated scenarios with both static obstacles and dynamic agents verify the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed method. Experimental results show that our method can run at 20 Hz. The source code is released as an open-source package.
abstract_zh: 动态环境中的实时运动动力学轨迹规划对于自动驾驶来说至关重要但也具有挑战性。在这封信中，我们通过迭代和增量路径速度优化，提出了一种用于复杂动态场景下自动驾驶的高效轨迹规划系统。利用规划问题的解耦结构，基于高斯过程的路径规划器首先在 Frenét 框架中生成连续弧长参数化路径，考虑静态避障和曲率约束。我们从理论上证明它是众所周知的加加速度最优解的良好推广。引入了一种有效的 s-t 图搜索方法来沿着生成的路径找到速度曲线来处理动态环境。最后，逐步迭代地优化路径和速度，以确保运动动力学的可行性。具有静态障碍物和动态代理的各种模拟场景验证了我们提出的方法的有效性和鲁棒性。实验结果表明我们的方法可以在 20 Hz 下运行。源代码作为开源包发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高斯过程和增量优化的实时轨迹规划方法，用于自动驾驶车辆在复杂动态环境中的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 实时运动学轨迹规划在动态环境中面临动态障碍物避让和复杂场景处理的挑战，传统方法难以兼顾效率与安全性。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程生成满足曲率约束的Frenét框架路径，结合s-t图搜索确定速度分布，并通过迭代增量优化确保运动学可行性。
AI.result: 实验验证方法在包含静态障碍物和动态代理的多场景下有效，系统运行频率达20Hz，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论证明与实验验证，在动态环境中实现了高效、鲁棒的轨迹规划，为自动驾驶提供可靠解决方案。
