search_text: Real-Time Trajectory Planning for Autonomous Driving with Gaussian Process and Incremental Refinement 采用高斯过程和增量细化的自动驾驶实时轨迹规划 Real-time kinodynamic trajectory planning in dynamic environments is critical yet challenging for autonomous driving. In this letter, we propose an efficient trajectory planning system for autonomous driving in complex dynamic scenarios through iterative and incremental path-speed optimization. Exploiting the decoupled structure of the planning problem, a path planner based on Gaussian process first generates a continuous arc-length parameterized path in the Frenét frame, considering static obstacle avoidance and curvature constraints. We theoretically prove that it is a good generalization of the well-known jerk optimal solution. An efficient s-t graph search method is introduced to find a speed profile along the generated path to deal with dynamic environments. Finally, the path and speed are optimized incrementally and iteratively to ensure kinodynamic feasibility. Various simulated scenarios with both static obstacles and dynamic agents verify the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed method. Experimental results show that our method can run at 20 Hz. The source code is released as an open-source package. 动态环境中的实时运动动力学轨迹规划对于自动驾驶来说至关重要但也具有挑战性。在这封信中，我们通过迭代和增量路径速度优化，提出了一种用于复杂动态场景下自动驾驶的高效轨迹规划系统。利用规划问题的解耦结构，基于高斯过程的路径规划器首先在 Frenét 框架中生成连续弧长参数化路径，考虑静态避障和曲率约束。我们从理论上证明它是众所周知的加加速度最优解的良好推广。引入了一种有效的 s-t 图搜索方法来沿着生成的路径找到速度曲线来处理动态环境。最后，逐步迭代地优化路径和速度，以确保运动动力学的可行性。具有静态障碍物和动态代理的各种模拟场景验证了我们提出的方法的有效性和鲁棒性。实验结果表明我们的方法可以在 20 Hz 下运行。源代码作为开源包发布。 本文提出一种基于高斯过程和增量优化的实时轨迹规划方法，用于自动驾驶车辆在复杂动态环境中的路径规划。 Cheng Jie,Chen Yingbing,Zhang Qingwen,Gan Lu,Liu Ming cs.RO

authors_text: Zifan Wang,Yuhang Yao,Chaoran Zhang,Han Zhang,Youjie Kang,Carlee Joe-Wong,Matt Fredrikson,Anupam Datta
title: Faithful Explanations for Deep Graph Models
title_zh: 对深度图模型的忠实解释
abstract: This paper studies faithful explanations for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). First, we provide a new and general method for formally characterizing the faithfulness of explanations for GNNs. It applies to existing explanation methods, including feature attributions and subgraph explanations. Second, our analytical and empirical results demonstrate that feature attribution methods cannot capture the nonlinear effect of edge features, while existing subgraph explanation methods are not faithful. Third, we introduce \emph{k-hop Explanation with a Convolutional Core} (KEC), a new explanation method that provably maximizes faithfulness to the original GNN by leveraging information about the graph structure in its adjacency matrix and its \emph{k-th} power. Lastly, our empirical results over both synthetic and real-world datasets for classification and anomaly detection tasks with GNNs demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: This paper studies faithful explanations for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). First, we provide a new and general method for formally characterizing the faithfulness of explanations for GNNs. It applies to existing explanation methods, including feature attributions and subgraph explanations. Second, our analytical and empirical results demonstrate that feature attribution methods cannot capture the nonlinear effect of edge features, while existing subgraph explanation methods are not faithful. Third, we introduce \emph{k-hop Explanation with a Convolutional Core} (KEC), a new explanation method that provably maximizes faithfulness to the original GNN by leveraging information about the graph structure in its adjacency matrix and its \emph{k-th} power. Lastly, our empirical results over both synthetic and real-world datasets for classification and anomaly detection tasks with GNNs demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了图神经网络（GNN）的忠实解释。首先，我们提供了一种新的通用方法来正式表征 GNN 解释的忠实度。它适用于现有的解释方法，包括特征归因和子图解释。其次，我们的分析和实证结果表明，特征归因方法无法捕获边缘特征的非线性效应，而现有的子图解释方法并不忠实。第三，我们引入了\emph{k-hop Explanation with a Convolutional Core}（KEC），这是一种新的解释方法，通过利用有关其邻接矩阵中的图结构及其\emph{k-th}幂的信息，可证明最大化对原始GNN的忠实度。最后，我们对使用 GNN 进行分类和异常检测任务的合成数据集和现实数据集的实证结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 研究图神经网络（GNN）的忠实解释方法，提出新的评估标准和KEC方法。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法存在不足，如特征归因无法捕捉边特征的非线性影响，子图解释不忠实，需改进。
AI.method: 提出形式化忠实度表征方法，并引入KEC方法，利用邻接矩阵及k次幂的图结构信息。
AI.result: 实验显示KEC在分类和异常检测任务中有效，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: KEC方法在理论上和实证上均证明有效，推动GNN解释的可信性。

title: Collaborative 3D Object Detection for Automatic Vehicle Systems via Learnable Communications
title_zh: 通过可学习通信实现自动车辆系统的协作 3D 物体检测
abstract: Accurate detection of objects in 3D point clouds is a key problem in autonomous driving systems. Collaborative perception can incorporate information from spatially diverse sensors and provide significant benefits for improving the perception accuracy of autonomous driving systems. In this work, we consider that the autonomous vehicle uses local point cloud data and combines information from neighboring infrastructures through wireless links for cooperative 3D object detection. However, information sharing among vehicle and infrastructures in predefined communication schemes may result in communication congestion and/or bring limited performance improvement. To this end, we propose a novel collaborative 3D object detection framework that consists of three components: feature learning networks that map point clouds into feature maps; an efficient communication block that propagates compact and fine-grained query feature maps from vehicle to support infrastructures and optimizes attention weights between query and key to refine support feature maps; a region proposal network that fuses local feature maps and weighted support feature maps for 3D object detection. We evaluate the performance of the proposed framework using a synthetic cooperative dataset created in two complex driving scenarios: a roundabout and a T-junction. Experiment results and bandwidth usage analysis demonstrate that our approach can save communication and computation costs and significantly improve detection performance under different detection difficulties in all scenarios.
summary: Accurate detection of objects in 3D point clouds is a key problem in autonomous driving systems. Collaborative perception can incorporate information from spatially diverse sensors and provide significant benefits for improving the perception accuracy of autonomous driving systems. In this work, we consider that the autonomous vehicle uses local point cloud data and combines information from neighboring infrastructures through wireless links for cooperative 3D object detection. However, information sharing among vehicle and infrastructures in predefined communication schemes may result in communication congestion and/or bring limited performance improvement. To this end, we propose a novel collaborative 3D object detection framework that consists of three components: feature learning networks that map point clouds into feature maps; an efficient communication block that propagates compact and fine-grained query feature maps from vehicle to support infrastructures and optimizes attention weights between query and key to refine support feature maps; a region proposal network that fuses local feature maps and weighted support feature maps for 3D object detection. We evaluate the performance of the proposed framework using a synthetic cooperative dataset created in two complex driving scenarios: a roundabout and a T-junction. Experiment results and bandwidth usage analysis demonstrate that our approach can save communication and computation costs and significantly improve detection performance under different detection difficulties in all scenarios.
abstract_zh: 3D点云中物体的精确检测是自动驾驶系统的关键问题。协作感知可以整合来自空间不同传感器的信息，并为提高自动驾驶系统的感知准确性提供显着的好处。在这项工作中，我们认为自动驾驶车辆使用本地点云数据，并通过无线链路结合来自邻近基础设施的信息，以进行协作 3D 对象检测。然而，预定义通信方案中车辆和基础设施之间的信息共享可能导致通信拥塞和/或带来有限的性能改进。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的协作 3D 对象检测框架，该框架由三个组件组成：将点云映射到特征图的特征学习网络；一个高效的通信块，将紧凑且细粒度的查询特征图从车辆传播到支持基础设施，并优化查询和密钥之间的注意力权重以细化支持特征图；融合局部特征图和加权支持特征图以进行 3D 对象检测的区域提议网络。我们使用在两个复杂驾驶场景（环岛和丁字路口）中创建的综合协作数据集来评估所提出框架的性能。实验结果和带宽使用分析表明，我们的方法可以节省通信和计算成本，并在所有场景的不同检测难度下显着提高检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可学习通信的协同3D物体检测框架，用于自动驾驶系统中车辆与基础设施之间的信息共享与检测优化。
AI.motivation: 现有预定义通信方案在车辆与基础设施间的信息共享中易导致通信拥堵且性能提升有限，需更高效的协作检测方法。
AI.method: 框架包含三部分：将点云映射为特征图的特征学习网络、优化查询与关键特征注意力权重的高效通信模块、融合本地与支持特征图的区域提议网络。
AI.result: 在合成数据集（环形交叉口和T型路口场景）中验证，方法在降低通信计算成本的同时显著提升了不同检测难度下的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过可学习通信机制有效优化了协同感知效率，为自动驾驶系统的3D物体检测提供了可行方案。

In this work, we consider that the autonomous vehicle uses local point cloud data and combines information from neighboring infrastructures through wireless links for cooperative 3D object detection. However, information sharing among vehicle and infrastructures in predefined communication schemes may result in communication congestion and/or bring limited performance improvement. To this end, we propose a novel collaborative 3D object detection framework that consists of three components: feature learning networks that map point clouds into feature maps; an efficient communication block that propagates compact and fine-grained query feature maps from vehicle to support infrastructures and optimizes attention weights between query and key to refine support feature maps; a region proposal network that fuses local feature maps and weighted support feature maps for 3D object detection. We evaluate the performance of the proposed framework using a synthetic cooperative dataset created in two complex driving scenarios: a roundabout and a T-junction. Experiment results and bandwidth usage analysis demonstrate that our approach can save communication and computation costs and significantly improve detection performance under different detection difficulties in all scenarios. 3D点云中物体的精确检测是自动驾驶系统的关键问题。协作感知可以整合来自空间不同传感器的信息，并为提高自动驾驶系统的感知准确性提供显着的好处。在这项工作中，我们认为自动驾驶车辆使用本地点云数据，并通过无线链路结合来自邻近基础设施的信息，以进行协作 3D 对象检测。然而，预定义通信方案中车辆和基础设施之间的信息共享可能导致通信拥塞和/或带来有限的性能改进。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的协作 3D 对象检测框架，该框架由三个组件组成：将点云映射到特征图的特征学习网络；一个高效的通信块，将紧凑且细粒度的查询特征图从车辆传播到支持基础设施，并优化查询和密钥之间的注意力权重以细化支持特征图；融合局部特征图和加权支持特征图以进行 3D 对象检测的区域提议网络。我们使用在两个复杂驾驶场景（环岛和丁字路口）中创建的综合协作数据集来评估所提出框架的性能。实验结果和带宽使用分析表明，我们的方法可以节省通信和计算成本，并在所有场景的不同检测难度下显着提高检测性能。 本文提出了一种可学习通信的协同3D物体检测框架，用于自动驾驶系统中车辆与基础设施之间的信息共享与检测优化。 Junyong Wang,Yuan Zeng,Yi Gong cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiwei Hao,Yong Luo,Zhi Wang,Han Hu,Jianping An
title: CDFKD-MFS: Collaborative Data-free Knowledge Distillation via Multi-level Feature Sharing
title_zh: CDFKD-MFS：通过多级特征共享进行协作无数据知识蒸馏
abstract: Recently, the compression and deployment of powerful deep neural networks (DNNs) on resource-limited edge devices to provide intelligent services have become attractive tasks. Although knowledge distillation (KD) is a feasible solution for compression, its requirement on the original dataset raises privacy concerns. In addition, it is common to integrate multiple pretrained models to achieve satisfactory performance. How to compress multiple models into a tiny model is challenging, especially when the original data are unavailable. To tackle this challenge, we propose a framework termed collaborative data-free knowledge distillation via multi-level feature sharing (CDFKD-MFS), which consists of a multi-header student module, an asymmetric adversarial data-free KD module, and an attention-based aggregation module. In this framework, the student model equipped with a multi-level feature-sharing structure learns from multiple teacher models and is trained together with a generator in an asymmetric adversarial manner. When some real samples are available, the attention module adaptively aggregates predictions of the student headers, which can further improve performance. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular computer visual datasets. In particular, compared with the most competitive alternative, the accuracy of the proposed framework is 1.18\% higher on the CIFAR-100 dataset, 1.67\% higher on the Caltech-101 dataset, and 2.99\% higher on the mini-ImageNet dataset.
summary: Recently, the compression and deployment of powerful deep neural networks (DNNs) on resource-limited edge devices to provide intelligent services have become attractive tasks. Although knowledge distillation (KD) is a feasible solution for compression, its requirement on the original dataset raises privacy concerns. In addition, it is common to integrate multiple pretrained models to achieve satisfactory performance. How to compress multiple models into a tiny model is challenging, especially when the original data are unavailable. To tackle this challenge, we propose a framework termed collaborative data-free knowledge distillation via multi-level feature sharing (CDFKD-MFS), which consists of a multi-header student module, an asymmetric adversarial data-free KD module, and an attention-based aggregation module. In this framework, the student model equipped with a multi-level feature-sharing structure learns from multiple teacher models and is trained together with a generator in an asymmetric adversarial manner. When some real samples are available, the attention module adaptively aggregates predictions of the student headers, which can further improve performance. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular computer visual datasets. In particular, compared with the most competitive alternative, the accuracy of the proposed framework is 1.18\% higher on the CIFAR-100 dataset, 1.67\% higher on the Caltech-101 dataset, and 2.99\% higher on the mini-ImageNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，在资源有限的边缘设备上压缩和部署强大的深度神经网络（DNN）以提供智能服务已成为有吸引力的任务。尽管知识蒸馏（KD）是一种可行的压缩解决方案，但它对原始数据集的要求引起了隐私问题。此外，集成多个预训练模型以获得令人满意的性能也是很常见的。如何将多个模型压缩为一个微小的模型是具有挑战性的，特别是当原始数据不可用时。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个名为“通过多级特征共享进行协作无数据知识蒸馏”（CDFKD-MFS）的框架，该框架由多头学生模块、非对称对抗性无数据 KD 模块和基于注意力的聚合模块组成。在此框架中，配备多级特征共享结构的学生模型从多个教师模型中学习，并以非对称对抗方式与生成器一起训练。当一些真实样本可用时，注意力模块自适应地聚合学生标题的预测，这可以进一步提高性能。我们对三个流行的计算机视觉数据集进行了广泛的实验。特别是，与最具竞争力的替代方案相比，所提出的框架在 CIFAR-100 数据集上的准确性高出 1.18%，在 Caltech-101 数据集上高出 1.67%，在 mini-ImageNet 数据集上高出 2.99%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需原始数据的多模型协同知识蒸馏框架CDFKD-MFS，用于在边缘设备上压缩深度神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏依赖原始数据引发隐私问题，且多模型压缩在无原始数据场景下存在技术挑战。
AI.method: 设计包含多头学生模块、非对称对抗数据蒸馏模块和注意力聚合模块的框架，通过多级特征共享实现多教师模型联合训练。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100/Caltech-101/mini-ImageNet数据集上分别比最优对比方法提升1.18%/1.67%/2.99%准确率。
AI.conclusion: CDFKD-MFS有效解决了无数据场景下的多模型压缩问题，为边缘设备部署提供了隐私保护的解决方案。

search_text: CDFKD-MFS: Collaborative Data-free Knowledge Distillation via Multi-level Feature Sharing CDFKD-MFS：通过多级特征共享进行协作无数据知识蒸馏 Recently, the compression and deployment of powerful deep neural networks (DNNs) on resource-limited edge devices to provide intelligent services have become attractive tasks. Although knowledge distillation (KD) is a feasible solution for compression, its requirement on the original dataset raises privacy concerns. In addition, it is common to integrate multiple pretrained models to achieve satisfactory performance. How to compress multiple models into a tiny model is challenging, especially when the original data are unavailable. To tackle this challenge, we propose a framework termed collaborative data-free knowledge distillation via multi-level feature sharing (CDFKD-MFS), which consists of a multi-header student module, an asymmetric adversarial data-free KD module, and an attention-based aggregation module. In this framework, the student model equipped with a multi-level feature-sharing structure learns from multiple teacher models and is trained together with a generator in an asymmetric adversarial manner. When some real samples are available, the attention module adaptively aggregates predictions of the student headers, which can further improve performance. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular computer visual datasets. In particular, compared with the most competitive alternative, the accuracy of the proposed framework is 1.18\% higher on the CIFAR-100 dataset, 1.67\% higher on the Caltech-101 dataset, and 2.99\% higher on the mini-ImageNet dataset. 最近，在资源有限的边缘设备上压缩和部署强大的深度神经网络（DNN）以提供智能服务已成为有吸引力的任务。尽管知识蒸馏（KD）是一种可行的压缩解决方案，但它对原始数据集的要求引起了隐私问题。此外，集成多个预训练模型以获得令人满意的性能也是很常见的。如何将多个模型压缩为一个微小的模型是具有挑战性的，特别是当原始数据不可用时。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个名为“通过多级特征共享进行协作无数据知识蒸馏”（CDFKD-MFS）的框架，该框架由多头学生模块、非对称对抗性无数据 KD 模块和基于注意力的聚合模块组成。在此框架中，配备多级特征共享结构的学生模型从多个教师模型中学习，并以非对称对抗方式与生成器一起训练。当一些真实样本可用时，注意力模块自适应地聚合学生标题的预测，这可以进一步提高性能。我们对三个流行的计算机视觉数据集进行了广泛的实验。特别是，与最具竞争力的替代方案相比，所提出的框架在 CIFAR-100 数据集上的准确性高出 1.18%，在 Caltech-101 数据集上高出 1.67%，在 mini-ImageNet 数据集上高出 2.99%。 本文提出一种无需原始数据的多模型协同知识蒸馏框架CDFKD-MFS，用于在边缘设备上压缩深度神经网络。 Zhiwei Hao,Yong Luo,Zhi Wang,Han Hu,Jianping An cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: SUSing: SU-net for Singing Voice Synthesis
title_zh: SUsing：用于歌声合成的 SU-net
comment: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks)
comments: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks)
abstract: Singing voice synthesis is a generative task that involves multi-dimensional control of the singing model, including lyrics, pitch, and duration, and includes the timbre of the singer and singing skills such as vibrato. In this paper, we proposed SU-net for singing voice synthesis named SUSing. Synthesizing singing voice is treated as a translation task between lyrics and music score and spectrum. The lyrics and music score information is encoded into a two-dimensional feature representation through the convolution layer. The two-dimensional feature and its frequency spectrum are mapped to the target spectrum in an autoregressive manner through a SU-net network. Within the SU-net the stripe pooling method is used to replace the alternate global pooling method to learn the vertical frequency relationship in the spectrum and the changes of frequency in the time domain. The experimental results on the public dataset Kiritan show that the proposed method can synthesize more natural singing voices.
summary: Singing voice synthesis is a generative task that involves multi-dimensional control of the singing model, including lyrics, pitch, and duration, and includes the timbre of the singer and singing skills such as vibrato. In this paper, we proposed SU-net for singing voice synthesis named SUSing. Synthesizing singing voice is treated as a translation task between lyrics and music score and spectrum. The lyrics and music score information is encoded into a two-dimensional feature representation through the convolution layer. The two-dimensional feature and its frequency spectrum are mapped to the target spectrum in an autoregressive manner through a SU-net network. Within the SU-net the stripe pooling method is used to replace the alternate global pooling method to learn the vertical frequency relationship in the spectrum and the changes of frequency in the time domain. The experimental results on the public dataset Kiritan show that the proposed method can synthesize more natural singing voices.
abstract_zh: 歌声合成是一项生成任务，涉及对歌唱模型的多维度控制，包括歌词、音高、时长，还包括歌手的音色和颤音等歌唱技巧。在本文中，我们提出了用于歌声合成的 SU-net，名为 SUSing。合成歌声被视为歌词与乐谱和谱之间的翻译任务。歌词和乐谱信息通过卷积层被编码成二维特征表示。通过SU-net网络将二维特征及其频谱以自回归的方式映射到目标频谱。在SU-net中，使用条带池化方法代替备用全局池化方法来学习频谱中的垂直频率关系以及时域中的频率变化。在公共数据集 Kiritan 上的实验结果表明，该方法可以合成更自然的歌声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SU-net模型SUSing，通过多维控制实现更自然的歌声合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效建模频谱的垂直频率关系及时域变化，需改进网络结构提升合成质量。
AI.method: 将歌词和乐谱编码为二维特征，通过SU-net自回归映射至目标频谱，并采用条纹池化替代交替全局池化。
AI.result: 在Kiritan数据集上实验表明，该方法能生成更自然的歌声。
AI.conclusion: SU-net通过改进特征编码与池化方法，有效提升了歌声合成的自然度与控制精度。

ai_content.conclusion: SU-net通过改进特征编码与池化方法，有效提升了歌声合成的自然度与控制精度。

authors_text: Iason Katsamenis,Eleni Eirini Karolou,Agapi Davradou,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Anastasios Doulamis,Nikolaos Doulamis,Dimitris Kalogeras
title: TraCon: A novel dataset for real-time traffic cones detection using deep learning
title_zh: TraCon：使用深度学习进行实时交通锥检测的新颖数据集
abstract: Substantial progress has been made in the field of object detection in road scenes. However, it is mainly focused on vehicles and pedestrians. To this end, we investigate traffic cone detection, an object category crucial for road effects and maintenance. In this work, the YOLOv5 algorithm is employed, in order to find a solution for the efficient and fast detection of traffic cones. The YOLOv5 can achieve a high detection accuracy with the score of IoU up to 91.31%. The proposed method is been applied to an RGB roadwork image dataset, collected from various sources.
summary: Substantial progress has been made in the field of object detection in road scenes. However, it is mainly focused on vehicles and pedestrians. To this end, we investigate traffic cone detection, an object category crucial for road effects and maintenance. In this work, the YOLOv5 algorithm is employed, in order to find a solution for the efficient and fast detection of traffic cones. The YOLOv5 can achieve a high detection accuracy with the score of IoU up to 91.31%. The proposed method is been applied to an RGB roadwork image dataset, collected from various sources.
abstract_zh: 道路场景中的物体检测领域已经取得了实质性进展。但主要针对的是车辆和行人。为此，我们研究了交通锥检测，这是对道路影响和维护至关重要的对象类别。在这项工作中，采用YOLOv5算法，以找到一种高效、快速检测交通锥的解决方案。 YOLOv5能够实现较高的检测精度，IoU得分高达91.31%。所提出的方法应用于从各种来源收集的 RGB 道路施工图像数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TraCon数据集，并利用YOLOv5算法实现交通锥的实时检测。
AI.motivation: 现有道路场景目标检测主要关注车辆和行人，而交通锥作为道路施工和维护的重要元素缺乏专门研究。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5算法，结合多源采集的RGB道路施工图像数据集进行交通锥检测模型训练与优化。
AI.result: 检测模型达到最高91.31%的IoU精度，实现了交通锥的高效实时检测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的检测方法为道路施工安全监测和智能交通系统提供了有效技术支撑。

ai_content.conclusion: 提出的检测方法为道路施工安全监测和智能交通系统提供了有效技术支撑。

search_text: TraCon: A novel dataset for real-time traffic cones detection using deep learning TraCon：使用深度学习进行实时交通锥检测的新颖数据集 Substantial progress has been made in the field of object detection in road scenes. However, it is mainly focused on vehicles and pedestrians. To this end, we investigate traffic cone detection, an object category crucial for road effects and maintenance. In this work, the YOLOv5 algorithm is employed, in order to find a solution for the efficient and fast detection of traffic cones. The YOLOv5 can achieve a high detection accuracy with the score of IoU up to 91.31%. The proposed method is been applied to an RGB roadwork image dataset, collected from various sources. 道路场景中的物体检测领域已经取得了实质性进展。但主要针对的是车辆和行人。为此，我们研究了交通锥检测，这是对道路影响和维护至关重要的对象类别。在这项工作中，采用YOLOv5算法，以找到一种高效、快速检测交通锥的解决方案。 YOLOv5能够实现较高的检测精度，IoU得分高达91.31%。所提出的方法应用于从各种来源收集的 RGB 道路施工图像数据集。 本文提出TraCon数据集，并利用YOLOv5算法实现交通锥的实时检测。 Iason Katsamenis,Eleni Eirini Karolou,Agapi Davradou,Eftychios Protopapadakis,Anastasios Doulamis,Nikolaos Doulamis,Dimitris Kalogeras cs.CV

title: Unsupervised Difference Learning for Noisy Rigid Image Alignment
title_zh: 用于噪声刚性图像对齐的无监督差异学习
abstract: Rigid image alignment is a fundamental task in computer vision, while the traditional algorithms are either too sensitive to noise or time-consuming. Recent unsupervised image alignment methods developed based on spatial transformer networks show an improved performance on clean images but will not achieve satisfactory performance on noisy images due to its heavy reliance on pixel value comparations. To handle such challenging applications, we report a new unsupervised difference learning (UDL) strategy and apply it to rigid image alignment. UDL exploits the quantitative properties of regression tasks and converts the original unsupervised problem to pseudo supervised problem. Under the new UDL-based image alignment pipeline, rotation can be accurately estimated on both clean and noisy images and translations can then be easily solved. Experimental results on both nature and cryo-EM images demonstrate the efficacy of our UDL-based unsupervised rigid image alignment method.
summary: Rigid image alignment is a fundamental task in computer vision, while the traditional algorithms are either too sensitive to noise or time-consuming. Recent unsupervised image alignment methods developed based on spatial transformer networks show an improved performance on clean images but will not achieve satisfactory performance on noisy images due to its heavy reliance on pixel value comparations. To handle such challenging applications, we report a new unsupervised difference learning (UDL) strategy and apply it to rigid image alignment. UDL exploits the quantitative properties of regression tasks and converts the original unsupervised problem to pseudo supervised problem. Under the new UDL-based image alignment pipeline, rotation can be accurately estimated on both clean and noisy images and translations can then be easily solved. Experimental results on both nature and cryo-EM images demonstrate the efficacy of our UDL-based unsupervised rigid image alignment method.
abstract_zh: 刚性图像对齐是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务，而传统算法要么对噪声过于敏感，要么耗时。最近基于空间变换网络开发的无监督图像对齐方法在干净图像上表现出改进的性能，但由于其严重依赖于像素值比较，因此在噪声图像上无法达到令人满意的性能。为了处理此类具有挑战性的应用，我们报告了一种新的无监督差异学习（UDL）策略并将其应用于刚性图像对齐。 UDL利用回归任务的定量特性，将原始无监督问题转化为伪监督问题。在新的基于 UDL 的图像对齐流程下，可以在干净图像和噪声图像上准确估计旋转，然后可以轻松解决平移问题。自然图像和冷冻电镜图像的实验结果证明了我们基于 UDL 的无监督刚性图像对齐方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督差分学习（UDL）策略，用于解决噪声环境下刚性图像对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统刚性图像对齐算法对噪声敏感或计算耗时，现有基于空间变换网络的无监督方法在处理噪声图像时表现不佳，因其依赖像素值比较。
AI.method: UDL利用回归任务的定量特性，将原始无监督问题转化为伪监督问题，通过旋转估计和后续平移求解实现对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在自然图像和冷冻电镜图像上均能有效提升噪声环境下刚性对齐的准确性。
AI.conclusion: UDL策略通过伪监督机制有效解决了噪声图像对齐难题，优于现有无监督方法。

title: TDASS: Target Domain Adaptation Speech Synthesis Framework for Multi-speaker Low-Resource TTS
title_zh: TDASS：多说话者低资源 TTS 的目标域适应语音合成框架
comment: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks)
comments: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks)
abstract: Recently, synthesizing personalized speech by text-to-speech (TTS) application is highly demanded. But the previous TTS models require a mass of target speaker speeches for training. It is a high-cost task, and hard to record lots of utterances from the target speaker. Data augmentation of the speeches is a solution but leads to the low-quality synthesis speech problem. Some multi-speaker TTS models are proposed to address the issue. But the quantity of utterances of each speaker imbalance leads to the voice similarity problem. We propose the Target Domain Adaptation Speech Synthesis Network (TDASS) to address these issues. Based on the backbone of the Tacotron2 model, which is the high-quality TTS model, TDASS introduces a self-interested classifier for reducing the non-target influence. Besides, a special gradient reversal layer with different operations for target and non-target is added to the classifier. We evaluate the model on a Chinese speech corpus, the experiments show the proposed method outperforms the baseline method in terms of voice quality and voice similarity.
summary: Recently, synthesizing personalized speech by text-to-speech (TTS) application is highly demanded. But the previous TTS models require a mass of target speaker speeches for training. It is a high-cost task, and hard to record lots of utterances from the target speaker. Data augmentation of the speeches is a solution but leads to the low-quality synthesis speech problem. Some multi-speaker TTS models are proposed to address the issue. But the quantity of utterances of each speaker imbalance leads to the voice similarity problem. We propose the Target Domain Adaptation Speech Synthesis Network (TDASS) to address these issues. Based on the backbone of the Tacotron2 model, which is the high-quality TTS model, TDASS introduces a self-interested classifier for reducing the non-target influence. Besides, a special gradient reversal layer with different operations for target and non-target is added to the classifier. We evaluate the model on a Chinese speech corpus, the experiments show the proposed method outperforms the baseline method in terms of voice quality and voice similarity.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过文本转语音（TTS）应用来合成个性化语音的需求非常大。但之前的TTS模型需要大量的目标说话人语音进行训练。这是一项高成本的任务，并且很难记录目标说话者的大量话语。语音的数据增强是一种解决方案，但会导致合成语音质量低下的问题。一些多说话者 TTS 模型被提出来解决这个问题。但各个说话人的话语数量不平衡导致了语音相似度问题。我们提出目标域适应语音合成网络（TDASS）来解决这些问题。 TDASS 基于高质量 TTS 模型 Tacotron2 模型的骨干，引入了自利分类器以减少非目标影响。此外，分类器中还添加了一个特殊的梯度反转层，对目标和非目标具有不同的操作。我们在中文语音语料库上评估该模型，实验表明所提出的方法在语音质量和语音相似度方面优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TDASS框架，解决多说话人低资源文本到语音合成中目标语音数据不足导致的语音质量和相似度问题。
AI.motivation: 传统TTS模型需大量目标说话人语音数据，成本高且难以获取；数据增强导致质量下降，现有模型因说话人数据不平衡存在语音相似度不足问题。
AI.method: 基于Tacotron2模型，引入自利分类器减少非目标影响，并设计特殊梯度反转层区分目标与非目标数据进行领域自适应。
AI.result: 在中文语料库实验中，TDASS在语音质量与语音相似度指标上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TDASS有效缓解低资源场景下多说话人TTS的语音质量与相似度矛盾，为领域自适应语音合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Yifeng Zhou,Xing Xu,Shuaicheng Liu,Guoqing Wang,Huimin Lu,Heng Tao Shen
title: Thunder: Thumbnail based Fast Lightweight Image Denoising Network
title_zh: Thunder：基于缩略图的快速轻量级图像去噪网络
abstract: To achieve promising results on removing noise from real-world images, most of existing denoising networks are formulated with complex network structure, making them impractical for deployment. Some attempts focused on reducing the number of filters and feature channels but suffered from large performance loss, and a more practical and lightweight denoising network with fast inference speed is of high demand. To this end, a \textbf{Thu}mb\textbf{n}ail based \textbf{D}\textbf{e}noising Netwo\textbf{r}k dubbed Thunder, is proposed and implemented as a lightweight structure for fast restoration without comprising the denoising capabilities. Specifically, the Thunder model contains two newly-established modules: (1) a wavelet-based Thumbnail Subspace Encoder (TSE) which can leverage sub-bands correlation to provide an approximate thumbnail based on the low-frequent feature; (2) a Subspace Projection based Refine Module (SPR) which can restore the details for thumbnail progressively based on the subspace projection approach. Extensive experiments have been carried out on two real-world denoising benchmarks, demonstrating that the proposed Thunder outperforms the existing lightweight models and achieves competitive performance on PSNR and SSIM when compared with the complex designs.
summary: To achieve promising results on removing noise from real-world images, most of existing denoising networks are formulated with complex network structure, making them impractical for deployment. Some attempts focused on reducing the number of filters and feature channels but suffered from large performance loss, and a more practical and lightweight denoising network with fast inference speed is of high demand. To this end, a \textbf{Thu}mb\textbf{n}ail based \textbf{D}\textbf{e}noising Netwo\textbf{r}k dubbed Thunder, is proposed and implemented as a lightweight structure for fast restoration without comprising the denoising capabilities. Specifically, the Thunder model contains two newly-established modules: (1) a wavelet-based Thumbnail Subspace Encoder (TSE) which can leverage sub-bands correlation to provide an approximate thumbnail based on the low-frequent feature; (2) a Subspace Projection based Refine Module (SPR) which can restore the details for thumbnail progressively based on the subspace projection approach. Extensive experiments have been carried out on two real-world denoising benchmarks, demonstrating that the proposed Thunder outperforms the existing lightweight models and achieves competitive performance on PSNR and SSIM when compared with the complex designs.
abstract_zh: 为了在从现实图像中去除噪声方面取得有希望的结果，大多数现有的去噪网络都采用复杂的网络结构，这使得它们不切实际的部署。一些尝试侧重于减少滤波器和特征通道的数量，但性能损失较大，因此迫切需要更实用、轻量级、推理速度快的去噪网络。为此，提出并实现了一种基于 \textbf{Thu}mb\textbf{n}ail 的 \textbf{D}\textbf{e}噪声网络，称为 Thunder，并实现为一种轻量级结构，用于快速恢复，而不包含去噪功能。具体来说，Thunder模型包含两个新建立的模块：（1）基于小波的缩​​略图子空间编码器（TSE），它可以利用子带相关性来提供基于低频特征的近似缩略图； (2)基于子空间投影的细化模块(SPR)，它可以基于子空间投影方法逐步恢复缩略图的细节。在两个现实世界的去噪基准上进行了大量的实验，证明所提出的 Thunder 优于现有的轻量级模型，并且与复杂的设计相比，在 PSNR 和 SSIM 上实现了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于缩略图的轻量级快速图像去噪网络Thunder，旨在在保持去噪能力的同时提升模型的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪网络结构复杂，难以部署；简化参数的尝试导致性能损失，亟需一种兼顾轻量化与高效能的去噪模型。
AI.method: Thunder包含两个模块：基于小波变换的缩略图子空间编码器（TSE）和基于子空间投影的细节修复模块（SPR），通过低频特征生成缩略图并逐步恢复细节。
AI.result: 在两个真实场景去噪基准测试中，Thunder优于现有轻量级模型，在PSNR和SSIM指标上接近复杂模型。
AI.conclusion: Thunder在保持去噪效果的同时实现了轻量化与快速推理，适用于实际应用场景。

search_text: Thunder: Thumbnail based Fast Lightweight Image Denoising Network Thunder：基于缩略图的快速轻量级图像去噪网络 To achieve promising results on removing noise from real-world images, most of existing denoising networks are formulated with complex network structure, making them impractical for deployment. Some attempts focused on reducing the number of filters and feature channels but suffered from large performance loss, and a more practical and lightweight denoising network with fast inference speed is of high demand. To this end, a \textbf{Thu}mb\textbf{n}ail based \textbf{D}\textbf{e}noising Netwo\textbf{r}k dubbed Thunder, is proposed and implemented as a lightweight structure for fast restoration without comprising the denoising capabilities. Specifically, the Thunder model contains two newly-established modules: (1) a wavelet-based Thumbnail Subspace Encoder (TSE) which can leverage sub-bands correlation to provide an approximate thumbnail based on the low-frequent feature; (2) a Subspace Projection based Refine Module (SPR) which can restore the details for thumbnail progressively based on the subspace projection approach. Extensive experiments have been carried out on two real-world denoising benchmarks, demonstrating that the proposed Thunder outperforms the existing lightweight models and achieves competitive performance on PSNR and SSIM when compared with the complex designs. 为了在从现实图像中去除噪声方面取得有希望的结果，大多数现有的去噪网络都采用复杂的网络结构，这使得它们不切实际的部署。一些尝试侧重于减少滤波器和特征通道的数量，但性能损失较大，因此迫切需要更实用、轻量级、推理速度快的去噪网络。为此，提出并实现了一种基于 \textbf{Thu}mb\textbf{n}ail 的 \textbf{D}\textbf{e}噪声网络，称为 Thunder，并实现为一种轻量级结构，用于快速恢复，而不包含去噪功能。具体来说，Thunder模型包含两个新建立的模块：（1）基于小波的缩​​略图子空间编码器（TSE），它可以利用子带相关性来提供基于低频特征的近似缩略图； (2)基于子空间投影的细化模块(SPR)，它可以基于子空间投影方法逐步恢复缩略图的细节。在两个现实世界的去噪基准上进行了大量的实验，证明所提出的 Thunder 优于现有的轻量级模型，并且与复杂的设计相比，在 PSNR 和 SSIM 上实现了有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种基于缩略图的轻量级快速图像去噪网络Thunder，旨在在保持去噪能力的同时提升模型的实用性。 Yifeng Zhou,Xing Xu,Shuaicheng Liu,Guoqing Wang,Huimin Lu,Heng Tao Shen cs.CV,eess.IV

title: MetaSID: Singer Identification with Domain Adaptation for Metaverse
title_zh: MetaSID：Metaverse 的歌手识别与域适应
comment: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks)
comments: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks)
abstract: Metaverse has stretched the real world into unlimited space. There will be more live concerts in Metaverse. The task of singer identification is to identify the song belongs to which singer. However, there has been a tough problem in singer identification, which is the different live effects. The studio version is different from the live version, the data distribution of the training set and the test set are different, and the performance of the classifier decreases. This paper proposes the use of the domain adaptation method to solve the live effect in singer identification. Three methods of domain adaptation combined with Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) are designed, which are Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), gradient reversal (Revgrad), and Contrastive Adaptation Network (CAN). MMD is a distance-based method, which adds domain loss. Revgrad is based on the idea that learned features can represent different domain samples. CAN is based on class adaptation, it takes into account the correspondence between the categories of the source domain and target domain. Experimental results on the public dataset of Artist20 show that CRNN-MMD leads to an improvement over the baseline CRNN by 0.14. The CRNN-RevGrad outperforms the baseline by 0.21. The CRNN-CAN achieved state of the art with the F1 measure value of 0.83 on album split.
summary: Metaverse has stretched the real world into unlimited space. There will be more live concerts in Metaverse. The task of singer identification is to identify the song belongs to which singer. However, there has been a tough problem in singer identification, which is the different live effects. The studio version is different from the live version, the data distribution of the training set and the test set are different, and the performance of the classifier decreases. This paper proposes the use of the domain adaptation method to solve the live effect in singer identification. Three methods of domain adaptation combined with Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) are designed, which are Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), gradient reversal (Revgrad), and Contrastive Adaptation Network (CAN). MMD is a distance-based method, which adds domain loss. Revgrad is based on the idea that learned features can represent different domain samples. CAN is based on class adaptation, it takes into account the correspondence between the categories of the source domain and target domain. Experimental results on the public dataset of Artist20 show that CRNN-MMD leads to an improvement over the baseline CRNN by 0.14. The CRNN-RevGrad outperforms the baseline by 0.21. The CRNN-CAN achieved state of the art with the F1 measure value of 0.83 on album split.
abstract_zh: 元宇宙将现实世界延伸到了无限的空间。 There will be more live concerts in Metaverse.歌手识别的任务是识别歌曲属于哪个歌手。然而，歌手识别一直存在一个棘手的问题，那就是现场效果不同。 studio版本与live版本不同，训练集和测试集的数据分布不同，分类器的性能有所下降。本文提出利用域自适应方法来解决歌手识别中的现场效果。设计了三种与卷积递归神经网络（CRNN）相结合的域适应方法，即最大平均差异（MMD）、梯度反转（Revgrad）和对比适应网络（CAN）。 MMD 是一种基于距离的方法，会增加域损失。 Revgrad 基于这样的思想：学习到的特征可以代表不同的领域样本。 CAN是基于类适应的，它考虑了源域和目标域的类别之间的对应关系。在 Artist20 公共数据集上的实验结果表明，CRNN-MMD 比基线 CRNN 提高了 0.14。 CRNN-RevGrad 的性能优于基线 0.21。 CRNN-CAN 达到了最先进的水平，专辑分割的 F1 测量值为 0.83。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaSID方法，通过领域自适应技术解决元宇宙中歌手识别因现场效果差异导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有歌手识别模型在面对录音室版本与现场版本数据分布差异时，分类性能显著下降，需解决领域偏移问题。
AI.method: 结合CRNN网络设计三种领域自适应方法：基于距离的MMD（最大均值差异）、基于梯度反转的Revgrad，以及考虑类别映射的CAN（对比自适应网络）。
AI.result: 在Artist20数据集上，CRNN-MMD较基线提升0.14，CRNN-RevGrad提升0.21，CRNN-CAN在专辑划分下达到F1值0.83的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应有效缓解了歌手识别中的领域偏移问题，其中基于类别对齐的CAN方法表现最优。

search_text: MetaSID: Singer Identification with Domain Adaptation for Metaverse MetaSID：Metaverse 的歌手识别与域适应 Metaverse has stretched the real world into unlimited space. There will be more live concerts in Metaverse. The task of singer identification is to identify the song belongs to which singer. However, there has been a tough problem in singer identification, which is the different live effects. The studio version is different from the live version, the data distribution of the training set and the test set are different, and the performance of the classifier decreases. This paper proposes the use of the domain adaptation method to solve the live effect in singer identification. Three methods of domain adaptation combined with Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) are designed, which are Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD), gradient reversal (Revgrad), and Contrastive Adaptation Network (CAN). MMD is a distance-based method, which adds domain loss. Revgrad is based on the idea that learned features can represent different domain samples. CAN is based on class adaptation, it takes into account the correspondence between the categories of the source domain and target domain. Experimental results on the public dataset of Artist20 show that CRNN-MMD leads to an improvement over the baseline CRNN by 0.14. The CRNN-RevGrad outperforms the baseline by 0.21. The CRNN-CAN achieved state of the art with the F1 measure value of 0.83 on album split. 元宇宙将现实世界延伸到了无限的空间。 There will be more live concerts in Metaverse.歌手识别的任务是识别歌曲属于哪个歌手。然而，歌手识别一直存在一个棘手的问题，那就是现场效果不同。 studio版本与live版本不同，训练集和测试集的数据分布不同，分类器的性能有所下降。本文提出利用域自适应方法来解决歌手识别中的现场效果。设计了三种与卷积递归神经网络（CRNN）相结合的域适应方法，即最大平均差异（MMD）、梯度反转（Revgrad）和对比适应网络（CAN）。 MMD 是一种基于距离的方法，会增加域损失。 Revgrad 基于这样的思想：学习到的特征可以代表不同的领域样本。 CAN是基于类适应的，它考虑了源域和目标域的类别之间的对应关系。在 Artist20 公共数据集上的实验结果表明，CRNN-MMD 比基线 CRNN 提高了 0.14。 CRNN-RevGrad 的性能优于基线 0.21。 CRNN-CAN 达到了最先进的水平，专辑分割的 F1 测量值为 0.83。 本文提出MetaSID方法，通过领域自适应技术解决元宇宙中歌手识别因现场效果差异导致的性能下降问题。 Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Singer Identification for Metaverse with Timbral and Middle-Level Perceptual Features
title_zh: 具有音色和中级感知特征的元宇宙歌手识别
comment: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.06817 by other authors
comments: Accepted by IJCNN2022 (The 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.06817 by other authors
abstract: Metaverse is an interactive world that combines reality and virtuality, where participants can be virtual avatars. Anyone can hold a concert in a virtual concert hall, and users can quickly identify the real singer behind the virtual idol through the singer identification. Most singer identification methods are processed using the frame-level features. However, expect the singer's timbre, the music frame includes music information, such as melodiousness, rhythm, and tonal. It means the music information is noise for using frame-level features to identify the singers. In this paper, instead of only the frame-level features, we propose to use another two features that address this problem. Middle-level feature, which represents the music's melodiousness, rhythmic stability, and tonal stability, and is able to capture the perceptual features of music. The timbre feature, which is used in speaker identification, represents the singers' voice features. Furthermore, we propose a convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) to combine three features for singer identification. The model firstly fuses the frame-level feature and timbre feature and then combines middle-level features to the mix features. In experiments, the proposed method achieves comparable performance on an average F1 score of 0.81 on the benchmark dataset of Artist20, which significantly improves related works.
summary: Metaverse is an interactive world that combines reality and virtuality, where participants can be virtual avatars. Anyone can hold a concert in a virtual concert hall, and users can quickly identify the real singer behind the virtual idol through the singer identification. Most singer identification methods are processed using the frame-level features. However, expect the singer's timbre, the music frame includes music information, such as melodiousness, rhythm, and tonal. It means the music information is noise for using frame-level features to identify the singers. In this paper, instead of only the frame-level features, we propose to use another two features that address this problem. Middle-level feature, which represents the music's melodiousness, rhythmic stability, and tonal stability, and is able to capture the perceptual features of music. The timbre feature, which is used in speaker identification, represents the singers' voice features. Furthermore, we propose a convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) to combine three features for singer identification. The model firstly fuses the frame-level feature and timbre feature and then combines middle-level features to the mix features. In experiments, the proposed method achieves comparable performance on an average F1 score of 0.81 on the benchmark dataset of Artist20, which significantly improves related works.
abstract_zh: 元宇宙是一个现实与虚拟相结合的互动世界，参与者可以是虚拟的化身。任何人都可以在虚拟音乐厅举办演唱会，用户可以通过歌手识别快速识别出虚拟偶像背后的真实歌手。大多数歌手识别方法都是使用帧级特征进行处理的。然而，除了歌手的音色之外，音乐框架还包括音乐信息，例如旋律、节奏和音调。这意味着使用帧级特征来识别歌手时音乐信息是噪声。在本文中，我们建议使用另外两个特征来解决这个问题，而不是仅使用帧级特征。中级特征，代表音乐的悠扬、节奏的稳定、音调的稳定，能够捕捉音乐的感性特征。音色特征代表歌手的声音特征，用于说话人识别。此外，我们提出了一种卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）来结合歌手识别的三个特征。该模型首先融合帧级特征和音色特征，然后将中级特征结合到混合特征中。在实验中，该方法在Artist20基准数据集上平均F1得分为0.81，取得了可比的性能，显着提高了相关工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音色特征和中层感知特征的歌手识别方法，用于元宇宙中的虚拟偶像身份识别。
AI.motivation: 传统歌手识别方法依赖帧级特征，但音乐中的旋律、节奏等信息会干扰识别效果，需引入更符合人类听觉感知的特征进行优化。
AI.method: 设计卷积循环神经网络（CRNN），首先融合帧级特征与音色特征，再引入中层感知特征（旋律性、节奏稳定性、音高稳定性）进行多特征融合识别。
AI.result: 在Artist20基准数据集上达到0.81的平均F1分数，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合音色特征与中层感知特征，有效提升了元宇宙场景下歌手识别的准确率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音色特征和中层感知特征的歌手识别方法，用于元宇宙中的虚拟偶像身份识别。

search_text: Singer Identification for Metaverse with Timbral and Middle-Level Perceptual Features 具有音色和中级感知特征的元宇宙歌手识别 Metaverse is an interactive world that combines reality and virtuality, where participants can be virtual avatars. Anyone can hold a concert in a virtual concert hall, and users can quickly identify the real singer behind the virtual idol through the singer identification. Most singer identification methods are processed using the frame-level features. However, expect the singer's timbre, the music frame includes music information, such as melodiousness, rhythm, and tonal. It means the music information is noise for using frame-level features to identify the singers. In this paper, instead of only the frame-level features, we propose to use another two features that address this problem. Middle-level feature, which represents the music's melodiousness, rhythmic stability, and tonal stability, and is able to capture the perceptual features of music. The timbre feature, which is used in speaker identification, represents the singers' voice features. Furthermore, we propose a convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) to combine three features for singer identification. The model firstly fuses the frame-level feature and timbre feature and then combines middle-level features to the mix features. In experiments, the proposed method achieves comparable performance on an average F1 score of 0.81 on the benchmark dataset of Artist20, which significantly improves related works. 元宇宙是一个现实与虚拟相结合的互动世界，参与者可以是虚拟的化身。任何人都可以在虚拟音乐厅举办演唱会，用户可以通过歌手识别快速识别出虚拟偶像背后的真实歌手。大多数歌手识别方法都是使用帧级特征进行处理的。然而，除了歌手的音色之外，音乐框架还包括音乐信息，例如旋律、节奏和音调。这意味着使用帧级特征来识别歌手时音乐信息是噪声。在本文中，我们建议使用另外两个特征来解决这个问题，而不是仅使用帧级特征。中级特征，代表音乐的悠扬、节奏的稳定、音调的稳定，能够捕捉音乐的感性特征。音色特征代表歌手的声音特征，用于说话人识别。此外，我们提出了一种卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）来结合歌手识别的三个特征。该模型首先融合帧级特征和音色特征，然后将中级特征结合到混合特征中。在实验中，该方法在Artist20基准数据集上平均F1得分为0.81，取得了可比的性能，显着提高了相关工作。 本文提出一种结合音色特征和中层感知特征的歌手识别方法，用于元宇宙中的虚拟偶像身份识别。 Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Linrui Zhang,Li Shen,Long Yang,Shixiang Chen,Bo Yuan,Xueqian Wang,Dacheng Tao
title: Penalized Proximal Policy Optimization for Safe Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于安全强化学习的惩罚近端策略优化
abstract: Safe reinforcement learning aims to learn the optimal policy while satisfying safety constraints, which is essential in real-world applications. However, current algorithms still struggle for efficient policy updates with hard constraint satisfaction. In this paper, we propose Penalized Proximal Policy Optimization (P3O), which solves the cumbersome constrained policy iteration via a single minimization of an equivalent unconstrained problem. Specifically, P3O utilizes a simple-yet-effective penalty function to eliminate cost constraints and removes the trust-region constraint by the clipped surrogate objective. We theoretically prove the exactness of the proposed method with a finite penalty factor and provide a worst-case analysis for approximate error when evaluated on sample trajectories. Moreover, we extend P3O to more challenging multi-constraint and multi-agent scenarios which are less studied in previous work. Extensive experiments show that P3O outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms with respect to both reward improvement and constraint satisfaction on a set of constrained locomotive tasks.
summary: Safe reinforcement learning aims to learn the optimal policy while satisfying safety constraints, which is essential in real-world applications. However, current algorithms still struggle for efficient policy updates with hard constraint satisfaction. In this paper, we propose Penalized Proximal Policy Optimization (P3O), which solves the cumbersome constrained policy iteration via a single minimization of an equivalent unconstrained problem. Specifically, P3O utilizes a simple-yet-effective penalty function to eliminate cost constraints and removes the trust-region constraint by the clipped surrogate objective. We theoretically prove the exactness of the proposed method with a finite penalty factor and provide a worst-case analysis for approximate error when evaluated on sample trajectories. Moreover, we extend P3O to more challenging multi-constraint and multi-agent scenarios which are less studied in previous work. Extensive experiments show that P3O outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms with respect to both reward improvement and constraint satisfaction on a set of constrained locomotive tasks.
abstract_zh: 安全强化学习旨在在满足安全约束的同时学习最优策略，这在实际应用中至关重要。然而，当前的算法仍然难以在满足硬约束的情况下实现有效的策略更新。在本文中，我们提出了惩罚近端策略优化（P3O），它通过等效无约束问题的单个最小化来解决繁琐的约束策略迭代。具体来说，P3O 利用简单而有效的惩罚函数来消除成本约束，并通过修剪的代理目标消除信任域约束。我们从理论上证明了具有有限惩罚因子的所提出方法的准确性，并在对样本轨迹进行评估时提供了近似误差的最坏情况分析。此外，我们将 P3O 扩展到更具挑战性的多约束和多智能体场景，这些场景在以前的工作中研究较少。大量实验表明，P3O 在一组受限机车任务的奖励改进和约束满足方面均优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为P3O的惩罚近端策略优化方法，用于解决安全强化学习中的约束满足与高效策略更新问题。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习算法在处理硬约束条件和实现高效策略更新时存在效率与精度的不足，需更有效的方法保障约束满足的同时提升性能。
AI.method: 通过引入简单有效的惩罚函数将约束问题转化为无约束优化，并利用截断替代目标消除信任区域约束，同时扩展至多约束与多智能体场景。
AI.result: 实验表明，P3O在多个受限运动任务中，在奖励提升与约束满足指标上均优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: P3O在理论保证与实际应用中均表现出有效性，为复杂安全强化学习场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Jinhwi Lee,Jungtaek Kim,Hyunsoo Chung,Jaesik Park,Minsu Cho
title: Learning to Assemble Geometric Shapes
title_zh: 学习组装几何形状
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, 9 tables. Accepted at the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2022). J. Lee and J. Kim equally contributed
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures, 9 tables. Accepted at the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI 2022). J. Lee and J. Kim equally contributed
abstract: Assembling parts into an object is a combinatorial problem that arises in a variety of contexts in the real world and involves numerous applications in science and engineering. Previous related work tackles limited cases with identical unit parts or jigsaw-style parts of textured shapes, which greatly mitigate combinatorial challenges of the problem. In this work, we introduce the more challenging problem of shape assembly, which involves textureless fragments of arbitrary shapes with indistinctive junctions, and then propose a learning-based approach to solving it. We demonstrate the effectiveness on shape assembly tasks with various scenarios, including the ones with abnormal fragments (e.g., missing and distorted), the different number of fragments, and different rotation discretization.
summary: Assembling parts into an object is a combinatorial problem that arises in a variety of contexts in the real world and involves numerous applications in science and engineering. Previous related work tackles limited cases with identical unit parts or jigsaw-style parts of textured shapes, which greatly mitigate combinatorial challenges of the problem. In this work, we introduce the more challenging problem of shape assembly, which involves textureless fragments of arbitrary shapes with indistinctive junctions, and then propose a learning-based approach to solving it. We demonstrate the effectiveness on shape assembly tasks with various scenarios, including the ones with abnormal fragments (e.g., missing and distorted), the different number of fragments, and different rotation discretization.
abstract_zh: 将零件组装成物体是一个组合问题，在现实世界的各种环境中都会出现，涉及科学和工程中的众多应用。以前的相关工作解决了具有相同单元零件或纹理形状的拼图式零件的有限情况，这极大地减轻了问题的组合挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了更具挑战性的形状组装问题，该问题涉及具有不明显连接的任意形状的无纹理片段，然后提出一种基于学习的方法来解决它。我们展示了各种场景下形状组装任务的有效性，包括具有异常碎片（例如丢失和扭曲）、不同数量的碎片和不同旋转离散化的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的方法，用于解决将无纹理且形状任意的几何碎片组装成完整物体的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多针对纹理化或相同单元零件的拼接问题，难以应对现实场景中碎片无纹理、接合处不明显等复杂情况。
AI.method: 设计了一种学习框架，通过神经网络模型处理无纹理碎片的组装任务，支持碎片数量变化及旋转离散化等多样化场景。
AI.result: 方法在包含缺失/扭曲碎片、不同碎片数量及旋转角度的多种测试场景中均表现出有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决复杂几何形状的自动组装问题提供了新思路，拓展了计算机视觉在物体重建领域的应用边界。

title: Hybrid Manufacturing Process Planning for Arbitrary Part and Tool Shapes
title_zh: 任意零件和工具形状的混合制造工艺规划
comment: Special Issue on symposium on Solid and Physical Modeling (SPM'2022)
comments: Special Issue on symposium on Solid and Physical Modeling (SPM'2022)
abstract: Hybrid manufacturing (HM) technologies combine additive and subtractive manufacturing (AM/SM) capabilities in multi-modal process plans that leverage the strengths of each. Despite the growing interest in HM technologies, software tools for process planning have not caught up with advances in hardware and typically impose restrictions that limit the design and manufacturing engineers' ability to systematically explore the full design and process planning spaces. We present a general framework for identifying AM/SM actions that make up an HM process plan based on accessibility and support requirements, using morphological operations that allow for arbitrary part and tool geometries to be considered. To take advantage of multi-modality, we define the actions to allow for temporary excessive material deposition or removal, with an understanding that subsequent actions can correct for them, unlike the case in unimodal (AM-only or SM-only) process plans that are monotonic. We use this framework to generate a combinatorial space of valid, potentially non-monotonic, process plans for a given part of arbitrary shape, a collection of AM/SM tools of arbitrary shapes, and a set of relative rotations (fixed for each action) between them, representing build/fixturing directions on $3-$axis machines. Finally, we use define a simple objective function quantifying the cost of materials and operating time in terms of deposition/removal volumes and use a search algorithm to explore the exponentially large space of valid process plans to find "cost-optimal" solutions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on 3D examples.

Despite the growing interest in HM technologies, software tools for process planning have not caught up with advances in hardware and typically impose restrictions that limit the design and manufacturing engineers' ability to systematically explore the full design and process planning spaces. We present a general framework for identifying AM/SM actions that make up an HM process plan based on accessibility and support requirements, using morphological operations that allow for arbitrary part and tool geometries to be considered. To take advantage of multi-modality, we define the actions to allow for temporary excessive material deposition or removal, with an understanding that subsequent actions can correct for them, unlike the case in unimodal (AM-only or SM-only) process plans that are monotonic. We use this framework to generate a combinatorial space of valid, potentially non-monotonic, process plans for a given part of arbitrary shape, a collection of AM/SM tools of arbitrary shapes, and a set of relative rotations (fixed for each action) between them, representing build/fixturing directions on $3-$axis machines. Finally, we use define a simple objective function quantifying the cost of materials and operating time in terms of deposition/removal volumes and use a search algorithm to explore the exponentially large space of valid process plans to find "cost-optimal" solutions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on 3D examples.
abstract_zh: Hybrid manufacturing (HM) technologies combine additive and subtractive manufacturing (AM/SM) capabilities in multi-modal process plans that leverage the strengths of each.尽管人们对 HM 技术的兴趣日益浓厚，但用于工艺规划的软件工具尚未跟上硬件的进步，并且通常会施加限制，限制设计和制造工程师系统地探索完整设计和工艺规划空间的能力。 We present a general framework for identifying AM/SM actions that make up an HM process plan based on accessibility and support requirements, using morphological operations that allow for arbitrary part and tool geometries to be considered. To take advantage of multi-modality, we define the actions to allow for temporary excessive material deposition or removal, with an understanding that subsequent actions can correct for them, unlike the case in unimodal (AM-only or SM-only) process plans that are monotonic. We use this framework to generate a combinatorial space of valid, potentially non-monotonic, process plans for a given part of arbitrary shape, a collection of AM/SM tools of arbitrary shapes, and a set of relative rotations (fixed for each action) between them, representing build/fixturing directions on $3-$axis machines.最后，我们定义一个简单的目标函数，根据沉积/去除量来量化材料成本和操作时间，并使用搜索算法来探索有效工艺计划的指数大空间，以找到“成本最优”解决方案。我们在 3D 示例上证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于任意零件和工具形状的混合制造工艺规划框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的混合制造软件工具无法充分利用硬件的进步，限制了设计和制造工程师对工艺规划空间的系统探索。
AI.method: 基于可达性和支撑需求，利用形态学运算定义了AM/SM动作，并使用搜索算法探索工艺规划空间以找到成本最优的解决方案。
AI.result: 该方法在3D示例中展示了其有效性，能够生成非单调的、成本优化的混合制造工艺计划。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为任意形状的零件和工具提供了灵活的混合制造工艺规划方法，有助于提升制造效率和降低成本。

authors_text: Hung-Min Hsu,Xinyu Yuan,Baohua Zhu,Zhongwei Cheng,Lin Chen
title: Package Theft Detection from Smart Home Security Cameras
title_zh: 智能家居安全摄像头的包裹盗窃检测
abstract: Package theft detection has been a challenging task mainly due to lack of training data and a wide variety of package theft cases in reality. In this paper, we propose a new Global and Local Fusion Package Theft Detection Embedding (GLF-PTDE) framework to generate package theft scores for each segment within a video to fulfill the real-world requirements on package theft detection. Moreover, we construct a novel Package Theft Detection dataset to facilitate the research on this task. Our method achieves 80% AUC performance on the newly proposed dataset, showing the effectiveness of the proposed GLF-PTDE framework and its robustness in different real scenes for package theft detection.
summary: Package theft detection has been a challenging task mainly due to lack of training data and a wide variety of package theft cases in reality. In this paper, we propose a new Global and Local Fusion Package Theft Detection Embedding (GLF-PTDE) framework to generate package theft scores for each segment within a video to fulfill the real-world requirements on package theft detection. Moreover, we construct a novel Package Theft Detection dataset to facilitate the research on this task. Our method achieves 80% AUC performance on the newly proposed dataset, showing the effectiveness of the proposed GLF-PTDE framework and its robustness in different real scenes for package theft detection.
abstract_zh: 包裹盗窃检测一直是一项具有挑战性的任务，主要是由于缺乏训练数据和现实中的包裹盗窃案例多种多样。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的全局和局部融合包裹盗窃检测嵌入（GLF-PTDE）框架，为视频中的每个片段生成包裹盗窃分数，以满足包裹盗窃检测的现实要求。此外，我们构建了一个新颖的包裹盗窃检测数据集来促进这项任务的研究。我们的方法在新提出的数据集上实现了 80% AUC 性能，显示了所提出的 GLF-PTDE 框架的有效性及其在不同真实场景中用于包裹盗窃检测的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合全局与局部信息的包裹盗窃检测框架（GLF-PTDE），并构建新型数据集以提升智能家居摄像头下的包裹盗窃检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中包裹盗窃案例多样且缺乏训练数据，导致现有检测方法难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计GLF-PTDE框架融合视频全局语义与局部细节特征，生成视频片段的盗窃评分；同时构建包含多场景的包裹盗窃检测数据集。
AI.result: 在新型数据集上达到80%的AUC性能，验证了方法在不同真实场景中的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GLF-PTDE框架通过特征融合策略显著提升了包裹盗窃检测性能，为该领域研究提供了新思路与基准数据集。

title: WeDef: Weakly Supervised Backdoor Defense for Text Classification
title_zh: WeDef：用于文本分类的弱监督后门防御
abstract: Existing backdoor defense methods are only effective for limited trigger types. To defend different trigger types at once, we start from the class-irrelevant nature of the poisoning process and propose a novel weakly supervised backdoor defense framework WeDef. Recent advances in weak supervision make it possible to train a reasonably accurate text classifier using only a small number of user-provided, class-indicative seed words. Such seed words shall be considered independent of the triggers. Therefore, a weakly supervised text classifier trained by only the poisoned documents without their labels will likely have no backdoor. Inspired by this observation, in WeDef, we define the reliability of samples based on whether the predictions of the weak classifier agree with their labels in the poisoned training set. We further improve the results through a two-phase sanitization: (1) iteratively refine the weak classifier based on the reliable samples and (2) train a binary poison classifier by distinguishing the most unreliable samples from the most reliable samples. Finally, we train the sanitized model on the samples that the poison classifier predicts as benign. Extensive experiments show that WeDefis effective against popular trigger-based attacks (e.g., words, sentences, and paraphrases), outperforming existing defense methods.
summary: Existing backdoor defense methods are only effective for limited trigger types. To defend different trigger types at once, we start from the class-irrelevant nature of the poisoning process and propose a novel weakly supervised backdoor defense framework WeDef. Recent advances in weak supervision make it possible to train a reasonably accurate text classifier using only a small number of user-provided, class-indicative seed words. Such seed words shall be considered independent of the triggers. Therefore, a weakly supervised text classifier trained by only the poisoned documents without their labels will likely have no backdoor. Inspired by this observation, in WeDef, we define the reliability of samples based on whether the predictions of the weak classifier agree with their labels in the poisoned training set. We further improve the results through a two-phase sanitization: (1) iteratively refine the weak classifier based on the reliable samples and (2) train a binary poison classifier by distinguishing the most unreliable samples from the most reliable samples. Finally, we train the sanitized model on the samples that the poison classifier predicts as benign. Extensive experiments show that WeDefis effective against popular trigger-based attacks (e.g., words, sentences, and paraphrases), outperforming existing defense methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的后门防御方法仅对有限的触发类型有效。为了同时防御不同的触发类型，我们从中毒过程的类无关性质出发，提出了一种新颖的弱监督后门防御框架WeDef。弱监督方面的最新进展使得仅使用少量用户提供的类别指示种子词来训练相当准确的文本分类器成为可能。此类种子词应被视为独立于触发器。因此，仅由没有标签的中毒文档训练的弱监督文本分类器可能没有后门。受这一观察的启发，在 WeDef 中，我们根据弱分类器的预测是否与其在中毒训练集中的标签一致来定义样本的可靠性。我们通过两阶段清理进一步改进结果：（1）基于可靠样本迭代细化弱分类器，（2）通过区分最不可靠的样本和最可靠的样本来训练二元毒物分类器。最后，我们在毒物分类器预测为良性的样本上训练净化后的模型。大量实验表明，WeDefi 可以有效抵御流行的基于触发的攻击（例如单词、句子和释义），性能优于现有的防御方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WeDef框架，通过弱监督方法防御文本分类中的后门攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有后门防御方法仅对有限触发类型有效，需设计能同时防御多种触发类型的通用方案。
AI.method: 基于弱监督学习，利用用户提供的类别指示种子词训练初始分类器，通过样本预测与标签的一致性判断可靠性，结合两阶段净化策略（迭代优化弱分类器、训练二分类毒化检测器）实现防御。
AI.result: 实验表明WeDef在词、句、改写等主流触发攻击下表现优于现有方法，且无需干净数据即可防御。
AI.conclusion: 通过弱监督与样本可靠性分析，WeDef为文本分类后门防御提供了新颖且有效的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出WeDef框架，通过弱监督方法防御文本分类中的后门攻击。
ai_content.motivation: 现有后门防御方法仅对有限触发类型有效，需设计能同时防御多种触发类型的通用方案。
ai_content.method: 基于弱监督学习，利用用户提供的类别指示种子词训练初始分类器，通过样本预测与标签的一致性判断可靠性，结合两阶段净化策略（迭代优化弱分类器、训练二分类毒化检测器）实现防御。
ai_content.result: 实验表明WeDef在词、句、改写等主流触发攻击下表现优于现有方法，且无需干净数据即可防御。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过弱监督与样本可靠性分析，WeDef为文本分类后门防御提供了新颖且有效的解决方案。

search_text: WeDef: Weakly Supervised Backdoor Defense for Text Classification WeDef：用于文本分类的弱监督后门防御 Existing backdoor defense methods are only effective for limited trigger types. To defend different trigger types at once, we start from the class-irrelevant nature of the poisoning process and propose a novel weakly supervised backdoor defense framework WeDef. Recent advances in weak supervision make it possible to train a reasonably accurate text classifier using only a small number of user-provided, class-indicative seed words. Such seed words shall be considered independent of the triggers. Therefore, a weakly supervised text classifier trained by only the poisoned documents without their labels will likely have no backdoor. Inspired by this observation, in WeDef, we define the reliability of samples based on whether the predictions of the weak classifier agree with their labels in the poisoned training set. We further improve the results through a two-phase sanitization: (1) iteratively refine the weak classifier based on the reliable samples and (2) train a binary poison classifier by distinguishing the most unreliable samples from the most reliable samples. Finally, we train the sanitized model on the samples that the poison classifier predicts as benign. Extensive experiments show that WeDefis effective against popular trigger-based attacks (e.g., words, sentences, and paraphrases), outperforming existing defense methods. 现有的后门防御方法仅对有限的触发类型有效。为了同时防御不同的触发类型，我们从中毒过程的类无关性质出发，提出了一种新颖的弱监督后门防御框架WeDef。弱监督方面的最新进展使得仅使用少量用户提供的类别指示种子词来训练相当准确的文本分类器成为可能。此类种子词应被视为独立于触发器。因此，仅由没有标签的中毒文档训练的弱监督文本分类器可能没有后门。受这一观察的启发，在 WeDef 中，我们根据弱分类器的预测是否与其在中毒训练集中的标签一致来定义样本的可靠性。我们通过两阶段清理进一步改进结果：（1）基于可靠样本迭代细化弱分类器，（2）通过区分最不可靠的样本和最可靠的样本来训练二元毒物分类器。最后，我们在毒物分类器预测为良性的样本上训练净化后的模型。大量实验表明，WeDefi 可以有效抵御流行的基于触发的攻击（例如单词、句子和释义），性能优于现有的防御方法。 本文提出WeDef框架，通过弱监督方法防御文本分类中的后门攻击。 Lesheng Jin,Zihan Wang,Jingbo Shang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: SepIt: Approaching a Single Channel Speech Separation Bound
title_zh: SepIt：接近单通道语音分离界限
abstract: We present an upper bound for the Single Channel Speech Separation task, which is based on an assumption regarding the nature of short segments of speech. Using the bound, we are able to show that while the recent methods have made significant progress for a few speakers, there is room for improvement for five and ten speakers. We then introduce a Deep neural network, SepIt, that iteratively improves the different speakers' estimation. At test time, SpeIt has a varying number of iterations per test sample, based on a mutual information criterion that arises from our analysis. In an extensive set of experiments, SepIt outperforms the state-of-the-art neural networks for 2, 3, 5, and 10 speakers.
summary: We present an upper bound for the Single Channel Speech Separation task, which is based on an assumption regarding the nature of short segments of speech. Using the bound, we are able to show that while the recent methods have made significant progress for a few speakers, there is room for improvement for five and ten speakers. We then introduce a Deep neural network, SepIt, that iteratively improves the different speakers' estimation. At test time, SpeIt has a varying number of iterations per test sample, based on a mutual information criterion that arises from our analysis. In an extensive set of experiments, SepIt outperforms the state-of-the-art neural networks for 2, 3, 5, and 10 speakers.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了单通道语音分离任务的上限，该上限基于有关短语音片段性质的假设。使用界限，我们能够证明，虽然最近的方法对于少数说话者来说已经取得了显着的进步，但对于五个和十个说话者来说还有改进的空间。然后，我们引入深度神经网络 SepIt，它可以迭代地改进不同说话者的估计。在测试时，SpeIt 根据我们分析中产生的互信息标准，对每个测试样本进行不同数量的迭代。在一系列广泛的实验中，SepIt 对于 2、3、5 和 10 个说话者的表现优于最先进的神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出单通道语音分离任务的理论上限，并设计SepIt模型通过迭代优化逼近该上限。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在少量说话人场景表现优异，但多说话人（如5-10人）分离效果仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 基于语音短片段性质假设建立理论上限，设计迭代式深度网络SepIt，测试时根据互信息准则动态调整迭代次数。
AI.result: SepIt在2/3/5/10人场景下均超越现有最佳模型，验证了理论上限的有效性和方法优势。
AI.conclusion: SepIt通过逼近理论上限实现了更优的多说话人语音分离，为单通道分离任务提供新方向。

title: Formulating Few-shot Fine-tuning Towards Language Model Pre-training: A Pilot Study on Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 针对语言模型预训练制定小样本微调：命名实体识别的试点研究
abstract: Fine-tuning pre-trained language models has recently become a common practice in building NLP models for various tasks, especially few-shot tasks. We argue that under the few-shot setting, formulating fine-tuning closer to the pre-training objectives shall be able to unleash more benefits from the pre-trained language models. In this work, we take few-shot named entity recognition (NER) for a pilot study, where existing fine-tuning strategies are much different from pre-training. We propose a novel few-shot fine-tuning framework for NER, FFF-NER. Specifically, we introduce three new types of tokens, "is-entity", "which-type" and bracket, so we can formulate the NER fine-tuning as (masked) token prediction or generation, depending on the choice of pre-trained language models. In our experiments, we apply FFF-NER to fine-tune both BERT and BART for few-shot NER on several benchmark datasets and observe significant improvements over existing fine-tuning strategies, including sequence labeling, prototype meta-learning, and prompt-based approaches. We further perform a series of ablation studies, showing few-shot NER performance is strongly correlated with the similarity between fine-tuning and pre-training.
summary: Fine-tuning pre-trained language models has recently become a common practice in building NLP models for various tasks, especially few-shot tasks. We argue that under the few-shot setting, formulating fine-tuning closer to the pre-training objectives shall be able to unleash more benefits from the pre-trained language models. In this work, we take few-shot named entity recognition (NER) for a pilot study, where existing fine-tuning strategies are much different from pre-training. We propose a novel few-shot fine-tuning framework for NER, FFF-NER. Specifically, we introduce three new types of tokens, "is-entity", "which-type" and bracket, so we can formulate the NER fine-tuning as (masked) token prediction or generation, depending on the choice of pre-trained language models. In our experiments, we apply FFF-NER to fine-tune both BERT and BART for few-shot NER on several benchmark datasets and observe significant improvements over existing fine-tuning strategies, including sequence labeling, prototype meta-learning, and prompt-based approaches. We further perform a series of ablation studies, showing few-shot NER performance is strongly correlated with the similarity between fine-tuning and pre-training.
abstract_zh: 最近，微调预训练语言模型已成为为各种任务（尤其是小样本任务）构建 NLP 模型的常见做法。我们认为，在少样本设置下，制定更接近预训练目标的微调应该能够从预训练的语言模型中释放出更多的好处。在这项工作中，我们采用少样本命名实体识别（NER）进行试点研究，其中现有的微调策略与预训练有很大不同。我们提出了一种新颖的 NER 少样本微调框架，FFF-NER。具体来说，我们引入了三种新类型的标记，“is-entity”、“which-type”和括号，因此我们可以根据预训练语言模型的选择，将 NER 微调制定为（屏蔽）标记预测或生成。在我们的实验中，我们应用 FFF-NER 在多个基准数据集上对 BERT 和 BART 进行小样本 NER 微调，并观察到相对于现有微调策略（包括序列标记、原型元学习和基于提示的方法）的显着改进。我们进一步进行了一系列消融研究，表明少样本 NER 性能与微调和预训练之间的相似性密切相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向少样本命名实体识别（NER）的新型微调框架FFF-NER，通过将微调目标与预训练任务对齐以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有NER微调方法与预训练目标差异较大，未能充分释放预训练语言模型的潜力，需探索更契合预训练目标的少样本微调策略。
AI.method: 引入三种新标记（'is-entity'、'which-type'和括号），将NER任务转化为掩码标记预测或生成问题，使微调过程与BERT/BART等模型的预训练目标一致。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于序列标注、元学习和提示方法，消融实验验证微调与预训练相似性对性能的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 少样本NER性能高度依赖微调与预训练目标的对齐程度，提出的方法通过任务形式重构有效提升了模型适应能力。

title: Symbolic Expression Transformer: A Computer Vision Approach for Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 符号表达式转换器：符号回归的计算机视觉方法
abstract: Symbolic Regression (SR) is a type of regression analysis to automatically find the mathematical expression that best fits the data. Currently, SR still basically relies on various searching strategies so that a sample-specific model is required to be optimized for every expression, which significantly limits the model's generalization and efficiency. Inspired by the fact that human beings can infer a mathematical expression based on the curve of it, we propose Symbolic Expression Transformer (SET), a sample-agnostic model from the perspective of computer vision for SR. Specifically, the collected data is represented as images and an image caption model is employed for translating images to symbolic expressions. A large-scale dataset without overlap between training and testing sets in the image domain is released. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of SET and suggest the promising direction of image-based model for solving the challenging SR problem.
summary: Symbolic Regression (SR) is a type of regression analysis to automatically find the mathematical expression that best fits the data. Currently, SR still basically relies on various searching strategies so that a sample-specific model is required to be optimized for every expression, which significantly limits the model's generalization and efficiency. Inspired by the fact that human beings can infer a mathematical expression based on the curve of it, we propose Symbolic Expression Transformer (SET), a sample-agnostic model from the perspective of computer vision for SR. Specifically, the collected data is represented as images and an image caption model is employed for translating images to symbolic expressions. A large-scale dataset without overlap between training and testing sets in the image domain is released. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of SET and suggest the promising direction of image-based model for solving the challenging SR problem.
abstract_zh: Symbolic Regression (SR) is a type of regression analysis to automatically find the mathematical expression that best fits the data.目前，SR基本上仍然依赖于各种搜索策略，因此需要针对每个表达来优化特定于样本的模型，这极大地限制了模型的泛化和效率。受人类可以根据其曲线推断数学表达式这一事实的启发，我们提出了符号表达式变换器（SET），这是一种从计算机视觉角度用于SR的样本不可知模型。 Specifically, the collected data is represented as images and an image caption model is employed for translating images to symbolic expressions.发布了图像领域训练集和测试集之间没有重叠的大规模数据集。我们的结果证明了 SET 的有效性，并提出了基于图像的模型解决具有挑战性的 SR 问题的有前途的方向。

AI.motivation: 传统符号回归依赖搜索策略需为每个表达式单独优化模型，导致泛化能力差且效率低。受人类通过曲线推断数学表达式的启发，需探索更高效的模型架构。
AI.method: 将数据表示为图像，采用图像字幕模型（基于Transformer）将图像转换为符号表达式，并构建大规模图像域训练测试不重叠的数据集。
AI.result: 实验验证了SET在符号回归任务中的有效性，证明基于图像的模型能有效解决SR问题。
AI.conclusion: SET展示了从计算机视觉角度解决符号回归问题的可行性，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Liping Hou,Ke Lu,Xue Yang,Yuqiu Li,Jian Xue
title: G-Rep: Gaussian Representation for Arbitrary-Oriented Object Detection
title_zh: G-Rep：任意方向目标检测的高斯表示
comment: 24 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables, the code has been open sourced at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate
comments: 24 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables, the code has been open sourced at https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmrotate
abstract: Typical representations for arbitrary-oriented object detection tasks include oriented bounding box (OBB), quadrilateral bounding box (QBB), and point set (PointSet). Each representation encounters problems that correspond to its characteristics, such as the boundary discontinuity, square-like problem, representation ambiguity, and isolated points, which lead to inaccurate detection. Although many effective strategies have been proposed for various representations, there is still no unified solution. Current detection methods based on Gaussian modeling have demonstrated the possibility of breaking this dilemma; however, they remain limited to OBB. To go further, in this paper, we propose a unified Gaussian representation called G-Rep to construct Gaussian distributions for OBB, QBB, and PointSet, which achieves a unified solution to various representations and problems. Specifically, PointSet or QBB-based object representations are converted into Gaussian distributions, and their parameters are optimized using the maximum likelihood estimation algorithm. Then, three optional Gaussian metrics are explored to optimize the regression loss of the detector because of their excellent parameter optimization mechanisms. Furthermore, we also use Gaussian metrics for sampling to align label assignment and regression loss. Experimental results on several public available datasets, such as DOTA, HRSC2016, UCAS-AOD, and ICDAR2015, show the excellent performance of the proposed method for arbitrary-oriented object detection.
summary: Typical representations for arbitrary-oriented object detection tasks include oriented bounding box (OBB), quadrilateral bounding box (QBB), and point set (PointSet). Each representation encounters problems that correspond to its characteristics, such as the boundary discontinuity, square-like problem, representation ambiguity, and isolated points, which lead to inaccurate detection. Although many effective strategies have been proposed for various representations, there is still no unified solution. Current detection methods based on Gaussian modeling have demonstrated the possibility of breaking this dilemma; however, they remain limited to OBB. To go further, in this paper, we propose a unified Gaussian representation called G-Rep to construct Gaussian distributions for OBB, QBB, and PointSet, which achieves a unified solution to various representations and problems. Specifically, PointSet or QBB-based object representations are converted into Gaussian distributions, and their parameters are optimized using the maximum likelihood estimation algorithm. Then, three optional Gaussian metrics are explored to optimize the regression loss of the detector because of their excellent parameter optimization mechanisms. Furthermore, we also use Gaussian metrics for sampling to align label assignment and regression loss. Experimental results on several public available datasets, such as DOTA, HRSC2016, UCAS-AOD, and ICDAR2015, show the excellent performance of the proposed method for arbitrary-oriented object detection.
abstract_zh: 任意定向目标检测任务的典型表示包括定向边界框（OBB）、四边形边界框（QBB）和点集（PointSet）。每个表示都会遇到与其特征相对应的问题，例如边界不连续、类正方形问题、表示模糊和孤立点，从而导致检测不准确。尽管针对各种表示形式提出了许多有效的策略，但仍然没有统一的解决方案。当前基于高斯建模的检测方法已经证明了打破这一困境的可能性；然而，它们仍然仅限于 OBB。更进一步，在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 G-Rep 的统一高斯表示来构造 OBB、QBB 和 PointSet 的高斯分布，从而实现了各种表示和问题的统一解决方案。具体来说，基于PointSet或QBB的对象表示被转换为高斯分布，并使用最大似然估计算法优化它们的参数。然后，由于其出色的参数优化机制，探索了三种可选的高斯度量来优化检测器的回归损失。此外，我们还使用高斯度量进行采样，以对齐标签分配和回归损失。在DOTA、HRSC2016、UCAS-AOD和ICDAR2015等多个公共可用数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在任意方向的目标检测方面具有出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的高斯表示方法G-Rep，用于解决任意方向目标检测中不同表示方式（如OBB、QBB、PointSet）存在的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测表示方式（OBB、QBB、PointSet）各自存在边界不连续、方形化问题、表示模糊和孤立点等缺陷，缺乏统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 将PointSet/QBB转换为高斯分布，通过最大似然估计优化参数，并探索三种高斯度量优化回归损失，利用高斯度量对齐标签分配与回归损失。
AI.result: 在DOTA、HRSC2016等数据集上实验表明，G-Rep在任意方向目标检测任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: G-Rep通过高斯建模统一了多种表示方式，有效解决了传统方法的缺陷，提升了检测精度。

title: Influence of perspective taking through robotic virtual agents on prosocial behavior
title_zh: 机器人虚拟代理的观点采择对亲社会行为的影响
abstract: Perspective taking, which allows people to imagine another's thinking and goals, is known to be an effective method for promoting prosocial behaviors in human-computer interactions. However, most of the previous studies have focused on simulating human-human interactions in the real world by offering participants experiences related to various moral tasks through the use of human-like virtual agents. In this study, we investigated whether taking the perspective of a different robot in a robot-altruistic task would influence the social behaviors of participants in a dictator game. Our findings showed that participants who watched the help-receiver view exhibited more altruistic behaviors toward a robot than those who watched the help-provider view. We also found that, after watching robots from two different viewpoints in the task, participants did not change their behavior toward another participant.
summary: Perspective taking, which allows people to imagine another's thinking and goals, is known to be an effective method for promoting prosocial behaviors in human-computer interactions. However, most of the previous studies have focused on simulating human-human interactions in the real world by offering participants experiences related to various moral tasks through the use of human-like virtual agents. In this study, we investigated whether taking the perspective of a different robot in a robot-altruistic task would influence the social behaviors of participants in a dictator game. Our findings showed that participants who watched the help-receiver view exhibited more altruistic behaviors toward a robot than those who watched the help-provider view. We also found that, after watching robots from two different viewpoints in the task, participants did not change their behavior toward another participant.
abstract_zh: 换位思考允许人们想象他人的想法和目标，被认为是在人机交互中促进亲社会行为的有效方法。然而，之前的大多数研究都集中在通过使用类人虚拟代理为参与者提供与各种道德任务相关的体验来模拟现实世界中的人与人的互动。在这项研究中，我们调查了在机器人利他任务中从不同机器人的角度来看是否会影响独裁者游戏参与者的社会行为。我们的研究结果表明，观看帮助接受者视图的参与者比观看帮助提供者视图的参与者对机器人表现出更多的利他行为。我们还发现，在从任务中的两个不同角度观察机器人后，参与者并没有改变他们对另一个参与者的行为。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨通过机器人虚拟代理进行视角采择对参与者亲社会行为的影响，特别是在独裁者游戏中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注人类互动中视角采择对亲社会行为的影响，但机器人作为虚拟代理的视角采择效果及对人类行为的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过设计机器人利他任务实验，让参与者从帮助提供者或接受者的视角观看机器人互动，随后在独裁者游戏中观察其分配行为。
AI.result: 观看帮助接受者视角的参与者对机器人表现出更多利他行为，但对其他人类参与者的行为无显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 机器人视角采择可有效引导人类对机器人的亲社会行为，但未能影响人类对同类的互动行为，表明机器人代理的视角机制可能与人类互动存在差异。

ai_content_json.result: 观看帮助接受者视角的参与者对机器人表现出更多利他行为，但对其他人类参与者的行为无显著影响。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 机器人视角采择可有效引导人类对机器人的亲社会行为，但未能影响人类对同类的互动行为，表明机器人代理的视角机制可能与人类互动存在差异。
