search_text: Influence of perspective taking through robotic virtual agents on prosocial behavior 机器人虚拟代理的观点采择对亲社会行为的影响 Perspective taking, which allows people to imagine another's thinking and goals, is known to be an effective method for promoting prosocial behaviors in human-computer interactions. However, most of the previous studies have focused on simulating human-human interactions in the real world by offering participants experiences related to various moral tasks through the use of human-like virtual agents. In this study, we investigated whether taking the perspective of a different robot in a robot-altruistic task would influence the social behaviors of participants in a dictator game. Our findings showed that participants who watched the help-receiver view exhibited more altruistic behaviors toward a robot than those who watched the help-provider view. We also found that, after watching robots from two different viewpoints in the task, participants did not change their behavior toward another participant. 换位思考允许人们想象他人的想法和目标，被认为是在人机交互中促进亲社会行为的有效方法。然而，之前的大多数研究都集中在通过使用类人虚拟代理为参与者提供与各种道德任务相关的体验来模拟现实世界中的人与人的互动。在这项研究中，我们调查了在机器人利他任务中从不同机器人的角度来看是否会影响独裁者游戏参与者的社会行为。我们的研究结果表明，观看帮助接受者视图的参与者比观看帮助提供者视图的参与者对机器人表现出更多的利他行为。我们还发现，在从任务中的两个不同角度观察机器人后，参与者并没有改变他们对另一个参与者的行为。 本研究探讨通过机器人虚拟代理进行视角采择对参与者亲社会行为的影响，特别是在独裁者游戏中的表现。 Chenlin Hang,Tetsuo Ono,Seiji Yamada cs.HC

title: Hierarchical Planning Through Goal-Conditioned Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过目标条件离线强化学习进行分层规划
abstract: Offline Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown potent in many safe-critical tasks in robotics where exploration is risky and expensive. However, it still struggles to acquire skills in temporally extended tasks. In this paper, we study the problem of offline RL for temporally extended tasks. We propose a hierarchical planning framework, consisting of a low-level goal-conditioned RL policy and a high-level goal planner. The low-level policy is trained via offline RL. We improve the offline training to deal with out-of-distribution goals by a perturbed goal sampling process. The high-level planner selects intermediate sub-goals by taking advantages of model-based planning methods. It plans over future sub-goal sequences based on the learned value function of the low-level policy. We adopt a Conditional Variational Autoencoder to sample meaningful high-dimensional sub-goal candidates and to solve the high-level long-term strategy optimization problem. We evaluate our proposed method in long-horizon driving and robot navigation tasks. Experiments show that our method outperforms baselines with different hierarchical designs and other regular planners without hierarchy in these complex tasks.
summary: Offline Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown potent in many safe-critical tasks in robotics where exploration is risky and expensive. However, it still struggles to acquire skills in temporally extended tasks. In this paper, we study the problem of offline RL for temporally extended tasks. We propose a hierarchical planning framework, consisting of a low-level goal-conditioned RL policy and a high-level goal planner. The low-level policy is trained via offline RL. We improve the offline training to deal with out-of-distribution goals by a perturbed goal sampling process. The high-level planner selects intermediate sub-goals by taking advantages of model-based planning methods. It plans over future sub-goal sequences based on the learned value function of the low-level policy. We adopt a Conditional Variational Autoencoder to sample meaningful high-dimensional sub-goal candidates and to solve the high-level long-term strategy optimization problem. We evaluate our proposed method in long-horizon driving and robot navigation tasks. Experiments show that our method outperforms baselines with different hierarchical designs and other regular planners without hierarchy in these complex tasks.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习 (RL) 在机器人技术的许多安全关键任务中显示出强大的作用，而这些任务的探索是有风险且昂贵的。然而，它仍然难以获得临时扩展任务的技能。在本文中，我们研究了时间扩展任务的离线强化学习问题。我们提出了一个分层规划框架，由低层目标条件强化学习策略和高层目标规划器组成。低层策略通过离线强化学习进行训练。我们改进了离线训练，通过扰动目标采样过程来处理分布外的目标。高层规划者利用基于模型的规划方法来选择中间子目标。它根据学习到的低级策略的价值函数来规划未来的子目标序列。我们采用条件变分自动编码器来采样有意义的高维子目标候选并解决高级长期策略优化问题。我们在长视野驾驶和机器人导航任务中评估我们提出的方法。实验表明，在这些复杂的任务中，我们的方法优于具有不同层次设计的基线和其他没有层次结构的常规规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于目标条件的离线强化学习分层规划框架，用于解决长时间任务中的技能学习问题。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习在安全关键型机器人任务中具有潜力，但在处理时间跨度长的任务时仍存在挑战，需通过分层规划提升性能。
AI.method: 框架包含低层目标条件RL策略（通过扰动目标采样优化离线训练）和高层基于模型的规划器（利用条件变分自编码器生成子目标并优化长期策略）。
AI.result: 在长时距驾驶和机器人导航任务中，该方法优于其他分层设计和非分层规划器。
AI.conclusion: 分层规划结合目标条件离线RL能有效解决长时间任务中的技能学习难题。

authors_text: Zhendong Chu,Hongning Wang,Yun Xiao,Bo Long,Lingfei Wu
title: Meta Policy Learning for Cold-Start Conversational Recommendation
title_zh: 用于冷启动会话推荐的元策略学习
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) explicitly solicit users' preferences for improved recommendations on the fly. Most existing CRS solutions count on a single policy trained by reinforcement learning for a population of users. However, for users new to the system, such a global policy becomes ineffective to satisfy them, i.e., the cold-start challenge. In this paper, we study CRS policy learning for cold-start users via meta-reinforcement learning. We propose to learn a meta policy and adapt it to new users with only a few trials of conversational recommendations. To facilitate fast policy adaptation, we design three synergetic components. Firstly, we design a meta-exploration policy dedicated to identifying user preferences via a few exploratory conversations, which accelerates personalized policy adaptation from the meta policy. Secondly, we adapt the item recommendation module for each user to maximize the recommendation quality based on the collected conversation states during conversations. Thirdly, we propose a Transformer-based state encoder as the backbone to connect the previous two components. It provides comprehensive state representations by modeling complicated relations between positive and negative feedback during the conversation. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the advantage of our solution in serving new users, compared with a rich set of state-of-the-art CRS solutions.
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) explicitly solicit users' preferences for improved recommendations on the fly. Most existing CRS solutions count on a single policy trained by reinforcement learning for a population of users. However, for users new to the system, such a global policy becomes ineffective to satisfy them, i.e., the cold-start challenge. In this paper, we study CRS policy learning for cold-start users via meta-reinforcement learning. We propose to learn a meta policy and adapt it to new users with only a few trials of conversational recommendations. To facilitate fast policy adaptation, we design three synergetic components. Firstly, we design a meta-exploration policy dedicated to identifying user preferences via a few exploratory conversations, which accelerates personalized policy adaptation from the meta policy. Secondly, we adapt the item recommendation module for each user to maximize the recommendation quality based on the collected conversation states during conversations. Thirdly, we propose a Transformer-based state encoder as the backbone to connect the previous two components. It provides comprehensive state representations by modeling complicated relations between positive and negative feedback during the conversation. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the advantage of our solution in serving new users, compared with a rich set of state-of-the-art CRS solutions.
abstract_zh: 会话推荐系统 (CRS) 明确征求用户的偏好，以便即时改进推荐。大多数现有的 CRS 解决方案都依赖于针对一群用户进行强化学习训练的单一策略。然而，对于刚接触系统的用户来说，这样的全局策略无法满足他们的需求，即冷启动挑战。在本文中，我们通过元强化学习研究冷启动用户的 CRS 策略学习。我们建议学习元策略并使其适应新用户，只需进行几次对话推荐尝试。为了促进政策的快速调整，我们设计了三个协同组件。 Firstly, we design a meta-exploration policy dedicated to identifying user preferences via a few exploratory conversations, which accelerates personalized policy adaptation from the meta policy. Secondly, we adapt the item recommendation module for each user to maximize the recommendation quality based on the collected conversation states during conversations.第三，我们提出一个基于 Transformer 的状态编码器作为连接前两个组件的主干。 It provides comprehensive state representations by modeling complicated relations between positive and negative feedback during the conversation. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the advantage of our solution in serving new users, compared with a rich set of state-of-the-art CRS solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元强化学习的对话推荐系统方法，解决新用户冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统依赖单一全局策略，难以满足新用户需求，导致冷启动问题难以解决。
AI.method: 设计元探索策略快速识别用户偏好、个性化推荐模块优化推荐质量、以及基于Transformer的状态编码器整合对话信息的三组件协同方法。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验表明，该方法在服务新用户时显著优于现有先进对话推荐系统方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过元策略学习与对话状态建模的结合，有效提升了冷启动用户推荐效果。

title: AFNet-M: Adaptive Fusion Network with Masks for 2D+3D Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: AFNet-M：带掩模的自适应融合网络，用于 2D+3D 面部表情识别
abstract: 2D+3D facial expression recognition (FER) can effectively cope with illumination changes and pose variations by simultaneously merging 2D texture and more robust 3D depth information. Most deep learning-based approaches employ the simple fusion strategy that concatenates the multimodal features directly after fully-connected layers, without considering the different degrees of significance for each modality. Meanwhile, how to focus on both 2D and 3D local features in salient regions is still a great challenge. In this letter, we propose the adaptive fusion network with masks (AFNet-M) for 2D+3D FER. To enhance 2D and 3D local features, we take the masks annotating salient regions of the face as prior knowledge and design the mask attention module (MA) which can automatically learn two modulation vectors to adjust the feature maps. Moreover, we introduce a novel fusion strategy that can perform adaptive fusion at convolutional layers through the designed importance weights computing module (IWC). Experimental results demonstrate that our AFNet-M achieves the state-of-the-art performance on BU-3DFE and Bosphorus datasets and requires fewer parameters in comparison with other models.
summary: 2D+3D facial expression recognition (FER) can effectively cope with illumination changes and pose variations by simultaneously merging 2D texture and more robust 3D depth information. Most deep learning-based approaches employ the simple fusion strategy that concatenates the multimodal features directly after fully-connected layers, without considering the different degrees of significance for each modality. Meanwhile, how to focus on both 2D and 3D local features in salient regions is still a great challenge. In this letter, we propose the adaptive fusion network with masks (AFNet-M) for 2D+3D FER. To enhance 2D and 3D local features, we take the masks annotating salient regions of the face as prior knowledge and design the mask attention module (MA) which can automatically learn two modulation vectors to adjust the feature maps. Moreover, we introduce a novel fusion strategy that can perform adaptive fusion at convolutional layers through the designed importance weights computing module (IWC). Experimental results demonstrate that our AFNet-M achieves the state-of-the-art performance on BU-3DFE and Bosphorus datasets and requires fewer parameters in comparison with other models.
abstract_zh: 2D+3D面部表情识别（FER）可以通过同时融合2D纹理和更鲁棒的3D深度信息来有效应对光照变化和姿势变化。大多数基于深度学习的方法采用简单的融合策略，在全连接层之后直接连接多模态特征，而不考虑每种模态的不同重要性程度。同时，如何同时关注显着区域的 2D 和 3D 局部特征仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在这封信中，我们提出了用于 2D+3D FER 的带掩模的自适应融合网络（AFNet-M）。为了增强 2D 和 3D 局部特征，我们将注释面部显着区域的掩模作为先验知识，并设计掩模注意模块（MA），它可以自动学习两个调制向量来调整特征图。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的融合策略，可以通过设计的重要性权重计算模块（IWC）在卷积层执行自适应融合。实验结果表明，我们的 AFNet-M 在 BU-3DFE 和博斯普鲁斯海峡数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且与其他模型相比需要更少的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AFNet-M的自适应融合网络，用于2D+3D面部表情识别。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习方法在融合2D和3D特征时未考虑不同模态的重要性，且难以聚焦于面部显著区域的局部特征。
AI.method: 设计了掩码注意力模块（MA）和重要性权重计算模块（IWC），通过掩码注释显著区域并自适应调整特征图。
AI.result: 在BU-3DFE和Bosphorus数据集上取得了最先进的性能，并且参数更少。
AI.conclusion: AFNet-M通过自适应融合策略和掩码注意力机制，有效提升了2D+3D面部表情识别的性能。

authors_text: Andrzej Reinke,Matteo Palieri,Benjamin Morrell,Yun Chang,Kamak Ebadi,Luca Carlone,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi
title: LOCUS 2.0: Robust and Computationally Efficient Lidar Odometry for Real-Time Underground 3D Mapping
title_zh: LOCUS 2.0：用于实时地下 3D 测绘的稳健且计算高效的激光雷达里程计
abstract: Lidar odometry has attracted considerable attention as a robust localization method for autonomous robots operating in complex GNSS-denied environments. However, achieving reliable and efficient performance on heterogeneous platforms in large-scale environments remains an open challenge due to the limitations of onboard computation and memory resources needed for autonomous operation. In this work, we present LOCUS 2.0, a robust and computationally-efficient \lidar odometry system for real-time underground 3D mapping. LOCUS 2.0 includes a novel normals-based \morrell{Generalized Iterative Closest Point (GICP)} formulation that reduces the computation time of point cloud alignment, an adaptive voxel grid filter that maintains the desired computation load regardless of the environment's geometry, and a sliding-window map approach that bounds the memory consumption. The proposed approach is shown to be suitable to be deployed on heterogeneous robotic platforms involved in large-scale explorations under severe computation and memory constraints. We demonstrate LOCUS 2.0, a key element of the CoSTAR team's entry in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, across various underground scenarios. We release LOCUS 2.0 as an open-source library and also release a \lidar-based odometry dataset in challenging and large-scale underground environments. The dataset features legged and wheeled platforms in multiple environments including fog, dust, darkness, and geometrically degenerate surroundings with a total of $11~h$ of operations and $16~km$ of distance traveled.
summary: Lidar odometry has attracted considerable attention as a robust localization method for autonomous robots operating in complex GNSS-denied environments. However, achieving reliable and efficient performance on heterogeneous platforms in large-scale environments remains an open challenge due to the limitations of onboard computation and memory resources needed for autonomous operation. In this work, we present LOCUS 2.0, a robust and computationally-efficient \lidar odometry system for real-time underground 3D mapping. LOCUS 2.0 includes a novel normals-based \morrell{Generalized Iterative Closest Point (GICP)} formulation that reduces the computation time of point cloud alignment, an adaptive voxel grid filter that maintains the desired computation load regardless of the environment's geometry, and a sliding-window map approach that bounds the memory consumption. The proposed approach is shown to be suitable to be deployed on heterogeneous robotic platforms involved in large-scale explorations under severe computation and memory constraints. We demonstrate LOCUS 2.0, a key element of the CoSTAR team's entry in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, across various underground scenarios. We release LOCUS 2.0 as an open-source library and also release a \lidar-based odometry dataset in challenging and large-scale underground environments. The dataset features legged and wheeled platforms in multiple environments including fog, dust, darkness, and geometrically degenerate surroundings with a total of $11~h$ of operations and $16~km$ of distance traveled.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达里程计作为在复杂的 GNSS 拒绝环境中运行的自主机器人的强大定位方法，引起了相当大的关注。然而，由于自主操作所需的板载计算和内存资源的限制，在大规模环境中的异构平台上实现可靠且高效的性能仍然是一个开放的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LOCUS 2.0，这是一个强大且计算高效的激光雷达测距系统，用于实时地下 3D 测绘。 LOCUS 2.0 包括一种新颖的基于法线的 \morrell{广义迭代最近点 (GICP)} 公式（可减少点云对齐的计算时间）、一个自适应体素网格滤波器（无论环境的几何形状如何都能维持所需的计算负载）以及一种限制内存消耗的滑动窗口贴图方法。所提出的方法被证明适合部署在异构机器人平台上，这些平台涉及严格的计算和内存限制下的大规模探索。我们在各种地下场景中演示了 LOCUS 2.0，这是 CoSTAR 团队参加 DARPA 地下挑战赛的关键要素。我们将 LOCUS 2.0 作为开源库发布，并在具有挑战性的大规模地下环境中发布基于激光雷达的里程计数据集。该数据集具有多种环境中的腿式和轮式平台，包括雾、灰尘、黑暗和几何退化环境，总共运行了 11~h$ 美元，行驶了 16~km$ 距离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LOCUS 2.0系统，用于实现实时地下3D地图的鲁棒且计算高效的激光雷达里程计算法。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达里程计算法在大规模复杂地下环境中因计算和内存限制难以满足异构平台的实时需求。
AI.method: 采用基于法线的广义迭代最近点（GICP）算法加速点云对齐，结合自适应体素网格滤波器控制计算负载，并通过滑动窗口地图策略限制内存消耗。
AI.result: LOCUS 2.0在多种地下场景中验证有效，作为CoSTAR团队DARPA地下挑战赛的核心技术，并开源了包含11小时操作数据和16公里轨迹的激光雷达里程数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为计算资源受限的地下大范围探索提供了高效的激光雷达里程解决方案，并通过开源工具和数据集推动了相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Hideya Ochiai,Yuwei Sun,Qingzhe Jin,Nattanon Wongwiwatchai,Hiroshi Esaki
title: Wireless Ad Hoc Federated Learning: A Fully Distributed Cooperative Machine Learning
title_zh: 无线自组织联合学习：完全分布式协作机器学习
abstract: Privacy-sensitive data is stored in autonomous vehicles, smart devices, or sensor nodes that can move around with making opportunistic contact with each other. Federation among such nodes was mainly discussed in the context of federated learning with a centralized mechanism in many works. However, because of multi-vendor issues, those nodes do not want to rely on a specific server operated by a third party for this purpose. In this paper, we propose a wireless ad hoc federated learning (WAFL) -- a fully distributed cooperative machine learning organized by the nodes physically nearby. WAFL can develop generalized models from Non-IID datasets stored in distributed nodes locally by exchanging and aggregating them with each other over opportunistic node-to-node contacts. In our benchmark-based evaluation with various opportunistic networks, WAFL has achieved higher accuracy of 94.8-96.3% than the self-training case of 84.7%. All our evaluation results show that WAFL can train and converge the model parameters from highly-partitioned Non-IID datasets over opportunistic networks without any centralized mechanisms.
summary: Privacy-sensitive data is stored in autonomous vehicles, smart devices, or sensor nodes that can move around with making opportunistic contact with each other. Federation among such nodes was mainly discussed in the context of federated learning with a centralized mechanism in many works. However, because of multi-vendor issues, those nodes do not want to rely on a specific server operated by a third party for this purpose. In this paper, we propose a wireless ad hoc federated learning (WAFL) -- a fully distributed cooperative machine learning organized by the nodes physically nearby. WAFL can develop generalized models from Non-IID datasets stored in distributed nodes locally by exchanging and aggregating them with each other over opportunistic node-to-node contacts. In our benchmark-based evaluation with various opportunistic networks, WAFL has achieved higher accuracy of 94.8-96.3% than the self-training case of 84.7%. All our evaluation results show that WAFL can train and converge the model parameters from highly-partitioned Non-IID datasets over opportunistic networks without any centralized mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 隐私敏感数据存储在自动驾驶车辆、智能设备或传感器节点中，这些节点可以四处移动并进行机会性接触。在许多工作中，这些节点之间的联邦主要是在具有集中机制的联邦学习的背景下讨论的。然而，由于多供应商问题，这些节点不希望为此目的依赖第三方运营的特定服务器。在本文中，我们提出了一种无线自组织联合学习（WAFL）——一种由物理上附近的节点组织的完全分布式协作机器学习。 WAFL 可以通过机会性节点到节点接触相互交换和聚合本地分布式节点中存储的非独立同分布数据集，从而开发通用模型。在我们使用各种机会网络进行的基于基准的评估中，WAFL 的准确率达到了 94.8-96.3%，比自训练情况的 84.7% 更高。我们所有的评估结果都表明，WAFL 可以通过机会网络从高度分区的非独立同分布数据集训练和收敛模型参数，而无需任何集中机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无线自组网络联邦学习（WAFL）框架，用于在无需中心服务器的情况下实现分布式节点间的协同机器学习。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习依赖中心化服务器存在多厂商兼容性问题，而移动设备间的偶发接触需要一种无需第三方服务器的自主协作机制。
AI.method: 通过节点间偶发接触直接交换和聚合模型参数，利用本地非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据进行分布式模型训练。
AI.result: 在多种机会网络环境下，WAFL模型准确率达到94.8%-96.3%，显著优于自训练方法的84.7%。
AI.conclusion: WAFL验证了在无中心化机制下，通过节点自主协作可有效训练高分区Non-IID数据集的机器学习模型。

search_text: Wireless Ad Hoc Federated Learning: A Fully Distributed Cooperative Machine Learning 无线自组织联合学习：完全分布式协作机器学习 Privacy-sensitive data is stored in autonomous vehicles, smart devices, or sensor nodes that can move around with making opportunistic contact with each other. Federation among such nodes was mainly discussed in the context of federated learning with a centralized mechanism in many works. However, because of multi-vendor issues, those nodes do not want to rely on a specific server operated by a third party for this purpose. In this paper, we propose a wireless ad hoc federated learning (WAFL) -- a fully distributed cooperative machine learning organized by the nodes physically nearby. WAFL can develop generalized models from Non-IID datasets stored in distributed nodes locally by exchanging and aggregating them with each other over opportunistic node-to-node contacts. In our benchmark-based evaluation with various opportunistic networks, WAFL has achieved higher accuracy of 94.8-96.3% than the self-training case of 84.7%. All our evaluation results show that WAFL can train and converge the model parameters from highly-partitioned Non-IID datasets over opportunistic networks without any centralized mechanisms. 隐私敏感数据存储在自动驾驶车辆、智能设备或传感器节点中，这些节点可以四处移动并进行机会性接触。在许多工作中，这些节点之间的联邦主要是在具有集中机制的联邦学习的背景下讨论的。然而，由于多供应商问题，这些节点不希望为此目的依赖第三方运营的特定服务器。在本文中，我们提出了一种无线自组织联合学习（WAFL）——一种由物理上附近的节点组织的完全分布式协作机器学习。 WAFL 可以通过机会性节点到节点接触相互交换和聚合本地分布式节点中存储的非独立同分布数据集，从而开发通用模型。在我们使用各种机会网络进行的基于基准的评估中，WAFL 的准确率达到了 94.8-96.3%，比自训练情况的 84.7% 更高。我们所有的评估结果都表明，WAFL 可以通过机会网络从高度分区的非独立同分布数据集训练和收敛模型参数，而无需任何集中机制。 本文提出了一种无线自组网络联邦学习（WAFL）框架，用于在无需中心服务器的情况下实现分布式节点间的协同机器学习。 Hideya Ochiai,Yuwei Sun,Qingzhe Jin,Nattanon Wongwiwatchai,Hiroshi Esaki cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI

title: Constrained Monotonic Neural Networks
title_zh: 约束单调神经网络
abstract: Wider adoption of neural networks in many critical domains such as finance and healthcare is being hindered by the need to explain their predictions and to impose additional constraints on them. Monotonicity constraint is one of the most requested properties in real-world scenarios and is the focus of this paper. One of the oldest ways to construct a monotonic fully connected neural network is to constrain signs on its weights. Unfortunately, this construction does not work with popular non-saturated activation functions as it can only approximate convex functions. We show this shortcoming can be fixed by constructing two additional activation functions from a typical unsaturated monotonic activation function and employing each of them on the part of neurons. Our experiments show this approach of building monotonic neural networks has better accuracy when compared to other state-of-the-art methods, while being the simplest one in the sense of having the least number of parameters, and not requiring any modifications to the learning procedure or post-learning steps. Finally, we prove it can approximate any continuous monotone function on a compact subset of $\mathbb{R}^n$.
summary: Wider adoption of neural networks in many critical domains such as finance and healthcare is being hindered by the need to explain their predictions and to impose additional constraints on them. Monotonicity constraint is one of the most requested properties in real-world scenarios and is the focus of this paper. One of the oldest ways to construct a monotonic fully connected neural network is to constrain signs on its weights. Unfortunately, this construction does not work with popular non-saturated activation functions as it can only approximate convex functions. We show this shortcoming can be fixed by constructing two additional activation functions from a typical unsaturated monotonic activation function and employing each of them on the part of neurons. Our experiments show this approach of building monotonic neural networks has better accuracy when compared to other state-of-the-art methods, while being the simplest one in the sense of having the least number of parameters, and not requiring any modifications to the learning procedure or post-learning steps. Finally, we prove it can approximate any continuous monotone function on a compact subset of $\mathbb{R}^n$.
abstract_zh: 由于需要解释其预测并对其施加额外的限制，神经网络在金融和医疗保健等许多关键领域的更广泛采用受到阻碍。单调性约束是现实场景中最需要的属性之一，也是本文的重点。构建单调全连接神经网络最古老的方法之一是限制其权重的符号。不幸的是，这种结构不适用于流行的非饱和激活函数，因为它只能近似凸函数。我们证明这个缺点可以通过从典型的不饱和单调激活函数构造两个额外的激活函数并在神经元部分使用它们中的每一个来解决。我们的实验表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，这种构建单调神经网络的方法具有更高的准确性，同时在参数数量最少的意义上是最简单的方法，并且不需要对学习过程或学习后步骤进行任何修改。最后，我们证明它可以逼近 $\mathbb{R}^n$ 的紧凑子集上的任何连续单调函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种构建单调神经网络的新方法，通过改进激活函数解决传统方法在非饱和激活函数下的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有单调神经网络方法在使用非饱和激活函数时仅能逼近凸函数，无法满足实际应用中对复杂单调函数的建模需求。
AI.method: 构造两种新型激活函数，基于常见非饱和单调激活函数，并分别应用于神经元的不同部分以实现单调性约束。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在准确率上优于现有方法，参数量最少且无需修改训练流程，理论上可逼近任意连续单调函数。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在保持简单性的同时提升了单调神经网络的表达能力，为实际应用提供了更有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Van-Nhiem Tran,Chi-En Huang,Shen-Hsuan Liu,Kai-Lin Yang,Timothy Ko,Yung-Hui Li
title: Multi-Augmentation for Efficient Visual Representation Learning for Self-supervised Pre-training
title_zh: 用于自监督预训练的高效视觉表示学习的多重增强
abstract: In recent years, self-supervised learning has been studied to deal with the limitation of available labeled-dataset. Among the major components of self-supervised learning, the data augmentation pipeline is one key factor in enhancing the resulting performance. However, most researchers manually designed the augmentation pipeline, and the limited collections of transformation may cause the lack of robustness of the learned feature representation. In this work, we proposed Multi-Augmentations for Self-Supervised Representation Learning (MA-SSRL), which fully searched for various augmentation policies to build the entire pipeline to improve the robustness of the learned feature representation. MA-SSRL successfully learns the invariant feature representation and presents an efficient, effective, and adaptable data augmentation pipeline for self-supervised pre-training on different distribution and domain datasets. MA-SSRL outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods on transfer and semi-supervised benchmarks while requiring fewer training epochs.
summary: In recent years, self-supervised learning has been studied to deal with the limitation of available labeled-dataset. Among the major components of self-supervised learning, the data augmentation pipeline is one key factor in enhancing the resulting performance. However, most researchers manually designed the augmentation pipeline, and the limited collections of transformation may cause the lack of robustness of the learned feature representation. In this work, we proposed Multi-Augmentations for Self-Supervised Representation Learning (MA-SSRL), which fully searched for various augmentation policies to build the entire pipeline to improve the robustness of the learned feature representation. MA-SSRL successfully learns the invariant feature representation and presents an efficient, effective, and adaptable data augmentation pipeline for self-supervised pre-training on different distribution and domain datasets. MA-SSRL outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods on transfer and semi-supervised benchmarks while requiring fewer training epochs.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们开始研究自监督学习来解决可用标记数据集的限制。在自监督学习的主要组成部分中，数据增强管道是提高最终性能的关键因素之一。然而，大多数研究人员手动设计了增强管道，有限的变换集合可能会导致学习到的特征表示缺乏鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了自监督表示学习的多重增强（MA-SSRL），它充分搜索各种增强策略来构建整个管道，以提高学习到的特征表示的鲁棒性。 MA-SSRL 成功学习了不变的特征表示，并提出了一种高效、有效且适应性强的数据增强管道，用于在不同分布和域数据集上进行自监督预训练。 MA-SSRL 在迁移和半监督基准方面优于以前最先进的方法，同时需要更少的训练周期。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MA-SSRL的多增强方法，用于改进自监督预训练中的视觉表征学习。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习中的数据增强策略多为人工设计，导致特征表示鲁棒性不足，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 通过全面搜索多种增强策略构建完整增强管道，学习领域不变的特征表示，提升模型适应性。
AI.result: 在迁移学习和半监督基准测试中优于现有最先进方法，且训练周期更短。
AI.conclusion: MA-SSRL为自监督预训练提供了高效、通用的数据增强框架，适用于不同分布和领域的数据集。

MA-SSRL outperforms the previous state-of-the-art methods on transfer and semi-supervised benchmarks while requiring fewer training epochs. 近年来，人们开始研究自监督学习来解决可用标记数据集的限制。在自监督学习的主要组成部分中，数据增强管道是提高最终性能的关键因素之一。然而，大多数研究人员手动设计了增强管道，有限的变换集合可能会导致学习到的特征表示缺乏鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了自监督表示学习的多重增强（MA-SSRL），它充分搜索各种增强策略来构建整个管道，以提高学习到的特征表示的鲁棒性。 MA-SSRL 成功学习了不变的特征表示，并提出了一种高效、有效且适应性强的数据增强管道，用于在不同分布和域数据集上进行自监督预训练。 MA-SSRL 在迁移和半监督基准方面优于以前最先进的方法，同时需要更少的训练周期。 本文提出了一种名为MA-SSRL的多增强方法，用于改进自监督预训练中的视觉表征学习。 Van-Nhiem Tran,Chi-En Huang,Shen-Hsuan Liu,Kai-Lin Yang,Timothy Ko,Yung-Hui Li cs.CV

authors_text: Banghua Zhu,Lun Wang,Qi Pang,Shuai Wang,Jiantao Jiao,Dawn Song,Michael I. Jordan
title: Byzantine-Robust Federated Learning with Optimal Statistical Rates and Privacy Guarantees
title_zh: 具有最佳统计率和隐私保证的拜占庭稳健联邦学习
abstract: We propose Byzantine-robust federated learning protocols with nearly optimal statistical rates. In contrast to prior work, our proposed protocols improve the dimension dependence and achieve a tight statistical rate in terms of all the parameters for strongly convex losses. We benchmark against competing protocols and show the empirical superiority of the proposed protocols. Finally, we remark that our protocols with bucketing can be naturally combined with privacy-guaranteeing procedures to introduce security against a semi-honest server. The code for evaluation is provided in https://github.com/wanglun1996/secure-robust-federated-learning.
summary: We propose Byzantine-robust federated learning protocols with nearly optimal statistical rates. In contrast to prior work, our proposed protocols improve the dimension dependence and achieve a tight statistical rate in terms of all the parameters for strongly convex losses. We benchmark against competing protocols and show the empirical superiority of the proposed protocols. Finally, we remark that our protocols with bucketing can be naturally combined with privacy-guaranteeing procedures to introduce security against a semi-honest server. The code for evaluation is provided in https://github.com/wanglun1996/secure-robust-federated-learning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了具有近乎最佳统计率的拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习协议。与之前的工作相比，我们提出的协议改善了维度依赖性，并在强凸损失的所有参数方面实现了严格的统计率。我们以竞争协议为基准，并展示了所提出协议的经验优越性。最后，我们指出，我们的分桶协议可以自然地与隐私保证程序结合起来，以引入针对半诚实服务器的安全性。 https://github.com/wanglun1996/secure-robust-federated-learning 中提供了评估代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出具有最优统计速率和隐私保障的拜占庭容错联邦学习协议。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法在拜占庭容错性、统计效率及隐私保护方面存在不足，需改进维度依赖性并实现更优理论保证。
AI.method: 设计改进的拜占庭鲁棒协议，优化维度依赖性以达到强凸损失函数的紧统计速率，并通过分桶技术结合隐私保护机制。
AI.result: 实验验证协议在统计速率上优于竞品方法，且能有效结合隐私保护对抗半诚实服务器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的协议在理论分析和实验中均表现优越，为安全联邦学习提供了高效且隐私友好的解决方案。
